Did you vote for President Trump and Republicans? If you could, do us a quick favor and help us correct our records. Friend, As the ballot counting process continues, _**we have to make sure every single voice in CA-45 is heard. **_ After all, that is the American Dream — making sure our democracy is representative of all of our beliefs, values, and voices. That is what my parents believed in when they came to America. It’s what I believed when I signed up to serve in the Army, and when I decided to run for this seat — and it’s the belief that is fueling my team now. [My team and I need your support to make sure democracy is upheld and that every lawful vote is counted. Hi Peter,
---
I hope you are doing well. Although the election is over, I wanted to keep you in the loop on my next steps as Representative-elect for MN-03 in Congress. This week, I started New Member Orientation in DC! The evening before my first day, I was honored to join Jen Psaki on her show, ‘Inside with Jen Psaki’ on MSNBC, to talk about my role as the **_first_** and **_only_** pro-choice OB-GYN in Congress. You can **[**watch a clip of the interview here**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/97106410/512298398/-1498310525?source=241114_jp_cu&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTkvMS8xMDkzOTAiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiMzJjOTU5ZDAtZTRhMi1lZjExLTg4ZDAtNjA0NWJkZDYyZGI2IiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=ANHOR-Qx7qABqtwzZqqpwfQdcvzuL7fJ2pSUG5dBgyA=&emci=2d060771-e3a2-ef11-88d0-6045bdd62db6&emdi=32c959d0-e4a2-ef11-88d0-6045bdd62db6&ceid=26798886)**!

name: Christina Bohannan
subject: Thank you for waiting
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Christina Bohannan for Congress
body:
| [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/97106491/512299056/-678669148?refcode=em_logoheader&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MjIyOCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhMDZmNTRkNi1lNGEyLWVmMTEtODhkMC02MDQ1YmRkNjJkYjYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Qik6fzPY-wH3REVKjnkorQ_UPtPkSJSYTPk71IdCvPw=)

Peter,

I want to personally thank you for your patience and commitment as we await the final outcome of this race. As you might be aware, it’s been a little over one week since Election Day, and Iowa’s 1st Congressional District race still remains incredibly close.

To make absolutely certain that every voter is heard, our campaign will request a recount in all 20 counties across the district, as permitted by Iowa law. We have full trust in this process and will accept the results, no matter the outcome. This transparent, precinct-level recount will ensure every lawful vote is counted and reported accurately so that all Iowans can feel confident in the result.

From the very beginning, we knew this would be a true “toss-up.” We did the work – every phone call, every door knock, every conversation shared, and every dollar donated made a tremendous impact. It’s because of that unwavering commitment that we’re here today.

**We knew how close this race would be – remember, Mariannette Miller-Meeks won by only six votes in the last presidential election. That’s why I’m incredibly proud of what we’ve built together, and every step we’ve taken has led us to this moment.**

[**So, will you pitch in today to support our recount efforts and ensure every vote is counted and every voice respected?**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/97106494/512299058/-678669148?refcode=em24_241114_recoun_fnd_gq_act___cb_ettx&utm_campaign=em24_241114_recoun_fnd_gq_act___cb_ettx&utm_medium=email&refcode2=a06f54d6-e4a2-ef11-88d0-6045bdd62db6&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MjIyOCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhMDZmNTRkNi1lNGEyLWVmMTEtODhkMC02MDQ1YmRkNjJkYjYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Qik6fzPY-wH3REVKjnkorQ_UPtPkSJSYTPk71IdCvPw=)
[DONATE](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/97106495/512299062/-678669148?refcode=em24_241114_recoun_fnd_gq_act___cb_ettx&utm_campaign=em24_241114_recoun_fnd_gq_act___cb_ettx&utm_medium=email&refcode2=a06f54d6-e4a2-ef11-88d0-6045bdd62db6&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MjIyOCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhMDZmNTRkNi1lNGEyLWVmMTEtODhkMC02MDQ1YmRkNjJkYjYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Qik6fzPY-wH3REVKjnkorQ_UPtPkSJSYTPk71IdCvPw=)

Thank you for your faith, passion, and for standing by my side every step of the way. Let’s keep that hope alive together as we take this next step.

With gratitude,

Christina

clean_body: | = Peter, I want to personally thank you for your patience and commitment as we await the final outcome of this race. As you might be aware, it’s been a little over one week since Election Day, and Iowa’s 1st Congressional District race still remains incredibly close. To make absolutely certain that every voter is heard, our campaign will request a recount in all 20 counties across the district, as permitted by Iowa law. We have full trust in this process and will accept the results, no matter the outcome. This transparent, precinct-level recount will ensure every lawful vote is counted and reported accurately so that all Iowans can feel confident in the result. From the very beginning, we knew this would be a true “toss-up.” We did the work – every phone call, every door knock, every conversation shared, and every dollar donated made a tremendous impact. It’s because of that unwavering commitment that we’re here today. We knew how close this race would be – remember, Mariannette Miller-Meeks won by only six votes in the last presidential election. That’s why I’m incredibly proud of what we’ve built together, and every step we’ve taken has led us to this moment. = = Thank you for your faith, passion, and for standing by my side every step of the way. Let’s keep that hope alive together as we take this next step. With gratitude, Christina = | Paid for by Christina Bohannan for Congress Christina Bohannan for Congress PO Box 722 Iowa City, IA 52244 United States If you believe you received this message in error or wish to no longer receive email from us, please .

name: Elizabeth Warren
subject: Trump is already breaking the law
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Warren for Senate
body:
I would know — I wrote the law.

| | | [ ](https://act.elizabethwarren.com/go/216?t=3&akid=2415%2E4032634%2EzKqR1W)
---
We are just over one week since the election, and Donald Trump and his transition team are already breaking the law. I would know — I wrote the law. You see, an earlier law, the Presidential Transition Act, was passed in 1963 to ensure a smooth transfer of executive powers between administrations. Its aim is to prevent any government disruptions that would harm the American public or our national security. I authored the Transition Team Ethics Improvement Act to add new ethical standards to that law, like:
* Requiring eligible presidential candidates to develop and release transition team ethics plans and disclose how they will address their own conflicts of interest before the election. These disclosures are required by October 1st in an election year, providing the public with the opportunity to assess candidates' ethics plans prior to a general election;
* Requiring transition team members to sign an ethics-specific code of conduct; and
* Establishing a set of minimum requirements for transition team ethics plans, including information about how the transition team will enforce a code of ethical conduct and address the role of lobbyists on transition teams.

These provisions of my bill were included in bipartisan legislation that was enacted in 2020. But Trump and his transition team have not signed the legally required ethics agreement. This is what illegal corruption looks like. Plain and simple. **We already knew that Trump didn’t respect the law. That’s been proven in court. But I won’t accept standing idly by and watching as he swats away ethics requirements and bulldozes checks and balances — and we need to call out and fight back against this corruption with every chance we get.** **[Add your name if you’re with me: Trump must follow the rule of law and sign the ethics agreements required under the Presidential Transition Act.](https://act.elizabethwarren.com/signup/ew-em-prez-transition/?source=EMZ23W_GOP_E_20241114_V1S1&t=8&akid=2415%2E4032634%2EzKqR1W)** | [**ADD MY NAME**](https://act.elizabethwarren.com/signup/ew-em-prez-transition/?source=EMZ23W_GOP_E_20241114_V1S1&t=9&akid=2415%2E4032634%2EzKqR1W)
---
We already saw Donald Trump run the most corrupt administration in modern history.
That’s one of the biggest reasons why I introduced these ethics enhancements to the Presidential Transition Act.
It’s simple: The American people should have complete confidence that government officials — including those running presidential transitions — are making decisions with only one factor in mind: the public interest. Not their own financial interests. Not the interests of big donors and giant corporations. The public interest.
I’m going to keep up the fight to demand that Trump and his transition team follow this law — and I’m also going to keep up the fight for broad anti-corruption reform, like banning members of Congress and federal judges from owning and trading individual stocks and imposing an enforceable code of conduct on the Supreme Court.
[**Together we can demonstrate that the American people do not accept this. Add your name if you’re with me: The Trump administration must uphold the rule of law.**](https://act.elizabethwarren.com/signup/ew-em-prez-transition/?source=EMZ23W_GOP_E_20241114_V1S1&t=10&akid=2415%2E4032634%2EzKqR1W)
Thanks for being a part of this,
Elizabeth

I went after Big Pharma, Big Polluters, gun rights activists, landlords – and now, I'm holding one of the most powerful and corrupt men in the nation accountable.
But to be honest, these corrupt (and well-funded) enemies of mine are going to dive deep into my fundraising numbers to find any weaknesses they're able to. They're going to want a fight, and I need to show that I have a powerful team standing with me. That's where you come in, Peter.

body:
| My name is Adam Gray and I’m the Democratic nominee in California’s 13th Congressional District.

When I ran for this seat in 2022, our race came down to just 564 votes. It was the second-closest race in the entire country.

This year, I know that we can finish the job.

Right now, our race is _**still too close to call**_ and we know it’s going to come down to every last vote.

body:
| Fellow American,

Our Senate majority is coming down to [**Pennsylvania**.](http://links.g4yamerica.com/u/click?_t=cc7dda5c2cc64061900678c88bd3a18a&_m=78e3ca94dd0d44b2ad03d2763bdda9e1&_e=2hWKEV_ETqy5-CPnofZI5zHB3z9QYPdfPWywHY4uNhZkp4_NNZlaqmRa9ABSSrp1bv88wAFo3EI-MfR05muiLBcwyMDe9Q4WSK7PzMdE1m4RboOQ6PaIqMDAOSb-ImCYiS_YhftCmZ_0c0ekHAjvFTI4UeWBey2r-NfQ13VpfZJtKzOwGVdeiqK2nsDzzfpwk2nIsZhkfKW32WezGn2K2Jf5BGaJNWGI2ocrwPhbnVTl7ble9G88814c6BudS0suLJgMPAIJiOpXCvL9k1S8tS6qANP4I3rey9909xXCXcAX2Lyw9p9JOl6kmlpeCywj4J9c2buGpDxJTyfotezxUAwDrZEOZWaBq0lTFXN0exK1L9WR8As9Jd4DMQm1Rottx11bHtCJdVWxCHrlW5q5wGbFMCGGHLmf9ypYnzRGUobSdZ5mDuOSXH-1E2pkLpiRPXg5Vhhp1lQAXaHBbDrwA4GKVi0-5K4_S2qSw9WrDnA%3D)

Right now, we have a razor-thin Republican Senate majority. We can’t let the new Republican Senate majority slip away after we have worked so hard this year.

But that is precisely what will happen if we don’t step up today to support Dave McCormick in his fight against Chuck Schumer’s corrupt lawyers.

Then there are the legal fees Dave will have to pay to repel Chuck Schumer’s army of dirty trickster Democrat lawyers.

It will cost millions more to protect this new Senate Republican majority, and we can’t let Dave McCormick down when he needs us MOST.

These numbers aren’t exact, so please don’t hold it against us, but according to the Pew Research Center, the average cost per ballot for recounting Senate elections is 15 cents.

These vital races involve millions of votes.

Can Senate Republicans count on Fellow American to send $30 or more today to fund recount efforts for 200 ballots? [**Please chip in whatever you can spare today to help where it’s needed most.**](http://links.g4yamerica.com/u/click?_t=cc7dda5c2cc64061900678c88bd3a18a&_m=78e3ca94dd0d44b2ad03d2763bdda9e1&_e=2hWKEV_ETqy5-CPnofZI5zHB3z9QYPdfPWywHY4uNhZkp4_NNZlaqmRa9ABSSrp1bv88wAFo3EI-MfR05muiLBcwyMDe9Q4WSK7PzMdE1m4RboOQ6PaIqMDAOSb-ImCYiS_YhftCmZ_0c0ekHAjvFTI4UeWBey2r-NfQ13VpfZJtKzOwGVdeiqK2nsDzzfpwk2nIsZhkfKW32WezGn2K2Jf5BGaJNWGI2ocrwPhbnVTl7ble9G88814c6BudS0suLJgMPAIJiOpXCvL9k1S8tS6qANP4I3rey9909xXCXcAX2Lyw9p9JOl6kmlpeCywjAY6XC2bLhQfa6_73BIMwoJn6aYQs8ibDxhn8wofgoxB3ZfgS3wHFrcjKMD-FeenuuPRpuobhrrf20z3_GEQr84OmKFBznWQLNdA34_UeDMWdVnj-yXRMWkyTWVAtTCHr3ACjSmjOa-YTeQQATI2QIuFl7emeVvS4usU8n-Qy9-w%3D)

[**DONATE $30 TO DAVE MCCORMICK >>>**](http://links.g4yamerica.com/u/click?_t=cc7dda5c2cc64061900678c88bd3a18a&_m=78e3ca94dd0d44b2ad03d2763bdda9e1&_e=2hWKEV_ETqy5-CPnofZI5zHB3z9QYPdfPWywHY4uNhZkp4_NNZlaqmRa9ABSSrp1bv88wAFo3EI-MfR05muiLBcwyMDe9Q4WSK7PzMdE1m4RboOQ6PaIqMDAOSb-ImCYiS_YhftCmZ_0c0ekHAjvFTI4UeWBey2r-NfQ13VpfZJtKzOwGVdeiqK2nsDzzfpwk2nIsZhkfKW32WezGn2K2Jf5BGaJNWGI2ocrwPhbnVTl7ble9G88814c6BudS0suLJgMPAIJiOpXCvL9k1S8tS6qANP4I3rey9909xXCXcAX2Lyw9p9JOl6kmlpeCywjhj0wQU5FUYoeDRU7ma40E-MbuyqdXn3KagkQ_AAK2mcGHOyg2R42Vi9AfDMw2eLUQNFlr4NHZESUREyz8PCKydQI7RwpW_atLhVsV6yRsReSr16FbcEvfYmNsNSmYXhq4cyxzDTmA3oQxZLiQLET5lIlHHUZBNkLfioyczFL6_Q%3D)

Then there are the legal fees Dave will have to pay to repel Chuck Schumer’s army of dirty trickster Democrat lawyers. It will cost millions more to protect this new Senate Republican majority, and we can’t let Dave McCormick down when he needs us MOST. These numbers aren’t exact, so please don’t hold it against us, but according to the Pew Research Center, the average cost per ballot for recounting Senate elections is 15 cents. These vital races involve millions of votes. Can Senate Republicans count on Fellow American to send $30 or more today to fund recount efforts for 200 ballots? Don’t forget that the recount costs are just the tip of the iceberg; Dave McCormick also must fend off far-Left lawyers in court, and that could be even more expensive. To Victory! body:
[](http://links.conservativeum.com/u/click?_t=26c2e4aa9bbe40418f61e26972138f21&_m=a8c7c7ef9e034f17a8775f3f411efcfa&_e=UjrC28byVqTV7HVmlqpAxqBvT4lHTcxpti2Xu-KtpVV8d4tWhERBy7ZUxHnq7lBwsxSWO12bO3uLYy11H7ACb-JliOlenGmcADbeDuJKv1hVkhPI_lYXqKNp4oQEVR9fCTrJ-3LZ8Mi2jhMqFYZa89YEh3vbyWwUJXT2fKGyhHjFAxKYgbLJQr3yFai4ly2q5kz4mEu5BfTyqQS_i8Fs27DLG6NnJlkvHbjx6QugyaI8ERQnuYGiX-PXjQEvONY1jGwpUSWdgWgxMkhSfJbZkXPr0C9kcFTWuQfkreghlST4ir179ixsHlRT7mI2iweRk0sQshxfcrBtmm02WEXyKRe18NtTKOBUlbqXVQpGG14MCpEfIcO_Ua8kqcDcVkbnHzltRXCo2tYuYC_zwxW6yg%3D%3D "Tuttle Twins")

Peter,

This is unlike anything I've written you. It may seem long but I have to explain to you why I'm optimistic for the future of our nation, and If you stay with me here, then I will even deliver you a book.

Let's start by showing where our education system currently stands:

[](http://links.conservativeum.com/u/click?_t=26c2e4aa9bbe40418f61e26972138f21&_m=a8c7c7ef9e034f17a8775f3f411efcfa&_e=UjrC28byVqTV7HVmlqpAxqBvT4lHTcxpti2Xu-KtpVV8d4tWhERBy7ZUxHnq7lBwsxSWO12bO3uLYy11H7ACb-JliOlenGmcADbeDuJKv1hVkhPI_lYXqKNp4oQEVR9fCTrJ-3LZ8Mi2jhMqFYZa89YEh3vbyWwUJXT2fKGyhHjFAxKYgbLJQr3yFai4ly2q5kz4mEu5BfTyqQS_i8Fs27DLG6NnJlkvHbjx6QugyaLBswR0bi3YCPxnAzmv8NU1Qmvi0m_BxnJGHD1FhGiJyIOqm0snyU2I77R6XWy3_m5RW8tGRl6OX6OOrsgSJ5YgQXxkLR1TC3WnsNj3eZyXuDiMgyNYBZaf9FZV75QtyHN7KxEku0dAFvxU1LtwkULSnWGGelJK4SCKozUhogsWWG8t1QZfduSNUaZkcSHjoic%3D)

See the bright red line?

That's the growth of administrative staff... aka woke administrators who enforce D.E.I., CRT, and other nonsense onto our kids. Ever hear the phrase "Go woke. Go broke." That's our educational system.

Fortunately, there is a solution that is turning the tide to educate our country's youth against the dangers of socialism and teach young people about the ideas of liberty.

And this is why I'm optimistic. Because there are students standing up.

The solution? _The Tuttle Twins_.

_The Tuttle Twins_ teaches kids about free markets, individual liberty, limited government, and personal responsibility.

And it's working...

Before I give you real stories of students fighting back, I must first ask how you can help. My personal friend Connor Boyack is the author of _The Tuttle Twins_. He is on a mission to distribute an additional 1,000,000 copies of the books.

[I am humbly asking you to help me raise $50,000 to distribute copies of The Tuttle Twins to schools, libraries, and families. It costs roughly $10 to distribute one copy. Can you chip in $10, $20, $40, or even $200 today?](http://links.conservativeum.com/u/click?_t=26c2e4aa9bbe40418f61e26972138f21&_m=a8c7c7ef9e034f17a8775f3f411efcfa&_e=UjrC28byVqTV7HVmlqpAxqBvT4lHTcxpti2Xu-KtpVV8d4tWhERBy7ZUxHnq7lBwsxSWO12bO3uLYy11H7ACb-JliOlenGmcADbeDuJKv1hVkhPI_lYXqKNp4oQEVR9fCTrJ-3LZ8Mi2jhMqFYZa89YEh3vbyWwUJXT2fKGyhHjFAxKYgbLJQr3yFai4ly2q5kz4mEu5BfTyqQS_i8Fs27DLG6NnJlkvHbjx6QugyaJTmcU-0744Hu6b8bwAtvOATN-d5EI35tGwzwSwUNcukPU5PM_DXLD2RfdiODFO9l2wcjDc7bJb10_8CuzE4mPVFRwJ-v_DeheAcmjayiIj_N0FnJMhScRJDvnXz6e0mif3_RWe7DOymqscXmXcZyLTHEZ-6fUCYc-A0A8l8Z8bpHwTorIjdg105Zi-uZrHGvs%3D)

Here's my favorite example of _The Tuttle Twins_ inspiring the next generation:

A public school in Colorado kicked Jaiden out of class. His crime? He wore a Gadsden flag patch on his backpack.

[](http://links.conservativeum.com/u/click?_t=26c2e4aa9bbe40418f61e26972138f21&_m=a8c7c7ef9e034f17a8775f3f411efcfa&_e=UjrC28byVqTV7HVmlqpAxqBvT4lHTcxpti2Xu-KtpVV8d4tWhERBy7ZUxHnq7lBwsxSWO12bO3uLYy11H7ACb-JliOlenGmcADbeDuJKv1hVkhPI_lYXqKNp4oQEVR9fCTrJ-3LZ8Mi2jhMqFYZa89YEh3vbyWwUJXT2fKGyhHjFAxKYgbLJQr3yFai4ly2q5kz4mEu5BfTyqQS_i8Fs27DLG6NnJlkvHbjx6QugyaIhkpCcI-Ud6OVDCIuuVysX7q9WDwIezzuuTR0v5YYyHsRxZegP3_2pQNzrhbaaBn1gOgUiYzm7v728KbbHY60FMeSVlS8xopxjGHOTRJ2mlUwnmRnJ-JRO5tzgGcbSUcdw5-ECzswtTKIQo-QaA48377pwv1t_P37eYTy-t_ppZtIRcPYgzY-cFFqf32Ndih8%3D)

The director at Vanguard School, where Jaiden attends, believed that this historical flag has "origins with slavery" and was "disruptive to the classroom environment." He told Jaiden's mother that the boy could not return to class unless the patch was removed.

Jaiden refused to remove the patch. Good for him!

In an emergency meeting, the school board voted to allow Jaiden to wear the patch. That was a quick victory!

Jaiden is a special kid. He stands up for his beliefs. More importantly, he stands up for the truth. As his mom explained to me, he's been reading the Tuttle Twins books for years and learning about freedom. Then, it came time for him to do something about it.

**What if we could teach an entire generation to be like Jaiden?**

_We can._

clean_body: "Tuttle Twins" Peter, This is unlike anything I've written you. It may seem long but I have to explain to you why I'm optimistic for the future of our nation, and If you stay with me here, then I will even deliver you a book. Let's start by showing where our education system currently stands: See the bright red line? That's the growth of administrative staff... aka woke administrators who enforce D.E.I., CRT, and other nonsense onto our kids. Ever hear the phrase "Go woke. Go broke." That's our educational system. Fortunately, there is a solution that is turning the tide to educate our country's youth against the dangers of socialism and teach young people about the ideas of liberty. And this is why I'm optimistic. Because there are students standing up. The solution? The Tuttle Twins. The Tuttle Twins teaches kids about free markets, individual liberty, limited government, and personal responsibility. And it's working... Before I give you real stories of students fighting back, I must first ask how you can help. My personal friend Connor Boyack is the author of The Tuttle Twins. He is on a mission to distribute an additional 1,000,000 copies of the books. As a special offer, if you donate $40 or more, my friend Connor will send you The Tuttle Twins Learn About The Law. Here's my favorite example of The Tuttle Twins inspiring the next generation: A public school in Colorado kicked Jaiden out of class. His crime? He wore a Gadsden flag patch on his backpack. The director at Vanguard School, where Jaiden attends, believed that this historical flag has "origins with slavery" and was "disruptive to the classroom environment." He told Jaiden's mother that the boy could not return to class unless the patch was removed. Jaiden refused to remove the patch. Good for him! In an emergency meeting, the school board voted to allow Jaiden to wear the patch. That was a quick victory! Jaiden is a special kid. He stands up for his beliefs. More importantly, he stands up for the truth. As his mom explained to me, he's been reading the Tuttle Twins books for years and learning about freedom. Then, it came time for him to do something about it. What if we could teach an entire generation to be like Jaiden? We can. If Congress had read The Tuttle Twins as kids, I bet we wouldn't be bankrupting our country and giving the Deep State warrantless spying! The time to start building the future is now, and your support is critical to our mission. Thank you. Mike Lee P.S. I've included a heartwarming letter below from a kid who was also inspired by The Tuttle Twins. This is how we can change the future. Paid for by Libertas Institute |

body:
don’t lose your chance to say thanks >>
| Friend, while the election didn’t turn out the way we hoped, one thing is clear:
_We are wholeheartedly grateful for Kamala Harris and Tim Walz._ **We’re sending a HUGE letter of support to our Democratic nominees to thank them for running such an inspiring campaign.** [**There are only 38 spots left for local Democrats: Add your name to thank Kamala Harris and Tim Walz! »**](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/85112?t=6&akid=18035%2E878179%2EDg7ogn) | [38 SPOTS LEFT FOR LOCAL DEMOCRATS: ADD YOUR NAME TO THANK VP HARRIS AND GOVERNOR WALZ »](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/85112?t=7&akid=18035%2E878179%2EDg7ogn)
---
TO: VP Kamala Harris and Governor Tim Walz
FROM: Your Strongest Supporter
Subject: I’m so proud of you. Dear Vice President Harris and Governor Walz,

**_Thank you._ I am so proud of all of your hard work and the amazing campaign you ran.**

I’m devastated that the election didn’t go our way, but please know your courage and leadership will continue to inspire millions of Americans for years to come.

Our country is so lucky to have fighters like you advocating for our democracy, rights, and freedoms.

**As a proud Democrat, I will never stop fighting for what’s right and everything you stand for.** [**So thank you, Vice President Harris and Governor Walz! I'm signing this letter and chipping in $3 now to show that I am committed to electing incredible Democrats like you and defending our democracy from Donald Trump. It's more important than ever that Democrats stand united together, and I promise not to back down »**](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/85112?t=8&akid=18035%2E878179%2EDg7ogn) [](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/85112?t=9&akid=18035%2E878179%2EDg7ogn) | [38 SPOTS LEFT FOR LOCAL DEMOCRATS: ADD YOUR NAME TO THANK VP HARRIS AND GOVERNOR WALZ »](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/85112?t=10&akid=18035%2E878179%2EDg7ogn)
---
Sincerely,

_A loyal Democrat_
— The Voter Protection Project
| | Paid for by VPP
(www.protectvoting.org)
Not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee. 401 2nd Ave. S, Ste. 303, Seattle, WA 98104

The Voter Protection Project is on an important mission: To end partisan gerrymandering and voter suppression by electing candidates at the state and federal levels that are forceful advocates for voting rights. Our enfranchisement agenda includes working to ensure that every state has automatic voter registration and online voter registration, convenient early voting, and independent redistricting commissions to ensure politicians are not able to draw their own maps.

Please, consider making a [one-time contribution by clicking here](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/121?t=1&akid=18035%2E878179%2EDg7ogn). **Or, to make the most powerful lasting impact and help us oust Republicans up and down the ballot who attack our right to vote, make a[monthly sustaining contribution by clicking here](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/122?t=2&akid=18035%2E878179%2EDg7ogn).**

We’re sending a HUGE letter of support to our Democratic nominees to thank them for running such an inspiring campaign. | TO: VP Kamala Harris and Governor Tim Walz FROM: Your Strongest Supporter Subject: I’m so proud of you. Dear Vice President Harris and Governor Walz, Thank you. I am so proud of all of your hard work and the amazing campaign you ran. I’m devastated that the election didn’t go our way, but please know your courage and leadership will continue to inspire millions of Americans for years to come. Our country is so lucky to have fighters like you advocating for our democracy, rights, and freedoms. As a proud Democrat, I will never stop fighting for what’s right and everything you stand for. | Sincerely, A loyal Democrat — The Voter Protection Project | | Paid for by VPP (www.protectvoting.org) Not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee. 401 2nd Ave. S, Ste. 303, Seattle, WA 98104 The Voter Protection Project is on an important mission: To end partisan gerrymandering and voter suppression by electing candidates at the state and federal levels that are forceful advocates for voting rights. Our enfranchisement agenda includes working to ensure that every state has automatic voter registration and online voter registration, convenient early voting, and independent redistricting commissions to ensure politicians are not able to draw their own maps. name: Britney VanCitters
subject: Fwd: Things are heavy, but we have good news for Oregon
body:
A massive thank you to all of our volunteers! | | Hi Peter, I wanted to get your eyes on Lindsey’s email again in case you missed our response to the election results. I’d like to take this second opportunity to reiterate our appreciation for our volunteers and members. We’re still waiting for 3 races to be called, but right now we know that we won 81.1% of all the races we endorsed in, and 90% (so far) of the races that we made significant financial and staff investments in. In this election OLCV staff and volunteers combined knocked on 10,000 doors and volunteers submitted 11 letters to the editor (LTEs) in support of climate champs. **A massive thank you to every single volunteer.** Your effort and energy matters so much for the future of Oregon, and these election results reflect that. It’s times like these that require us to come together and lean on our community. What we can accomplish within our communities and at the state level will be critical during the next four years. I’d like to share a story from a volunteer on our Washington County Leadership Committee, Ann Scherner: _“After the election of Trump in 2016 and the emotional roller coaster it brought, I wanted to “do something” to counteract the havoc of his presidency and administration. At the urging of my friend, Donna, I joined OLCV in 2017 and it saved my sanity. It has been vastly rewarding to be a part of this organization - as a volunteer in OLCV, I have learned how local and state politics is so important to what happens on a federal level, how to hold elected officials accountable, and how we can help protect Oregon’s natural legacy._ _One of the most inspiring parts of my OLCV participation is interviewing candidates for office on local and state levels and to help elect officials who are for addressing climate change, environmental and social justice. I have learned so much (and have much more to learn) about environmental and climate change issues as a member of OLCV along with making new friends, meeting elected officials. I feel like I can make a difference through my involvement with this organization._ _So here we are again with Trump 2.0. I along with millions of Americans are feeling desperation, grief, anger and other emotions but I am heading into “take action” mode again. As a volunteer with OLCV, there are many opportunities to take action to combat climate change and more - we need to fight back.”_ **Because of all of you, there is hope, and I hope you don’t lose sight of it in this dark time.[Find your community and sign up to volunteer with us here.](https://click.everyaction.com/k/97108185/512337981/-600427321?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9BVi9BVkxDVi8xLzcwODc3IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogImI4Y2ZkOTFlLWYxYTItZWYxMS04OGQwLTYwNDViZGQ2MmRiNiIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=aAC5KNKmhj4fKWrZrunX4qKekGa4ed7PCXSXWVHA8Ik=&emci=c989bdec-0ca2-ef11-88d0-6045bdd62db6&emdi=b8cfd91e-f1a2-ef11-88d0-6045bdd62db6&ceid=2107230)** Sincerely,
Britney VanCitters
OLCV Political & Organizing Director | [](https://click.everyaction.com/k/97108186/512337982/-1918275715?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9BVi9BVkxDVi8xLzcwODc3IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogImI4Y2ZkOTFlLWYxYTItZWYxMS04OGQwLTYwNDViZGQ2MmRiNiIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=aAC5KNKmhj4fKWrZrunX4qKekGa4ed7PCXSXWVHA8Ik=&emci=c989bdec-0ca2-ef11-88d0-6045bdd62db6&emdi=b8cfd91e-f1a2-ef11-88d0-6045bdd62db6&ceid=2107230) Hi Peter, Just like you, I’ve been feeling the weight of the devastation after the results from the presidential election. We were here once before, but now we truly know what’s at stake. When Donald Trump steps into office, we must be prepared to defend our climate, people, and places. This time we know what we will be fighting, and OLCV is committed to fighting like hell (albeit peacefully) against threats to our climate, our clean air and water, and the environment we all depend on. It’s hard not to worry about the future of our country. However, the presidential race reminds us of the importance of electing the right candidates here in Oregon. Our hard work this election cycle is not diminished by the presidential results, but is perhaps made more essential. As the federal government will backtrack on our progress and do damage to our climate and bedrock environmental protections, it’s up to states like Oregon to step up. While we are taking time to recover from and comprehend these results \- and I hope you all do the same - we turn to look at the good news that is happening right here in Oregon. The results will not be final until all the ballots are counted, but here’s what we know:
* **We elected a new supermajority to the Oregon State Senate,** and elected two new climate champions to the chamber with Senators-elect Khanh Pham and Anthony Broadman.

* We elected **3 pro-climate candidates statewide** to join us in this fight. We elected Dan Rayfield, one of our strongest climate champions, as our next attorney general. We will need his leadership to defend against environmental rollbacks and protect Oregonians against corporate polluters. We also elected Tobias Read as our next Secretary of State. He is committed to safeguarding our election processes and ensuring access to free and fair elections for all Oregon voters.

* It’s still too early to call some House races, but we know that we will **maintain at least a 35 seat majority in the Oregon House.** This strong majority with our senate supermajority, gives Democrats a mandate to lead on climate.

I want to thank our entire team that made these state wins a possibility; that includes our staff, volunteers, donors, and supporters. Thank you to everyone who showed up to vote in this election. We wouldn’t be here celebrating these wins if it wasn’t for you. I’m grateful to be living in a state that prioritizes climate, safety, and progress, regardless of what happens at the federal level. Thank you for your continued support, and for joining this fight with us. Together we can and will continue to make progress here in our beloved state of Oregon. It’s our time to step up, [and we hope you will join us.](https://click.everyaction.com/k/97108187/512337983/-1869592716?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9BVi9BVkxDVi8xLzcwODc3IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogImI4Y2ZkOTFlLWYxYTItZWYxMS04OGQwLTYwNDViZGQ2MmRiNiIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=aAC5KNKmhj4fKWrZrunX4qKekGa4ed7PCXSXWVHA8Ik=&emci=c989bdec-0ca2-ef11-88d0-6045bdd62db6&emdi=b8cfd91e-f1a2-ef11-88d0-6045bdd62db6&ceid=2107230) Take care of yourself. Don’t give up.
Sincerely,
Lindsey Scholten
OLCV Executive Director P.S. There are other ways to support and join our fight. [Check out other ways to get involved here!](https://click.everyaction.com/k/97108188/512337984/966953210?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9BVi9BVkxDVi8xLzcwODc3IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogImI4Y2ZkOTFlLWYxYTItZWYxMS04OGQwLTYwNDViZGQ2MmRiNiIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=aAC5KNKmhj4fKWrZrunX4qKekGa4ed7PCXSXWVHA8Ik=&emci=c989bdec-0ca2-ef11-88d0-6045bdd62db6&emdi=b8cfd91e-f1a2-ef11-88d0-6045bdd62db6&ceid=2107230) |

Now more than ever, he needs good Democrats like you to stand with him.** **[_Friend, sign our urgent petition standing with Special Counsel Jack Smith in his quest to hold Donald Trump accountable »_](https://act.fightforreform.org/survey/stand_with_jack_smith_new?source=FFR_20241114_EMPET_E2_T0_AC_RS&t=7&akid=22539%2E4449941%2EJlX108)** | [_30,000 SIGNATURES NEEDED ON OUR EMERGENCY PETITION:_ Stand with Special Counsel Jack Smith »](https://act.fightforreform.org/survey/stand_with_jack_smith_new?source=FFR_20241114_EMPET_E2_T0_AC_RS&t=8&akid=22539%2E4449941%2EJlX108)

name: Team Kennedy
subject: RFK Jr. Nominated as HHS Secretary – You made this possible!
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY TEAM KENNEDY
body:
This is the opportunity he promised us he'd fight for.

|
---
| | | | [**Your unwavering commitment made this moment possible!**](https://www.mahanow.org/donate-em1?e=d33e868971601c1c714cfe0555abd394&utm_source=joinkennedy&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=hhs_nomination_11_14_24_1&n=1)

|

[](https://www.mahanow.org/donate-em1?e=d33e868971601c1c714cfe0555abd394&utm_source=joinkennedy&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=hhs_nomination_11_14_24_1&n=4)
---
|
---
Robert F. Kennedy Jr. Nominated as Secretary of Health and Human Services
Dear Peter,
Today, President-elect Donald Trump officially nominated Robert F. Kennedy Jr. as Secretary of the United States Department of Health and Human Services.
This is the opportunity RFK Jr. promised us he'd fight for — **the chance to end America’s chronic disease epidemic once and for all.**
[](https://www.mahanow.org/donate-em1?e=d33e868971601c1c714cfe0555abd394&utm_source=joinkennedy&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=hhs_nomination_11_14_24_1&n=5)
_Your unwavering commitment made this moment possible!_
**Every effort, every call, every dollar given, every hour volunteered, every conversation, and every prayer — _none of it was in vain_.**

name: Patti Reilly
subject: My police officer son is going to prison for doing his job
body:
Never in my wildest imagination could I have predicted that my son would be wrongfully convicted of murder – murder of a criminal my son didn’t even touch.
Dear Fellow American,

My son, Washington Metro Police Officer Terence Sutton, was just sentenced to 5 1⁄2 years in prison for doing the job he was trained to do.

And though you and I have never met, I’m praying you’ll help me save him.

Here are some photos of Terence as a little boy.

[](http://links.conservativesfordjt.com/u/click?_t=05b03ef2209247bcbdad7fd5099cd670&_m=2f34cf94335e440eb57943358b476b78&_e=jP_1BcuCvh-9vf41EfiQrE_csQpelWEmO7vuBcAwfTFiRkuCoZVFAq_3YTPAC5TnxXMawzEYUiJ6BMdaH1wPPrcYGSb5t6Q79cTunmiDLrfonalhzuY1c4g_8dG-xiB8huDSCjiFdL2yhnQaWmHPlzqBOUsa4LmCHKOZUguCgaVTT6n3sqml5yzWqNuLxewh0xT6I6WIF8ZtYmfkKUGFo5c09LTZt5j5AnoPLRl0_K7yLvvaQ1TRJHFlaHhdWgIDy3vZpMWO50L08FTQT6eo9dG9hj8_yS-xI34Zn92VTmlD7elG7UIKVaSavrapvwv3FMvbZ6emT3CYA2eG_4K-1cqX_oLyGyvlgiFndDAXv7PnfSJYViwhS7TJn_XeDdyF2zF3vKdHVL-gOM5wwfUv2A%3D%3D)
He always dreamed of following in his dad’s footsteps to be a police officer. I also included one of my favorites of us from the night he graduated from the Police Academy.

I was so proud that night.

Never in my wildest imagination could I have predicted that my son would be _wrongfully_ _convicted_ _of_ _murder_ **– murder of a criminal my son didn’t even touch.**

[**_I’m praying you will help me save my son_**](http://links.conservativesfordjt.com/u/click?_t=05b03ef2209247bcbdad7fd5099cd670&_m=2f34cf94335e440eb57943358b476b78&_e=jP_1BcuCvh-9vf41EfiQrE_csQpelWEmO7vuBcAwfTFiRkuCoZVFAq_3YTPAC5TnxXMawzEYUiJ6BMdaH1wPPrcYGSb5t6Q79cTunmiDLrfonalhzuY1c4g_8dG-xiB8huDSCjiFdL2yhnQaWmHPlzqBOUsa4LmCHKOZUguCgaVTT6n3sqml5yzWqNuLxewh0xT6I6WIF8ZtYmfkKUGFo5c09LTZt5j5AnoPLRl0_K5FZc5eFgIEPfjsdhQbYfCTjbtt0Mk_nn8vxvvu9PSy9iYbl6EHyIav-zCrX2ocZcgSN092Gb9fVgTO0uWbLkviZAs7gFFz2WCotEcnXWJhv3o-AFylJ9l_zqBTE2RLT-RaRtoer__cuiAnAP3AKroMKqayciSsCPAo0xwKqzcBYg%3D%3D) – **but first, let me explain what happened.** Our nightmare started in October of 2020.

Terence was sitting in his patrol car when he received a report that a known gang member, Karon Hylton-Brown, was seen entering a rival gang’s territory.

Karon was a violent criminal with a rap sheet a mile long – including drugs, illegal gun possession, and assaults. Earlier that day, he was seen arguing with a rival gang member who owed him money. So Terence and other officers were concerned Karon was planning to get revenge.

When Terence saw Karon illegally driving a motorized scooter on the sidewalk without a helmet, he tried to pull him over to talk. Instead, Karon took off on the scooter.

Terence watched as Karon sped through traffic, weaving in and out of cars and blowing past red lights and stop signs.

My son knew Karon was putting others at risk, so for 3 minutes he slowly and carefully followed behind in his patrol car.

Then it happened.

Karon veered into an alleyway, drove out the other side without looking and slammed into a passing car.

After several days in the hospital, Karon died from his injuries. And here’s where the story takes a shocking turn...

Because Karon was black, and the incident happened just four months after George Floyd’s death, the anti-police mob went into frenzy.

They blamed Terence for the accident and smeared him as a racist.

There were protests and even riots. The mob threw rocks at officers, smashed store windows, and set fires.

Anti-police politicians piled on too. Without any evidence, they demanded my son be charged even though he did nothing to cause Karon’s death.

**The pressure campaign worked and prosecutors charged my son with Second-Degree Murder.**

**Terence was convicted in December 2022 and he was finally just sentenced – to 5 1⁄2 years in prison.**

Now you understand why I’m so heartbroken. The injustice is almost too much to bear.

My son was well-respected by the community he served. He trained many Rookies and set a good example for all of them. He was even awarded Officer of the Year!

But unless Terence’s appeal is successful, he’s going to prison – which is why I’m urgently turning to you for help today. The **Law Enforcement Legal Defense Fund** (LELDF) has stepped forward to pay for Terence’s defense and is actively raising funds to pay for the appeal.

If you’ve ever heard of LELDF, you know they’re a national group fighting on behalf of wrongly-accused police officers like Terence for over 30 years. LELDF has helped dozens of innocent cops – and their families – at their lowest moments.

We expect it will cost at least $150,000 to appeal Terence’s conviction.

So I have to ask you one of the toughest questions I’ve ever asked anyone:

[**_Will you help my son Terence fight the unjust charges against him by donating to LELDF today?_**](http://links.conservativesfordjt.com/u/click?_t=05b03ef2209247bcbdad7fd5099cd670&_m=2f34cf94335e440eb57943358b476b78&_e=jP_1BcuCvh-9vf41EfiQrE_csQpelWEmO7vuBcAwfTFiRkuCoZVFAq_3YTPAC5TnxXMawzEYUiJ6BMdaH1wPPrcYGSb5t6Q79cTunmiDLrfonalhzuY1c4g_8dG-xiB8huDSCjiFdL2yhnQaWmHPlzqBOUsa4LmCHKOZUguCgaVTT6n3sqml5yzWqNuLxewh0xT6I6WIF8ZtYmfkKUGFo5c09LTZt5j5AnoPLRl0_K6Q1bLBHLPHllzCDfxoBX4bpsy3KG4j90VkO4bg7-21hOwnqfERKVy_RWcjVnBHI3RwIoGPSdoOoOEwt8WBk9XYeC8QpyFchdVIkvpZDDUiz4f0n33JRL7vuvfaX_iLEWiA0MbkDPCkpKu0xMc3FkF6Hdls-F88USTe-iCAMgXvbw%3D%3D)

I’m not asking you to donate the entire $150,000 yourself – though it would be a huge weight off our shoulders if you are able to help that way.

[**_But your tax-deductible gift of $35, $50, $100, or more will help LELDF fully fund Terence’s appeal over the next 12 months._**](http://links.conservativesfordjt.com/u/click?_t=05b03ef2209247bcbdad7fd5099cd670&_m=2f34cf94335e440eb57943358b476b78&_e=jP_1BcuCvh-9vf41EfiQrE_csQpelWEmO7vuBcAwfTFiRkuCoZVFAq_3YTPAC5TnxXMawzEYUiJ6BMdaH1wPPrcYGSb5t6Q79cTunmiDLrfonalhzuY1c4g_8dG-xiB8huDSCjiFdL2yhnQaWmHPlzqBOUsa4LmCHKOZUguCgaVTT6n3sqml5yzWqNuLxewh0xT6I6WIF8ZtYmfkKUGFo5c09LTZt5j5AnoPLRl0_K4rDKbEZKiYPt1MTyfxfqTRqZkygccEkjLiL_jELtr019yGqlLEK2waCO0Mwgwakm8xrnV_VdaghcclAScDRFMT_YjexKwyO4Xv_KP9msyCB-_f-se2dcNVsQ4ilizC1OagyFgmqUToTOFji4VATBpmeNs7pW8dHRVdtYdV6XK7lA%3D%3D) If I had anywhere else to turn, I wouldn’t be so bold as to ask for your help.

But I already lost my husband. He was a police officer too, and he was so proud that Terence followed in his footsteps. I simply can’t bear the thought of having another family member ripped away from me.

[**_So if you are at all able, please follow this link to make a tax-deductible donation to the Law Enforcement Legal Defense Fund to help my Terence._**](http://links.conservativesfordjt.com/u/click?_t=05b03ef2209247bcbdad7fd5099cd670&_m=2f34cf94335e440eb57943358b476b78&_e=jP_1BcuCvh-9vf41EfiQrE_csQpelWEmO7vuBcAwfTFiRkuCoZVFAq_3YTPAC5TnxXMawzEYUiJ6BMdaH1wPPrcYGSb5t6Q79cTunmiDLrfonalhzuY1c4g_8dG-xiB8huDSCjiFdL2yhnQaWmHPlzqBOUsa4LmCHKOZUguCgaVTT6n3sqml5yzWqNuLxewh0xT6I6WIF8ZtYmfkKUGFo5c09LTZt5j5AnoPLRl0_K7gOWvfj2fTQ8oXKtXvpgc_u3uapKZQm0nzcMQyPnAjKLfXvpCnvKAjMANW9WiPZVIKbi2Eof7aiFIRiENdqZCpq8X4WnG7ImrcWGG2UIERXnm7tspeUSIWcTx4ZExlze36tHX4ziGiGjoGrQwchnDEKxCPjx8sVUBus4uEz6z0Tw%3D%3D)

**Any amount – $35, $50, $100, or even $500 or more – will help.**

And because LELDF is a non-profit organization, your gift is completely tax-deductible. But whatever you can afford to give, I ask that you rush it back quickly.

Right now, Terence can only rely on the good nature and generosity of kind folks like you.

Thank you for taking the time to read my letter today.

And thank you in advance for helping LELDF support Terence and other wrongly accused officers.

Gratefully,
**Patti Reilly**

P.S. Don’t get me wrong, I’m thankful the judge granted Terence bond so he doesn’t have to report to prison just yet. Hopefully it never comes to that... but to get Terence’s conviction overturned, it’s going to cost at least $150,000 to fund his appeal. [**_Will you please help me save my son by making an urgent tax-deductible donation of $35, $50, $100 or more to LELDF today?_**](http://links.conservativesfordjt.com/u/click?_t=05b03ef2209247bcbdad7fd5099cd670&_m=2f34cf94335e440eb57943358b476b78&_e=jP_1BcuCvh-9vf41EfiQrE_csQpelWEmO7vuBcAwfTFiRkuCoZVFAq_3YTPAC5TnxXMawzEYUiJ6BMdaH1wPPrcYGSb5t6Q79cTunmiDLrfonalhzuY1c4g_8dG-xiB8huDSCjiFdL2yhnQaWmHPlzqBOUsa4LmCHKOZUguCgaVTT6n3sqml5yzWqNuLxewh0xT6I6WIF8ZtYmfkKUGFo5c09LTZt5j5AnoPLRl0_K6xnob2lsle7SL5sHopQieIWNUQLPWootzDvb-YwgxaPz3Vi6SC4hWendnQVFCod0sFa_DnfMw2a9DvK2N4byJ7KeKxAYO_stJ24O4mWfnoT20P0w_p_Jp-CXsWuA0qrZLSVSyY1PE2WkYQfdd8yWpnbtuPWpOmij-jECws3YKBrQ%3D%3D) Thank you for standing with Terence during this nightmare.
--------

_More such officers who sacrifice so much for will face similar fates unless we speak out and stand up for the brave men and women in blue. The next time you see a police officer in your community, please thank them for their service. To read more about our mission or the other Law Enforcement officers we're defending, please visit**www.PoliceDefense.org**. And remember -Blue Lives Matter!_
_(C) Law Enforcement Legal Defense Fund | [www.PoliceDefense.org](http://links.conservativesfordjt.com/u/click?_t=05b03ef2209247bcbdad7fd5099cd670&_m=2f34cf94335e440eb57943358b476b78&_e=jP_1BcuCvh-9vf41EfiQrH6-FgdokUVrcyEcZyFGrjUzGpB8EfnmmSOvq0YCdpl8vWLcZLwpCcyrOiNPOBeO6HQWw4E5LdzykqXauAQB-oHAnuQM_2C2Yua2pfDXRz6uHr-aYg60uGRs85vrXiU9Yp92lHQ2VkbImLEuGy_dercTIOsnC-Nne1gAzowNv3qjly5fuxbHpiX5St6luxaW0w%3D%3D)
2560 Huntington Ave. Suite 203, Alexandria, VA, 22303_

Click here to [Unsubscribe](http://links.conservativesfordjt.com/e/encryptedUnsubscribe?_r=05b03ef2209247bcbdad7fd5099cd670&_s=2f34cf94335e440eb57943358b476b78&_t=ZLg58hdb5Y-jiVwBEVfN-8A297X4Sxk07O5TTAfrLvTX-eKhXEMFjUh64quw-dnf0CiowbGfIQp0LXHY9rocR7nQaw3pFsXdtxqcAf0t1zz2uhMmTsvVbgzlUxf8nv5y)

name: Bob Casey
subject: Let’s finish strong
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Debbie for Florida
body:
I’m counting on you.
| | |
---
Folks,
We’ve done such incredible work together. Today, I’m asking you to keep working with us.
I’ve always stood up for the people of our Commonwealth — and I believe every person’s voice should be heard.
That’s why we have to see this across the finish line.
**I’ll never stop fighting for Pennsylvania, but I need you with me to help us keep going.** [**Will you help ensure that every Pennsylvanians' voice is heard by splitting $5 or more right now between myself and Debbie Mucarsel-Powell?**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/97108267/512339468/-1885065628?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk2536-bu-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDYvMS8xMDc1MjUiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiNmE4YjdkMDMtZjZhMi1lZjExLTg4ZDAtNjA0NWJkZDYyZGI2IiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=NaJqlb6gE9np3YT1pC7YlGZzjT_hplo6wvZsei7x7I8=)

Bob’s team needs urgent resources to keep this work going. I’m not $#!ting you when I say this is the most important race in the country now. We cannot afford to lose another Senate seat. Bob Casey MUST be re-elected to stand up to Republicans and Donald Trump in the Senate. Thank you, James Carville

name: Patti Reilly
subject: Help me save my son
body:
My son, Washington Metro Police Officer Terence Sutton, was just sentenced to 5 1⁄2 years in prison for doing the job he was trained to do.
Dear Fellow American,

My son, Washington Metro Police Officer Terence Sutton, was just sentenced to 5 1⁄2 years in prison for doing the job he was trained to do.

And though you and I have never met, I’m praying you’ll help me save him.

Here are some photos of Terence as a little boy.

[](http://links.freedomfirstalert.com/u/click?_t=9ca143e971904d26a973d002cb0ae7f7&_m=e6ce17712a4a4df09b76459c1f50df15&_e=7sPjsQAxWB-B9o31JNnGzGoViIWI-jnnOmp46M-peROVHJx3MoEtgW2NrinBmGmkcAm9mUcxtPX9Pf3xbzlOV3j6LE_DVgHrzpqmOjfRBiQjsaOzAIe-fo_BFrredOEicYTXqjxRxB9g8TES6go69-tulUOVmb8XM6RoMEY9YkRBeaUTL5zrCrmt9U8tJpq_zVtozsguz00r76_JthyGJlzF1Nbkx83-3C1TllqMiVZTNbSt1by1YnYSqfRdVVtnkJML94SmgzGg5-asW8yVIXF8uz6oN4po8sO7hHnWGgdnPEVcD2U-Vc4N1mq8RwEKq7oHgjUR0F8vv_mS4JLMj34REt6RFOHEHzV7jpPHoSyn30jeiRSYeq5xKI-vxvp_cvRrCZiI_GyzlYNK3q0r9w%3D%3D)
He always dreamed of following in his dad’s footsteps to be a police officer. I also included one of my favorites of us from the night he graduated from the Police Academy.

I was so proud that night.

Never in my wildest imagination could I have predicted that my son would be _wrongfully_ _convicted_ _of_ _murder_ **– murder of a criminal my son didn’t even touch.**

[**_I’m praying you will help me save my son_**](http://links.freedomfirstalert.com/u/click?_t=9ca143e971904d26a973d002cb0ae7f7&_m=e6ce17712a4a4df09b76459c1f50df15&_e=7sPjsQAxWB-B9o31JNnGzGoViIWI-jnnOmp46M-peROVHJx3MoEtgW2NrinBmGmkcAm9mUcxtPX9Pf3xbzlOV3j6LE_DVgHrzpqmOjfRBiQjsaOzAIe-fo_BFrredOEicYTXqjxRxB9g8TES6go69-tulUOVmb8XM6RoMEY9YkRBeaUTL5zrCrmt9U8tJpq_zVtozsguz00r76_JthyGJlzF1Nbkx83-3C1TllqMiVbZF_hsfoRg5Kt0rZQBZ00RtOXMYXg4St-ZLhywSaSAuJ539H6RKEE-OqVcfO1Ze3jpl6jNh2L0ghTnkk-5BzIZTGgSpQlSg-6MY-P0Z9RIdXTgpOGjq4vIKu3cWH7x1xQStd-z67IseUkS6TBHXEoPj-VkVMnUqFWNf9NtcYm_Jg%3D%3D) – **but first, let me explain what happened.** Our nightmare started in October of 2020.

Terence was sitting in his patrol car when he received a report that a known gang member, Karon Hylton-Brown, was seen entering a rival gang’s territory.

Karon was a violent criminal with a rap sheet a mile long – including drugs, illegal gun possession, and assaults. Earlier that day, he was seen arguing with a rival gang member who owed him money. So Terence and other officers were concerned Karon was planning to get revenge.

When Terence saw Karon illegally driving a motorized scooter on the sidewalk without a helmet, he tried to pull him over to talk. Instead, Karon took off on the scooter.

Terence watched as Karon sped through traffic, weaving in and out of cars and blowing past red lights and stop signs.

My son knew Karon was putting others at risk, so for 3 minutes he slowly and carefully followed behind in his patrol car.

Then it happened.

Karon veered into an alleyway, drove out the other side without looking and slammed into a passing car.

After several days in the hospital, Karon died from his injuries. And here’s where the story takes a shocking turn...

Because Karon was black, and the incident happened just four months after George Floyd’s death, the anti-police mob went into frenzy.

They blamed Terence for the accident and smeared him as a racist.

There were protests and even riots. The mob threw rocks at officers, smashed store windows, and set fires.

Anti-police politicians piled on too. Without any evidence, they demanded my son be charged even though he did nothing to cause Karon’s death.

**The pressure campaign worked and prosecutors charged my son with Second-Degree Murder.**

**Terence was convicted in December 2022 and he was finally just sentenced – to 5 1⁄2 years in prison.**

Now you understand why I’m so heartbroken. The injustice is almost too much to bear.

My son was well-respected by the community he served. He trained many Rookies and set a good example for all of them. He was even awarded Officer of the Year!

But unless Terence’s appeal is successful, he’s going to prison – which is why I’m urgently turning to you for help today. The **Law Enforcement Legal Defense Fund** (LELDF) has stepped forward to pay for Terence’s defense and is actively raising funds to pay for the appeal.

If you’ve ever heard of LELDF, you know they’re a national group fighting on behalf of wrongly-accused police officers like Terence for over 30 years. LELDF has helped dozens of innocent cops – and their families – at their lowest moments.

We expect it will cost at least $150,000 to appeal Terence’s conviction.

So I have to ask you one of the toughest questions I’ve ever asked anyone:

[**_Will you help my son Terence fight the unjust charges against him by donating to LELDF today?_**](http://links.freedomfirstalert.com/u/click?_t=9ca143e971904d26a973d002cb0ae7f7&_m=e6ce17712a4a4df09b76459c1f50df15&_e=7sPjsQAxWB-B9o31JNnGzGoViIWI-jnnOmp46M-peROVHJx3MoEtgW2NrinBmGmkcAm9mUcxtPX9Pf3xbzlOV3j6LE_DVgHrzpqmOjfRBiQjsaOzAIe-fo_BFrredOEicYTXqjxRxB9g8TES6go69-tulUOVmb8XM6RoMEY9YkRBeaUTL5zrCrmt9U8tJpq_zVtozsguz00r76_JthyGJlzF1Nbkx83-3C1TllqMiVYzFTm9jy8qZ57CCv23b9p5jAEE1VEdDvcIxrS_OYG-WzIxvhV83JRNUqcXNEyYNOTzItAgt0Ae8hI7o64MFAP13RdYWvMs777KGjTczq1PKin48iZglYEu4-B5tC6AbPPSCKGmzVjtHlssFe5-MhJa71kTSCvST2mpMC4mMYCuMA%3D%3D)

I’m not asking you to donate the entire $150,000 yourself – though it would be a huge weight off our shoulders if you are able to help that way.

[**_But your tax-deductible gift of $35, $50, $100, or more will help LELDF fully fund Terence’s appeal over the next 12 months._**](http://links.freedomfirstalert.com/u/click?_t=9ca143e971904d26a973d002cb0ae7f7&_m=e6ce17712a4a4df09b76459c1f50df15&_e=7sPjsQAxWB-B9o31JNnGzGoViIWI-jnnOmp46M-peROVHJx3MoEtgW2NrinBmGmkcAm9mUcxtPX9Pf3xbzlOV3j6LE_DVgHrzpqmOjfRBiQjsaOzAIe-fo_BFrredOEicYTXqjxRxB9g8TES6go69-tulUOVmb8XM6RoMEY9YkRBeaUTL5zrCrmt9U8tJpq_zVtozsguz00r76_JthyGJlzF1Nbkx83-3C1TllqMiVZUWaO3pqRThPo8QRMdOvCoTlWJpVzIGhS72q1HtLeCDSilsVofZMPIlaP280buqCorkBGWyXuboEt9J3NSP3FDrT-jcS0wORmc9nYghwkXIJL8eVr_oUa0OhODjUPsnaJy3z5uV2dis5pHv5R_W-aVd-9T2C9hhwMOvfQpTs05QQ%3D%3D) If I had anywhere else to turn, I wouldn’t be so bold as to ask for your help.

But I already lost my husband. He was a police officer too, and he was so proud that Terence followed in his footsteps. I simply can’t bear the thought of having another family member ripped away from me.

[**_So if you are at all able, please follow this link to make a tax-deductible donation to the Law Enforcement Legal Defense Fund to help my Terence._**](http://links.freedomfirstalert.com/u/click?_t=9ca143e971904d26a973d002cb0ae7f7&_m=e6ce17712a4a4df09b76459c1f50df15&_e=7sPjsQAxWB-B9o31JNnGzGoViIWI-jnnOmp46M-peROVHJx3MoEtgW2NrinBmGmkcAm9mUcxtPX9Pf3xbzlOV3j6LE_DVgHrzpqmOjfRBiQjsaOzAIe-fo_BFrredOEicYTXqjxRxB9g8TES6go69-tulUOVmb8XM6RoMEY9YkRBeaUTL5zrCrmt9U8tJpq_zVtozsguz00r76_JthyGJlzF1Nbkx83-3C1TllqMiVbO76yP5QCRP_Eoc5grWhaI_i6tQ3XwyVe2rbiJ5knZNznhC3g49LbC0l97ewZqEqMGtVojXsCdQAfEcgbebRl76ODQ2uWJcLxGKk0E197pRpx0w0ZV9aZtwNnVUaF-ZBk-hoblz3wbqF7WptSCXEQWa5E7WUwPS-nXnpi1CImAgA%3D%3D)

**Any amount – $35, $50, $100, or even $500 or more – will help.**

And because LELDF is a non-profit organization, your gift is completely tax-deductible. But whatever you can afford to give, I ask that you rush it back quickly.

Right now, Terence can only rely on the good nature and generosity of kind folks like you.

Thank you for taking the time to read my letter today.

And thank you in advance for helping LELDF support Terence and other wrongly accused officers.

Gratefully,
**Patti Reilly**

P.S. Don’t get me wrong, I’m thankful the judge granted Terence bond so he doesn’t have to report to prison just yet. Hopefully it never comes to that... but to get Terence’s conviction overturned, it’s going to cost at least $150,000 to fund his appeal. [**_Will you please help me save my son by making an urgent tax-deductible donation of $35, $50, $100 or more to LELDF today?_**](http://links.freedomfirstalert.com/u/click?_t=9ca143e971904d26a973d002cb0ae7f7&_m=e6ce17712a4a4df09b76459c1f50df15&_e=7sPjsQAxWB-B9o31JNnGzGoViIWI-jnnOmp46M-peROVHJx3MoEtgW2NrinBmGmkcAm9mUcxtPX9Pf3xbzlOV3j6LE_DVgHrzpqmOjfRBiQjsaOzAIe-fo_BFrredOEicYTXqjxRxB9g8TES6go69-tulUOVmb8XM6RoMEY9YkRBeaUTL5zrCrmt9U8tJpq_zVtozsguz00r76_JthyGJlzF1Nbkx83-3C1TllqMiVaF0aXp25k79PlBN3Zto9MYI-yVGd6AcQ1Q8Q6cWAWbFl0zOAleO6nDQanHMmty0w41KWfaWIAB40E0cedF4a6ri8PXVBULQXbpU50UW_2H_F9REp69Wg_XtOiwTMtDKX4qvEuwTsM0ZXm8WLOD8n_fGFqr1d-FIQpRWxjatLTnAA%3D%3D) Thank you for standing with Terence during this nightmare.
--------

_More such officers who sacrifice so much for will face similar fates unless we speak out and stand up for the brave men and women in blue. The next time you see a police officer in your community, please thank them for their service. To read more about our mission or the other Law Enforcement officers we're defending, please visit**www.PoliceDefense.org**. And remember -Blue Lives Matter!_

clean_body: My son, Washington Metro Police Officer Terence Sutton, was just sentenced to 5 1⁄2 years in prison for doing the job he was trained to do. Dear Fellow American, My son, Washington Metro Police Officer Terence Sutton, was just sentenced to 5 1⁄2 years in prison for doing the job he was trained to do. And though you and I have never met, I’m praying you’ll help me save him. Here are some photos of Terence as a little boy. He always dreamed of following in his dad’s footsteps to be a police officer. I also included one of my favorites of us from the night he graduated from the Police Academy. I was so proud that night. Never in my wildest imagination could I have predicted that my son would be wrongfully convicted of murder – murder of a criminal my son didn’t even touch. – but first, let me explain what happened. Our nightmare started in October of 2020. Terence was sitting in his patrol car when he received a report that a known gang member, Karon Hylton-Brown, was seen entering a rival gang’s territory. Karon was a violent criminal with a rap sheet a mile long – including drugs, illegal gun possession, and assaults. Earlier that day, he was seen arguing with a rival gang member who owed him money. So Terence and other officers were concerned Karon was planning to get revenge. When Terence saw Karon illegally driving a motorized scooter on the sidewalk without a helmet, he tried to pull him over to talk. Instead, Karon took off on the scooter. Terence watched as Karon sped through traffic, weaving in and out of cars and blowing past red lights and stop signs. My son knew Karon was putting others at risk, so for 3 minutes he slowly and carefully followed behind in his patrol car. Then it happened. Karon veered into an alleyway, drove out the other side without looking and slammed into a passing car. After several days in the hospital, Karon died from his injuries. And here’s where the story takes a shocking turn... Because Karon was black, and the incident happened just four months after George Floyd’s death, the anti-police mob went into frenzy. They blamed Terence for the accident and smeared him as a racist. There were protests and even riots. The mob threw rocks at officers, smashed store windows, and set fires. Anti-police politicians piled on too. Without any evidence, they demanded my son be charged even though he did nothing to cause Karon’s death. The pressure campaign worked and prosecutors charged my son with Second-Degree Murder. Terence was convicted in December 2022 and he was finally just sentenced – to 5 1⁄2 years in prison. Now you understand why I’m so heartbroken. The injustice is almost too much to bear. My son was well-respected by the community he served. He trained many Rookies and set a good example for all of them. He was even awarded Officer of the Year! But unless Terence’s appeal is successful, he’s going to prison – which is why I’m urgently turning to you for help today. The Law Enforcement Legal Defense Fund (LELDF) has stepped forward to pay for Terence’s defense and is actively raising funds to pay for the appeal. If you’ve ever heard of LELDF, you know they’re a national group fighting on behalf of wrongly-accused police officers like Terence for over 30 years. LELDF has helped dozens of innocent cops – and their families – at their lowest moments. We expect it will cost at least $150,000 to appeal Terence’s conviction. So I have to ask you one of the toughest questions I’ve ever asked anyone: I’m not asking you to donate the entire $150,000 yourself – though it would be a huge weight off our shoulders if you are able to help that way. If I had anywhere else to turn, I wouldn’t be so bold as to ask for your help. But I already lost my husband. He was a police officer too, and he was so proud that Terence followed in his footsteps. I simply can’t bear the thought of having another family member ripped away from me. Any amount – $35, $50, $100, or even $500 or more – will help. And because LELDF is a non-profit organization, your gift is completely tax-deductible. But whatever you can afford to give, I ask that you rush it back quickly. Right now, Terence can only rely on the good nature and generosity of kind folks like you. Thank you for taking the time to read my letter today. And thank you in advance for helping LELDF support Terence and other wrongly accused officers. Gratefully, Patti Reilly P.S. Don’t get me wrong, I’m thankful the judge granted Terence bond so he doesn’t have to report to prison just yet. Hopefully it never comes to that... but to get Terence’s conviction overturned, it’s going to cost at least $150,000 to fund his appeal. Thank you for standing with Terence during this nightmare. More such officers who sacrifice so much for will face similar fates unless we speak out and stand up for the brave men and women in blue. The next time you see a police officer in your community, please thank them for their service. To read more about our mission or the other Law Enforcement officers we're defending, please visitwww.PoliceDefense.org. And remember -Blue Lives Matter! subject: Thank you, President Trump. From: Fellow American
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the NRCC and not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee
body:
They tried to bankrupt him. They tried to imprison him. They even tried to kill him.
Will you sign our thank you note to President Trump?

|
---
| | |
Friend,

They tried to bankrupt him. They tried to imprison him. They even tried to kill him.

But he never stopped fighting for us.

And now, President Donald J. Trump will once again be President of the United States.

We are so grateful for all he has done for us, so House Republicans are sending him a letter to show our thanks.

**[Will you join us and say THANK YOU PRESIDENT TRUMP, by signing this heartfelt note?](http://links.g4yamerica.com/u/click?_t=cc7dda5c2cc64061900678c88bd3a18a&_m=1c5eefb7b5e84f3c9cdd4b413412af79&_e=TpvED5kr3tY2hiuZ8WgNFNUob6T0I731P7eMmc2GeqU6aZQ3LPDGZkyLAFoVJO4FSFl2N4lFpxANU2Ah2HooUptC6b0u05Z3Ck7nylX0ge3lnt7Xqga-byTaXNCuQzt-4fXGTUDRmjbfp1weH9BaSUimuZNy6oSyQQVeWko4B1JuqedNlSwq6Ju2sviLrzDl4R5OZJUFuFanlsTTeLSlO7uwZfzm-vfAYEB7b3VSxpKRluN_5YM-1eA7sgJK9f5JzfPQgKJmGI_inQrUli2S7fgerbKFv-pVk61Z3nhP_z5OPVev6Ki0UVEmVK73pR8AcHNzn2wDVA2ulS4EeYmGJKHeaJ_MGHT2_nrTgW54rdP787y2bAH88gfN12ONfx6ObBR6LeIgRQFgJlT-qhkghA%3D%3D "Will you join us and say THANK YOU PRESIDENT TRUMP, by signing this heartfelt note?")**

name: Patti Reilly
subject: My police officer son is going to prison for doing his job
body:
Never in my wildest imagination could I have predicted that my son would be wrongfully convicted of murder – murder of a criminal my son didn’t even touch.
Dear Fellow American,

My son, Washington Metro Police Officer Terence Sutton, was just sentenced to 5 1⁄2 years in prison for doing the job he was trained to do.

And though you and I have never met, I’m praying you’ll help me save him.

Here are some photos of Terence as a little boy.

[](http://links.makingamericathegreatest.com/u/click?_t=79fa4a3daf024a0a886c5b498ff32e32&_m=00990d7d455248eaa05241db28baacc1&_e=kuInbR6wPowz6oVqAaRpyChvJT4Huf207cVg4miURwuIF0iR12zbzKbHkJu1sgzLcxuWegmc1Wt8u9-Koce2lA7LpKRTfaIeQzP8-fqbjyCUMKr4D9w5MS_2sxEQeiqnhLSZU5ER_wxLP6h99oDOmHB3xdK5Ggm2Nt9B2ztYWw1rkLq39-oAhE7G63fEnF_ldPkONI_TEHly1nnbDan8S9wUn-pFIcSV_Ce6wf5sXpu5H7V0kQ6Mc9Z1ijydLVJl6B1-KpwlOX6udCuXF-1ewwOxbqnPSlT3UHFMitW4NEclLTPH-LzZUgKDqxBjX3xDlaD79QthIewEp0YjOR8Exw5F1JRRXWjNw1w3FZWd7EQh69mwVaO92EmshzRq76LAco8fW7HGetNg3TCXtsk1YA%3D%3D)
He always dreamed of following in his dad’s footsteps to be a police officer. I also included one of my favorites of us from the night he graduated from the Police Academy.

I was so proud that night.

Never in my wildest imagination could I have predicted that my son would be _wrongfully_ _convicted_ _of_ _murder_ **– murder of a criminal my son didn’t even touch.**

[**_I’m praying you will help me save my son_**](http://links.makingamericathegreatest.com/u/click?_t=79fa4a3daf024a0a886c5b498ff32e32&_m=00990d7d455248eaa05241db28baacc1&_e=kuInbR6wPowz6oVqAaRpyChvJT4Huf207cVg4miURwuIF0iR12zbzKbHkJu1sgzLcxuWegmc1Wt8u9-Koce2lA7LpKRTfaIeQzP8-fqbjyCUMKr4D9w5MS_2sxEQeiqnhLSZU5ER_wxLP6h99oDOmHB3xdK5Ggm2Nt9B2ztYWw1rkLq39-oAhE7G63fEnF_ldPkONI_TEHly1nnbDan8S9wUn-pFIcSV_Ce6wf5sXpu5H7V0kQ6Mc9Z1ijydLVJl0EZrvEVqNodJizSpoFq-Ml4Sk5ZuxlPeMhX94J2s6fgMkNSSzz7xkEnBmioFCVMRgkzb5uAk7gPOxoJPrAi1cl57wmQKmjmOjzmk8E63G2mblHjXRZNxFoWpafP543xCN7NeXA6SS45INSML1D_CPQ%3D%3D) – **but first, let me explain what happened.** Our nightmare started in October of 2020.

Terence was sitting in his patrol car when he received a report that a known gang member, Karon Hylton-Brown, was seen entering a rival gang’s territory.

Karon was a violent criminal with a rap sheet a mile long – including drugs, illegal gun possession, and assaults. Earlier that day, he was seen arguing with a rival gang member who owed him money. So Terence and other officers were concerned Karon was planning to get revenge.

When Terence saw Karon illegally driving a motorized scooter on the sidewalk without a helmet, he tried to pull him over to talk. Instead, Karon took off on the scooter.

Terence watched as Karon sped through traffic, weaving in and out of cars and blowing past red lights and stop signs.

My son knew Karon was putting others at risk, so for 3 minutes he slowly and carefully followed behind in his patrol car.

Then it happened.

Karon veered into an alleyway, drove out the other side without looking and slammed into a passing car.

After several days in the hospital, Karon died from his injuries. And here’s where the story takes a shocking turn...

Because Karon was black, and the incident happened just four months after George Floyd’s death, the anti-police mob went into frenzy.

They blamed Terence for the accident and smeared him as a racist.

There were protests and even riots. The mob threw rocks at officers, smashed store windows, and set fires.

Anti-police politicians piled on too. Without any evidence, they demanded my son be charged even though he did nothing to cause Karon’s death.

**The pressure campaign worked and prosecutors charged my son with Second-Degree Murder.**

**Terence was convicted in December 2022 and he was finally just sentenced – to 5 1⁄2 years in prison.**

Now you understand why I’m so heartbroken. The injustice is almost too much to bear.

My son was well-respected by the community he served. He trained many Rookies and set a good example for all of them. He was even awarded Officer of the Year!

But unless Terence’s appeal is successful, he’s going to prison – which is why I’m urgently turning to you for help today. The **Law Enforcement Legal Defense Fund** (LELDF) has stepped forward to pay for Terence’s defense and is actively raising funds to pay for the appeal.

If you’ve ever heard of LELDF, you know they’re a national group fighting on behalf of wrongly-accused police officers like Terence for over 30 years. LELDF has helped dozens of innocent cops – and their families – at their lowest moments.

We expect it will cost at least $150,000 to appeal Terence’s conviction.

So I have to ask you one of the toughest questions I’ve ever asked anyone:

[**_Will you help my son Terence fight the unjust charges against him by donating to LELDF today?_**](http://links.makingamericathegreatest.com/u/click?_t=79fa4a3daf024a0a886c5b498ff32e32&_m=00990d7d455248eaa05241db28baacc1&_e=kuInbR6wPowz6oVqAaRpyChvJT4Huf207cVg4miURwuIF0iR12zbzKbHkJu1sgzLcxuWegmc1Wt8u9-Koce2lA7LpKRTfaIeQzP8-fqbjyCUMKr4D9w5MS_2sxEQeiqnhLSZU5ER_wxLP6h99oDOmHB3xdK5Ggm2Nt9B2ztYWw1rkLq39-oAhE7G63fEnF_ldPkONI_TEHly1nnbDan8S9wUn-pFIcSV_Ce6wf5sXpu5H7V0kQ6Mc9Z1ijydLVJljxvd4I1ui26YsfmfdXXM3UISVQ6aralGiFh9b1cwBFR5vnrYopD362JE5cyoSRZko_QaK1q7bCH8poJROnZDZIn6plI6F7G_a7G3JBpkIDaWWO1lTmZVr71DkujCMlSScQjGoTCh2BGm-yzi3gJjnQ%3D%3D)

I’m not asking you to donate the entire $150,000 yourself – though it would be a huge weight off our shoulders if you are able to help that way.

[**_But your tax-deductible gift of $35, $50, $100, or more will help LELDF fully fund Terence’s appeal over the next 12 months._**](http://links.makingamericathegreatest.com/u/click?_t=79fa4a3daf024a0a886c5b498ff32e32&_m=00990d7d455248eaa05241db28baacc1&_e=kuInbR6wPowz6oVqAaRpyChvJT4Huf207cVg4miURwuIF0iR12zbzKbHkJu1sgzLcxuWegmc1Wt8u9-Koce2lA7LpKRTfaIeQzP8-fqbjyCUMKr4D9w5MS_2sxEQeiqnhLSZU5ER_wxLP6h99oDOmHB3xdK5Ggm2Nt9B2ztYWw1rkLq39-oAhE7G63fEnF_ldPkONI_TEHly1nnbDan8S9wUn-pFIcSV_Ce6wf5sXpu5H7V0kQ6Mc9Z1ijydLVJlR73SNFswHEQE0hoXp7JF-wglqmropBEho0SLQPqqbMvx7uQ7XtVflF43nF4SABmo1CDLHfZLFlqA68Iod45hsp4ca-ap9lRf0J088fCmuSz8FHm-2-S6SKHs8HRZo8K0s8QGpeO3d7eiXbrzTA2t3Q%3D%3D) If I had anywhere else to turn, I wouldn’t be so bold as to ask for your help.

But I already lost my husband. He was a police officer too, and he was so proud that Terence followed in his footsteps. I simply can’t bear the thought of having another family member ripped away from me.

[**_So if you are at all able, please follow this link to make a tax-deductible donation to the Law Enforcement Legal Defense Fund to help my Terence._**](http://links.makingamericathegreatest.com/u/click?_t=79fa4a3daf024a0a886c5b498ff32e32&_m=00990d7d455248eaa05241db28baacc1&_e=kuInbR6wPowz6oVqAaRpyChvJT4Huf207cVg4miURwuIF0iR12zbzKbHkJu1sgzLcxuWegmc1Wt8u9-Koce2lA7LpKRTfaIeQzP8-fqbjyCUMKr4D9w5MS_2sxEQeiqnhLSZU5ER_wxLP6h99oDOmHB3xdK5Ggm2Nt9B2ztYWw1rkLq39-oAhE7G63fEnF_ldPkONI_TEHly1nnbDan8S9wUn-pFIcSV_Ce6wf5sXpu5H7V0kQ6Mc9Z1ijydLVJlJIhv4Jjp47wBTfEQ9FKPnWZyE6ymtA9vv8HDHmJxEFHVS_6L01yAjKXAp90aLyLgH11YHADWb90l4IaubeSclcGl65KT52qW0iSPDogKQp-V8IxdIY67DDB-qTjyFgBJhvKFD4bUmf_xC0yoZAnV5Q%3D%3D)

**Any amount – $35, $50, $100, or even $500 or more – will help.**

And because LELDF is a non-profit organization, your gift is completely tax-deductible. But whatever you can afford to give, I ask that you rush it back quickly.

Right now, Terence can only rely on the good nature and generosity of kind folks like you.

Thank you for taking the time to read my letter today.

And thank you in advance for helping LELDF support Terence and other wrongly accused officers.

Gratefully,
**Patti Reilly**

P.S. Don’t get me wrong, I’m thankful the judge granted Terence bond so he doesn’t have to report to prison just yet. Hopefully it never comes to that... but to get Terence’s conviction overturned, it’s going to cost at least $150,000 to fund his appeal. [**_Will you please help me save my son by making an urgent tax-deductible donation of $35, $50, $100 or more to LELDF today?_**](http://links.makingamericathegreatest.com/u/click?_t=79fa4a3daf024a0a886c5b498ff32e32&_m=00990d7d455248eaa05241db28baacc1&_e=kuInbR6wPowz6oVqAaRpyChvJT4Huf207cVg4miURwuIF0iR12zbzKbHkJu1sgzLcxuWegmc1Wt8u9-Koce2lA7LpKRTfaIeQzP8-fqbjyCUMKr4D9w5MS_2sxEQeiqnhLSZU5ER_wxLP6h99oDOmHB3xdK5Ggm2Nt9B2ztYWw1rkLq39-oAhE7G63fEnF_ldPkONI_TEHly1nnbDan8S9wUn-pFIcSV_Ce6wf5sXpu5H7V0kQ6Mc9Z1ijydLVJlz6EM0xVOAW8zreUNxEPpD63kU_RAit_5VMMune5nljIdUaYqBd3ARL2O8ckiFdFLt87ryEVsRNyYTzcbCd3ZHEJXEd2jpnRt71b7efzMgjF5ara155Jn8RUpoFwjiA_iAUpv6dTmPCpYFN37F57eOA%3D%3D) Thank you for standing with Terence during this nightmare.
--------

_More such officers who sacrifice so much for will face similar fates unless we speak out and stand up for the brave men and women in blue. The next time you see a police officer in your community, please thank them for their service. To read more about our mission or the other Law Enforcement officers we're defending, please visit**www.PoliceDefense.org**. And remember -Blue Lives Matter!_
_(C) Law Enforcement Legal Defense Fund | [www.PoliceDefense.org](http://links.makingamericathegreatest.com/u/click?_t=79fa4a3daf024a0a886c5b498ff32e32&_m=00990d7d455248eaa05241db28baacc1&_e=kuInbR6wPowz6oVqAaRpyOjsH7zsHIXHcr2jjYNQgH8M7L9ljQs2NP15z0riN2ACTwsx8m9wQQCLR5FBfh9dRDIpOe_PUAPw4wMG3zp-IRfPyuuWLhFzng0Fjj-XOcbUyDBzp5EXGv9SD1GEjE0jDoPsfJgmjHVH6NK-ei3fCylYBPBiUdEY8RZ6AyPYlgxfZxjzR54nrVeO73LhUi8AGA%3D%3D)
2560 Huntington Ave. Suite 203, Alexandria, VA, 22303_

subject: 𝘿𝙞𝙙 𝙮𝙤𝙪 𝙫𝙤𝙩𝙚 𝙛𝙤𝙧 𝙋𝙧𝙚𝙨𝙞𝙙𝙚𝙣𝙩 𝙏𝙧𝙪𝙢𝙥 𝙖𝙣𝙙 𝙍𝙚𝙥𝙪𝙗𝙡𝙞𝙘𝙖𝙣𝙨?

body:
This is unusual, friend.

We were examining our voting records and can't seem to find your results.

Did you vote for President Trump and Republicans?

If you could, please do us a quick favor and help us correct our records.

name: The Babylon Bee
subject: How you can survive the end of the world
body:
I don’t mean to worry you – but the apocalypse is nigh!

| | | [](https://e.firstlook.news/rd/9z2z40r6ql30j7s1fhubl3d5mvlb58gmv7snmkd22m8_rp22sh2s8i6epj4cdhmapr2c5h2bs)
---
|
---
Hey there, I don't mean to worry you - but the apocalypse is nigh!I know, I know. You've been hearing false alarms your whole life from doomsday cults and Greta Thunberg. **But THIS warning is no joke** : with the imminent threats of climate change, alien invasion, zombie attacks, dangerous MAGA terrorists, and other countless scenarios, the world could literally end before you finish reading this sentence.Oh good - it looks like it didn't. **_But that doesn 't mean you're safe!_****[Claim you FREE Guide to the Apocalypse today and learn how to survive any end-times situation, from the coming communist takeover to the rise of AI-powered death robots. It's the only way to be prepared!](https://e.firstlook.news/rd/9z2zvoq2nv7b41m7kup451qq5788vnrsee57qeumts0_rp22sh2s8i6epj4cdhmapr2c5h2bs)**

[](https://e.firstlook.news/rd/9z2z1q7up95jjt5brkifn8h0qrndk2urcaksgj2h8q8_rp22sh2s8i6epj4cdhmapr2c5h2bs)

[ Subscribe and Get your Free Copy Now >>](https://e.firstlook.news/rd/9z2z2v7n5ms5fo5pjr3vjcelgm17kidg6r8hjerkul8_rp22sh2s8i6epj4cdhmapr2c5h2bs)
---
This book includes nearly everything you'll need to live through the apocalypse, including:
---
* Handy attack moves to fight off zombies, commies, and other brainless monsters
* Easy bunker construction guides so you can get started building your own apocalypse safe space today
* Interior decorating tips that will wow any guests in your 50-story underground nuclear silo
* Weapon assembly DIY guides on how to put together the very best tools for fighting off all kinds of post-apocalyptic horrors
* Funny stick figures
* And as a Premium Member, you'll also receive exclusive access to the Babylon Bee's new **_January 6: The Most Deadliest Day_** movie.

---
_Other_ how-to books just tell you we're doomed, and the collapse of Western Civilization is imminent and leave you to your own devices.But the _Babylon Bee 's Guide to the Apocalypse_ goes further and gives you the tools you need to survive it._And, hey - if you don't buy a copy, it's not like it's the end of the world. _ **[**Except IT IS! So become a Babylon Bee Premium Subscriber TODAY for as little as $7 per month and get this most(ly) useful guide to the end of the world - as well as exclusive access to our _January 6: The Most Deadliest Day_ movie - as a thank you for your support.**](https://e.firstlook.news/rd/9z2zt9dqv946ogbek8dqaj639lefok79krouqhn0gk0_rp22sh2s8i6epj4cdhmapr2c5h2bs)**

---
Friend, if you want to live, you'll find simple instructions for survival in this book. One hundred percent useful information like......reports from the multiverse where we have an intrepid reporter on the ground telling you how the world ends in every possible universe......attractive infographics and charts on EVERY page that even YOU can understand...... and helpful financial tips for what kind of currency and precious metals to hoard for the end of the world. So, if Revelation gave you nightmares as a child, rest easy. **[Subscribe today as a Premium Member to the Babylon Bee, and we'll send you the Guide to the Apocalypse for FREE. Plus, gain exclusive access to the Babylon Bee's _January 6: The Most Deadliest Day_ movie, available only to our premium members!](https://e.firstlook.news/rd/9z2z0v0n940oa5d9mi1o85qiqjl88bbojr5dt7uqqu8_rp22sh2s8i6epj4cdhmapr2c5h2bs)**

clean_body: I don’t mean to worry you – but the apocalypse is nigh! | | | | Hey there, I don't mean to worry you - but the apocalypse is nigh!I know, I know. You've been hearing false alarms your whole life from doomsday cults and Greta Thunberg. But THIS warning is no joke : with the imminent threats of climate change, alien invasion, zombie attacks, dangerous MAGA terrorists, and other countless scenarios, the world could literally end before you finish reading this sentence.Oh good - it looks like it didn't. But that doesn 't mean you're safe! This book includes nearly everything you'll need to live through the apocalypse, including: Handy attack moves to fight off zombies, commies, and other brainless monsters Easy bunker construction guides so you can get started building your own apocalypse safe space today Interior decorating tips that will wow any guests in your 50-story underground nuclear silo Weapon assembly DIY guides on how to put together the very best tools for fighting off all kinds of post-apocalyptic horrors Funny stick figures And as a Premium Member, you'll also receive exclusive access to the Babylon Bee's new January 6: The Most Deadliest Day movie. Other how-to books just tell you we're doomed, and the collapse of Western Civilization is imminent and leave you to your own devices.But the Babylon Bee 's Guide to the Apocalypse goes further and gives you the tools you need to survive it.And, hey - if you don't buy a copy, it's not like it's the end of the world. Friend, if you want to live, you'll find simple instructions for survival in this book. One hundred percent useful information like......reports from the multiverse where we have an intrepid reporter on the ground telling you how the world ends in every possible universe......attractive infographics and charts on EVERY page that even YOU can understand...... and helpful financial tips for what kind of currency and precious metals to hoard for the end of the world. So, if Revelation gave you nightmares as a child, rest easy. DillonCEO| The Babylon Bee | Copyright(C) 2023 Babylon Bee, All rights reserved. name: Hillsdale College via American Action News
subject: The study of God
body:
One of the chief aims of education at Hillsdale College is to understand what kind of being we are, as well as our purpose.

This sponsored message from American Action News is on behalf of Hillsdale College
[](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zd5c055jot36ugalhdv6bigqs9lvlg1446trhh3g_rp22sh2s8i6epj4cdhm6or4c3h2bs) Dear Fellow American, I hope your day is going well. I’m writing to let you know about something I think you’ll find useful in your learning. Reason and speech are gifts from God that enable us to think about God and to worship Him. [](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zb5cno8l3kctk2153fdsebtp5sfhv3pga32c18a8_rp22sh2s8i6epj4cdhm6or4c3h2bs) One of the chief aims of education at Hillsdale College is to understand what kind of being we are, as well as our purpose. That, in turn, makes it possible to begin to understand our relationship to God.

The study of God, also known as “theology,” has had a profound impact on Western civilization, stretching back thousands of years to the ancient Hebrews. And that’s what Hillsdale’s **“Theology 101”** online course is about—the development of theology from the Old Testament through the twentieth century.

**“Theology 101”** has been a popular course, so I’m pleased to let you know that it is [**now available for you to own on DVD**](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zvj1ilh29pskh1cnhf3ckfp5ke4uun2dhtcnbbe0_rp22sh2s8i6epj4cdhm6or4c3h2bs). You can add it to your home library or give it as a gift to a friend or relative.

We do have a limited number of sets in stock, though—and they go fast—so don’t delay in getting your copy of **“Theology 101”** on DVD. Secure yours right now at: **[https://secured.hillsdale.edu/support-hillsdales-online-courses-theology-101-dvd](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zta5e9rj43rj0a0pk31i9sosktto17mmun6l7meo_rp22sh2s8i6epj4cdhm6or4c3h2bs)** Best regards,

Jeremiah Regan, Ph.D.
Executive Director of Online Learning
Hillsdale College
---
