subject: KEEP FIGHTING
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Rudy Giuliani Freedom Fund Legal Defense Trust
body:
Newsweek: Trump Ally Rudy Giuliani 'About to Find Himself' in Jail—Legal Analyst

Newsweek: Trump Ally Rudy Giuliani 'About to Find Himself' in Jail—Legal Analyst
| [](https://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2zd30h4gsb2gsnek22pbcmhhq0mpcvr9egdcd6uuo_rp22sh2s8i6epj4cdhm1ob1cjh2bs)
---
Dear Friend,
---
Even as the Deep State continues its efforts to rob me of EVERYTHING – _my home, my possessions, my credit cards, my car_ – _I will never surrender the fight for my freedom and justice._
---
And even with headlines like these popping up, I refuse to roll over like a dog and give up my rights:
---
**_Newsweek_ : Trump Ally Rudy Giuliani 'About to Find Himself' in Jail—Legal Analyst**
---
Outside the New York City Courthouse, I was asked, _“Do you think Mr. Trump can help you get out of this?”_
---
Here’s what I said: _**“Mr. Trump doesn’t have to help me get out of it. All Mr. Trump has to do is straighten out the legal system and we’ll find out who the real criminals are.”**_
---
Anyone with common sense knows this case was a complete abuse of power. _They want me to pay _$148 MILLION!__
---
It’s punitive! It’s ridiculous! This was done solely because I’m a Republican living in the Democrat Dictatorship of New York.
---
But now that President Trump is headed back to the White House, I have hope that our broken, corrupt, and predatory judicial system will be fixed – and justice for ALL Americans will be restored.
---
Don’t forget: President Trump refused to surrender to the tyrannical Democrats even after four wrongful arrests, a felony conviction, and an assassin’s bullet. And he just won the White House!
---
_**That’s why I will _KEEP_ _FIGHTING_ for my God-given freedoms and rights.**_
---
If you can support me in my fight, I’d be eternally grateful. But if you cannot, please do not even think twice. Take care of yourself and your family!
---
[**If you can, and, seriously, only if you can, please make a contribution to my Legal Defense Trust – the Rudy Giuliani Freedom Fund – as I keep fighting for my freedom and justice as the Democrats’ Deep State tries to JAIL me for life.**](https://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2zb7h16ks1f447gbh45rdiorue45q3rf1dulnhg70_rp22sh2s8i6epj4cdhm1ob1cjh2bs)

name: Birch Gold Group
subject: The Wealthy’s New Strategy for Prosperity (Beyond 2024, 2028)
body:
As conservatives, we know the importance of playing the long game.

| | | | **My Strategy For Long-Term Prosperity (Beyond 2024, 2028)**
---
**My Strategy For Long-Term Prosperity
(Beyond 2024, 2028)**
| | As conservatives, we know the [importance of playing the long game](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zvidg2at4llm7698fvusrharcojsh5cpfgmer96g_rp22sh2s8i6epj4cdhm1ob1cph2bs). We teach our children to love America. We exercise our 2nd Amendment rights to protect our families. We fiercely defend our right to free speech.**Are you applying that same long-term thinking to your savings?** Consider this: America's ballooning government debt, growing support for socialist policies, and erosion of traditional values aren't going away anytime soon. These are long-term issues that require long-term solutions.And that’s why it’s **more critical than ever** to protect your hard-earned savings. This is where a Gold IRA comes in. name: Hillsdale College via First Look News
subject: What is our purpose?
body:
One of the chief aims of education at Hillsdale College is to understand what kind of being we are, as well as our purpose.

This sponsored message from First Look is on behalf of Hillsdale College
[](https://e.firstlook.news/rd/9z2zms9s7fcpbanta8b6hlg1p123q8fq70fkpumgun0_rp22sh2s8i6epj4cdhm9pj2cdh2bs) Dear Fellow American, I hope your day is going well. I’m writing to let you know about something I think you’ll find useful in your learning. Reason and speech are gifts from God that enable us to think about God and to worship Him. [](https://e.firstlook.news/rd/9z2zckrb4o9ujetvkhc846me4ohhjibjlpv8cn7bkfg_rp22sh2s8i6epj4cdhm9pj2cdh2bs) One of the chief aims of education at Hillsdale College is to understand what kind of being we are, as well as our purpose. That, in turn, makes it possible to begin to understand our relationship to God.

The study of God, also known as “theology,” has had a profound impact on Western civilization, stretching back thousands of years to the ancient Hebrews. And that’s what Hillsdale’s **“Theology 101”** online course is about—the development of theology from the Old Testament through the twentieth century.

**“Theology 101”** has been a popular course, so I’m pleased to let you know that it is [**now available for you to own on DVD**](https://e.firstlook.news/rd/9z2zvcj41iii8o8mvspl0len75qmqqlabjvb0l0k1bo_rp22sh2s8i6epj4cdhm9pj2cdh2bs). You can add it to your home library or give it as a gift to a friend or relative.

We do have a limited number of sets in stock, though—and they go fast—so don’t delay in getting your copy of **“Theology 101”** on DVD. Secure yours right now at: **[https://secured.hillsdale.edu/support-hillsdales-online-courses-theology-101-dvd](https://e.firstlook.news/rd/9z2zfk88fbltrmsj2bo4pv82896l0cuh95bfv3dmbq0_rp22sh2s8i6epj4cdhm9pj2cdh2bs)** Best regards,

Jeremiah Regan, Ph.D.
Executive Director of Online Learning
Hillsdale College
---

name: Hillsdale College via Your America News
subject: What is our purpose?
body:
One of the chief aims of education at Hillsdale College is to understand what kind of being we are, as well as our purpose.

This sponsored message from Your America News is on behalf of Hillsdale College
[](https://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2zlvmsl63p1ffckfevlto82mhc1hfm2ps9tn25di0_rp22sh2s8i6epj4cdjm4o36c1h2bs) Dear Fellow American, I hope your day is going well. I’m writing to let you know about something I think you’ll find useful in your learning. Reason and speech are gifts from God that enable us to think about God and to worship Him. [](https://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2zl4hfig1tt0pmt2jna74ss278oclse267smd598g_rp22sh2s8i6epj4cdjm4o36c1h2bs) One of the chief aims of education at Hillsdale College is to understand what kind of being we are, as well as our purpose. That, in turn, makes it possible to begin to understand our relationship to God.

The study of God, also known as “theology,” has had a profound impact on Western civilization, stretching back thousands of years to the ancient Hebrews. And that’s what Hillsdale’s **“Theology 101”** online course is about—the development of theology from the Old Testament through the twentieth century.

**“Theology 101”** has been a popular course, so I’m pleased to let you know that it is [**now available for you to own on DVD**](https://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2z1aas48do5tftj825m31jgg23pum8k6htvun1t58_rp22sh2s8i6epj4cdjm4o36c1h2bs). You can add it to your home library or give it as a gift to a friend or relative.

We do have a limited number of sets in stock, though—and they go fast—so don’t delay in getting your copy of **“Theology 101”** on DVD. Secure yours right now at: **[https://secured.hillsdale.edu/support-hillsdales-online-courses-theology-101-dvd](https://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2ztlojesqkk5seh3sqlmrtvc2jnsrltcbek9g2318_rp22sh2s8i6epj4cdjm4o36c1h2bs)** Best regards,

Jeremiah Regan, Ph.D.
Executive Director of Online Learning
Hillsdale College
---

Your America
---

name: Rudy Giuliani
subject: KEEP FIGHTING
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Rudy Giuliani Freedom Fund Legal Defense Trust
body:
Newsweek: Trump Ally Rudy Giuliani 'About to Find Himself' in Jail—Legal Analyst

Newsweek: Trump Ally Rudy Giuliani 'About to Find Himself' in Jail—Legal Analyst
| [](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2z4bqnl61k9hgpgcl6h15s3vl3rsho2atbq10uulo_rp22sh2s8i6epj4cdjm4o31c9h2bs)
---
Dear Friend,
---
Even as the Deep State continues its efforts to rob me of EVERYTHING – _my home, my possessions, my credit cards, my car_ – _I will never surrender the fight for my freedom and justice._
---
And even with headlines like these popping up, I refuse to roll over like a dog and give up my rights:
---
**_Newsweek_ : Trump Ally Rudy Giuliani 'About to Find Himself' in Jail—Legal Analyst**
---
Outside the New York City Courthouse, I was asked, _“Do you think Mr. Trump can help you get out of this?”_
---
Here’s what I said: _**“Mr. Trump doesn’t have to help me get out of it. All Mr. Trump has to do is straighten out the legal system and we’ll find out who the real criminals are.”**_
---
Anyone with common sense knows this case was a complete abuse of power. _They want me to pay _$148 MILLION!__
---
It’s punitive! It’s ridiculous! This was done solely because I’m a Republican living in the Democrat Dictatorship of New York.
---
But now that President Trump is headed back to the White House, I have hope that our broken, corrupt, and predatory judicial system will be fixed – and justice for ALL Americans will be restored.
---
Don’t forget: President Trump refused to surrender to the tyrannical Democrats even after four wrongful arrests, a felony conviction, and an assassin’s bullet. And he just won the White House!
---
_**That’s why I will _KEEP_ _FIGHTING_ for my God-given freedoms and rights.**_
---
If you can support me in my fight, I’d be eternally grateful. But if you cannot, please do not even think twice. Take care of yourself and your family!
---
[**If you can, and, seriously, only if you can, please make a contribution to my Legal Defense Trust – the Rudy Giuliani Freedom Fund – as I keep fighting for my freedom and justice as the Democrats’ Deep State tries to JAIL me for life.**](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zfr46se8q6t828hhmqv1g0ac86g4bi8qcbr12c3g_rp22sh2s8i6epj4cdjm4o31c9h2bs)

We fiercely defend our right to free speech.**Are you applying that same long-term thinking to your savings?** Consider this: America's ballooning government debt, growing support for socialist policies, and erosion of traditional values aren't going away anytime soon. HHS has a budget of nearly $2 billion and administers federal health programs including Medicare, Medicaid and the Affordable Care Act. HHS [...]...Click to read more Read More On Jan 25, 2023, Sen. John Thune (R-SD) delivered an eloquent pro-life speech, which appears below. Yesterday, Senator Thune was elected Senate Majority Leader. Mr. President, on Friday, as they have done for decades, Americans from around the country— many of them young people—took to the streets of Washington, DC, to march for life. This [...] Kennedy would oversee the Centers for Disease Control and Prevention, the Food and Drug Administration, and other agencies, if confirmed. FBI Houston SAC Douglas Williams said in a social media post that the suspect was plotting a possible attack from his apartment in far west Houston. New York Governor Kathy Hochul (D) is reviving the highly controversial congestion toll in New York City, reversing her decision to indefinitely "pause" the plan this past summer.In June, Hochul stopped the proposed $15 toll for those entering Manhattan below 60th Street following widespread opposition. The Metropolitan Transportation Authority agreed to pause the plan indefinitely.'You wonder why people are cynical of elected officials? name: Hillsdale College via 1600 Daily
subject: What is our purpose?
body:
One of the chief aims of education at Hillsdale College is to understand what kind of being we are, as well as our purpose.

This sponsored message from 1600 Daily is on behalf of Hillsdale College
[](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zqqokiievtak5m1q5intodgj6hfmarb1kcksn7d8_rp22sh2s8i6epj4cdjm4o32cth2bs) Dear Fellow American, I hope your day is going well. I’m writing to let you know about something I think you’ll find useful in your learning. Reason and speech are gifts from God that enable us to think about God and to worship Him. [](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zb2fego448fmjq6qq1dserd5074m1inm67c97qr8_rp22sh2s8i6epj4cdjm4o32cth2bs) One of the chief aims of education at Hillsdale College is to understand what kind of being we are, as well as our purpose. That, in turn, makes it possible to begin to understand our relationship to God.

The study of God, also known as “theology,” has had a profound impact on Western civilization, stretching back thousands of years to the ancient Hebrews. And that’s what Hillsdale’s **“Theology 101”** online course is about—the development of theology from the Old Testament through the twentieth century.

**“Theology 101”** has been a popular course, so I’m pleased to let you know that it is [**now available for you to own on DVD**](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2z3es5r41ha1lhftrbtvop77n4qrh9n2qmsihlbr8_rp22sh2s8i6epj4cdjm4o32cth2bs). You can add it to your home library or give it as a gift to a friend or relative.

We do have a limited number of sets in stock, though—and they go fast—so don’t delay in getting your copy of **“Theology 101”** on DVD. Secure yours right now at: **[https://secured.hillsdale.edu/support-hillsdales-online-courses-theology-101-dvd](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2z8g7a7ahfrfrgeit07tojerl8vgpn3sf034c19do_rp22sh2s8i6epj4cdjm4o32cth2bs)** Best regards,

Jeremiah Regan, Ph.D.
Executive Director of Online Learning
Hillsdale College

We fiercely defend our right to free speech.**Are you applying that same long-term thinking to your savings?** Consider this: America's ballooning government debt, growing support for socialist policies, and erosion of traditional values aren't going away anytime soon. These are long-term issues that require long-term solutions.And that’s why it’s **more critical than ever** to protect your hard-earned savings. This is where a Gold IRA comes in. body:

| _You're getting this message because you’ve supported good causes and Democratic candidates. We need your support to continue fighting for our democracy. We love having you in our network, but if you no longer wish to hear from us, you can[unsubscribe here](https://default.salsalabs.org/T081831fc-a6f8-4f3b-a3de-677d6404b622/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)._

| Peter – did you see this photo of our new Democratic Senator-elects? [](https://default.salsalabs.org/T2c61a735-94c9-4a76-905d-bf6551ce0d66/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)
---
|
---
| | | | | Even though Kamala Harris lost, we still made strides in fighting for freedom and protecting our democracy. And in case you forgot:
* Andy Kim will be the first Korean-American Senator.
* For the first time ever, two Black women will be in the Senate at the same time thanks to Lisa Blunt Rochester and Angela Alsobrooks.
* Ruben Gallego will be the first Latino senator to represent Arizona.
* Elissa Slotkin and Adam Schiff were able to defend their Senate seats in tough races against far-right, extreme Republicans.

They will be the ones to defend our democracy and stand up for our democracy against a second Trump administration. They are proof that your contributions and support were the difference for their winning campaigns. [But in order to help them get the job done in the Senate, they need us to continue the fight for freedom. Will you chip in any amount to show your support for these changemakers and ensure our democracy stands tall?](https://default.salsalabs.org/T6ce69eeb-5259-4f89-900f-8f7c450d38ea/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)

---
| | |
---
| | | About Blue Amp Action: We cannot sugarcoat the current situation. Right-wing authoritarianism, defeated by a worldwide coalition during WWII, was only in hibernation. Over the past decade it has infected democratic societies--including ours. It is as simple as it is terrifying: What we do now will define the future of our country and world. We at Blue Amp Action are dedicated to liberal, open societies, where reason and science are applied to solve our problems; where civil rights--including voting rights!--are protected for all. We fight for these values every day. Speaking up on our platforms, raising the voices and the political prospects of liberal pols and pundits. **And savvy grassroots activists like you know, just like we do, that we can’t stop watching the people we help elect:_ after the elections, we have to keep organizing support for the policies we like and pushing back against the ones we don’t._** **__When the public tunes out between elections and the only people our elected officials hear from are the paid lobbyists of wealthy corporations, our government stops being accountable to the needs of ordinary families.__** **Democracy never sleeps, and neither can we.** So we ask that you support our work, so we can continue to engage in this fight every moment of every day. So our kids grow up in democracy, not dystopia. Thank you for your support for all we do! Please follow Cliff Schecter on Twitter @cliffschecter, or subscribe to The Takedown with Cliff Schecter on YouTube, to keep up to date with this battle for the heart and soul of our country. — _You're getting this message because you’ve supported good causes and Democratic candidates. We need your support to continue fighting for our democracy. We love having you in our network, but if you no longer wish to hear from us, you can[unsubscribe here](https://default.salsalabs.org/T35477a27-4a9b-4bcb-8513-05d885b246ba/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)._

name: Hillsdale College via American Values Digest
subject: Our most important online course?
body:
Marxism goes by different names to make itself seem less dangerous

This sponsored message from Conservative Broadcast is on behalf of Hillsdale College

| | | [](https://post.spmailtechnol.com/f/a/2slU1cRa8hUqkZ7wUINKLA~~/AARclAA~/RgRpGbCkP0S7aHR0cHM6Ly9vbmxpbmUuaGlsbHNkYWxlLmVkdS9jb3Vyc2VzL3JlZ2lzdGVyL21hcnhpc20tc29jaWFsaXNtLWNvbW11bmlzbT9zYz0wMTY1OE4wMjQyTDIxRE9ERUVTJnV0bV9zb3VyY2U9cHJvc3BlY3RpbmcmdXRtX21lZGl1bT1lbWFpbCZ1dG1fY2FtcGFpZ249bWFyeGlzbSZ1dG1fY29udGVudD1CR19QQS1DQi0yMDI0MTExNVcDc3BjQgpnK_oZN2fHMgF9UhRkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbVgEAAAAAA~~)
---
| | Dear Fellow American,

**I 'm excited to let you know about our free documentary course, "Marxism, Socialism, and Communism."**

Today, Marxism goes by different names to make itself seem less dangerous. I'm sure you've heard of "critical race theory," "gender theory," or even "decolonization."

I know you're not fooled by these disguises.

Without a doubt, "Marxism, Socialism, and Communism" will be one of our most important courses **because the source of these dangerous ideologies is still Karl Marx.**

It's still the same Marxism that works to destroy your property and your country.

It's still the same Marxism that seeks to abolish your family and your God.

And it's still the same Marxism that leads to famines, show trials, gulags, and other atrocities.

The truth is, there's nothing fundamentally _new_ about this "new" Marxism, except for one crucial fact...

**... it's more popular with our youth than ever before. **

That's why I invite you to gain a deeper understanding of the history of Marxism as well as the threat it poses to our liberty.

[**You can do that by registering for "Marxism, Socialism, and Communism" today.**](https://post.spmailtechnol.com/f/a/2slU1cRa8hUqkZ7wUINKLA~~/AARclAA~/RgRpGbCkP0S7aHR0cHM6Ly9vbmxpbmUuaGlsbHNkYWxlLmVkdS9jb3Vyc2VzL3JlZ2lzdGVyL21hcnhpc20tc29jaWFsaXNtLWNvbW11bmlzbT9zYz0wMTY1OE4wMjQyTDIxRE9ERUVTJnV0bV9zb3VyY2U9cHJvc3BlY3RpbmcmdXRtX21lZGl1bT1lbWFpbCZ1dG1fY2FtcGFpZ249bWFyeGlzbSZ1dG1fY29udGVudD1CR19QQS1DQi0yMDI0MTExNVcDc3BjQgpnK_oZN2fHMgF9UhRkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbVgEAAAAAA~~)

Or you can send this to a friend!

This free online course is more urgent than ever. We are at a critical time for our country, and Marxism--under a variety of names--continues to infiltrate our culture.

**Will you join us by registering for this free online course?** You can click on the secure link below to register and get access today:

[**https://online.hillsdale.edu/courses/register/marxism-socialism-communism**](https://post.spmailtechnol.com/f/a/2slU1cRa8hUqkZ7wUINKLA~~/AARclAA~/RgRpGbCkP0S7aHR0cHM6Ly9vbmxpbmUuaGlsbHNkYWxlLmVkdS9jb3Vyc2VzL3JlZ2lzdGVyL21hcnhpc20tc29jaWFsaXNtLWNvbW11bmlzbT9zYz0wMTY1OE4wMjQyTDIxRE9ERUVTJnV0bV9zb3VyY2U9cHJvc3BlY3RpbmcmdXRtX21lZGl1bT1lbWFpbCZ1dG1fY2FtcGFpZ249bWFyeGlzbSZ1dG1fY29udGVudD1CR19QQS1DQi0yMDI0MTExNVcDc3BjQgpnK_oZN2fHMgF9UhRkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbVgEAAAAAA~~)

Most colleges and universities work to indoctrinate young people with Marxism.

That's why taking this course and making it available to as many Americans as possible will be one of the most important ways you will defend liberty in America.

You're one of the reasons why we can defend liberty by producing and promoting courses like "Marxism, Socialism, and Communism"--so thank you so much for all you do.

Warm regards,

Bill Gray, '01
Vice President
Institutional Advancement
Hillsdale College

P.S. We've released one of our most important free documentary courses this month..."Marxism, Socialism, and Communism"! You can register for this course at the secure link below:

[**https://online.hillsdale.edu/courses/register/marxism-socialism-communism**](https://post.spmailtechnol.com/f/a/2slU1cRa8hUqkZ7wUINKLA~~/AARclAA~/RgRpGbCkP0S7aHR0cHM6Ly9vbmxpbmUuaGlsbHNkYWxlLmVkdS9jb3Vyc2VzL3JlZ2lzdGVyL21hcnhpc20tc29jaWFsaXNtLWNvbW11bmlzbT9zYz0wMTY1OE4wMjQyTDIxRE9ERUVTJnV0bV9zb3VyY2U9cHJvc3BlY3RpbmcmdXRtX21lZGl1bT1lbWFpbCZ1dG1fY2FtcGFpZ249bWFyeGlzbSZ1dG1fY29udGVudD1CR19QQS1DQi0yMDI0MTExNVcDc3BjQgpnK_oZN2fHMgF9UhRkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbVgEAAAAAA~~)

**Marxism currently hides behind many names ...CRT, gender ideology, or even calls for decolonization...but it's still the same Marxism that seeks to destroy your rights.**

**You can stand up to this dangerous ideology by registering for this free documentary course today!** **
**

name: Hillsdale College via Conservative Liberty Wire
subject: What is our purpose?
body:
One of the chief aims of education at Hillsdale College is to understand what kind of being we are, as well as our purpose.

This sponsored message from Conservative Liberty Wire is on behalf of Hillsdale College
[](https://links.conservativelibertywire.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=a8eb9d40be7e4ec2a40287e32f858a79&_e=DQCd6giWjzeDuG3c-_ZAfFafWqqUZWkP6ZqwFIue-FVFvQN-hx-LcwN4WpMIOsQlpHNnq4iIC4XzdNofBITEDzv7l5UdupvIYeybMCoXlp06MUfQj1KiwfiDVGEHmlopETwCjODmtO5vPF-fURdgfxZwmk9eqC5MRJetjPz9ppveNaBO_4qInWNJx1RbGHtLtigNWC65YiQjpEH0OM32hETqY7Kd9XI2CjmTr-jLBTWRghMYe6ZuFACqI-bRLKhSNYHvcakEjzydQUrMH7fgFN5FjI1vGQKXLflPiTv0q4S7Cm8ctotMFFqB-JvZ0rG_p1MDhKXCcR7IPWydCaHJJrIfmm1zCrvZb1I1y1Jo1mR0_YBXmwLDxZVmsElQ-TqHBNOgsBqda1uVfrMVkOi76MUu8qztkKUwg-w5JIHMYmSa5ukPf6oL2cMfqYJRAbAs) Dear Fellow American, I hope your day is going well. I’m writing to let you know about something I think you’ll find useful in your learning. Reason and speech are gifts from God that enable us to think about God and to worship Him. [](https://links.conservativelibertywire.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=a8eb9d40be7e4ec2a40287e32f858a79&_e=DQCd6giWjzeDuG3c-_ZAfFafWqqUZWkP6ZqwFIue-FVFvQN-hx-LcwN4WpMIOsQlpHNnq4iIC4XzdNofBITEDzv7l5UdupvIYeybMCoXlp06MUfQj1KiwfiDVGEHmlopETwCjODmtO5vPF-fURdgfxZwmk9eqC5MRJetjPz9ppveNaBO_4qInWNJx1RbGHtLtigNWC65YiQjpEH0OM32hETqY7Kd9XI2CjmTr-jLBTWRghMYe6ZuFACqI-bRLKhSNYHvcakEjzydQUrMH7fgFN5FjI1vGQKXLflPiTv0q4QZT9Jtbm6el_bJS5s1NKGOyjZ4xufoY8Pm3E2Vib8GnfYLA04m4BrSsqARvD4A_S1ZrBVVjSXg9ak5ju_j5nig2lX1vWoiu56Q-YyX-4CJvut3DDuv3J5xZ-ZZpff1CQDkMeaOBHIlTkOz6-PK8GrM) One of the chief aims of education at Hillsdale College is to understand what kind of being we are, as well as our purpose. That, in turn, makes it possible to begin to understand our relationship to God.

The study of God, also known as “theology,” has had a profound impact on Western civilization, stretching back thousands of years to the ancient Hebrews. And that’s what Hillsdale’s **“Theology 101”** online course is about—the development of theology from the Old Testament through the twentieth century.

**“Theology 101”** has been a popular course, so I’m pleased to let you know that it is [**now available for you to own on DVD**](https://links.conservativelibertywire.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=a8eb9d40be7e4ec2a40287e32f858a79&_e=DQCd6giWjzeDuG3c-_ZAfFafWqqUZWkP6ZqwFIue-FVFvQN-hx-LcwN4WpMIOsQlpHNnq4iIC4XzdNofBITEDzv7l5UdupvIYeybMCoXlp06MUfQj1KiwfiDVGEHmlopETwCjODmtO5vPF-fURdgfxZwmk9eqC5MRJetjPz9ppveNaBO_4qInWNJx1RbGHtLtigNWC65YiQjpEH0OM32hETqY7Kd9XI2CjmTr-jLBTWRghMYe6ZuFACqI-bRLKhSNYHvcakEjzydQUrMH7fgFN5FjI1vGQKXLflPiTv0q4TNlzufK30aLFjdkdle7Gn70OASAccHJRe5lNXvMAIrgQQ0Y2vGFaX_YtBgTeTlK4xPCu-tEJifPPgMMsI3eqTcTl9zO2p3lilNoFhhSiZ-T8bdv0AoWiNkzG47fylbp9g2OZWOEE_9_0SohVR5mkry). You can add it to your home library or give it as a gift to a friend or relative.

We do have a limited number of sets in stock, though—and they go fast—so don’t delay in getting your copy of **“Theology 101”** on DVD. Secure yours right now at: **[https://secured.hillsdale.edu/support-hillsdales-online-courses-theology-101-dvd](https://links.conservativelibertywire.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=a8eb9d40be7e4ec2a40287e32f858a79&_e=DQCd6giWjzeDuG3c-_ZAfFafWqqUZWkP6ZqwFIue-FVFvQN-hx-LcwN4WpMIOsQlpHNnq4iIC4XzdNofBITEDzv7l5UdupvIYeybMCoXlp06MUfQj1KiwfiDVGEHmlopETwCjODmtO5vPF-fURdgfxZwmk9eqC5MRJetjPz9ppveNaBO_4qInWNJx1RbGHtLtigNWC65YiQjpEH0OM32hETqY7Kd9XI2CjmTr-jLBTWRghMYe6ZuFACqI-bRLKhSNYHvcakEjzydQUrMH7fgFN5FjI1vGQKXLflPiTv0q4T9KUJoyv8qrE19CXBokKdsKd5tdhXhVeuh_OAgUqGvRWbIqSC2ellXHndKmxuN8UgUEVLHsU5pRyZTlb8E00iNCn_TESYPWWstERx3l5rW6qoT1eBeOSLlX5axVJY4yf8WRI3Wgo9ahfDwFRd18p2j)** Best regards,

Jeremiah Regan, Ph.D.

name: Hillsdale College via Freedom Nation Today
subject: It’s still the same Marxism
body:
Marxism goes by different names to make itself seem less dangerous

This sponsored message from Freedom Nation Today is on behalf of Hillsdale College

| | | [](https://links.freedomnationtoday.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=b49852d46ffc444f932447b0649343dc&_e=ecRlQu6UCCUOBkX5Xh8s1kgn9ssYI9ag9sd-NPYOrWegcreWZn7cbRViUStfuJNBhewKvEErvJFzWGFe0ugWfYMzmCc_Eeud7blGo7whsQOUdVyQGTMbjaTqk8K8qgTfIrihQGZ7UYLoYnK8iUwQqoLGmnYzwxstoL1_6sQmaHFxy4IeoDlqxv1_lcOklCuVRUlzAKOw_lv24jJpwonqkQhNZ5YqObmThMbxWMegt9SLM3E7zQEi-_3HCIkgbwXXi5g4RF15L6041flLoLf5n6OTCrO20HInLeHhX6Ja78FXCmnxrmPjQ3v-mJ_e-XNfZgbKQWmoLXNPrUin7poO1bzhezskOiIn18ITyrpBFCbQaGCzbTTswg6asVGutozYH7txCA86005TvRRBKagBWcDVkpJFr9lR1ovkEiAunYI%3D)

| | Dear Fellow American,

**I 'm excited to let you know about our free documentary course, "Marxism, Socialism, and Communism."**

Today, Marxism goes by different names to make itself seem less dangerous. I'm sure you've heard of "critical race theory," "gender theory," or even "decolonization."

I know you're not fooled by these disguises.

Without a doubt, "Marxism, Socialism, and Communism" will be one of our most important courses **because the source of these dangerous ideologies is still Karl Marx.**

It's still the same Marxism that works to destroy your property and your country.

It's still the same Marxism that seeks to abolish your family and your God.

And it's still the same Marxism that leads to famines, show trials, gulags, and other atrocities.

The truth is, there's nothing fundamentally _new_ about this "new" Marxism, except for one crucial fact...

**... it's more popular with our youth than ever before. **

That's why I invite you to gain a deeper understanding of the history of Marxism as well as the threat it poses to our liberty.

[**You can do that by registering for "Marxism, Socialism, and Communism" today.**](https://links.freedomnationtoday.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=b49852d46ffc444f932447b0649343dc&_e=ecRlQu6UCCUOBkX5Xh8s1kgn9ssYI9ag9sd-NPYOrWegcreWZn7cbRViUStfuJNBhewKvEErvJFzWGFe0ugWfYMzmCc_Eeud7blGo7whsQOUdVyQGTMbjaTqk8K8qgTfIrihQGZ7UYLoYnK8iUwQqoLGmnYzwxstoL1_6sQmaHFxy4IeoDlqxv1_lcOklCuVRUlzAKOw_lv24jJpwonqkQhNZ5YqObmThMbxWMegt9SLM3E7zQEi-_3HCIkgbwXXi5g4RF15L6041flLoLf5n0nkJLgJTj7WPJeqhgHiFt1izhHwMoQQqYMmM1e5gz-iPBXQPdhDa0xjIUg9KjXccatQazgT0w_NH-Xi1bhaoufDe3wUYAXwbcAnYV4pOMcgE3Vqop2cGEb56ZA4toHElacNOCZtkbqA-2FJtDX-6ko%3D)

Or you can send this to a friend!

This free online course is more urgent than ever. We are at a critical time for our country, and Marxism--under a variety of names--continues to infiltrate our culture.

**Will you join us by registering for this free online course?** You can click on the secure link below to register and get access today:

[**https://online.hillsdale.edu/courses/register/marxism-socialism-communism**](https://links.freedomnationtoday.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=b49852d46ffc444f932447b0649343dc&_e=ecRlQu6UCCUOBkX5Xh8s1kgn9ssYI9ag9sd-NPYOrWegcreWZn7cbRViUStfuJNBhewKvEErvJFzWGFe0ugWfYMzmCc_Eeud7blGo7whsQOUdVyQGTMbjaTqk8K8qgTfIrihQGZ7UYLoYnK8iUwQqoLGmnYzwxstoL1_6sQmaHFxy4IeoDlqxv1_lcOklCuVRUlzAKOw_lv24jJpwonqkQhNZ5YqObmThMbxWMegt9SLM3E7zQEi-_3HCIkgbwXXi5g4RF15L6041flLoLf5n42wr8SEwBH0BhGqtUvFdyjn6ptKCDaTgieIxjlpYOgqAW2BqIuiakDfl8OXHFVakHeF-1WG-yE5xIa8Wi8lqfb6YsN3kuthMmmIFeU01ieFKLxDBOgcJWJQEe-WHvztRIwWeBnAFdk4l9TL8TM_tT4%3D)

Most colleges and universities work to indoctrinate young people with Marxism.

That's why taking this course and making it available to as many Americans as possible will be one of the most important ways you will defend liberty in America.

You're one of the reasons why we can defend liberty by producing and promoting courses like "Marxism, Socialism, and Communism"--so thank you so much for all you do.

Warm regards,

Bill Gray, '01
Vice President
Institutional Advancement
Hillsdale College

P.S. We've released one of our most important free documentary courses this month..."Marxism, Socialism, and Communism"! You can register for this course at the secure link below:

[**https://online.hillsdale.edu/courses/register/marxism-socialism-communism**](https://links.freedomnationtoday.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=b49852d46ffc444f932447b0649343dc&_e=ecRlQu6UCCUOBkX5Xh8s1kgn9ssYI9ag9sd-NPYOrWegcreWZn7cbRViUStfuJNBhewKvEErvJFzWGFe0ugWfYMzmCc_Eeud7blGo7whsQOUdVyQGTMbjaTqk8K8qgTfIrihQGZ7UYLoYnK8iUwQqoLGmnYzwxstoL1_6sQmaHFxy4IeoDlqxv1_lcOklCuVRUlzAKOw_lv24jJpwonqkQhNZ5YqObmThMbxWMegt9SLM3E7zQEi-_3HCIkgbwXXi5g4RF15L6041flLoLf5n3S9wnwv1zRbpo2VO7vDe7VjSpIQXo6410BrWp0EkS5Ho42XyU5a4hlZYJ14hWemQ7NsaJ63pbhq-m82z7fskgqmfHK3qKS2v4-tU1MblwYDzSifkM63gjRRxhdbvmi9S6yGczyWGT7RzZso0mjz2BM%3D)

**Marxism currently hides behind many names ...CRT, gender ideology, or even calls for decolonization...but it's still the same Marxism that seeks to destroy your rights.**

**You can stand up to this dangerous ideology by registering for this free documentary course today!** **

Today, Marxism goes by different names to make itself seem less dangerous. I'm sure you've heard of "critical race theory," "gender theory," or even "decolonization." I know you're not fooled by these disguises. Without a doubt, "Marxism, Socialism, and Communism" will be one of our most important courses because the source of these dangerous ideologies is still Karl Marx. It's still the same Marxism that works to destroy your property and your country. It's still the same Marxism that seeks to abolish your family and your God. And it's still the same Marxism that leads to famines, show trials, gulags, and other atrocities. The truth is, there's nothing fundamentally new about this "new" Marxism, except for one crucial fact... ... it's more popular with our youth than ever before. That's why I invite you to gain a deeper understanding of the history of Marxism as well as the threat it poses to our liberty. Or you can send this to a friend! This free online course is more urgent than ever. We are at a critical time for our country, and Marxism--under a variety of names--continues to infiltrate our culture. Will you join us by registering for this free online course? You can click on the secure link below to register and get access today: Most colleges and universities work to indoctrinate young people with Marxism. That's why taking this course and making it available to as many Americans as possible will be one of the most important ways you will defend liberty in America. You're one of the reasons why we can defend liberty by producing and promoting courses like "Marxism, Socialism, and Communism"--so thank you so much for all you do. Warm regards, Bill Gray, '01 Vice President Institutional Advancement Hillsdale College P.S. We've released one of our most important free documentary courses this month..."Marxism, Socialism, and Communism"! You can register for this course at the secure link below: Marxism currently hides behind many names ...CRT, gender ideology, or even calls for decolonization...but it's still the same Marxism that seeks to destroy your rights. You can stand up to this dangerous ideology by registering for this free documentary course today! | | Freedom Nation Today PO Box 2221 Fort Collins, CO 80522 | _

Newsweek: Trump Ally Rudy Giuliani 'About to Find Himself' in Jail—Legal Analyst

Newsweek: Trump Ally Rudy Giuliani 'About to Find Himself' in Jail—Legal Analyst
| [](https://links.fullmagnews.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=757c47d5b79043e3bb1d63f451df6578&_e=nWLKeI-rVCgt4RL8ZeqLKDrz0pnsxuWJFdkjaPIUw67sPZWxFDiiYt-f36HTzGHObCu7gUg0iYyBYp1-waInXO7kjBdzLdQZ-lDAF7Uk7PsHDbdF9RFyeic_ziIo1zYygYp0x4tgNbeoOSPW4shDGILWy_BgPlJso1yBeEEx6Y4COK0pqeKbGHodbkhvFNyNHXqnceit98EM3W8b5-urtI_VKzmrhoaIppNW3HbgJzjL_9EawcvoqqXNfpMXnU1JmDnXfTvWjOlycrOWodiH-Dh0w5TJ-J4ZM1ZeARif5C9WOoxXIcG9dOAkyUgvYPTDJCVNBXUX1LEHHqPgslnKySSebAquDBgi0sBB0WGZnDzfo-i5zaIVJqN-h0G6USpiEMcOFgicD5pfMf1BdP0irA%3D%3D)
---
Dear Friend,
---
Even as the Deep State continues its efforts to rob me of EVERYTHING – _my home, my possessions, my credit cards, my car_ – _I will never surrender the fight for my freedom and justice._
---
And even with headlines like these popping up, I refuse to roll over like a dog and give up my rights:
---
**_Newsweek_ : Trump Ally Rudy Giuliani 'About to Find Himself' in Jail—Legal Analyst**
---
Outside the New York City Courthouse, I was asked, _“Do you think Mr. Trump can help you get out of this?”_
---
Here’s what I said: _**“Mr. Trump doesn’t have to help me get out of it. All Mr. Trump has to do is straighten out the legal system and we’ll find out who the real criminals are.”**_
---
Anyone with common sense knows this case was a complete abuse of power. _They want me to pay _$148 MILLION!__
---
It’s punitive! It’s ridiculous! This was done solely because I’m a Republican living in the Democrat Dictatorship of New York.
---
But now that President Trump is headed back to the White House, I have hope that our broken, corrupt, and predatory judicial system will be fixed – and justice for ALL Americans will be restored.
---
Don’t forget: President Trump refused to surrender to the tyrannical Democrats even after four wrongful arrests, a felony conviction, and an assassin’s bullet. And he just won the White House!
---
_**That’s why I will _KEEP_ _FIGHTING_ for my God-given freedoms and rights.**_
---
If you can support me in my fight, I’d be eternally grateful. But if you cannot, please do not even think twice. Take care of yourself and your family!
---
[**If you can, and, seriously, only if you can, please make a contribution to my Legal Defense Trust – the Rudy Giuliani Freedom Fund – as I keep fighting for my freedom and justice as the Democrats’ Deep State tries to JAIL me for life.**](https://links.fullmagnews.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=757c47d5b79043e3bb1d63f451df6578&_e=nWLKeI-rVCgt4RL8ZeqLKDrz0pnsxuWJFdkjaPIUw67sPZWxFDiiYt-f36HTzGHObCu7gUg0iYyBYp1-waInXO7kjBdzLdQZ-lDAF7Uk7PsHDbdF9RFyeic_ziIo1zYygYp0x4tgNbeoOSPW4shDGILWy_BgPlJso1yBeEEx6Y4COK0pqeKbGHodbkhvFNyNHXqnceit98EM3W8b5-urtI_VKzmrhoaIppNW3HbgJzgHz8jvsdXP1qMUGVbmz2AZp8t0td2WbBcx9OjpIHX2EFmfMA0UreAcuWGUEwl7Buiji0JcuqPgUipOrJ_hCFdyPvp8mzBEVKPM30a4Sx7KFSEzCA-5EWSvjXxBe8BGUfPPxj2cRUgwOwuaQwWJyzpqKupkHanittAm9bpwthZt9Q%3D%3D)

And even with headlines like these popping up, I refuse to roll over like a dog and give up my rights: Newsweek : Trump Ally Rudy Giuliani 'About to Find Himself' in Jail—Legal Analyst Outside the New York City Courthouse, I was asked, “Do you think Mr. Trump can help you get out of this?” Here’s what I said: “Mr. Trump doesn’t have to help me get out of it. All Mr. Trump has to do is straighten out the legal system and we’ll find out who the real criminals are.” Anyone with common sense knows this case was a complete abuse of power. They want me to pay $148 MILLION! It’s punitive! It’s ridiculous! This was done solely because I’m a Republican living in the Democrat Dictatorship of New York. But now that President Trump is headed back to the White House, I have hope that our broken, corrupt, and predatory judicial system will be fixed – and justice for ALL Americans will be restored. Don’t forget: President Trump refused to surrender to the tyrannical Democrats even after four wrongful arrests, a felony conviction, and an assassin’s bullet. And he just won the White House! That’s why I will KEEP FIGHTING for my God-given freedoms and rights. If you can support me in my fight, I’d be eternally grateful. But if you cannot, please do not even think twice. Take care of yourself and your family! Thank you and God bless you, Rudy Giuliani Rudy Giuliani Freedom Fund Paid for by Rudy Giuliani Freedom Fund Legal Defense Trust Full Mag News PO Box 1177 Fort Collins, CO 80522 | _

name: Hillsdale College via Restore Our Nation
subject: Our most important online course?
body:
Marxism goes by different names to make itself seem less dangerous

This sponsored message from Restore Our Nation is on behalf of Hillsdale College

| | | [](https://post.spmailtechnol.com/f/a/GYJczp_gsXgRxilPh4BJCw~~/AARclAA~~)
---
| | Dear Fellow American,

**I 'm excited to let you know about our free documentary course, "Marxism, Socialism, and Communism."**

Today, Marxism goes by different names to make itself seem less dangerous. I'm sure you've heard of "critical race theory," "gender theory," or even "decolonization."

I know you're not fooled by these disguises.

Without a doubt, "Marxism, Socialism, and Communism" will be one of our most important courses **because the source of these dangerous ideologies is still Karl Marx.**

It's still the same Marxism that works to destroy your property and your country.

It's still the same Marxism that seeks to abolish your family and your God.

And it's still the same Marxism that leads to famines, show trials, gulags, and other atrocities.

The truth is, there's nothing fundamentally _new_ about this "new" Marxism, except for one crucial fact...

**... it's more popular with our youth than ever before. **

That's why I invite you to gain a deeper understanding of the history of Marxism as well as the threat it poses to our liberty.

[**You can do that by registering for "Marxism, Socialism, and Communism" today.**](https://post.spmailtechnol.com/f/a/GYJczp_gsXgRxilPh4BJCw~~/AARclAA~~)

Or you can send this to a friend!

This free online course is more urgent than ever. We are at a critical time for our country, and Marxism--under a variety of names--continues to infiltrate our culture.

**Will you join us by registering for this free online course?** You can click on the secure link below to register and get access today:

[**https://online.hillsdale.edu/courses/register/marxism-socialism-communism**](https://post.spmailtechnol.com/f/a/GYJczp_gsXgRxilPh4BJCw~~/AARclAA~~)

Most colleges and universities work to indoctrinate young people with Marxism.

That's why taking this course and making it available to as many Americans as possible will be one of the most important ways you will defend liberty in America.

You're one of the reasons why we can defend liberty by producing and promoting courses like "Marxism, Socialism, and Communism"--so thank you so much for all you do.

Warm regards,

Bill Gray, '01
Vice President
Institutional Advancement
Hillsdale College

P.S. We've released one of our most important free documentary courses this month..."Marxism, Socialism, and Communism"! You can register for this course at the secure link below:

[**https://online.hillsdale.edu/courses/register/marxism-socialism-communism**](https://post.spmailtechnol.com/f/a/GYJczp_gsXgRxilPh4BJCw~~/AARclAA~~)

**Marxism currently hides behind many names ...CRT, gender ideology, or even calls for decolonization...but it's still the same Marxism that seeks to destroy your rights.**

**You can stand up to this dangerous ideology by registering for this free documentary course today!** **
**

---
| |
---

Restore Our Nation

clean_body: Marxism goes by different names to make itself seem less dangerous This sponsored message from Reclaiming American Freedom is on behalf of Hillsdale College | | | | | Dear Fellow American, I 'm excited to let you know about our free documentary course, "Marxism, Socialism, and Communism." Today, Marxism goes by different names to make itself seem less dangerous. I'm sure you've heard of "critical race theory," "gender theory," or even "decolonization." I know you're not fooled by these disguises. Without a doubt, "Marxism, Socialism, and Communism" will be one of our most important courses because the source of these dangerous ideologies is still Karl Marx. It's still the same Marxism that works to destroy your property and your country. It's still the same Marxism that seeks to abolish your family and your God. And it's still the same Marxism that leads to famines, show trials, gulags, and other atrocities. The truth is, there's nothing fundamentally new about this "new" Marxism, except for one crucial fact... ... it's more popular with our youth than ever before. That's why I invite you to gain a deeper understanding of the history of Marxism as well as the threat it poses to our liberty. Or you can send this to a friend! This free online course is more urgent than ever. We are at a critical time for our country, and Marxism--under a variety of names--continues to infiltrate our culture. # Friday, November 15, 2024
---|---
**Good morning!** On this day in 1901, [cattlewoman Armel Keeran](http://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJx0z7FugzAQgOGnMRvId4Y4Hjx0YUvXjuiMj2Bh7MhYIenTV-3eF_h_fV-36UYhhnT_pJ1tfS15Qol9C9DCMHkK8T31jbdOegMNW9AKLloqrZrVajcYvmowM8_KS2O8m5XRCl0POJNqgv2NAcAAgFclu0UbN19gQULu5bCIXrIPNZeurlz5RccS3_nJpZvz3kS71vo4hPoQOAocz_Ps6rFSTjEk7nK5CxxXSt7lvAkcOdUS-BA4Otq4tFR2ju3GXCi1W86pfjfF-scZYgzHRYte3ncK8W9W_9U_Lf4EAAD__4lMXfs) was born in San Antonio. At one point, Keeran owned the largest herd of Brahman cattle in the United States. Mike Tyson and Jake Paul [face off tonight](http://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJx00L2SrCAUBOCnwQwLDggaENzEbG66oXWEwww7-FPKjOPbb7n5xt31VVd_3YYbppzm-3-cyJVPXAYQoLmUXDZDwJTPQVfBjSJ0siInrZLGCmVV9XAjETWgBGmvhDHWAFrfNYpiK0GRqJK7MCllIyW0StTRdqM3MgICadFEpgWFVJatLg8q9ME95nN501b7Zaqye5Sy7kz9Y9Az6I_jqI-IeIUMetxK8pkY9DMdO4M-Lx4zgz5gzrhzv7zmcjLov_FJfMVX5lN6Ei_nvsx83Wi_OnOkjWZ_MdBaLqKBEBvDLTTEtdGBjx0EDqMaSbQeAtlqc2E9Us5pN5ZpcZ8w5d_F5c8L3w5-AgAA___Kx3G4) at AT&T Stadium, and one of the fighters said that "someone's getting put to sleep." Let us know who you think will win in today's poll! Did someone send this to you? ## FBI Houston Arrests ISIS Supporter
FBI Houston announced Thursday they [have arrested a man](http://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJx0kL1uwyAURp8Gb1jcC_4bGLp4S9eOFoZLjIJNBCRO3r5K946fPuno6PxclosJMRzXb7OTri-fFhSoOACHbnEmxPeiGqdX4SZoSMMgoR-EHGSz6YnEOgmvLEkFdkDnlbe4Ki-wHwCpCfoDA4AOAEcpWj9Mq-3Bo0FSovNMCXKhptzWjSq9TPHxnZ6UW5v2Juqt1nth8ovhzHA-z7O9benxORnOJtdgIzGcDzoLw9nmsH-mXwMPJRRucqZSeaWcU-amVmNv_J7pSUclx7f0KDUdDGccO-7EpIxB4nbsJq48IjfS9tyscu1lP4KbVJO1u58hxlD6gSlx3U2If67133hPjb8BAAD__6YWcEI) who had allegedly attempted to support the terrorist organization ISIS by creating propaganda, offering to host ISIS members in his Houston apartment, and bragging that he would commit a 9/11-style attack in Houston if given the chance. Anas Said, 28, was born in the U.S. His family later returned to Lebanon before moving back to the U.S. in 2015. The FBI interviewed Said in 2018 after receiving a tip about his purchase of pro-ISIS stickers. He is [awaiting a detention hearing](http://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJx0kL3O4yAQAJ8Gd0Tsgk1SUFzjLtdeaa35iZGwQWaTS97-lOu_eqTRaP7clzvlko_Hb9qj43eqCyo0EkDCuATK5bOYIbhVhRsM0YHVMFmlrR42FzEp7SevLGq4WUjamEnFNK1-CnBVQ3ZfGQCMAHjV6pLsbfUTJCSMRo1JGBVD5npeeIsc39RT-dRXPC--7kNxG3PrQv8SOAucafWgv0Tg3GpngfNWn53rIXc6JB3UZaccJHn_7DFIYo5743w8ZDvrK4cod-J4ZiqyP1urJ8vccxc4wzia0aIVOA-nC-1vLiX3yQqjHjvl8j-Ifzz0cvgvAAD__-ldaKo) for his current charges. "_We stopped a potential terrorist attack from happening right here in Houston._ " [said an FBI Houston](http://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJx0kL2OhCAUhZ8GuzvxIg5aUGxjN9tuaUAuIwmK4TJ_b79x-21OTnKSLyffz22-2Zjifv-2G5n6DnmWrVSACNjP3sb0mVXjjWv9iA0Z1B1eddvprlmNGlzQPTrdqWEZFksOHY5WD6RGr13fRHPCELFHlEPXXoIe3XLFIK0k1fZBqJZ8rLlc6kqV3pZD-uQnlcuStyaZtdaDRfcl5CTktH-OzPWchJxOspAT4hlnezDs9GIhp-Ai2FKIK8OaH1zzDpvdIeQCNiW6k4fIkaFGYqhUSi5wpFwh7_Bg4ByTkFNTjD9eMaXIVy1Ue99sTH_H6r-mnkb-BgAA__8LOWtF) spokesperson. "_Any day we can publicly say that is a good day._ "
## Abbott Freezes Tuition At Public Colleges
Gov. Greg Abbott directed Texas public colleges and universities to [freeze tuition for the next two years](http://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJx0kLGOszAQhJ_GdEZeYzApXPwNXf72SmRgTVbn4MjeQHJPfwr91TPzafR9Xcerp0jb-t_f0fErpFErbSSAhHZcPMX3aKrFTWq5QIUObAOdVY1tqpubsEMLl9ZAmFXTQ2vaXgUM3mMIVvUVuQ8MAFoA3TeqDvYyzR0E7TUa1QZhFC7EKdd8Q8aXLyG-0465ntO9iu7G_Cii-Sf0IPRwHEf9_fLbJxR62PAoQg_nTOhhTbv005SYJW4h5RmL5CcxpU2GjPiD0rM82_LxnCLNck4x4opFPjfaMRdiwg-qym55HBQjlc4Ko9a7p3he4j8d7U7_BgAA__8Tb2xX), citing “significant rising costs due to inflation” and his “commitment to ensuring that higher education remains accessible and affordable for all Texans.” In a letter, Abbott said his office had met with every public university system Board of Regents, and they [agreed to the two-year tuition freeze](http://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJx0kLGu2zAMRb9G3hSItBPFg4Yu3l7XjoEsUTEB2Qok2k369YXf0K0LcUEQB4f319fjy3Pm7fnTr-TkncoDDQ4aQMP1ET3nz2PooptNHKEjB7aHmzW97bvF2cEHH3vEcRj7dB8j2fE63xL1YM0A947dCQOAKwDee3NJdpzDDRJ6pMFckxoMRZZSL7KQ0Nu3lD_loHoJZe2yW0ReTfU_FE4Kp1DWdd9YPry-fJDzRuHk9ya8KZxa2WXRgTapPut_a4p78MLlzKeOwgngHGd6lkP7eS4iOnKlIE1_a-h944NqY2FqWoqmt9AWtex8onSqRH9Iy1LL_lw0GrQKp666-PrNOXO7WTWY5-o5f78i_-32cPg3AAD__911fcQ). In 2023, lawmakers [allocated an additional $700 million](http://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJx0kLGOszAQhJ_GdEZeG3AoXPwNXf72SmRgDSs5GNmbkLz9KfTXjWY0o9H3cx_vniLt63__QMfvkEatdCMBJLTj4il-xqZa3KSWHip0YA10Vhlrqs0tvcVgvLKTMlOrv_rWKm-DbWzn4VaR-44BQAugb0bVwfbT3EHQXmOj2iAahQtxyjVvyPj2JcRPemGu5_SootuYjyLMP6EHoYfzPOt5y2n_pkIPO55F6GFLz8Jpl1df6MFnpjmi0MPlyDnFiCsW-dzphbkQExbJT2JKu1wzrtJPU2KW0PfQdl1fH9tRZbccJ8VIpbOiUevDU7xu8Z-cXk7_BgAA__9m_Gx1) to the state budget for public universities in exchange for their agreement to keep tuition flat through 2025. Tuition and fees for in-state students attending a public university average just over $10,200, while the [total average cost of attendance](http://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJx0kDFrwzAQhX-NvMXoTrIUDxoKxVPTqdDRKNYpEZwjY4k4_vfFpWu3N3zvPfi-L-PFJ06P26efydVXzCNK1CeAE3Rj8In3UTfBXWXooSEHVoGxUlnV3J3VKgRQMnQm9EEH9F7Zc7QEXd8rb5rkjjEA6ADwrGQbbX-dDET0SFp2UWhJIdW8tvVOlV6-RN7zk9Z2ynPD7l7rItSbwEHgsG1bO2VmulHMq2c-Co9yoAIHvyxF4PAHTLnU0k5xFmr42hcS6h0Emg96Eh-5WV1YtsScirFCy9vsE_-e1n8tPB3-BAAA__8Np17z)—including room and board, books, and other costs—is $28,724.
## Satire Website Buys Infowars
The Onion, a left-leaning satirical news site, has [purchased Alex Jones's Austin-based Infowars](http://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJx0kL2O6yAUhJ8Gd1gcsCEUFLdxl9tuaR3zk7BLIDIkJG-_8mrb7T5pRqPR93FezxhTzJf_ePOmvUJZOeMTBaAwrw5jeq_T4MzGnIbBG1ACpGJCieFqlN60PM3omNOWBzlJKU5yVtoydJ5vQzTHGADMAPwk2BiU3qyEwJH7ic2BTMy72Mo-tqtv_oU1pHd5-n205TYkc23tXon4R_hC-NJ7H_Nms-_1yAlfDiR8eVT6SyXHkmmPuVJM_kU_S_aVxhxKx73SDfPX_rg3-6b4sO3o7jYjKK2FHHbj7j2mFKtUZGKXG8b0c6T9aeZp-HcAAAD__1o4Z5A) at a bankruptcy auction, backed by families of the 2012 Sandy Hook shooting victims to whom Jones owes over $1 billion in defamation judgments. Infowars, a website with a reputation for advancing conspiracy theories, was shut down within hours of the sale. The CEO of The Onion’s parent company said Infowars would be relaunched in January as a [parody site to mock right-wing personalities like Jones](http://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJx0kLtuAyEQRb9mt8NieC4FRRp3TptyNQuDTYTBWogffx85fcqrK50jna_TesJccj1_4pX8eKa2Ci4UA2Cg14i5vFY1R7_x6GAmD1aCsVxaOV-8IiMWpzeTdLAQUVlhQWrkFskGiXP2bxgAaACxSH5I1m3BQBIoSHGdJsUp5tH2w7jQoCf2VF7tTvshtOtc_GWMW5_kxySOkzjirdKjv6_32EcOhSZxbDW3yrafV2e5pvbAvTMs9GTfrVJnRjmTwC0RFATngC82huik3aReFnLz7uPtkUvJ3dhJ8fMVc_nzj3-D3L34DQAA__-nMWDv) and promote the messaging of Everytown for Gun Safety, a group that aims to advance gun control measures. Jones claims the auction trustee [changed the rules at the last minute](http://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJx00DFzhCAUBOBfgx2OD0HOgiKN3aVN6aA8TjIIDrycd_8-Y_rU38zO7n7d57sNMaTHp93R0MvnWXRCcgAOanY2xPcsG2eWzo3QoAHdw6C7XvfNZtQopQO5KABQq_NOqX5xI9xAea302gRzhV0KIG5913o9LusAXliBslOeyQ5doFxa2pDwZauP7_zE0q55b6LZiI7K-g8mJiam8zzbdSs5XcrEhImwkA1px0RMTLZQWCMyMVVLoSCv1zIsnDbkOYWc-PLzrtxGfPHvnLByGEdQehjaYzuaYtxxhhhDHTST3WO3If4VoX-feRrxGwAA___9aGam) so that only sealed bids were allowed, preventing a group of affiliated financial backers from offering a counter to The Onion’s bid. Jones criticized the sale as “a total attack on free speech” and promised to challenge it.
| [](http://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJx0z8FqgzAYAOCnSW6V_H-itoccdpHBqIx1Y0eJ5k8MRCMx2Pbtx3bfC3zwfV-HqwkxrL43C-nycGlAgeoEcIJ6sCbE56C41aOwF-CkoZXQtEK2ks8aDVo54lkosKKWEkdHKBtsaLwYFDUP-hcDgBoAz1JUrr2MUwMODZIStWNKkA0l5arMVOhhdhef6aBcTWnhUc-lbDuTLww7hp0PR1h9dU852imtE-W1Stkz7DbjiWHXffXvH7e322f_yrO22z3EGPamZUr4xYT4p5Z_m4fGnwAAAP__l9NT3w) Somalia is facing a devastating combination of natural disasters, global conflicts, widespread poverty, and disease outbreaks. East Africa has just endured its worst drought in 40 years, leaving tens of millions without access to clean water, wiping out millions of livestock and destroying crops. With domestic food production crippled, Somalia has relied heavily on imports—90% of its wheat coming from Russia and Ukraine—until those shipments stopped. Now, two in five children in Somalia suffer from acute malnutrition, and cholera is spreading in some regions. The food crisis, compounded by global humanitarian aid being redirected to Europe and the Middle East, has created a perfect storm, leading to a sharp rise in child malnutrition. [Be Doers](http://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJx0z8FqgzAYAOCnSW6V_H-itoccdpHBqIx1Y0eJ5k8MRCMx2Pbtx3bfC3zwfV-HqwkxrL43C-nycGlAgeoEcIJ6sCbE56C41aOwF-CkoZXQtEK2ks8aDVo54lkosKKWEkdHKBtsaLwYFDUP-hcDgBoAz1JUrr2MUwMODZIStWNKkA0l5arMVOhhdhef6aBcTWnhUc-lbDuTLww7hp0PR1h9dU852imtE-W1Stkz7DbjiWHXffXvH7e322f_yrO22z3EGPamZUr4xYT4p5Z_m4fGnwAAAP__l9NT3w) We’re asking the _Texas Flyover_ Community to partner with World Concern to help distribute emergency nutrition packs (a peanut paste fortified with nutrients), water, and hygiene products to those in greatest need. Every $12 feeds a child for a month. [We’re matching the first $750; just give through this link.](http://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJx0z8FqgzAYAOCnSW6V_H-itoccdpHBqIx1Y0eJ5k8MRCMx2Pbtx3bfC3zwfV-HqwkxrL43C-nycGlAgeoEcIJ6sCbE56C41aOwF-CkoZXQtEK2ks8aDVo54lkosKKWEkdHKBtsaLwYFDUP-hcDgBoAz1JUrr2MUwMODZIStWNKkA0l5arMVOhhdhef6aBcTWnhUc-lbDuTLww7hp0PR1h9dU852imtE-W1Stkz7DbjiWHXffXvH7e322f_yrO22z3EGPamZUr4xYT4p5Z_m4fGnwAAAP__l9NT3w)

([Watch Video](http://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJx0kLHOozAQhJ_GdIu8xgZSuLiGLtdeiRa8DlaMHRkrJG9_4u__ZjTSaD6N5t99vlOIIT3-0s62fnyelVQaEAHN7CjE76wbZxfpbtiwxaHDfpDd0DWbHTUaRZ0kkr3ve9MhjY4WJDMOrNA0wV4wRDSIauxk64fbsvboFSnW0nihJbtQc2nrxpU_dPj4zW8u7Zr3Jtqt1tchuj9CTUJN53m2z7N-rlCo6WILNSFecrkAK6UK5H0uDupGFZ4hRuYEZ94pwcF8AEdeawkrLCFGCGktTAfD8oU9F75qCbSUkBPDnlPdhJqaYt3rDDGGox-Elo-dQvzZWH897W3V_wAAAP__7cxt2A)) **➤ Dallas:** A couple is suing the shuttered Twisted Trick bar for serving them a flaming drink that caused severe burns. Greg Abbott directed Texas public colleges and universities to , citing “significant rising costs due to inflation” and his “commitment to ensuring that higher education remains accessible and affordable for all Texans.” In a letter, Abbott said his office had met with every public university system Board of Regents, and they . Satire Website Buys Infowars The Onion, a left-leaning satirical news site, has at a bankruptcy auction, backed by families of the 2012 Sandy Hook shooting victims to whom Jones owes over $1 billion in defamation judgments. Infowars, a website with a reputation for advancing conspiracy theories, was shut down within hours of the sale. The CEO of The Onion’s parent company said Infowars would be relaunched in January as a and promote the messaging of Everytown for Gun Safety, a group that aims to advance gun control measures. Jones claims the auction trustee so that only sealed bids were allowed, preventing a group of affiliated financial backers from offering a counter to The Onion’s bid. Jones criticized the sale as “a total attack on free speech” and promised to challenge it. | Somalia is facing a devastating combination of natural disasters, global conflicts, widespread poverty, and disease outbreaks. East Africa has just endured its worst drought in 40 years, leaving tens of millions without access to clean water, wiping out millions of livestock and destroying crops. With domestic food production crippled, Somalia has relied heavily on imports—90% of its wheat coming from Russia and Ukraine—until those shipments stopped. Now, two in five children in Somalia suffer from acute malnutrition, and cholera is spreading in some regions. The food crisis, compounded by global humanitarian aid being redirected to Europe and the Middle East, has created a perfect storm, leading to a sharp rise in child malnutrition. We’re asking the Texas Flyover Community to partner with World Concern to help distribute emergency nutrition packs (a peanut paste fortified with nutrients), water, and hygiene products to those in greatest need. body:
Marxism goes by different names to make itself seem less dangerous

This sponsored message from Defend the Constitution is on behalf of Hillsdale College

| | | [](https://links.defend-the-constitution.org/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=86fbf3f240c944e3a17fe3c3b59da2a9&_e=lKXql0G4X_umyQDSx7uSYImgzUs5H1ZgPTqMNpRVX7VZj0pd8oRjUqQEoqEuPWcGHlccCcU6hP_6URrVCnANRRXf5VSOXrkQN7BoUO4sA3z9RveTrWEHV9qiTypx85DvnnvT5H7rOeL5Xi1peWlExM16g8NS30hnjRK560uH2qeFBeLNZsvl6L2sxauioMbDFmOwVNpfQWxdulCii_KKkCuZOz3Z2cju8yQOyxhMBTWqNqzzZp1y40y0EVBPFN9F-aed-e--UrM-D74fxwWlZRZv3p-68g-J70oVzMiY4brBEOtv60zpEt58GCSivZBJi92CJ6vt_tRhi8Z-GgywqhYmStMjK7u98E-gNUVC847olzyK-KpHVBQkysWtAKSTBcGsq1Xo23SGmBtMXW_xZ64Zsj0IA5p7S6Nzq8HOoA0%3D)

| | Dear Fellow American,

**I 'm excited to let you know about our free documentary course, "Marxism, Socialism, and Communism."**

Today, Marxism goes by different names to make itself seem less dangerous. I'm sure you've heard of "critical race theory," "gender theory," or even "decolonization."

I know you're not fooled by these disguises.

Without a doubt, "Marxism, Socialism, and Communism" will be one of our most important courses **because the source of these dangerous ideologies is still Karl Marx.**

It's still the same Marxism that works to destroy your property and your country.

It's still the same Marxism that seeks to abolish your family and your God.

And it's still the same Marxism that leads to famines, show trials, gulags, and other atrocities.

The truth is, there's nothing fundamentally _new_ about this "new" Marxism, except for one crucial fact...

**... it's more popular with our youth than ever before. **

That's why I invite you to gain a deeper understanding of the history of Marxism as well as the threat it poses to our liberty.

[**You can do that by registering for "Marxism, Socialism, and Communism" today.**](https://links.defend-the-constitution.org/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=86fbf3f240c944e3a17fe3c3b59da2a9&_e=lKXql0G4X_umyQDSx7uSYImgzUs5H1ZgPTqMNpRVX7VZj0pd8oRjUqQEoqEuPWcGHlccCcU6hP_6URrVCnANRRXf5VSOXrkQN7BoUO4sA3z9RveTrWEHV9qiTypx85DvnnvT5H7rOeL5Xi1peWlExM16g8NS30hnjRK560uH2qeFBeLNZsvl6L2sxauioMbDFmOwVNpfQWxdulCii_KKkCuZOz3Z2cju8yQOyxhMBTWqNqzzZp1y40y0EVBPFN9F-aed-e--UrM-D74fxwWlZRQ4GPoxoCoKzwM55HUZo0tW8pCt66UQUYViQ_6AD35ipxQ1u2BP_tsJlxIxgAtCno1cCncWphknotpv1AVnC_ymG2mTI4BfQ00_ce3-Jw8u2pv24X5_pI8fXd70rIJB8jZ4vG4LihYtB4WOSIW2CdM%3D)

Or you can send this to a friend!

This free online course is more urgent than ever. We are at a critical time for our country, and Marxism--under a variety of names--continues to infiltrate our culture.

**Will you join us by registering for this free online course?** You can click on the secure link below to register and get access today:

[**https://online.hillsdale.edu/courses/register/marxism-socialism-communism**](https://links.defend-the-constitution.org/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=86fbf3f240c944e3a17fe3c3b59da2a9&_e=lKXql0G4X_umyQDSx7uSYImgzUs5H1ZgPTqMNpRVX7VZj0pd8oRjUqQEoqEuPWcGHlccCcU6hP_6URrVCnANRRXf5VSOXrkQN7BoUO4sA3z9RveTrWEHV9qiTypx85DvnnvT5H7rOeL5Xi1peWlExM16g8NS30hnjRK560uH2qeFBeLNZsvl6L2sxauioMbDFmOwVNpfQWxdulCii_KKkCuZOz3Z2cju8yQOyxhMBTWqNqzzZp1y40y0EVBPFN9F-aed-e--UrM-D74fxwWlZXB3jcCPSohbxnqgTyDEBGX9mNqV3q0y5akihPUqGSQgRsBRJ2Wy20LtSE_sUiLGY-2tlc45EPnxTaP4G6FWo0iKBY5f9KzsIw9-Ru64Xs3hgyYg2hzfg86DIUM5zbfZgqnpAY_nsUtgNJEw3byvY88%3D)

Most colleges and universities work to indoctrinate young people with Marxism.

That's why taking this course and making it available to as many Americans as possible will be one of the most important ways you will defend liberty in America.

You're one of the reasons why we can defend liberty by producing and promoting courses like "Marxism, Socialism, and Communism"--so thank you so much for all you do.

Warm regards,

Bill Gray, '01
Vice President
Institutional Advancement
Hillsdale College

Today, Marxism goes by different names to make itself seem less dangerous. I'm sure you've heard of "critical race theory," "gender theory," or even "decolonization." I know you're not fooled by these disguises. Without a doubt, "Marxism, Socialism, and Communism" will be one of our most important courses because the source of these dangerous ideologies is still Karl Marx. It's still the same Marxism that works to destroy your property and your country. It's still the same Marxism that seeks to abolish your family and your God. And it's still the same Marxism that leads to famines, show trials, gulags, and other atrocities. The truth is, there's nothing fundamentally new about this "new" Marxism, except for one crucial fact... ... it's more popular with our youth than ever before. That's why I invite you to gain a deeper understanding of the history of Marxism as well as the threat it poses to our liberty. Or you can send this to a friend! This free online course is more urgent than ever. We are at a critical time for our country, and Marxism--under a variety of names--continues to infiltrate our culture. subject: Trump Taps RFK Jr., Pennsylvania Recount, and a 300-Carat Necklace
body:
President-elect [Trump nominated Robert F. Kennedy Jr.](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJx0kD1v8yAURn8NbERwAX8MDO_iLe_a0SJwCbQYLOc2lf99lXbu_Dw6Rzpv1_XqSy3t_t9v6Cj1FSQYoZRQdo2-1HM1PLqECKg5OjVqNYxykJZnN06D1NGEWWEIU_Bh0jdrwSY5W6knz4t70ZRSVik9GHkBb1JIMaU5xttgAjMSY6F-XN57aZQx1bM_8biEvvHqMtH-YPofg4XBQhlzqfW1MVj2Xks4GSwZfaUc_IEMFjPPSoMRdHxuu2h9K80TPsQHtobxFL9nEXH3B23YiMHCDxf3r1JreQwjM_K--fJj4fRXkaeD7wAAAP__zztkDA) to head the Department of Health and Human Services, which oversees 13 agencies with a budget of nearly $2 trillion.

| | |
---
| [](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJx0kD1r6zAYRn-NvNlIrz6cO2i4YAJ3yKVbR6NIr2wVfRhZSci_Ly7p1s7P4cB53i_zxYQY8vLfJNTNlxkoiJ6xnsnZmRCfs-ic9oiAvEPNRs7USBWV3aqFlVQZzuQJ-MhGQ61k3p9AMSvlqGgX9GFjjEnGuBJ0ACO89c77P85dlbBEUHShlTp8lJDbij4-yx3rYEvqol5b23bC_xI4EziHfMe9Dak4TOUaIh7UMfHzraV5L7dqkfDJpVpxMWtJSEAdU0IXbonw6c3UlrGC6ikckSBehDVpM2HJhE8ZH3vE1rDO_yauJP1GSm6YG-ETAdWySbj_aOxfDVsN6UgH0VXttkeIMexqJIIuyYT4ldh-u_yu4TMAAP__uziB8A) | |
# Friday, November 15, 2024
---|---
**Good Morning**! On this day in 1777, the Continental Congress adopted the [Articles of Confederation](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJx00LFugzAQxvGnMZuRzxicDB66sKVrR2S4u3CVgyNjBfH2VaqunX_S90n_r9t0i5Jku3_GB4XKebLGOg2goZ8wSjon12BgIktdQwF8B4M3g-mbNTjv5qub2UNkP4PnhS1euItwsX1nLo2E9xoA9ADd4Exro-OFkfmKOA9uUc4QSs2l_c6y1ZU4nflFpV3yo0lhrfW5q-5D2VHZ8TiOdpW95nK-XdmxrrJrjKeWTf-JsmMsVZZEu86sl7wxIZVYJW86Yn5WwqYEfB6SkuyDV87cH1HS72X9L8Er2J8AAAD__8GgYIs) and Perpetual Union, establishing a central government that functioned as a “league of friendship” while maintaining state independence. Later this afternoon, get ready for _The Feel Good Flyover_ _,_ landing in your inbox. Today we're featuring hero dogs, vintage casserole recipes, and an AI-generated granny who wears down phone scammers. It's a keeper! Our sponsors help keep the lights on and the news free. Be sure to check out today's—[Mode Mobile](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJx0kD1r6zAYRn-NvNlIrz6cO2i4YAJ3yKVbR6NIr2wVfRhZSci_Ly7p1s7P4cB53i_zxYQY8vLfJNTNlxkoiJ6xnsnZmRCfs-ic9oiAvEPNRs7USBWV3aqFlVQZzuQJ-MhGQ61k3p9AMSvlqGgX9GFjjEnGuBJ0ACO89c77P85dlbBEUHShlTp8lJDbij4-yx3rYEvqol5b23bC_xI4EziHfMe9Dak4TOUaIh7UMfHzraV5L7dqkfDJpVpxMWtJSEAdU0IXbonw6c3UlrGC6ikckSBehDVpM2HJhE8ZH3vE1rDO_yauJP1GSm6YG-ETAdWySbj_aOxfDVsN6UgH0VXttkeIMexqJIIuyYT4ldh-u_yu4TMAAP__uziB8A).
|
---
## RFK Jr. Named to Head Health Agencies
President-elect [Trump nominated Robert F. Kennedy Jr.](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJx0kD1v8yAURn8NbERwAX8MDO_iLe_a0SJwCbQYLOc2lf99lXbu_Dw6Rzpv1_XqSy3t_t9v6Cj1FSQYoZRQdo2-1HM1PLqECKg5OjVqNYxykJZnN06D1NGEWWEIU_Bh0jdrwSY5W6knz4t70ZRSVik9GHkBb1JIMaU5xttgAjMSY6F-XN57aZQx1bM_8biEvvHqMtH-YPofg4XBQhlzqfW1MVj2Xks4GSwZfaUc_IEMFjPPSoMRdHxuu2h9K80TPsQHtobxFL9nEXH3B23YiMHCDxf3r1JreQwjM_K--fJj4fRXkaeD7wAAAP__zztkDA) to head the Department of Health and Human Services, which oversees 13 agencies with a budget of nearly $2 trillion. Kennedy, an outspoken critic of big pharmaceutical companies, vaccine mandates, herbicides, and processed foods, said [Trump asked him](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJx0kL1uwyAURp_G3ojgcg1kYOiSLV07WoR7CTT4RzZNlLev3L3jp086Rzpf1_EaSi3z_TNM7FtaRpCAQimhhpFCqe8Re_KJGVj37JXVylhp5NBnb5xB65huGq1GB1aRi2dEFSUg2NQXf9CUUoNS2qA8QcAUE6V0JroZjB1KptKW7fS9lLllTvW9PHk7xWXqq8-trXunPzq4dHAJ68yv_biOsbUSK3dwadvPtIotPUTOu8gcasviwfPM9BYJJTPos2MdwMmoBmeYI5GTN0o29pun9VVqLbuxHcr7FEr9s7f_ajw9_AYAAP__SQlgcQ) to “reorganize” the agencies overseen by HHS. These include the Centers for Disease Control and Prevention, the Food and Drug Administration and the Centers for Medicare & Medicaid Services, among others. The announcement [received some bipartisan support](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJx00TGvnDAMwPFPA5ufSOBANzB0ue117Xgy2CG5CzFyclz59hXVG55UdfJg6feX7F-f908MMaTlJ648Fid329gOjAFzuROGeNy7mkbHbLmteTRDa_qh6ZtL7UdnB9Pj9equNE1DM9HQYds3ne0vxg2tq8N4asaYizFt3zUfFjs3O3LuSjT13Vx1DVMooh8PCal4dvGQnfVjlrWOoy9ly1X7o7K3yt6eTn6X_VxV9pb4nc-BJUiCt2ikyt6IV5kVS5hhliiKJLCcYBKFTTFkzlD0tW7gRCHJGk4hLaDuCQ8FzOB9hsyzckE94Ju4yA4PVCbYJIb85RFsyjkQpwIceS5AkjDSV0YSFP_STHj8k5SJtYCDJ6fEdJz9b7lXBuINtawnLQ48YyweMBH414oJMuseZs61jrS9Q4wh90PVNcuKIf49YfnfS_fR_gkAAP__FlOv2g), with Democratic Colorado Gov. Jared Polis praising Robert F. Kennedy Jr.'s nomination, highlighting his stance against big pharma and corporate agriculture.
## Judges Postpone Trials for Jan. 6 Defendants
Two federal judges [agreed to delay](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJx0kLGu4yAURL8Gd1hwjXFcUKSxtEW23dIicHGIMCDAsfL3K7_-VTPSSKOj8--xPrQPPm5_9Y6qubQCA0E5p3xcrfbhu4rOKocIOHSo-DRwOTHJxu6lbvM8A7tNIKWZpRFu0GyUM1rkFp5i6ry63jjnI-eDFKwHLZxx1rnZ2qcUhgiG1rdU-nfysb3QhW_6YOlN2rugXq3lSoY7gYXAcp5nv9d4bQQWjPSoBJaI5xU5Bd-8uer7sBtWmlNtOUWkbx2ppK14HSpNkX6wbEiTo60ce6a5YPUWo_kSWHSh9zs_xj_Au6JsPn0IvsqJCLbt2ocfsPabqI-C_wEAAP__FQFroQ) trials for defendants accused of participating in the Jan. 6 Capitol breach, citing the upcoming inauguration of President-elect Donald Trump. Judges Carl Nichols and Rudolph Contreras—appointed by Trump and former president Barack Obama, respectively—opted to avoid calling jurors for trials that could be canceled if Trump follows through on his pardon pledge. These delays are the [first instances](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJx0kLGOqzAQAL_GdEbeNTikcPEaurz2SuTgNWxk7Aic-Pj7093V149Go_m4TTfHkdPy321kS8gTKuwkgIR-8o7jOXWNt4EISTdk4aLBXJRRfbNa54mMdgMOClF7oHt_V6BnH67DoAkatt82AOgBtOlUi64Lc_AhXL2_m24WnSLPJe_tI3MqK4V45jft7Zy3Jtq1lOch9D-Bo8Cx1tpWd6yclpITfbqN0y8qcExUD4GjRq00aoHj4-UXOqSn6E5ZapYPl6SRZWcXDzlz4bTIsr-2p3zzXPJ-Chyb3fpn5Rj5MBfRqWVzHH9iyl9z3ha_AgAA__-092hH) of federal judges granting postponements due to defendants' hopes for clemency from the incoming administration. Several [defendants have already submitted](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJx0kL1uwyAUhZ8Gb1jcC8bNwNDFW7p2tPi5JEQYp4bE8ttX7t7tSEfnfNL3fZ2vNuVUbl92IdPiOqNAxQE4DHOwKR-z6oKJREiyIwOjBD0KLYbubpwEoT_E4PAiHSoZJUgnPOEYvQOwXTLnGwAMAFIr0aNV0ccQ4yUEp5VnSlBIbd36x5pKu1PMx_qmrffr0mVzb-1ZmfxkODGc9n3vvauF9nr2DKczMpwetnDNA0UqwZZWedtey5NTJt_SWvhGPy-qjQfK9uDeVjpX3WbCc085p6pHpsRtsSn_gdt_It4GfwMAAP__eyxhjw) case updates, pointing to Trump's election victory as grounds for further delays.
## Tyson, Paul in Big Fight on Netflix Tonight
The highly anticipated [rescheduled boxing match](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJx0kLGO6yAQAL8Gd1jsGmOnoHgNXV57pUVgiUmwsQyJz39_yvVXjzQazdd1utqY4nr_bxfSNeQJBUoOwKGfvI3pnGTjdSBC6hrSMHSgBqFE38x6VOAkXKBX4C9d74dudB78aGG8jQGhifpjA4AeoFNStGhlcMGHcPH-pqRjUpCPNe_tI8e1zhTSmd-0ty4vTdJzrVth3T-GhqE5jqOlsq0fyNDc8ndc7wxNqXk_GZqJoYmeoZECpZQSGZolPonXs-SVvwt_2Cfxzb4SP2x1M99fiQr3thJP2dka88qXvFOza78dMaVY1MCkuC82pt-m-tejt8afAAAA__8ofGjf) between legendary heavyweight champion Mike Tyson and YouTuber-turned-boxer Jake Paul is set for tonight at AT&T Stadium in Arlington, Texas. Tyson will wear [his traditional black boxing trunks](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJx0kLGO6yAQAL_G7ohYwBAXFK9Jl9deaeHsYjbBxiIkJ__9KddfPdKMNF_X6Ro487b8Dyv5FsukpDICQMAwYeB8TKZHH4kU6Z48OA3WSSuHPvl51pLQRuu0ctrg7MbzqGGAWY2oKPTsPzYAGAC0NfKkgom3iDGOiLM1t85IQm6lnu6Ft5Yo5qO8qZ5uZe2zT63tz07_69SlU5edyp7pgzp1WflBoh3PsolUtlJFDo0EhteSGlWBr8rbIu7hQWIPrywiL6mJszOD066vHvdvzpmf1nVGLmvg_Ntsfz14e_UTAAD__55hXzo) with the name of his late daughter, Exodus Sierra Tyson, stitched on the bottom, warning Paul, _"I'm bringing the devil himself [to the ring]."_ Paul doesn’t seem to be intimidated by “Iron Mike” after [promising to bet](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJx0kLFuhDAQRL_GdD55F2NC4SIN3aVNiQxeg-8MRrB3EX8fOX2a1Upv9DSa7_twdzHFbf5yK1kOeUCFWgJIaAbvYroGXXkbiJDqiiy0NZhWGdVUi1W-a13Tjp33NZqmIxPUSB9qUtiY0egq2mIDgAagNlrd0OkwBR9C5_1o9CS0Ih85H7dHjhsvFNKV33TcprxWyS7M-ynqT4G9wH679nxyQQL7IhbYA5RTvpGY4zYL7B_uSXJ3ryRH4lNqJdeYUsyb3F_HSZIXx3KhVLhjucYnSb7OvAnsq8P6_afET9MKrebVxfTXhv9b523xNwAA__-T9GYS) his entire $40 million purse on himself, stating, _“I’m here to make $40 million and knock out a legend.”_ The [latest betting odds](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJx0kDGTpCAQhX8NZm0BIt4EBJeY7aUXWiiN9g6CJb3jzr-_8vKNXvLVe6--vx_Th6dEef3jd3Qcy6SlNqAUqH4KntJ7Mk1wEVFj16BTQ6fsIK3sm81ZPfeq0_GXNI9Boh6seageEb2XvrNdQ-5uU0r1SnXWyFZ7E5cYYnyEMFuzCCMxEJez_SyUecOY3uWFZ7uUvUluYz6q6H4LPQo9XtfVLnOtRzm53oTQ44oZT5-EHjNeVehxpycCv2vJ8Krw6Z8Ih_9KMCMz5RXWLwoIJYQKkdaNIXhGYNoR5vJ9E_h94Mn1zuQpw3FioIWp5AoHLc97pTldOC5KiaodhJHr7in9P80_SXw5_S8AAP__sNd4Ow) have Jake Paul, 31 years younger, as the 2-1 favorite to win.

On this day in 1777, the Continental Congress adopted the and Perpetual Union, establishing a central government that functioned as a “league of friendship” while maintaining state independence. Later this afternoon, get ready for The Feel Good Flyover , landing in your inbox. Today we're featuring hero dogs, vintage casserole recipes, and an AI-generated granny who wears down phone scammers. It's a keeper! Our sponsors help keep the lights on and the news free. Be sure to check out today's—. | RFK Jr. Named to Head Health Agencies President-elect to head the Department of Health and Human Services, which oversees 13 agencies with a budget of nearly $2 trillion. Kennedy, an outspoken critic of big pharmaceutical companies, vaccine mandates, herbicides, and processed foods, said to “reorganize” the agencies overseen by HHS. These include the Centers for Disease Control and Prevention, the Food and Drug Administration and the Centers for Medicare & Medicaid Services, among others. The announcement , with Democratic Colorado Gov. Jared Polis praising Robert F. Kennedy Jr.'s nomination, highlighting his stance against big pharma and corporate agriculture. Judges Postpone Trials for Jan. 6 Defendants Two federal judges trials for defendants accused of participating in the Jan. 6 Capitol breach, citing the upcoming inauguration of President-elect Donald Trump. Judges Carl Nichols and Rudolph Contreras—appointed by Trump and former president Barack Obama, respectively—opted to avoid calling jurors for trials that could be canceled if Trump follows through on his pardon pledge. These delays are the of federal judges granting postponements due to defendants' hopes for clemency from the incoming administration. Several case updates, pointing to Trump's election victory as grounds for further delays. Tyson, Paul in Big Fight on Netflix Tonight The highly anticipated between legendary heavyweight champion Mike Tyson and YouTuber-turned-boxer Jake Paul is set for tonight at AT&T Stadium in Arlington, Texas. The event will stream on Netflix starting at 8 p.m. ET. It's the , and its highest-profile effort in live streaming to date. Tyson will wear with the name of his late daughter, Exodus Sierra Tyson, stitched on the bottom, warning Paul, "I'm bringing the devil himself [to the ring]." Paul doesn’t seem to be intimidated by “Iron Mike” after his entire $40 million purse on himself, stating, “I’m here to make $40 million and knock out a legend.” The have Jake Paul, 31 years younger, as the 2-1 favorite to win. name: Hassan Martini, Executive Director of No Dem Left Behind
subject: Capitalizing off of MAGA's Weaknesses
body:
| | | | | |
---
# **Capitalizing off of MAGA's weaknesses**
---
| | | | Hello folks, We are not without power, and **we need to remember that as the headlines continue to pour in**. The truth of the matter is, yes, the Republicans will control all three branches of government, but **they still must serve the American people**. Trump, in particular, is very sensitive to public opinion and public pressure; he's a narcissist with several complex social disorders. We have to use that to our advantage, and we have a plan to do just that. Organizations like ours work year-round for a reason—**campaigns come and go, but our country moves forward, and so do we**. We adapt and do our best to fulfill our mission, and right now, we find ourselves in full restructuring mode. Expect some big announcements from us in the weeks to come. In the meantime, we are focused on creating content to share with the American public about the radical trajectory the Republicans are embarking on and how it does not align with our collective American values. We will be highlighting radical right-wing Christian nationalists who are set to appoint one of their own as the new Secretary of Defense. We will be **laser-focused on showcasing the missteps of the Trump cabinet** , and there is plenty to choose from. **Matt Gaetz is not a serious person** ; he was a frat boy masquerading as a Congressman, a position his wealthy father bought for him to keep him out of trouble. Matt Gaetz epitomizes white privilege, and his nomination as Attorney General has Republicans furious. By Republicans, I am not referring to those in Congress but **Republican voters who value law and order**. We live in a vast country, and with that comes significant challenges related to crime. Now, a suspected sexual deviant is in charge of our nation's criminal justice system. The world is laughing at us, and that is not something Americans take lightly. Our job now is to highlight all of this. The more Trump goes off the rails, **the more we document and share**. What we absolutely must not do is follow the lead of some of the loudest voices on social media and yell, "Haha, I told you so." I am seeing a lot of this, and it nauseates me. **You do not talk to people this way—this is not how you win anyone over**. Yes, it gets clicks, but as we have learned, it does not get votes. **I know everyone is feeling down, but now is the time to unify and get to work**. **We all have a role to play**. Our country deserves it. Our children deserve it, and that is what keeps us going. As always, in solidarity, Hassan

body:
As conservatives, we know the importance of playing the long game.

| | | | **My Strategy For Long-Term Prosperity (Beyond 2024, 2028)**

**My Strategy For Long-Term Prosperity
(Beyond 2024, 2028)**
| | As conservatives, we know the [importance of playing the long game](http://links.reclamingamericanfreedom.com/u/click?_t=5ec072595b1347f09b4bac0de82ea87d&_m=d0d2e03fe6f94e4eb4e29236acd4f771&_e=r2Is3CRorKE9AfoR5wp_Dco6nkfzJr1XuI2qU_VrIT-jOplVegfmS3JrdxJP0l8mQZR6n1RHjVYi-69ePXUE4bY1S-MTX5Som5huE8zQJSxk_Z-E-HYgRL6ABbB8DqrZ69HmBp-0IQyyKGHh_Ybr3oGXeOibRNKSd-JAgGvatcVWAfcbWPPIq-4Bu3DrsgOjkcUEsUjeGqQCEOeBohfOmkv14PMyNlcf4a_g4AZfd67-wsbOv-57tbKHEQkCyf42JwhbDvmtvnYN-wu34DY2wzJ9fVy1EXLx2aum5rbOVM8CyaQqC2eexpi0J_JjKO_ZP3nUx-ej3hz6-a6rh10i-SO-BmS8rFXpjPwE4ubnVxiFdhhuzZF4llwiyO71k1cadbb5L3S0OU0DHjyw_4Mh1A%3D%3D). Gold has been a trusted store of value for thousands of years, outlasting empires and economic systems. At Birch Gold Group, we help patriots like you protect their savings for the long haul. We believe in preserving the financial freedom that upholds our conservative values. To find out more, **[request our FREE Info Kit on Gold IRAs](http://links.reclamingamericanfreedom.com/u/click?_t=5ec072595b1347f09b4bac0de82ea87d&_m=d0d2e03fe6f94e4eb4e29236acd4f771&_e=r2Is3CRorKE9AfoR5wp_Dco6nkfzJr1XuI2qU_VrIT-jOplVegfmS3JrdxJP0l8mQZR6n1RHjVYi-69ePXUE4bY1S-MTX5Som5huE8zQJSxk_Z-E-HYgRL6ABbB8DqrZ69HmBp-0IQyyKGHh_Ybr3oGXeOibRNKSd-JAgGvatcVWAfcbWPPIq-4Bu3DrsgOjkcUEsUjeGqQCEOeBohfOmkv14PMyNlcf4a_g4AZfd67-wsbOv-57tbKHEQkCyf42fU4-_yuOAbEhMmkyqfoKCXBR1NbuegbkLzMtqGC7BWlqIW87SAMxC5ICllYrxPmv3oWKSttbjlVSTtQ0MXU0qYlIH7ULN5INMlZGuGYrhyvG-V-at0haN633NOaq9YxdANaUmr5uGt-p8Trt3U2aSw%3D%3D)**. _**Back-door plots are already forming.**_
_**TOP**_ Democrats in Washington are meeting _**THIS WEEK**_ , and are assembling a _**BATTLE-PLAN**_ to prevent President Trump from implementing his _**AMERICA-FIRST AGENDA.**_

__**And we’ve seen this before.**__

Four years ago, Democrats in Washington did _**EVERYTHING**_ in their power to hamstring the MAGA movement.

__**They decried President Trump of RUSSIAN COLLUSION...**__

name: History Facts
subject: This real-life ruler inspired Dracula
body:
Neither Dracula nor vampires are, strictly speaking, real — at least so far as we know — but that doesn’t mean they don’t have their basis in reality. [](https://track.historyfacts.com/?xtl=1krv9cfc68bf4r6nwnzv71nk0yb6cqeeu5dzunws4bqs3f5ygaf1g7n88xxsgbf0j8x57yv3fgf8vwxj8xw3x4zphvendad5hpvnea5wof7w7pg2svxk8qnoo9e03rhmgn4qltsysi2v4v47qrba2ztba&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=smzqxv&__onlt=h&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com)
---
---
# [Count Dracula was inspired by Vlad the Impaler of Transylvania.](https://track.historyfacts.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=smzqxv&__onlt=h&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com)
### [Arts & Culture](https://track.historyfacts.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=smzqxv&__onlt=h&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com)
[](https://track.historyfacts.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=smzqxv&__onlt=h&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com)
| N either Dracula nor vampires are, strictly speaking, real — at least so far as we know — but that doesn’t mean they don’t have their basis in reality. While writing his endlessly influential novel _Dracula,_ author Bram Stoker was inspired by Central European folklore in general and [Vlad III](https://track.historyfacts.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=smzqxv&__onlt=h&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com) in particular, whom history often remembers by a more colorful name: Vlad the Impaler. The son of Vlad Dracul, he’s believed to have been born in Transylvania, eventually became voivode (ruler) of Wallachia (a region of Romania south of Transylvania), and more than earned his nickname by impaling his enemies. Vlad Dracul took _his_ name when he joined the Order of the Dragon, a secret cabal of Christian knights; “dracul” is Romanian for “dragon.” As fate would have it, “Dracula” means “son of Dracul.”
---
Stoker [called](https://track.historyfacts.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=smzqxv&__onlt=h&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com) Transylvania “one of the wildest and least known portions of Europe” in the book’s first chapter, an evocative description based on his research into the area and 19th-century travel literature (though the author never actually visited Romania’s spookiest region). Before falling in battle in 1476, Vlad III earned a reputation for brutality. Impalement was his favorite means of torturing and dispatching his enemies, but he was also known to decapitate, disembowel, and skin them; some claim he even dipped his bread in his victims’ blood while using their impaled bodies as morbid dinner guests. Whether such gory details are true may never be known, but it’s easy to see how he inspired one of the world’s most fearsome fictional characters.
[](https://track.historyfacts.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=smzqxv&__onlt=h&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com) | [](https://track.historyfacts.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=smzqxv&__onlt=h&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com)
Thank you for supporting our advertisers!

| [](https://track.historyfacts.com/?xtl=1wbmisw9fj44svm5mcrpnwow2xhg2z93mkogncqwg9nzfwdu3k9fzgolur7fw9i7cesmiaqeu3bvkl4stv8a23ogq1bpfnr21o236516b5b1i09k63jt88y8625byn8r5s0noeagwimmpl7lzew7r6ha43hlgila7d6her40p35qrut94yxly919fpo6kzc4d57vzlnuzp5xomawpsulpi8uy53pf13omi4zaqc5co7g5rt0uzhyi12xr&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=smzqxv&__onlt=h&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com)

## By the Numbers

27

| Film depictions of Dracula, the most of any literary character

| | Years it took Bram Stoker to write _Dracula_

| Vlad the Impaler’s age when he died

| | | Did you know?
---|---|---
## Sunlight isn’t fatal to Dracula in the novel.
Although sunlight does weaken Dracula and drain him of his powers, it doesn’t kill him — nor was it fatal to any other vampire for a full 25 years after _Dracula_ was published. The trope was actually invented in the 1922 German movie[ _Nosferatu: A Symphony of Horror_](https://track.historyfacts.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=smzqxv&__onlt=h&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com), director F.W. Murnau’s unofficial adaptation of Stoker’s novel. Widely considered one of the best, most influential horror films ever made, the German expressionist masterwork almost passed out of existence immediately after its release. Stoker’s estate sued over the film in Germany, reportedly leading to a court ordering that all copies be destroyed. Fortunately, enough prints survived for _Nosferatu_ to eventually achieve its current reputation as a vampiric classic almost on the same level as _Dracula_ itself.
