clean_body: Neither Dracula nor vampires are, strictly speaking, real — at least so far as we know — but that doesn’t mean they don’t have their basis in reality. | N either Dracula nor vampires are, strictly speaking, real — at least so far as we know — but that doesn’t mean they don’t have their basis in reality. While writing his endlessly influential novel Dracula, author Bram Stoker was inspired by Central European folklore in general and in particular, whom history often remembers by a more colorful name: Vlad the Impaler. The son of Vlad Dracul, he’s believed to have been born in Transylvania, eventually became voivode (ruler) of Wallachia (a region of Romania south of Transylvania), and more than earned his nickname by impaling his enemies. Vlad Dracul took his name when he joined the Order of the Dragon, a secret cabal of Christian knights; “dracul” is Romanian for “dragon.” As fate would have it, “Dracula” means “son of Dracul.” Stoker Transylvania “one of the wildest and least known portions of Europe” in the book’s first chapter, an evocative description based on his research into the area and 19th-century travel literature (though the author never actually visited Romania’s spookiest region). Before falling in battle in 1476, Vlad III earned a reputation for brutality. Impalement was his favorite means of torturing and dispatching his enemies, but he was also known to decapitate, disembowel, and skin them; some claim he even dipped his bread in his victims’ blood while using their impaled bodies as morbid dinner guests. Whether such gory details are true may never be known, but it’s easy to see how he inspired one of the world’s most fearsome fictional characters. | Thank you for supporting our advertisers! | By the Numbers | | Chapters in Bram Stoker’s Dracula 27 | | Film depictions of Dracula, the most of any literary character 272+ | Film depictions of Dracula, the most of any literary character 272+ | | Years it took Bram Stoker to write Dracula 7 | | Vlad the Impaler’s age when he died 45 | Vlad the Impaler’s age when he died 45 | | | Did you know? ---|---|--- Sunlight isn’t fatal to Dracula in the novel. Although sunlight does weaken Dracula and drain him of his powers, it doesn’t kill him — nor was it fatal to any other vampire for a full 25 years after Dracula was published. The trope was actually invented in the 1922 German movie, director F.W. Murnau’s unofficial adaptation of Stoker’s novel. Widely considered one of the best, most influential horror films ever made, the German expressionist masterwork almost passed out of existence immediately after its release. Stoker’s estate sued over the film in Germany, reportedly leading to a court ordering that all copies be destroyed. Fortunately, enough prints survived for Nosferatu to eventually achieve its current reputation as a vampiric classic almost on the same level as Dracula itself. body:

| | | Dear Friend,

The last four years of the Democrats' radical administration have been a **disaster** for America. Record inflation, out-of-control crime, and deadly drugs crossing our border - _it's clear Washington DC was in desperate need of the conservative takeover that struck the Nation on Election Night._

Your support throughout 2024 helped fuel our success.

**So, as one of the top 10 Republicans in YOUR AREA, we need you to help House Republicans shape our agenda. **

name: Bob Casey
subject: Standing up for the people of Pennsylvania
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY Pennsylvania Senate Victory Fund 2024
body:
We need to make sure voters across the Commonwealth have their voices heard.
# [](https://go.bobcasey.com/go/181?t=1&akid=4847%2E552475%2EuHisIC)
Peter, my priority has always been standing up for the people of Pennsylvania.
Across our Commonwealth, close to 7 million people cast their votes in a free and fair election. Our county election officials will finish counting those votes, just like they do in every election.
We need to make sure voters across the Commonwealth have their voices heard. The American democratic process was born in Pennsylvania, and that process must and will play out.
[**I’m here to tell you that the process is _not_ done, and this race is _not_ over. Can you fund our fight to have all voices heard with a donation of $5 or more right now?**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/casey-em-20241115-1?refcode=em20241115-1&refcode2=4847_552475_uHisIC&akid=4847%2E552475%2EuHisIC)

name: Heidi Ganahl
subject: The Mountain Minute: 11/15/2024
body:
Boebert, Hurd commit to seamless transition in 3rd District U.S. House leadership
| | | | [](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)
---
**PRESENTED BY[ROCKYMOUNTAINVOICE.COM](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)**
| | Hi friends,
In this today's lineup, we have a special report on the [peaceful transition](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.) from Rep. Lauren Boebert to Jeff Hurd. We then dive into the latest on the [Colorado Department of Transportation (CDOT)](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.) [](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.) and the pressing questions it faces, as former and current congressmen demand accountability. [Governor Polis is under scrutiny](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.) as well; we explore the contradictions between his self-proclaimed role as a “protector of democracy” and his actions impacting Colorado citizens. On the business front, I provide a close look at the [Kroger-Albertsons merger](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.) and its implications for Colorado’s economy, competition, and jobs. Rounding out our state report, we review the American Petroleum Institute’s priorities under the new administration and what that means for [Colorado’s energy industry](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.).
From Washington, a long awaited promise made by Trump was kept today as he tapped RFK, Jr., for [Health and Human Services secretary](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.). Also making waves, U.S. Rep. Matt Gaetz prepares to [take on the DOJ](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.) with an aggressive stance aimed at addressing perceived bias within the department.
Meanwhile, I got the wonderful opportunity to be in Florida at Mar-a-Lago for the America First Gala last night. Make sure you're following me on [X/Twitter](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.) for updates -- and join my new [X Community](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.) for insight scoop on how we're saving the state!
This is the Mountain Minute for Friday, November 15, 2024.
– Heidi Ganahl
---
|
---
**TODAY'S TOP STORIES**
**[Boebert, Hurd commit to seamless transition in 3rd District U.S. House leadership](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)** BY JEN SCHUMANN, [ROCKY MOUNTAIN VOICE](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)
[](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)
Colorado Republicans have had some inner-party drama this year. But, teamwork is possible. U.S. Rep. Lauren Boebert and U.S. Rep.-elect Jeff Hurd are proving it.
In a joint press release, the two pledge a smooth transition of leadership for Colorado’s 3rd U.S. House District. Boebert presently serves in the seat. Hurd will serve in the seat come January. They both express confidence in each other and their teams.
“As legislators wrap up our work for the 118th Congress, it is critically important that the people of Colorado’s 3rd Congressional District experience a smooth transition of representation as Congressman-elect Jeff Hurd begins his term in January,” says Boebert.
**[READ MORE](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)**
|
---
The Rocky Mountain Voice is a 501(c)(3) that exists to promote informed civic engagement and the principles of self-governance through enterprise reporting on public policy, politics, government, and culture throughout the state of Colorado. The only way we can continue to spread truth is with your support!
[DONATE TO ROCKY MOUNTAIN VOICE](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)
|
---
**[‘CDOT is going to have to answer some hard questions’: Former, current congressmen want answers on failures](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)** [ROCKY MOUNTAIN VOICE](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)
* Former State Senator Ray Scott and Congresswoman Lauren Boebert are pressing the Colorado Department of Transportation (CDOT) to address safety concerns after numerous fatal accidents in CDOT work zones, highlighting issues with project management and accountability.
* Contractors have privately reported safety violations, including withheld traffic flow plans and improper use of safety equipment, raising fears of retaliation from CDOT if they speak publicly.
* Republican congressional leaders have appealed to U.S. Transportation Secretary Pete Buttigieg to oversee CDOT’s practices, aiming for transparency, accountability, and improved safety standards for Colorado’s infrastructure projects.

**[READ MORE](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)**
|
---
**[Schumann: Polis position as ‘protector of democracy’ at odds with his actions as governor](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)** [ROCKY MOUNTAIN VOICE](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)
* Governor Jared Polis has promoted himself as a "protector of democracy" through initiatives like the Governors Safeguarding Democracy Coalition but has been criticized for using executive authority in ways that some believe contradict this stance, especially during the COVID-19 pandemic and in implementing strict gun regulations.
* Critics argue that Polis’ actions on issues like the National Popular Vote, oil and gas regulation, and gun control reflect a centralization of power that bypasses the legislature, undermining the democratic processes he claims to defend.
* Despite a substantial investment in public safety, violent crime rates have surged under Polis' administration, leading to questions about the effectiveness of his policies and further contrasting with his stated commitment to safeguard democracy and public well-being.

**[READ MORE](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)**
|
---
**[Ganahl: Kroger-Albertsons merger preserves competition, protects jobs and retains price points](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)** [ROCKY MOUNTAIN VOICE](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)
* The proposed Kroger-Albertsons merger aims to preserve competition in Colorado by selling 91 stores to C&S Wholesale Grocers, ensuring no store closures or layoffs and honoring existing union agreements.
* Colorado Attorney General Phil Weiser has raised antitrust concerns over the merger, citing a 2022 dispute as evidence; Kroger denies any wrongdoing, and the merger's benefits are highlighted as crucial to protecting jobs and avoiding potential store closures.
* The merger is framed as a necessary move to compete with large retail chains like Walmart and Amazon, with a commitment to investing in price reductions and supporting Colorado communities if approved.

**[READ MORE](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)**
|
---
**[Oil and gas industry to push for policy changes under Trump administration](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)** [THE GAZETTE](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)
* The American Petroleum Institute (API) has set forth a five-point plan to support the oil and gas sector under the Trump administration, focusing on policies to reduce regulations, promote domestic energy resources, and lower consumer costs.
* API advocates repealing California’s Clean Air Act waiver, aiming to create a unified national vehicle emissions standard, and calls for resuming liquefied natural gas (LNG) export permits and offshore leasing to strengthen U.S. energy independence.
* Environmental groups express strong opposition to these proposed rollbacks, citing concerns about increased pollution and climate impacts, while API highlights that American voters support a diverse energy portfolio without restrictive mandates.

**[READ MORE](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)**
|
---
**[‘Make America Great and Healthy’: Trump taps RFK, Jr., for Health and Human Services secretary](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)** [THE DAILY SIGNAL](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)
* President-elect Donald Trump has announced Robert F. Kennedy Jr. as his nominee for Secretary of Health and Human Services, emphasizing Kennedy’s focus on challenging pharmaceutical companies and the industrial food complex to address America’s health crisis.
* Kennedy, known for his environmental activism and criticism of vaccines, aims to bring greater transparency and accountability to health agencies, advocating for protection from harmful chemicals and pollutants in food and drugs.
* The nomination aligns with Trump’s “Make America Healthy Again” initiative, highlighting a shared commitment with Kennedy to disrupt traditional health systems and prioritize the well-being of everyday Americans.

**[READ MORE](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)**
|
---
**[Davidson: We need to take a wrecking ball to the DOJ. Matt Gaetz is just the man for the job](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)** BY JOHN DANIEL DAVIDSON, [THE FEDERALIST](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)
_Gaetz isn’t ‘unqualified’ to lead the Justice Department. As a victim of the DOJ, he might be the best person to reform it._
_The collective pearl-clutching by the corporate press and Washington establishment on Wednesday after Trump announced he’d chosen Matt Gaetz to be his attorney general was something to behold. The swamp consensus is that the former Florida congressman is “unqualified” to lead the Justice Department._

_Never mind that the people making this claim are themselves deeply unqualified to hold their own positions of power. (Consider Alaska Sen. Lisa Murkowski, who dismissed Gaetz as not a “serious” pick. Murkowski is poster-child for unserious and unqualified Beltway drones. She failed the bar exam four times and only got a Senate seat because her corrupt father, Frank Murkowski, appointed her to his seat after he became a one-term governor of Alaska in 2002.)_
**[READ MORE](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)**
|
---
**ONLY ON ROCKY MOUNTAIN VOICE ⤵️**
**[‘We only needed to flip three seats’: In House District 16, Keltie leads and is working to keep it that way](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)** **BY JEN SCHUMANN | STATE | NOVEMBER 13** _The final act of a mother’s life has come to symbolize the stakes in Colorado’s House District 16 race. A late mother’s son ensured his mother’s ballot was cured, honoring her final wish to participate in the electoral process._
**[Update: Republican Dan Woog expands lead in tight House District 19 overnight](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)** **BY BRIAN PORTER | STATE | NOVEMBER 13** _In a race Republican Dan Woog once trailed, he is beginning to look like a winner by continuing to add votes to a tight margin. His lead grew by 21 votes as of Wednesday morning to a margin of 228 votes over Democrat Jillaire McMillan in House District 19, which includes electorate in Boulder and Weld counties._
[**Mesa County voters approve measures 4A and 4B for schools, promising upgrades, transparency**](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)
[****](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)**BY JEN SCHUMANN | LOCAL |****NOVEMBER 13** _In a decisive voice, the Mesa County community voted for ballot measures 4A and 4B. This passage is a clear mandate: Buildings with accessibility and security issues get an overhaul. Five learning days remain on the school calendar. And teachers will receive more approved curriculum sources, so they won’t have to resort to websites like Teachers Pay Teachers._

This jingle campaign was so successful that Wheaties' sales boomed in Minneapolis, showing the power of **radio advertising**.

After Donald Trump won the presidential election, President Biden and Senate Democrats have been working hard to end Trump’s immunity and limit the Supreme Court’s power. Just read the fine print right here: [](https://default.salsalabs.org/T3380f435-319e-4519-8e0b-cb831081f9f2/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)

| | | About Blue Amp Action: We cannot sugarcoat the current situation. Right-wing authoritarianism, defeated by a worldwide coalition during WWII, was only in hibernation. Over the past decade it has infected democratic societies--including ours. It is as simple as it is terrifying: What we do now will define the future of our country and world. We at Blue Amp Action are dedicated to liberal, open societies, where reason and science are applied to solve our problems; where civil rights--including voting rights!--are protected for all. We fight for these values every day. Speaking up on our platforms, raising the voices and the political prospects of liberal pols and pundits. **And savvy grassroots activists like you know, just like we do, that we can’t stop watching the people we help elect:_ after the elections, we have to keep organizing support for the policies we like and pushing back against the ones we don’t._** **__When the public tunes out between elections and the only people our elected officials hear from are the paid lobbyists of wealthy corporations, our government stops being accountable to the needs of ordinary families.__** **Democracy never sleeps, and neither can we.** So we ask that you support our work, so we can continue to engage in this fight every moment of every day. So our kids grow up in democracy, not dystopia. Thank you for your support for all we do! Please follow Cliff Schecter on Twitter @cliffschecter, or subscribe to The Takedown with Cliff Schecter on YouTube, to keep up to date with this battle for the heart and soul of our country. — _You're getting this message because you’ve supported good causes and Democratic candidates. We need your support to continue fighting for our democracy. # [Tell the Ethics Committee to release the Matt Gaetz report. America needs to know about his sexual misconduct, drug use, etc](https://default.salsalabs.org/Tef0f5253-3c62-4912-a6f2-18a4b283fce0/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)

---
| | | The bipartisan House Ethics Committee was ready this week to release a lengthy report of its investigation into Matt Gaetz's felony crimes, sexual misconduct, sexual trafficking, drug use, and God only knows what else. But that move was cut short when Donald Trump nominated Gaetz for attorney general, and Gaetz resigned his House seat -- ending the committee's jurisdiction for further investigation. **But the committee still has the right to issue its report, and can do so with a simple majority vote.** And with Gaetz nominated for the top legal position in America, the people need to know just how big a criminal he is. [**Add your name, and tell the Ethics Committee to release the Matt Gaetz report.**](https://default.salsalabs.org/Ta148fe90-936c-42d9-968b-252d459091bf/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)

I want to let you in on something. I just debriefed our team at Marsha HQ, and we came up with an idea I want your input on. Senator Marsha Blackburn has dedicated her life to serving the people of Tennesee and making our country a beacon of freedom and prosperity. And what better way to congratulate her on her re-election than to send her a card filled with messages from her TOP supporters! https://click.updates.marshablackburn.com/?qs=14ed24a76f476c0746cccd3440c55666fd80085fb8c115a9993d61110ed8ae5be818b1cc304617c40458ed10a294df60ccee63e8cdb8c811c2d83c2c1cf605ac I’m attaching the card below, and I hope you’ll take a moment to sign it: https://click.updates.marshablackburn.com/?qs=14ed24a76f476c0746cccd3440c55666fd80085fb8c115a9993d61110ed8ae5be818b1cc304617c40458ed10a294df60ccee63e8cdb8c811c2d83c2c1cf605ac SIGN MARSHA’S CARD Senator Blackburn – THANK YOU for everything you’ve done and will continue to do to serve our country. From protecting women’s sports with an iron fist to dropping the hammer on Communist China, you continue to inspire Conservatives all over the country. You fought tirelessly against the Radical Left to keep Tennessee red, take back the Senate Majority, and re-elect President Trump. And you WON. There is no better person for the job, and I’m so honored to support a woman like you in the Senate. God bless, https://click.updates.marshablackburn.com/?qs=14ed24a76f476c0746cccd3440c55666fd80085fb8c115a9993d61110ed8ae5be818b1cc304617c40458ed10a294df60ccee63e8cdb8c811c2d83c2c1cf605ac {Your Name Here} We’re finalizing our card at 11:59 PM, so please sign it as soon as you can! name: Hillsdale College via Old Glory Today
subject: Our most important online course?
body:
Marxism goes by different names to make itself seem less dangerous

This sponsored message from Old Glory Today is on behalf of Hillsdale College

| | | [](https://post.spmailtechnol.com/f/a/xaqnfg7sPL4w-FaB6NX6IA~~/AARclAA~~)
---
| | Dear Fellow American,

**I 'm excited to let you know about our free documentary course, "Marxism, Socialism, and Communism."**

Today, Marxism goes by different names to make itself seem less dangerous. I'm sure you've heard of "critical race theory," "gender theory," or even "decolonization."

I know you're not fooled by these disguises.

Without a doubt, "Marxism, Socialism, and Communism" will be one of our most important courses **because the source of these dangerous ideologies is still Karl Marx.**

It's still the same Marxism that works to destroy your property and your country.

It's still the same Marxism that seeks to abolish your family and your God.

And it's still the same Marxism that leads to famines, show trials, gulags, and other atrocities.

The truth is, there's nothing fundamentally _new_ about this "new" Marxism, except for one crucial fact...

**... it's more popular with our youth than ever before. **

That's why I invite you to gain a deeper understanding of the history of Marxism as well as the threat it poses to our liberty.

[**You can do that by registering for "Marxism, Socialism, and Communism" today.**](https://post.spmailtechnol.com/f/a/xaqnfg7sPL4w-FaB6NX6IA~~/AARclAA~~)

Or you can send this to a friend!

This free online course is more urgent than ever. We are at a critical time for our country, and Marxism--under a variety of names--continues to infiltrate our culture.

**Will you join us by registering for this free online course?** You can click on the secure link below to register and get access today:

[**https://online.hillsdale.edu/courses/register/marxism-socialism-communism**](https://post.spmailtechnol.com/f/a/xaqnfg7sPL4w-FaB6NX6IA~~/AARclAA~~)

Most colleges and universities work to indoctrinate young people with Marxism.

That's why taking this course and making it available to as many Americans as possible will be one of the most important ways you will defend liberty in America.

You're one of the reasons why we can defend liberty by producing and promoting courses like "Marxism, Socialism, and Communism"--so thank you so much for all you do.

Warm regards,

Bill Gray, '01
Vice President
Institutional Advancement
Hillsdale College

P.S. We've released one of our most important free documentary courses this month..."Marxism, Socialism, and Communism"! You can register for this course at the secure link below:

[**https://online.hillsdale.edu/courses/register/marxism-socialism-communism**](https://post.spmailtechnol.com/f/a/xaqnfg7sPL4w-FaB6NX6IA~~/AARclAA~~)

**Marxism currently hides behind many names ...CRT, gender ideology, or even calls for decolonization...but it's still the same Marxism that seeks to destroy your rights.**

**You can stand up to this dangerous ideology by registering for this free documentary course today!** **
**

---
| |

name: Hillsdale College via Conservative Direct
subject: Our nation’s history is unifying
body:
I’m reaching out to share something important with you...something that could expand your horizons. | _Please see a special message from our sponsor. If you would like to unsubscribe, visit this[link](http://links.newsletter.conservativedirect.com/e/encryptedUnsubscribe?_r=5b1853ae48754bee8f471363fe4933a9&_s=bd6cbfe4d2c142e4984529a73f7430b8&_t=Qjv1TK8VwbbxNfayJzERda7CF7UX1H_2zVP9FN0Pvt2G7ZSirroF4lPZW522-USrqlg1r5-XgO3EfQBMkvactpH3vs4SUsrXsRdffB2CsT8Ga8D5r8RseOEvUApp7wQT)_
---
[](http://links.newsletter.conservativedirect.com/u/click?_t=5b1853ae48754bee8f471363fe4933a9&_m=bd6cbfe4d2c142e4984529a73f7430b8&_e=Whw-SOqA37E3xkvzR3olUTfv5QPkrxkMWau_uHTQFSzuV1Y7WhZVmsylu09VHTxmzwE2g_ROSUZNQU2eTh-lbylc7f1UX-A-2AdtC6oKKGFsL4kBwK4oIp7FtrBDsTT_264_AtPHXHEBubGsF4QKlwSA-EBSmPLkK1SZA2SqaEqyjQN3L6yuoX1afoaGt76jtGfecnd-UP3F4GBBnuPOX8TpbAAiFXAeX-BVN5CzrGUHTMjHxgCp8BIg-WQBuEkAUAgaReQFWvoJFWdF8mbrXzuE1z7O7-Z11hpTdP5UyzRM4Mo7kiLbyLbdtIrvaew8dJ9s8pjo7elxQa_Y6zvQze09Sj1VMuXr7kvR2h3GevcwFTeAvWqp6oCg9nt8jDf3weyA4oFjtgcUvHgqvQOv_8B-0vRqgWjht_75JAKRiOQ%3D) Dear Fellow American, Thanks for opening my email. I hope you're having a great day so far. I'm reaching out to share something important with you...something that could expand your horizons. I'm talking about studying American history! As Hillsdale College professor Wilfred McClay explains in our online course ["The Great American Story: A Land of Hope,"](http://links.newsletter.conservativedirect.com/u/click?_t=5b1853ae48754bee8f471363fe4933a9&_m=bd6cbfe4d2c142e4984529a73f7430b8&_e=Whw-SOqA37E3xkvzR3olUTfv5QPkrxkMWau_uHTQFSzuV1Y7WhZVmsylu09VHTxmzwE2g_ROSUZNQU2eTh-lbylc7f1UX-A-2AdtC6oKKGFsL4kBwK4oIp7FtrBDsTT_264_AtPHXHEBubGsF4QKlwSA-EBSmPLkK1SZA2SqaEqyjQN3L6yuoX1afoaGt76jtGfecnd-UP3F4GBBnuPOX8TpbAAiFXAeX-BVN5CzrGUHTMjHxgCp8BIg-WQBuEkAUAgaReQFWvoJFWdF8mbrX9oF-p-l0Buj1TlrFQEY50bawgQ9DTU3KqESbWHZWHjAzVK6F7T1xVjuQ8c1A4Y0AkgySp5APWg9KfwPA67uKgWnmWjFP4BxEK2BSaE23LC6BmW46jiIqKzMfdbshtPNjcqS-sdG5E5Vu5Jr4t0Eu4E%3D) studying history can broaden your perspective and help you understand different ways of living. Compare that to _The New York Times '_ "1619 Project," now a multi-part series streaming online. The "1619 Project" locates the founding of America in 1619, the year the first slave arrived on our shores, rather than in 1776, when the **Declaration of Independence declared that all men are created equal with unalienable God-given rights**. According to the "1619 Project," the key to understanding America is not freedom but slavery--and the project's main goal is to broadcast this false teaching into every home, including yours. We must counter this false and dishonest historical narrative with the truth. **That 's why we've turned our online course, ["The Great American Story: A Land of Hope,"](http://links.newsletter.conservativedirect.com/u/click?_t=5b1853ae48754bee8f471363fe4933a9&_m=bd6cbfe4d2c142e4984529a73f7430b8&_e=Whw-SOqA37E3xkvzR3olUTfv5QPkrxkMWau_uHTQFSzuV1Y7WhZVmsylu09VHTxmzwE2g_ROSUZNQU2eTh-lbylc7f1UX-A-2AdtC6oKKGFsL4kBwK4oIp7FtrBDsTT_264_AtPHXHEBubGsF4QKlwSA-EBSmPLkK1SZA2SqaEqyjQN3L6yuoX1afoaGt76jtGfecnd-UP3F4GBBnuPOX8TpbAAiFXAeX-BVN5CzrGUHTMjHxgCp8BIg-WQBuEkAUAgaReQFWvoJFWdF8mbrXyacLhTXRcwH9QovimG7sPEHltYTlSnEr4ybwDLZlT116LECm0KMm5jbduMy-o4jZbsKO95WgHB-txPeS1b2TW7KSORcK0T3EBto7yD3lQdhqIb_gU7uxB58j0em5dVZTTEVPH5OkXwTx8OG3n_pRi0%3D) into a DVD set, and I'd like you to have a copy.** **" The Great American Story: A Land of Hope"** presents a full, unbiased account of America's past. We produced this course to restore the kind of intelligent patriotism--especially among our young people--essential to restoring free government. You'll be excited to learn that **" The Great American Story: A Land of Hope"** is a powerful counterweight to _The New York Times '_ "1619 Project," which tells people, especially children, that America is essentially an unjust nation--the opposite of our nation's unifying principles. Today, you can claim a DVD copy of ["The Great American Story: A Land of Hope"](http://links.newsletter.conservativedirect.com/u/click?_t=5b1853ae48754bee8f471363fe4933a9&_m=bd6cbfe4d2c142e4984529a73f7430b8&_e=Whw-SOqA37E3xkvzR3olUTfv5QPkrxkMWau_uHTQFSzuV1Y7WhZVmsylu09VHTxmzwE2g_ROSUZNQU2eTh-lbylc7f1UX-A-2AdtC6oKKGFsL4kBwK4oIp7FtrBDsTT_264_AtPHXHEBubGsF4QKlwSA-EBSmPLkK1SZA2SqaEqyjQN3L6yuoX1afoaGt76jtGfecnd-UP3F4GBBnuPOX8TpbAAiFXAeX-BVN5CzrGUHTMjHxgCp8BIg-WQBuEkAUAgaReQFWvoJFWdF8mbrX2lpvXjF0nXYgQESZKxdjkmz_aXB7g_GzeXOudb27FpchoPb3tGtW2VyBo61WpXUDfR5pWfpT3YDs1J4bo7p2neKIXqoe0l08xpC0SWll_jXExyRq2VbVqL2fkWb5SHFDPj10R9EzuTDMXb0SrfWczU%3D) for your home library or give it as a gift. **Presenting real American history is the surest means of preserving liberty.** Quantities are limited, so reserve your copy today. [https://secured.hillsdale.edu/hillsdale/support-great-american-story-dvd](http://links.newsletter.conservativedirect.com/u/click?_t=5b1853ae48754bee8f471363fe4933a9&_m=bd6cbfe4d2c142e4984529a73f7430b8&_e=Whw-SOqA37E3xkvzR3olUTfv5QPkrxkMWau_uHTQFSzuV1Y7WhZVmsylu09VHTxmzwE2g_ROSUZNQU2eTh-lbylc7f1UX-A-2AdtC6oKKGFsL4kBwK4oIp7FtrBDsTT_264_AtPHXHEBubGsF4QKlwSA-EBSmPLkK1SZA2SqaEqyjQN3L6yuoX1afoaGt76jtGfecnd-UP3F4GBBnuPOX8TpbAAiFXAeX-BVN5CzrGUHTMjHxgCp8BIg-WQBuEkAUAgaReQFWvoJFWdF8mbrXzzrY5islTXd-P2qHKdVo5BtZZLmP7yURLTKzbFErsrq58xvlY5JFwzBcbGnK4uQCHgoWSOHc1RgTOrm-Y4uqGQHDjdBWC1EQFnvqOGZFWR5-_dqBBqEXNbpDWS4Rjt1kU8UM2owEUiv8sMxclePv6Q%3D) Thank you for your partnership with Hillsdale College and for supporting its mission on behalf of liberty. Warm regards, Bill Gray, '01 Vice President Institutional Advancement Hillsdale College **P.S.** Despite what _The New York Times '_ "1619 Project" says, our nation's history is unifying. That's why we've produced a full, unbiased account of America's past with **" The Great American Story: A Land of Hope,"** now available on DVD. You can receive your copy with your generous tax-deductible gift of $100 or more using this secure link: [https://secured.hillsdale.edu/hillsdale/support-great-american-story-dvd](http://links.newsletter.conservativedirect.com/u/click?_t=5b1853ae48754bee8f471363fe4933a9&_m=bd6cbfe4d2c142e4984529a73f7430b8&_e=Whw-SOqA37E3xkvzR3olUTfv5QPkrxkMWau_uHTQFSzuV1Y7WhZVmsylu09VHTxmzwE2g_ROSUZNQU2eTh-lbylc7f1UX-A-2AdtC6oKKGFsL4kBwK4oIp7FtrBDsTT_264_AtPHXHEBubGsF4QKlwSA-EBSmPLkK1SZA2SqaEqyjQN3L6yuoX1afoaGt76jtGfecnd-UP3F4GBBnuPOX8TpbAAiFXAeX-BVN5CzrGUHTMjHxgCp8BIg-WQBuEkAUAgaReQFWvoJFWdF8mbrXyJynCnk0ZHbAfIoMdsSnG18dPbt18QXj7awMCtmwpvEKsmkoxdK5fuAjlr64FXodrb7KTwhoqb2sQTpmeDXE1vzSSuqS9WoLaVzLqXI2ujxgu08E1urKiYT_peXdow02CK8Gr8AFJzQeCK8ye71dc0%3D) Act today because quantities are limited! Thank you so much for helping us promote intelligent patriotism--especially among younger Americans. |

name: USO Reading Program
subject: Discover how the USO brings families together for story time even when they’re 5,000 miles apart.
body:
Your support makes a critical difference.
[](https://www.uso.org)
[DONATE NOW](https://links.e.uso.)
---
USO Supporter,
This Military Family Appreciation Month, we wanted to share just one example of how programs like the USO Reading Program are a lifeline for military families to keep them connected even when they're thousands of miles apart.
[](https://links.e.uso.org/els/v2/KAeVs7zW~Vhe/ODdaOTlyNm4wSmp1NFJlTDZPMjlPampKYUxMMlRLZVl5RTdkOVFDTy95MkZocEhHckZhSUlmYkR6OUFGR2pZNVROdFN0cjcyZjVBb3NEOGlsV0tkMjloN1FkTGI5cFB2cS9kVWlVUW8zMzA9S0/bG5OSEZRSnFVSWgwaFNTbjB6MXprUEpMNFBzc1pCMXRGUlk5RzczeEkyVDB2MHJFbXAxSVBFNTIwdVUxUnNaWHpXY3NuRGtOYkxHU2x1bVk1RFUwaFpma1Q1MG5nbWJxS0)
---
When the Bishop family first transferred to Spangdahlem Air Base, they leaned on the USO's support to help them settle into their new life in Germany. A few years later, mom, Megan and her son, Aiden, chose to give back by becoming USO volunteers themselves, building the same community they had once relied on.
The USO Reading Program holds a particularly special place in their hearts. When Master Sgt. Brent Bishop was sent to Nellis Air Force Base in Nevada, it was this program that helped ensure he could be home for Aiden's bedtime.
The USO Reading Program is one of our most popular programs for military members overseas to connect with their families. Typically, service members record themselves reading a book, and the USO sends that recording and a copy of the book home to a son, daughter, sibling or any other child in their life.
The program hosted at Spangdahlem was the opposite. It was the children and spouses who read to the service members in "reverse readings." Aiden jumped at the opportunity.
"I chose the book 'I Love You Like No Otter' because I really do love him like no other. He's always there for me and I appreciate him a lot."
[](https://links.e.uso.org/els/v2/KAeVs7zW~Vhe/ODdaOTlyNm4wSmp1NFJlTDZPMjlPampKYUxMMlRLZVl5RTdkOVFDTy95MkZocEhHckZhSUlmYkR6OUFGR2pZNVROdFN0cjcyZjVBb3NEOGlsV0tkMjloN1FkTGI5cFB2cS9kVWlVUW8zMzA9S0/bG5OSEZRSnFVSWgwaFNTbjB6MXprUEpMNFBzc1pCMXRGUlk5RzczeEkyVDB2MHJFbXAxSVBFNTIwdVUxUnNaWHpXY3NuRGtOYkxHU2x1bVk1RFUwaFpma1Q1MG5nbWJxS0)
---
For Master Sgt. Bishop, who works closely with the USO to support the well-being of his fellow airmen, receiving the recording from his family was a moment of surprise and joy that impacted him on a personal level.
**It 's thanks to the support of the USO that Master Sgt. Bishop and his family can be there for each other even when he's thousands of miles away -- and we want to continue to make that possible for all our service members. [In honor of Military Family Appreciation Month, will you help the USO raise $50,000 to support more military members and families like the Bishops through programs like USO Reading?](https://links.e.uso.)**
Thank you for standing with our service members and their families, this month and always.
--The USO

name: Mark
subject: 🆘 ACT NOW: Urgent CALL for Election Integrity!
body:
Your immediate action is required to secure fair elections. | | | [ ](https://gfiohio.us17.list-manage.com/track/click?u=c2cee5a5358289d5dd20ff17d&id=e3515a0eb7&e=5c740fa3e2)
---
| Sorry it's been almost 2 months since our last "weekly" message. Lots of things have taken priority, including **ELECTION INTEGRITY** initiatives!

**PLEASE READ THIS AND CONSIDER ACTING! IT WILL ONLY TAKE MINUTES BUT IS EXTREMELY IMPORTANT!**

Thank you for subscribing & staying subscribed!

**BE SURE TO HAVE YOUR FAMILY & FRIENDS "JOIN US":**

---
| [Join Us!](https://gfiohio.us17.list-manage.com/track/click?u=c2cee5a5358289d5dd20ff17d&id=a337d04a66&e=5c740fa3e2 "Join Us!")
---
| | | **
ELECTION INTEGRITY ALERT!
WE NEED YOUR HELP!
THIS IS AN IMPORTANT "ASK"!
PLEASE READ THIS & TAKE ACTION!
(1st Request)**

---
| **Call to Action**
**Call Frank LaRose today at 877-767-6446 and tell him to “Please authorize and direct Monroe County to conduct a 100% paper ballot hand count audit.”

IT DOES NOT MATTER WHERE YOU LIVE IN OHIO, SO PLEASE DON'T NEGLECT CALLING BECAUSE YOU LIVE IN ANOTHER COUNTY!**
_**"You can vote your values all day long ... but if your vote isn't safe and the process isn't secure, it doesn't matter."**_
**BACKGROUND:**

Monroe County is the second least populated county in Ohio, located in the southeast corner of the state. With only about 13,000 residents and 9300 registered voters, there were only 6801 ballots cast in last week’s election.

**SITUATION:**
* In May, the Board of Elections informed county commissioners that if ballots were hand counted, it would take 9 days at a cost of $156,000 per election. We don’t believe those numbers are accurate. We are a small county, and many of our older residents remember results posted on election night when ballots were hand counted.
* In September, we submitted a public records request for the resources used to arrive at those conclusions. We are still waiting.
* In early October, 45 people attended the Board of Elections meeting and requested that the post-election audit be expanded to hand count 100% of the ballots, noting that volunteers would be provided to assist with that task. No response has ever been given.
* A petition was created and circulated following that meeting. In 10 days, 269 Monroe County registered voters signed that petition with more than 80 of them indicating they would like to volunteer if provided the opportunity.
* This petition was submitted to the Board of Elections on Wednesday, October 23 with a response requested by Monday, October 28, to allow for organization and training of all volunteers. No formal response has ever been provided, however, a text from the Chair stated they were “waiting on a response from the state.”
* Prior to election day, 6 poll observers were approved. Very early on Tuesday, November 5th, an observer was informed that the sheriff’s department had been given observers names as potential trouble makers and law enforcement was assigned to each polling location – a first for this county.
* WHAT IS GOING ON IN MONROE COUNTY??? Why does the Board of Elections continue to ignore the voters and stoop to intimidation tactics rather than encourage transparency?

**Please call Frank LaRose today at 877-767-6446 and tell him to “Please authorize and direct Monroe County to conduct a 100% paper ballot hand count audit.”**

---
|
---
| [ ](https://gfiohio.us17.list-manage.com/track/click?u=c2cee5a5358289d5dd20ff17d&id=6c66aefdfb&e=5c740fa3e2)
---
|
---
|

---
| |
**Prior Issues of This Email
You May Find Valuable**

---
|
[**CLICK HERE for access to all past issues!**](https://gfiohio.us17.list-manage.com/track/click?u=c2cee5a5358289d5dd20ff17d&id=47a22c398f&e=5c740fa3e2)

---
|
---
|
---

Best regards,

**Mark Pukita
A GFI Person
mark@gfiohio.com
614-499-0599 (c)
[GFIOhio.com](https://gfiohio.us17.list-manage.com/track/click?u=c2cee5a5358289d5dd20ff17d&id=68822f60dc&e=5c740fa3e2)**
---

**Our mailing address is:**
The Grassroots Freedom Initiative4240 Hobbs Landing Dr WDublin, OH 43017-6025
[Add us to your address book](https://gfiohio.us17.list-manage.com/vcard?u=c2cee5a5358289d5dd20ff17d&id=9877b1cc31)

Want to change how you receive these emails?
You can [update your preferences](https://gfiohio.us17.list-manage.com/profile?u=c2cee5a5358289d5dd20ff17d&id=9877b1cc31&e=5c740fa3e2&c=027b5e34ad) or [unsubscribe from this list](https://gfiohio.us17.list-manage.com/unsubscribe?u=c2cee5a5358289d5dd20ff17d&id=9877b1cc31&t=b&e=5c740fa3e2&c=027b5e34ad).

* * *
**[Reality Check: Are You Prepared for What's Next?](http://trk.thedcbugle.com/?xtl=7l65mieco2oh0pyusc8d4lw3ti1itlp7dbquszkgkd830sdhlsbsm4r6yw0c64nu8hxgoz5n74xdhlaq25w7rmg2v5xge1z2y3dnd1092mqwvkrilcflam5fw2fuvjenhp8hn25ia3gr4h3ladrjo0n2zp0nzmm92fjg2jt9tcy3xqj4gvgpky99u4trt7hla6zalz8hbtdyjndyis7dqsrtntrwprbkr9slhz95lylg6nw3196k5bw&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=smzxpr&__onlt=h)** With everything going on today, it’s natural to feel a growing sense of unease about the future. Rising costs of everyday essentials, inflation eating into the value of our hard-earned dollars, and news of escalating national debt are impacting people across the board. The middle class feels the pinch acutely, with many left wondering how long they can maintain their standard of living without making sacrifices. Global shifts, like the alliance of BRICS nations pushing for economic independence from the U.S. dollar, and ongoing market volatility add layers of unpredictability that complicate even the best-laid financial plans. It’s easy to find yourself asking: **[What happens if the world doesn’t return to “normal”?](http://trk.thedcbugle.com/?xtl=7l65mieco2oh0pyusc8d4lw3ti1itlp7dcpilcjgdnzzuse7ovvf8der4iz41z7cr1qo322ibwgt8fjs9tktczvbm2d0p90ldm2zmt7qfyswy60i8a5i9gwi2d1m15ursrtk3dbvfwt03bi7a7r27ya7icqsayny5ec6wumg95w7jn3353vzlakf8c9od4orb6o7jvjz65gn418cvnp9zl9qerb7jq2nuyp4w0z1qhtiw3t100x8c5o&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=smzxpr&__onlt=h)** One pressing concern that keeps emerging is the U.S. dollar’s diminishing purchasing power. According to recent data from the U.S. Bureau of Labor Statistics and the World Bank, the dollar has lost over 20% of its purchasing power since 2020. In practical terms, this devaluation means that a dollar today buys far less than it did just four years ago, impacting everyday expenses, savings, and the value of long-term assets. **[For the average middle-class American, each percentage point lost further erodes financial security, forcing them to either cut back or explore alternative ways to protect and grow their savings.](http://trk.thedcbugle.com/?xtl=7l65mieco2oh0pyusc8d4lw3ti1itlp7ddpnufigvi380seubyq67r5zz99tj63kx76fft0u8136xa6usgoe209o0li5ksqiispkfjqwwkuwapxhtxtehqlkxr91up8v1td0it96l13x2warzzq7391p63exbkol8duv234r0wuo9791rz8k0daolo1m10ehc60chsyqyfilmcbg66udju3o9pkhtoqaxl998q0ig3lkjhpkkdlvmxv&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=smzxpr&__onlt=h)** [](http://trk.thedcbugle.com/?xtl=7l65mieco2oh0pyusc8d4lw3ti1itlp7deoc1ihgosueuseg2b8v62ui5xhheb06dolnvhk3ctnhkurwa6d2pokkdj1nvzeg1ybmppxcomwwcx6gcufbslr143selwkyyw03b6eg4tc61rszz3pnkhqurt6cdmqoncmhvzjldlssx3qlc6k81gpibjf7mj9nd5b9fpn63tlzts6jf1am70j9co8v1md1bo5pidqe9ou1nzmijvpfh1p&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=smzxpr&__onlt=h) For many, day-to-day routines, busy schedules, and opinions from advisors, family, and friends often pull attention away from the bigger picture. When it comes to finances, it’s tempting to put off critical decisions, assume the status quo will hold, or rely on others’ advice without evaluating what’s truly best for long-term security. **[But in times like these, with so many factors shifting all at once, taking proactive steps has never been more important.](http://trk.thedcbugle.com/?xtl=7l65mieco2oh0pyusc8d4lw3ti1itlp7dfo4wlgg50kp0sf5re2i4bi4zku9a7iqjudfmmhb8jwxnoayhv5oabaxug6t4h6d6f0xifei3yyweedfls5y2vg3ydawseac7y96tiot9kod0m8hyvosgtdzagwheyrbqb3818dwvqqwilwk0czu2j3ssvx4wfbde5ped9ljw62na5a1rifesvd77mu6x93qeb1ux4ezax03br7gime4rtq&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=smzxpr&__onlt=h)** The question is no longer whether to take action but what kind of action to take. How can we prepare for an economic environment that feels as unpredictable as it is challenging? How can we maintain our lifestyles, protect our families, and still plan for the future, regardless of what uncertainties arise? **[Diversification—spreading out assets to manage risk—has long been a cornerstone of financial planning in uncertain times.](http://trk.thedcbugle.com/?xtl=7l65mieco2oh0pyusc8d4lw3ti1itlp7eia9emcxhc950t5dkjfmyaxx1lpab7btdkruyi7xcl8dwkd31n0fmg5hrziab2zwjfxrufdmt0gz982litpg18wipan3xpaby4omqm67ors1ctxd0mphlopu3cmt9lk8box3wpyz00nq4c71cycz9jtq0cy3whlwheygrxus2j174sa2guk31t0q1p8odqfkv0cba07wy12d0rfxuczh590&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=smzxpr&__onlt=h)** Throughout history, people have turned to various methods to safeguard their wealth with assets that retain value even when the market fluctuates. In today’s world, including options in your portfolio that offer stability, and long-term resilience can bring peace of mind and create a more secure future. **Why Gold and Silver?** These assets are not tied to any single economy, currency, or policy, giving them a unique role in a diversified portfolio. Unlike assets solely tied to market performance, gold and silver possess intrinsic value that has historically held up through market and economic shifts. They’re valued not because of fleeting trends but because of their enduring role as stores of value across civilizations, providing an extra layer of security when times feel uncertain. **[This is precisely why central banks and governments are steadily increasing their reserves of gold and silver.](http://trk.thedcbugle.com/?xtl=7l65mieco2oh0pyusc8d4lw3ti1itlp7ejzanpbxamabut63o0zzxnkfwo02wcxbk480pn579rtsjf058zr3y6hu6x1gmm1u2lid29ks8oiznrzl5qbcyelkiouh2xqf76xp6lbgti2ybopklcp0gkczp3aynnlxenps1ks7dr9usyp016rjn06jdoq0ges0ienppu77vx3hn656tq3xmlgnunu0np6nypygopxs19wfq7cvtu25bbs&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=smzxpr&__onlt=h)** We understand that taking action can seem complex, especially with so much information and influence pulling us in different directions. However, the biggest risk isn’t taking action—it’s staying fully exposed to a financial system already showing signs of cracks. The question isn’t whether assets like gold and silver value have—central banks and governments worldwide have already answered that for us. The real question is: How comfortable are you leaving your wealth fully exposed to a system under strain? Having clarity about your financial direction matters. Discover steps you can take toward a more diversified, secure future aligned with your goals. **[Our complimentary Learning Kit](http://trk.thedcbugle.com/?xtl=7l65mieco2oh0pyusc8d4lw3ti1itlp7ekz2gsaxsh4m0t6qb3u0vlo22ayss9tk4m0u3c2edhc6mz97rlfpjvx4ju6lhtrr8682xc5xlakzpz8kqo1z8pr1r0cyvf4ie8grlb9tzob7a766l6o5cx3eyt2doa0khm5evv9eug7yeuuknc57o2ittk5k4aisjdlinqhl096vthym4993wua8l9dzhnuabcul0clnsu2hdlzts9ssm57&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=smzxpr&__onlt=h)** offers valuable information on alternative assets so you can make informed decisions about your financial well-being. **[Request Your Free Learning Kit Today!](http://trk.thedcbugle.com/?xtl=7l65mieco2oh0pyusc8d4lw3ti1itlp7elytpvzx9rvgut6c26opuybmx18gneq6mrelg50qmnkhztu9zo7a8imdaro5safopovq56odd10zrgfjz9pvfjg3jakq10h0pn3ueqf4efnez1kqkynmy7sjhgsiq02nk8k5143pm95d4qaiy9gtp5y18vjhqxoikdar9nwcsj97ax3pd4qxg1u6s81nr9h1f3r3b4p6hcwk5dwrr0gcgxx&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=smzxpr&__onlt=h)** [](http://trk.thedcbugle.com/?xtl=7l65mieco2oh0pyusc8d4lw3ti1itlp7f0xhiyyx1llr0t71r96ctm2v3ph87nmqsxxtwvjlee7x0ndngaxkw90qrotn1i79uugbayvjup2zu2qii6bsru96sp65u8x3kpoxx4odk9kpxicyk2mrtfg357h1ro3b17ctuaik1a3hsmggifvdq8nwl5beatfoldok789tjxnhhmwtplw43wo3j6mkl87qisn8ptd2ml30vvtppe91r1q&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=smzxpr&__onlt=h)

[](http://trk.thedcbugle.com/?xtl=7l65mieco2oh0pyusc8d4lw3ti1itlp7f1xmrbxwgwqlut7oeo13rjrdxcty2g6yydplmkhxn8smp60q2108hxc169ysz3x6zb6182d39b4zw9li541p12a8l1pilsn7vrxapfir3cwkwdugju9wps78qx96sa5246ug09cuf31le70f7p91rn14bdtbkq9f0d1t54k9q9qw201x0gbyp361q4wyv6vdlf7p1h4jc7x2jnqnovznlt2&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=smzxpr&__onlt=h)

body:
I am excited to announce my new apparel line! Get your very own "Deplorable Trash Service" shirt today!
| | | | [](https://ghwh6lbbb.cc.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001lKu-ulDXK_d0mWz7SyEKyMuUlHAp7Q5IULvJ8kyFkrCt7msT3068yROn7KzX_753ldmXpHhOCwc-5rm8Dnd_HKIsdF5dSDtgzruWBG9oLfeWcx2R-e3KnkCBPx6VFfFeF_Hx9sWTu3LL4piaF6UZBbJZi2gRbMQzaxbXnyPX9TJQqKK26_T2hG3H3Zk9ZD0B86s_-MAFwrGJLOaKSrSkE03KubPmqvwY&c=hqrmTlvq18UjyM1DrbIsbbapfUg2dj1TXZVyO4tgjscKdFajeMMF9w==&ch=VuQvShlwofGILdY0YUBN4CfkR5gZQF5MoMQv34J-hOs_CK1xSHVSqg==)

| Friend, A few weeks ago, President Joe Biden topped Hillary Clinton's "Deplorables" comment by calling the over 75 Million Americans who support President Donald J. Trump "trash."
This message of calling us all trash resonated with the base, and we proudly owned the title. President Trump even rode in a Trash Truck wearing an orange vest to symbolize his unity with the base in owning the label.
On November 5th, the American people delivered a mandate to the world, creating what has been labeled as the "Greatest Political Comeback in American History" and "A Massive Political Re-Alignment."
In honor of that massive shift, in partnership with the Team Imer PAC, I am thrilled to unveil my latest T-shirt design, capitalizing on the success of the "I'm Voting for the Felon" shirts I launched over the summer before the Republican National Convention.
Introducing the "Deplorable Trash Service" T-Shirt!
We sold 100+ "I'm Voting for the Felon" shirts over the summer, and I am hopeful we can sell just as many of these shirts!

Get your very own "Deplorable Trash Service" shirt today! | | | | == | Friend, A few weeks ago, President Joe Biden topped Hillary Clinton's "Deplorables" comment by calling the over 75 Million Americans who support President Donald J. Trump "trash." This message of calling us all trash resonated with the base, and we proudly owned the title. President Trump even rode in a Trash Truck wearing an orange vest to symbolize his unity with the base in owning the label. On November 5th, the American people delivered a mandate to the world, creating what has been labeled as the "Greatest Political Comeback in American History" and "A Massive Political Re-Alignment." In honor of that massive shift, in partnership with the Team Imer PAC, I am thrilled to unveil my latest T-shirt design, capitalizing on the success of the "I'm Voting for the Felon" shirts I launched over the summer before the Republican National Convention. Introducing the "Deplorable Trash Service" T-Shirt! We sold 100+ "I'm Voting for the Felon" shirts over the summer, and I am hopeful we can sell just as many of these shirts! == | == | Get your Deplorable Trash Service shirt today to show your unity and support for President Trump's massive victory! I hope you will purchase one of these shirts, and I can't wait to see you wearing one at an upcoming event. MAGA! Best, | == | == | Weston D. name: Bob Casey
subject: Let’s finish strong
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Blue Amp Action PAC
body:
I’m counting on you.
| | | |
---
| | | | |
---
| _You're getting this message because you’ve supported good causes and Democratic candidates. We need your support to continue fighting for our democracy. We love having you in our network, but if you no longer wish to hear from us, you can[unsubscribe here](https://default.salsalabs.org/Tff55cdf0-599f-4853-bd70-4c69c212b572/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)._
---
|
---
| | | | | Peter, We’ve done such incredible work together. Today, I’m asking you to keep working with us. I’ve always stood up for the people of our Commonwealth — and I believe every person’s voice should be heard. That’s why we have to see this across the finish line. I’ll never stop fighting for Pennsylvania, but I need you with me to help us keep going. [Will you help ensure that every Pennsylvanians' voice is heard by splitting $15 or more right now between myself and Blue Amp Action?](https://default.salsalabs.org/T0b28a9a5-febb-48cd-bea1-283f270eab64/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)
---
| | [DONATE →](https://default.salsalabs.org/Ta13f0e02-88c5-410a-bd5b-f2983f6dd355/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)
---
|
---
| | | Democracy means ensuring everyone's voices are heard and that they matter. Pennsylvania is the birthplace of democracy, and I’m not giving up that fight. I hope you’re not ready to give up either. Let’s finish this strong: [Split $15 or more between Blue Amp Action and me to ensure every PA voter's voice is heard.](https://default.salsalabs.org/T0a8a2bed-c317-4582-bd17-00761e327a7f/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9) With gratitude, Bob Casey
---
|
---
|
---
| | |
---
| | | | |
---
| | | | Cliff Schecter President, Blue Amp Action Amplify Good
---|---
| | |
---
| | Follow Us | [](https://twitter.com/intent/follow?screen_name=cliffschecter)| [](https://linkedin.com/in/cliffschecter-0873a448/)
---|---
| **Blue Amp Action PAC**
PO Box 8384, Cincinnati, OH 45208
---
| Having trouble viewing this email? [View it in your web browser](https://blueampstrategies.salsalabs.org/loc_em_fr_20241115_finishstrong_b3_f1_s1_c1_90op_rs-t1_copy1?wvpId=368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)
---
| | |
---
| | | About Blue Amp Action: We cannot sugarcoat the current situation. Right-wing authoritarianism, defeated by a worldwide coalition during WWII, was only in hibernation. Over the past decade it has infected democratic societies--including ours. It is as simple as it is terrifying: What we do now will define the future of our country and world. We at Blue Amp Action are dedicated to liberal, open societies, where reason and science are applied to solve our problems; where civil rights--including voting rights!--are protected for all. We fight for these values every day. Speaking up on our platforms, raising the voices and the political prospects of liberal pols and pundits. **And savvy grassroots activists like you know, just like we do, that we can’t stop watching the people we help elect:_ after the elections, we have to keep organizing support for the policies we like and pushing back against the ones we don’t._** **__When the public tunes out between elections and the only people our elected officials hear from are the paid lobbyists of wealthy corporations, our government stops being accountable to the needs of ordinary families.__** **Democracy never sleeps, and neither can we.** So we ask that you support our work, so we can continue to engage in this fight every moment of every day. So our kids grow up in democracy, not dystopia. Thank you for your support for all we do! Please follow Cliff Schecter on Twitter @cliffschecter, or subscribe to The Takedown with Cliff Schecter on YouTube, to keep up to date with this battle for the heart and soul of our country. — _You're getting this message because you’ve supported good causes and Democratic candidates. We need your support to continue fighting for our democracy. We love having you in our network, but if you no longer wish to hear from us, you can[unsubscribe here](https://default.salsalabs.org/T9b6350ad-3876-4a56-a24e-b7ddd3592c12/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)._
---
| Paid for by Blue Amp Action PAC
---

name: Bob Casey for Senate
subject: Time is running out
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY Pennsylvania Senate Victory Fund 2024
body:
# [](https://go.bobcasey.com/go/181?t=1&akid=4850%2E552475%2EORPw3A)
⏰ Time is running out ⏰ Pennsylvania voters’ voices must be heard — and we’re running out of time. **[Please rush a contribution right now to power our work.](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/casey-em-20241115-2?refcode=em20241115-2&refcode2=4850_552475_ORPw3A&akid=4850%2E552475%2EORPw3A)** **[Donate ››](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/casey-em-20241115-2?refcode=em20241115-2&refcode2=4850_552475_ORPw3A&akid=4850%2E552475%2EORPw3A)**
---
Peter,
We won’t stop fighting to ensure that every Pennsylvanian’s voice is heard. With a razor-thin margin and tens of thousands of votes left to count, we need resources ASAP.
The fight for Pennsylvania’s Senate seat is still on, but time is running out. Our team is working hard to ensure Bob Casey stays in the Senate fighting for us.
**[Help us fund the fight in Pennsylvania’s critical Senate race. All eyes are on us, and we can’t back down from this fight. Rush $5 now to fuel our efforts:](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/casey-em-20241115-2?refcode=em20241115-2&refcode2=4850_552475_ORPw3A&akid=4850%2E552475%2EORPw3A)**

name: Red State Insider

name: Riley Gaines
subject: It's getting hard to hold back this evil
body:
| |
---
| | I’m writing to ask you to stand beside me at the top of a very slippery slope.
---
| |
---
| |
---
[](http://links.conservativeum.com/u/click?_t=26c2e4aa9bbe40418f61e26972138f21&_m=b2e8b310f1e344419cc4340ce9a5bbb0&_e=UVZhOP13ux-VMf-ySY9vS8zdDimcJ0VQp2oGmsc8ucYXWQanH0l6VgGRyNMp5yy4DzjjXMxvSFq87gwGuwsDbk5it8gcV64wDQSqtoxaPnp2FX0PR-ZOaHnsw2vJd3uaf4G8UDbptvp_zpVj4cnksb25DwNcZc325pfucayoBBc76KxyRnqxeVyqooxH41fJ10As0RKQ1XRiWC7EB6Xt2t4Li_pZ8EH2D_J8N6I4lHNpCaAW6tKFbk3jSxYueTYLHgdi2p5FoCpaAiuLiE5MNea7gIBnos8tPlNErbjjB4ka2qGhHG8BlG5ch-_3p5URtoBZPhGmbeDy7ttSUroK_I8_p6WmSz_WIoIl1HigSbyKj0aSlXl75qC6rDoKOKIVoV3f1pFuawciStVesLs_IiyE0s6CMrude5fgLb-ukLCGtdcGOH4WXxt6ZyH38XyH)
---
| | Dear Fellow Conservative,
---
| | I'm writing to ask you to stand beside me at the top of a very slippery slope.Actually, in my case, it's a slippery _slide_. My name is Riley Gaines and I'm the University of Kentucky swimmer who had to compete against a fully intact 6'4" _male_ swimmer dressed in a women's bathing suit.And after he stole the victory I had worked for my entire life, I had to go back to the women's locker room and undress out of my wet bathing suit while he did the same next to me.
---
| [](http://links.conservativeum.com/u/click?_t=26c2e4aa9bbe40418f61e26972138f21&_m=b2e8b310f1e344419cc4340ce9a5bbb0&_e=UVZhOP13ux-VMf-ySY9vS8zdDimcJ0VQp2oGmsc8ucYXWQanH0l6VgGRyNMp5yy4DzjjXMxvSFq87gwGuwsDbk5it8gcV64wDQSqtoxaPnp2FX0PR-ZOaHnsw2vJd3uaf4G8UDbptvp_zpVj4cnksb25DwNcZc325pfucayoBBc76KxyRnqxeVyqooxH41fJ10As0RKQ1XRiWC7EB6Xt2t4Li_pZ8EH2D_J8N6I4lHNpCaAW6tKFbk3jSxYueTYLHgdi2p5FoCpaAiuLiE5MNea7gIBnos8tPlNErbjjB4kLvmKTkgFmgckaluGZNg8SkWL8H6q8hsM7dkpTGtpa1nZB44CKycxN95JxNG0jgCfPMpjJ1uXOTHWbVvTIc8gVEWiAn2SAM0_P0Ba4ZMa1WGYAyX5u_zcgwZQcW9kusa_yo_ZVAg5q7fRIJjGB9XWw)
---
| | I know the images I'm bringing up are horrible. But please don't stop reading -- because God-fearing, faith-filled people like you and me have a job to do today. We can't retreat into our homes and hope our government's evil culture just passes us by. **[That's why I'm asking you to stand with me today -- before it's too late.](http://links.conservativeum.com/u/click?_t=26c2e4aa9bbe40418f61e26972138f21&_m=b2e8b310f1e344419cc4340ce9a5bbb0&_e=UVZhOP13ux-VMf-ySY9vS8zdDimcJ0VQp2oGmsc8ucYXWQanH0l6VgGRyNMp5yy4DzjjXMxvSFq87gwGuwsDbk5it8gcV64wDQSqtoxaPnp2FX0PR-ZOaHnsw2vJd3uaf4G8UDbptvp_zpVj4cnksb25DwNcZc325pfucayoBBc76KxyRnqxeVyqooxH41fJ10As0RKQ1XRiWC7EB6Xt2t4Li_pZ8EH2D_J8N6I4lHNpCaAW6tKFbk3jSxYueTYLHgdi2p5FoCpaAiuLiE5MNea7gIBnos8tPlNErbjjB4kbGWmVKqBN9qP56tkPl3G5SUvsGnyb4x2zfE8hU7QzAPh6EqmHIL0MF2GpFtyAXJn_APxjvls2fVaWZga34MT4JW2vLYPUHmrzwSgXrTyQMeDzOdnZi5HDqlubHdWJu3ue02xGLHoQma3ljEGDVXiF)** My fellow conservative, you know this slippery slide.It's the same one you got pushed down when the Left told you abortion was going to be "safe, legal, and rare."_Now abortion is a "right" and "women’s healthcare." And if you don’t support it up until the moment of birth, you must "hate women."_ It's the same slippery slide you got pushed down when the Left told you limiting gay couples to civil unions was "mean." You were told, "They just want to use the word "marriage" like everyone else. It's just a word."_Now if you don't fully embrace a homosexual lifestyle by displaying rainbows and celebrating gay pride, you're a "hate-filled bigot."_ Enough with their lies. We have Truth on our side. And we need to start acting like it.**God created man. And God created woman. It isn't any more complicated than that.** Letting men believe they are women... letting girls believe they are boys... is a bold-faced rejection of God’s truth. And if we give this deranged movement one more inch, a year from now when you're forced by law to call boys "she"... when it becomes normal for kids to be taken away from parents who oppose this evil... I don't want you looking back with regret wishing you had done something when you still had a chance.**Your chance is right now -- and right by my side.** **[Please stand with me against the radical transgender movement by making an urgent tax-deductible donation today -- before it's too late.](http://links.conservativeum.com/u/click?_t=26c2e4aa9bbe40418f61e26972138f21&_m=b2e8b310f1e344419cc4340ce9a5bbb0&_e=UVZhOP13ux-VMf-ySY9vS8zdDimcJ0VQp2oGmsc8ucYXWQanH0l6VgGRyNMp5yy4DzjjXMxvSFq87gwGuwsDbk5it8gcV64wDQSqtoxaPnp2FX0PR-ZOaHnsw2vJd3uaf4G8UDbptvp_zpVj4cnksb25DwNcZc325pfucayoBBc76KxyRnqxeVyqooxH41fJ10As0RKQ1XRiWC7EB6Xt2t4Li_pZ8EH2D_J8N6I4lHNpCaAW6tKFbk3jSxYueTYLHgdi2p5FoCpaAiuLiE5MNea7gIBnos8tPlNErbjjB4lXgD0cp2pSHAQkHrKoxvPHdmPN8mYdTiNTVA_0ekm2f_Cpgnusa5Ht4mH5gDcNdq95nB1BvM4KVc8V03o-zSMlzw2fHYxIyoENN716NBqZ6yphQ1dbfOCgSyPCLr5Vh3u1K-b8njAQ87tPyTVuMrOp) **The radical transgender movement has parents backed into a corner. But when I'm speaking around the country, I meet so many seniors who say, "I wish someone had told me about this sooner." The good news is that right now, you still have a chance to help me stop the radical transgender movement before they push us down their slippery slide.And today I'm writing you on behalf of a group that is doing more work to block the transgender movement than anyone I know. **It's the legal non-profit the Center for American Liberty.** **[And your tax-deductible gift today is going straight to help them.](http://links.conservativeum.com/u/click?_t=26c2e4aa9bbe40418f61e26972138f21&_m=b2e8b310f1e344419cc4340ce9a5bbb0&_e=UVZhOP13ux-VMf-ySY9vS8zdDimcJ0VQp2oGmsc8ucYXWQanH0l6VgGRyNMp5yy4DzjjXMxvSFq87gwGuwsDbk5it8gcV64wDQSqtoxaPnp2FX0PR-ZOaHnsw2vJd3uaf4G8UDbptvp_zpVj4cnksb25DwNcZc325pfucayoBBc76KxyRnqxeVyqooxH41fJ10As0RKQ1XRiWC7EB6Xt2t4Li_pZ8EH2D_J8N6I4lHNpCaAW6tKFbk3jSxYueTYLHgdi2p5FoCpaAiuLiE5MNea7gIBnos8tPlNErbjjB4nptvN0umYF3o_8MjjT1PssbWTn0jmnt1nvXnTrfZLyBApLdOiMvq5a8vh6WGD_yBLYbY0G-bmgT2ihyDbOSjGhIIBd0Nwgob5nSOD_ano-qbVeTtqM9oOMbS6yiZtvAvAq29KAZIWPIO4iblQCQd0G)** With the help of patriots like you, the _Center for American Liberty_ fights the transgender movement _in the courts_ because that’s the only way to stop them. And the _Center for American Liberty_ is attacking this evil from all sides with their comprehensive three-pronged approach.
---
**#1. They're fighting radical schools**.
---
---
**#2. They're fighting radical doctors.**
---
---
**#3. They're fighting for _your_ right to speak out against this evil.**
---
**[**When you make your tax-deductible gift today**](http://links.conservativeum.com/u/click?_t=26c2e4aa9bbe40418f61e26972138f21&_m=b2e8b310f1e344419cc4340ce9a5bbb0&_e=UVZhOP13ux-VMf-ySY9vS8zdDimcJ0VQp2oGmsc8ucYXWQanH0l6VgGRyNMp5yy4DzjjXMxvSFq87gwGuwsDbk5it8gcV64wDQSqtoxaPnp2FX0PR-ZOaHnsw2vJd3uaf4G8UDbptvp_zpVj4cnksb25DwNcZc325pfucayoBBc76KxyRnqxeVyqooxH41fJ10As0RKQ1XRiWC7EB6Xt2t4Li_pZ8EH2D_J8N6I4lHNpCaAW6tKFbk3jSxYueTYLHgdi2p5FoCpaAiuLiE5MNea7gIBnos8tPlNErbjjB4nh1FLEfbZYTKB22TsPIrsZzbCidIUpwnKiti0rvqHdqZOe0Dhb8-DoEI4rtYrXGcUBoSXeKUihf7Qw0lfJCUyre_49NBhqoB1ITjEt4uzjaVLidnQFLTX4aMeRNUEvZmXUUb5ZEAad49wdGwDBOOIG)** , you're helping the _Center for American Liberty_ protect every American's right to speak out against this evil! I know you'd probably love to fund an entire court case on your own after all I've told you.**[But all I'm asking you to do is make a tax-deductible gift of $25, $50, $75, $100 or even $250 or more today -- before it's too late.](http://links.conservativeum.com/u/click?_t=26c2e4aa9bbe40418f61e26972138f21&_m=b2e8b310f1e344419cc4340ce9a5bbb0&_e=UVZhOP13ux-VMf-ySY9vS8zdDimcJ0VQp2oGmsc8ucYXWQanH0l6VgGRyNMp5yy4DzjjXMxvSFq87gwGuwsDbk5it8gcV64wDQSqtoxaPnp2FX0PR-ZOaHnsw2vJd3uaf4G8UDbptvp_zpVj4cnksb25DwNcZc325pfucayoBBc76KxyRnqxeVyqooxH41fJ10As0RKQ1XRiWC7EB6Xt2t4Li_pZ8EH2D_J8N6I4lHNpCaAW6tKFbk3jSxYueTYLHgdi2p5FoCpaAiuLiE5MNea7gIBnos8tPlNErbjjB4nEgtWBBlDhfyVCwhGFPwVeqST1lg2RMd5_3EgUKjhMGBcAMF36eyU_oT8EwqcU8SCvpNFk7Fsx8oJ76UuVadx4FTbzqkiR_MM7aCzfdSZPACij5dyyK-IbkW6ovDJEx4eIt0fvz6Ib6DM7y0lFzyRO)** Please donate whatever amount is right for you whether it's smaller or larger. _The Center for American Liberty_ needs and appreciates every dollar that comes in.And because I believe so strongly in the work they're doing -- and because they are one of the few groups who've stood shoulder-to-shoulder with me in this fight... I**t will be my honor to send you my new book _Swimming Against the Current: Fighting for Common Sense in a World That's Lost Its Mind_ as my free gift** **[**when you donate $100 or more to the Center for American Liberty.**](http://links.conservativeum.com/u/click?_t=26c2e4aa9bbe40418f61e26972138f21&_m=b2e8b310f1e344419cc4340ce9a5bbb0&_e=UVZhOP13ux-VMf-ySY9vS8zdDimcJ0VQp2oGmsc8ucYXWQanH0l6VgGRyNMp5yy4DzjjXMxvSFq87gwGuwsDbk5it8gcV64wDQSqtoxaPnp2FX0PR-ZOaHnsw2vJd3uaf4G8UDbptvp_zpVj4cnksb25DwNcZc325pfucayoBBc76KxyRnqxeVyqooxH41fJ10As0RKQ1XRiWC7EB6Xt2t4Li_pZ8EH2D_J8N6I4lHNpCaAW6tKFbk3jSxYueTYLHgdi2p5FoCpaAiuLiE5MNea7gIBnos8tPlNErbjjB4k9Bro_5i-xGw6YXFjzsXTz_bdKZiXrxtlDkpMuX93WXWOCQceGmwR2Qb8hGoIri1Lwip2qjqA_Tjjo7v3hAPwFF4qY3jP4Kxt_uFDmxlCakhjM6TGFnQZmpyhvtycHEGiqcO9sxZgYGjoAbmAB6cYe)** Before I go, please let me share one last thought with you.Every morning as a competitive swimmer, I would get up and think of this verse: _For I consider that the sufferings of the present time are not worthy to be compared to the glory that is about to be revealed to us. Romans 8:18_ I applied it to my swimming: work hard now and wins come later. But now I see that God has a much bigger plan for my life just as He does for yours.Thank you for reading my letter all the way to the end. I'm praying for you, and I hope you'll pray for me too.
---
Sincerely,
---
| | Riley Gaines
---
|
---

clean_body: | | | | I’m writing to ask you to stand beside me at the top of a very slippery slope. | | | | | | Dear Fellow Conservative, | | I'm writing to ask you to stand beside me at the top of a very slippery slope.Actually, in my case, it's a slippery slide. My name is Riley Gaines and I'm the University of Kentucky swimmer who had to compete against a fully intact 6'4" male swimmer dressed in a women's bathing suit.And after he stole the victory I had worked for my entire life, I had to go back to the women's locker room and undress out of my wet bathing suit while he did the same next to me. | | | I know the images I'm bringing up are horrible. But please don't stop reading -- because God-fearing, faith-filled people like you and me have a job to do today. We can't retreat into our homes and hope our government's evil culture just passes us by. My fellow conservative, you know this slippery slide.It's the same one you got pushed down when the Left told you abortion was going to be "safe, legal, and rare."Now abortion is a "right" and "women’s healthcare." And if you don’t support it up until the moment of birth, you must "hate women." It's the same slippery slide you got pushed down when the Left told you limiting gay couples to civil unions was "mean." You were told, "They just want to use the word "marriage" like everyone else. It's just a word."Now if you don't fully embrace a homosexual lifestyle by displaying rainbows and celebrating gay pride, you're a "hate-filled bigot." Enough with their lies. We have Truth on our side. And we need to start acting like it.God created man. And God created woman. It isn't any more complicated than that. Letting men believe they are women... letting girls believe they are boys... is a bold-faced rejection of God’s truth. And if we give this deranged movement one more inch, a year from now when you're forced by law to call boys "she"... when it becomes normal for kids to be taken away from parents who oppose this evil... I don't want you looking back with regret wishing you had done something when you still had a chance.Your chance is right now -- and right by my side. The radical transgender movement has parents backed into a corner. But when I'm speaking around the country, I meet so many seniors who say, "I wish someone had told me about this sooner." The good news is that right now, you still have a chance to help me stop the radical transgender movement before they push us down their slippery slide.And today I'm writing you on behalf of a group that is doing more work to block the transgender movement than anyone I know. It's the legal non-profit the Center for American Liberty. With the help of patriots like you, the Center for American Liberty fights the transgender movement in the courts because that’s the only way to stop them. And the Center for American Liberty is attacking this evil from all sides with their comprehensive three-pronged approach. #1. They're fighting radical schools. #2. They're fighting radical doctors. #3. They're fighting for your right to speak out against this evil. , you're helping the Center for American Liberty protect every American's right to speak out against this evil! I know you'd probably love to fund an entire court case on your own after all I've told you. Please donate whatever amount is right for you whether it's smaller or larger. The Center for American Liberty needs and appreciates every dollar that comes in.And because I believe so strongly in the work they're doing -- and because they are one of the few groups who've stood shoulder-to-shoulder with me in this fight... It will be my honor to send you my new book Swimming Against the Current: Fighting for Common Sense in a World That's Lost Its Mind as my free gift Before I go, please let me share one last thought with you.Every morning as a competitive swimmer, I would get up and think of this verse: For I consider that the sufferings of the present time are not worthy to be compared to the glory that is about to be revealed to us. Romans 8:18 I applied it to my swimming: work hard now and wins come later. But now I see that God has a much bigger plan for my life just as He does for yours.Thank you for reading my letter all the way to the end. I'm praying for you, and I hope you'll pray for me too. Sincerely, | | Riley Gaines | | | P.S. God made man and God made woman. The attempts to deny those basic truths, are attempts to deny the truth of God. Your help is so critical to the Center for American Liberty's work, Please hurry. It's getting hard to hold back this evil without you. I don't want you to look back a year from now and say, "I wish I had done something when I had the chance." | | | | | | | ---|---|--- The Center For American Liberty is a 501(c)(3) charitable organization fighting against growing anti-free speech and anti-civil liberties trends. © The Center for American Liberty | PO Box 200942, Pittsburgh, PA 15251 | |

name: Hillsdale College via Conservative Intel
subject: Your Supreme Court survey
body:
http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/p/vs6OiG9WNG
Hillsdale College

Your participation in Hillsdale College's National Survey
on the United States Supreme Court..
http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/p/os6OiG9WNG

Please see a special message from our sponsor:

Dear Friend,

Your participation in Hillsdale
College's National Survey on the United States Supreme Court is
requested.

Your response will only take a few
minutes, but the subject is crucial to the future of liberty and
the separation of powers in America.

The American Founders thought that the
proper role of the Supreme Court is to apply the Constitution.

But progressives see the Court
differently. They want activist judges to legislate from the
bench.

Do you agree that the role of the
Supreme Court is to apply the Constitution as it is written and
NOT to make laws or advance a particular policy agenda?

YES

NO

Even worse, progressives dismayed by
recent Supreme Court decisions want to "pack" the bench with
additional justices to advance a preferred policy agenda.

As Sen. Elizabeth Warren (D-Mass.) put
it in a Boston Globe op-ed: "To restore balance and integrity to
a broken institution, Congress must expand the Supreme Court by
four or more seats."

That is why I'm reaching out to you
today...

What is your opinion about the Supreme
Court's role in our constitutional republic?

Please share your thoughts with me
using the College's National Survey on the United States Supreme
Court right away.

Your response will help Hillsdale form
effective strategies to educate millions of Americans about the
importance of the Constitution to liberty-including the proper
role of an independent judiciary that applies the Constitution
instead of legislating from the bench.

You can easily complete your National
Survey on the United States Supreme Court using this secure link:
http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/63817779:s6OiG9WNG:m:3:2532013465:607E5C2C49DE1BF7C34A261813AB5A4B:r

Thank you for your time and
attention-and for your support of liberty.

Warm regards,

Larry P. Arnn

President, Hillsdale College

Pursuing Truth - Defending Liberty
since 1844

Hillsdale College 33 East College St Hillsdale, MI
49242 USA

This message was intended for: dpwillis67@gmail.com
You were added to the system January 18, 2022.
For more information please follow the URL below:
http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/p/is6OiG9WNG

Follow the URL below to update your preferences or opt-out:

Friend, my priority has always been standing up for the people of Pennsylvania.
Across our Commonwealth, close to 7 million people cast their votes in a free and fair election. Our county election officials will finish counting those votes, just like they do in every election.
We need to make sure voters across the Commonwealth have their voices heard. The American democratic process was born in Pennsylvania, and that process must and will play out.
[**I’m here to tell you that the process is _not_ done, and this race is _not_ over. name: Team GIFFORDS
subject: Our final request
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Giffords PAC; not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee
body:
Can you chip in to GIFFORDS PAC right now to help us reach our November fundraising goals?
#

Friends -
Our mid-month fundraising deadline comes to an end at midnight tonight, so we’re making one final request:
[**Can you chip in to GIFFORDS PAC right now to help us reach our November fundraising goals?**](https://go.giffords.org/go/14457?c0=giffords-em-nov24.MBs8nS&refcode=em241115-1-30&t=1&akid=9429%2E3935704%2EsdvVj_)
**[DONATE NOW](https://go.giffords.org/go/14457?c0=giffords-em-nov24.MBs8nS&refcode=em241115-1-30&t=2&akid=9429%2E3935704%2EsdvVj_)**
We will be straightforward with you. The work ahead isn’t going to be easy.
Donald Trump has bragged that his first administration “did nothing” on guns.
JD Vance called school shootings a “fact of life.”
We know this is discouraging, but this is not the time to give up. This is the time when we need you most.
Right now, the gun lobby probably thinks that we aren’t prepared to hold them and the Trump Administration accountable. But we all know that couldn’t be further from the truth.
That’s why it’s so important we have a strong showing at our mid-month fundraising deadline tonight—our first fundraising deadline since Election Day.
[**If you understand the importance of this moment, we hope you’ll consider rushing in a $3 contribution to GIFFORDS PAC before midnight.**](https://go.giffords.org/go/14457?c0=giffords-em-nov24.MBs8nS&refcode=em241115-1-30&t=3&akid=9429%2E3935704%2EsdvVj_)
_If you 've stored your info with ActBlue, we'll process your contribution instantly:_
| | **[CONTRIBUTE $3](https://go.giffords.org/go/17015?c0=giffords-em-nov24.ILqYYQ&amount=3&refcode=em241115-1-30&t=4&akid=9429%2E3935704%2EsdvVj_)**
---
****
| **[CONTRIBUTE MORE](https://go.giffords.org/go/17015?c0=giffords-em-nov24.ILqYYQ&refcode=em241115-1-30&t=5&akid=9429%2E3935704%2EsdvVj_)**
---
****
Thank you. We couldn’t do our work without you.
\- Team GIFFORDS PAC

Paid For By Giffords PAC; not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee. www.Giffords.org
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. We try to send only the most important information and opportunities to participate via email, but click [here](https://go.giffords.org/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=6&akid=9429%2E3935704%2EsdvVj_) if you'd like to unsubscribe. Giffords PAC was started to support elected officials who step up to fight the gun violence epidemic. Thank you for standing with Gabby and the Giffords team.

name: Team Nina for Philly
subject: Save the Date: Nina Ahmad's Holiday Party is December 10th!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Nina for Philly
body:
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ninaholiday24 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ninaholiday24]
Hi Friend,
As we approach the holidays, I am reminded of the importance of coming together in the spirit of gratitude, celebration, support, and connectivity. During these difficult and chaotic times, community is more important than ever and and I am resolved to lean into those around me.
In that spirit, we hope that you will join us for a Birthday and Holiday Party on Tuesday, December 10th, 2024 from 5:30 pm - 7:00 pm at XI West - 3939 Chestnut Street, Philadelphia, PA 19104.
We will be collecting new toys to donate to Philadelphia children for the holidays. All donations are appreciated!
To RSVP, please click below or email AmandaDeMaria@DeMariaConsultingLLC.com.
We hope to see you there!
Nina

| | Dear Peter, C.S. Lewis was a master at addressing life's most important questions through vivid language that is delightful and captivating to read.

His signature ability to communicate the truth about Christianity has inspired countless skeptics to become believers and even more believers to renew and deepen their faith--making him the greatest Christian apologist of the twentieth century.

To help you learn more about Lewis, we produced "[**C.S. Lewis on Christianity,**](http://links.itsourgreatamerica.com/u/click?_t=442fb7cf105f4725a8bda0b6bcffc1bd&_m=1d4f8631b4ba4f0e8ec1b497e668511c&_e=ayolpLacd5puOVLCHJ_BcAXagP_4Q4DU4ff4RR1YkiU3daBxoiKl764Nsg-HDxlFGkKj1uDDAsDSea-dEZLRVU8IWiLdqHpij0P7qu1heERDs7QiddH4kejRD9YS7nziegM8vjHAbQC24VIeAI2IzltscW0QHUCKW0E3YA_ZH2nA_aYXwBitLN5ucwJPNO9oZb-ail-vql-ny6p6y2Dh2fCnJ7oPMplpv2aNCvCR5y3xz9cw0VF4rKVvtFp9L3uBiOvLUgI5soc5SVpsx3-qemS1zZ14kN8tAUa9ASr4VbIdCj6e6ATVNJOjVGvbLPx4tPKx-21mpiF061jKOfRvX3auOCPmsD2ns8d70WQSI3vXE-RTx0t7ToXI2_CeqSLrj29u9TxcxhA3mw2L3tVamDEVZ9FUneSUbJ2TDHQu1plY-a_Qk3ihE7PWXnkffv6z)" which you can now own on DVD.

| | In this course you will learn Lewis's profound insights on the central topics of Christianity, including:
* good and evil,
* conversion and faith,
* prayer and the Bible,
* suffering and death,
* heaven and hell, and much more.

The instructor, Dr. Michael Ward, is a Distinguished Visiting Professor at Hillsdale College and a member of the Faculty of Theology and Religion at the University of Oxford. He is the author of _Planet Narnia: The Seven Heavens in the Imagination of C.S. Lewis_ and _After Humanity: A Guide to C.S. Lewis 's The Abolition of Man_, and the co-editor of _The Cambridge Companion to C.S. Lewis_. He even spent three years living in Lewis's Oxford home as the resident Warden of The Kilns!

This course is especially moving because it examines C.S. Lewis's beautiful writings about faith and traces Lewis's own journey from skeptic to believer. The combination provides an opportunity for us to grow in our knowledge and understanding of Christianity.

That's why I hope you'll join us in examining the eternal questions of Christianity with C.S. Lewis with [this beautiful DVD box set](http://links.itsourgreatamerica.com/u/click?_t=442fb7cf105f4725a8bda0b6bcffc1bd&_m=1d4f8631b4ba4f0e8ec1b497e668511c&_e=ayolpLacd5puOVLCHJ_BcAXagP_4Q4DU4ff4RR1YkiU3daBxoiKl764Nsg-HDxlFGkKj1uDDAsDSea-dEZLRVU8IWiLdqHpij0P7qu1heERDs7QiddH4kejRD9YS7nziegM8vjHAbQC24VIeAI2IzltscW0QHUCKW0E3YA_ZH2nA_aYXwBitLN5ucwJPNO9oZb-ail-vql-ny6p6y2Dh2fCnJ7oPMplpv2aNCvCR5y3xz9cw0VF4rKVvtFp9L3uBiOvLUgI5soc5SVpsx3-qeiWZf6m0iyU8_Xpefm_vJMPhFNHVlXZA382E7Y6uIzgx9r1Mcr7UIdS4IiFyfrAwUxvzyKzSMNTRuFNqdc7cGNJzLSX5xMD86P-KrUxPO3gslfRKXnMZqw2l69zUylNzqhwJmVmWim9mFxdvyccCD2xsIe30TYC1J5N--C-rAIau).

Best regards,

Jeremiah Regan, Ph.D.
