name: Voter Action Project
subject: Snap poll: Matt Gaetz for Attorney General?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Integrity First Voter Action Project, www
body:
Voter Action Project Logo [http://secure.actblue.com/donate/ifvap-weekly?refcode=111524_1&amount=25]
You are invited to join our one-click issue response poll.
For data integrity purposes, please do not complete this survey if your email address is not dpwillis67@gmail.com .
The Department of Justice (DOJ), and the Civil Rights Division in particular, are key components to defending the right to vote in our courts. Congressman Matt Gaetz of Florida was nominated by incoming President Trump to be Attorney General, the head of DOJ.
Gaetz, who resigned from Congress upon being nominated, was a four-term Congressman who was investigated by the very department he is supposed to lead for sex trafficking and sexual exploitation of a minor. A House Ethics Committee investigation is still pending, with media reports indicating that a final ruling was close at hand prior to his nomination.
Given the impact that DOJ has on our fight for voting rights, we're looking to solicit feedback from our supporters. Team, will you take our one-question poll right away?
Do you oppose or support the nomination of Matt Gaetz for Attorney General?
By clicking a response below your answer will be automatically recorded:
SUPPORT [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ifvap-pollresponse?refcode=111524_1&amount=15] OPPOSE [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ifvap-pollresponse?refcode=111524_1&amount=15]
http://secure.actblue.com/donate/ifvap-weekly?refcode=111524_1&amount=25 [http://secure.actblue.com/donate/ifvap-weekly?refcode=111524_1&amount=25]
https://www.facebook.com/voteraction [https://www.facebook.com/voteraction] https://twitter.com/voteractionproj [https://twitter.com/voteractionproj] https://www.instagram.com/voteractionproj/ [https://www.instagram.com/voteractionproj/] https://www.linkedin.com/company/voter-action-project/ [https://www.linkedin.com/company/voter-action-project/]
Integrity First Voter Action Project is dedicated to expanding ballot access and increasing voter participation across the country.
Since the Supreme Court gutted key provisions in the Voting Rights Act, extreme politicians have taken advantage to pass harsh laws that restrict access to the ballot box. These restrictions particularly affect disadvantaged communities and people of color. It’s our goal to bring awareness to these laws wherever they may crop up and organize voters to take action to ensure the right to vote is available to everyone in their states and communities.
Your support is crucial to our efforts. Will you donate today to help us protect voting rights? [http://secure.actblue.com/donate/ifvap-weekly?refcode=111524_1&amount=25]
Donate Now [http://secure.actblue.com/donate/ifvap-weekly?refcode=111524_1&amount=25]

---
| | I’ll be blunt. I told you that some House races are still uncalled [**– and they’re getting closer by the hour!**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/97140242/512412872/1694124557?amount=15&refcode=20241115_em_fr_b1_np4c_main&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDIvMS84ODQ2NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjYjFkZmU1OS02YmEzLWVmMTEtODhkMC02MDQ1YmRkNjJkYjYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=bvHE5XHAAoqrL2UPtM9RSBFEXB_fyw5DLweTBrnZGg8=) I told you that there are still thousands of votes to be counted [**– but it’s expensive to help voters cure their ballots!**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/97140243/512412873/1694124557?amount=15&refcode=20241115_em_fr_b1_np4c_main&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDIvMS84ODQ2NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjYjFkZmU1OS02YmEzLWVmMTEtODhkMC02MDQ1YmRkNjJkYjYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=bvHE5XHAAoqrL2UPtM9RSBFEXB_fyw5DLweTBrnZGg8=) I told you that Democratic campaigns have likely spent their final dime [**– so we need to rush resources ASAP!**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/97140244/512412874/1694124557?amount=15&refcode=20241115_em_fr_b1_np4c_main&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDIvMS84ODQ2NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjYjFkZmU1OS02YmEzLWVmMTEtODhkMC02MDQ1YmRkNjJkYjYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=bvHE5XHAAoqrL2UPtM9RSBFEXB_fyw5DLweTBrnZGg8=) [**This election isn’t over – not until every vote in every last House race has been counted**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/97140245/512412875/1694124557?amount=15&refcode=20241115_em_fr_b1_np4c_main&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDIvMS84ODQ2NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjYjFkZmU1OS02YmEzLWVmMTEtODhkMC02MDQ1YmRkNjJkYjYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=bvHE5XHAAoqrL2UPtM9RSBFEXB_fyw5DLweTBrnZGg8=). name: Carolina at United We Dream Action
subject: It feels like it’s been 10 years
body:
The assaults on our freedom have started rolling in. | | | Peter, It’s been only 10 days since Donald Trump won the presidential election — _but it feels like it’s been 10 *years*_. In that time, he’s already:
* Began preparations for the largest mass deportation in U.S. history,
* Appointed white supremacist Stephen Miller as deputy chief of staff,
* Chose the former ICE director to be his “border czar,”
* Promised to restart family separation policy,
* Eyed new locations for immigrant detention centers to double the number of ICE beds in the country...

And that’s only what we know about. **Who’s to say what awful attacks on immigrants are happening behind closed doors right now?** For the next four years, we’re going to be fighting a battle on so many different fronts: Stopping deportations, protecting our asylum systems, enforcing human rights at the border, organizing against anti-immigrant legislation, and more. We can’t do this work without the support of this team. And that’s only what we know about. Who’s to say what awful attacks on immigrants are happening behind closed doors right now? For the next four years, we’re going to be fighting a battle on so many different fronts: Stopping deportations, protecting our asylum systems, enforcing human rights at the border, organizing against anti-immigrant legislation, and more. We can’t do this work without the support of this team. We have to be ready for anything and everything. If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | | | | | | | | | Thanks, team. — Carolina, United We Dream Action | Our most dedicated supporters are chipping in monthly to sustain our fight to secure a pathway to citizenship. Join them and help us win permanent protections in Congress by starting a recurring donation today:** | |

name: The Federalist Wire
subject: The history of capitalism and socialism
body:
TheFederalistWire.com

Please read the following message
from our sponsor.

Dear Fellow American,

Over the last century, free-market capitalism and socialism
have provided the dominant interpretations, and conflicting
visions, of political and economic freedom. In the past few
years, we've seen a growing trend among young Americans in favor
of socialism and against capitalism.

But do they truly understand the history and outcomes of
socialism and capitalism?

This is precisely why we put together this brand new eBook, The
History Of Socialism And Capitalism, from Hoover Institution
senior fellows Niall Ferguson and Victor Davis Hanson.

This eBook consists of two papers-one from each scholar-written
in conjunction with The Human Prosperity Project on Socialism and
Free-Market Capitalism. This project provides objective and
scholarly analyses of free-market capitalism, socialism, and
hybrid systems and provides evidence on the effectiveness of the
various systems on outcomes that affect prosperity and
well-being.

I think you will find this new eBook particularly important and
timely, given the recent interest in policies that are radical
from a US historical perspective, some of which are advocated by
political leaders.

Simply click here to request your free copy of The History Of
Socialism And Capitalism.

Thanks,

Greg

Greg Stamps | Online Development

Hoover Institution | Stanford University

With its eminent scholars and world-renowned Library and
Archives, the Hoover Institution is a non-partisan, data-driven
policy research organization that seeks to improve the human
condition by advancing ideas that promote economic prosperity,
national security, and democratic governance. Over more than one
hundred years, Hoover's work has directly led to policies that
have produced greater freedom, democracy, and opportunity in the
United States and around the world.

DISCLAIMER
Your privacy is important to us.
It is The Federalist Wire's policy to respect your privacy and
comply with any applicable law and regulation regarding any
personal information we may collect about you, including across
our website, and other sites we own and operate.

today@thefederalistwire.com

---
Peter, though we didn’t get the results we were looking for last week, we couldn’t be more proud of Kamala Harris and her campaign.
* → She made history by earning more votes than any Democratic candidate in Georgia ever, earning 70,000 new votes from 2020.
* → She performed better in the Peach State than in any other battleground state.

And despite constant attacks from Donald Trump and his far-right followers, she stayed true to her values of equality, freedom, and justice to run an admirable campaign.
She needs to know how grateful we are that she stepped up and gave it her all. That’s why we’ve put together a card thanking her for her efforts.

**NOW** , the sore loser Democrats are trying to count UNREGISTERED VOTERS for Bob Casey to steal this election from Senator-elect Dave McCormick!

_Day in and day out, the Left has done everything they can to stop Dave from winning this Senate seat. And their dirty tricks haven 't stopped, they're getting WORSE!_

**ELON MUSK is now calling the Democrats out for their ILLEGAL DIRTY TRICKS! We need your support NOW more than ever!**

Dave and our team are giving it everything we can to push back against the barrage of attacks and dirty tricks the sore loser Democrats are throwing at us.

Dave is counting on you to step up. Time is running out, and we need you to step up ASAP.

Thanks for your support,
Team McCormick

name: Pennsylvania Forward Party
subject: Join us Monday for our Statewide Call
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Forward Party and not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee
body:
make change in 2025

| | [ ](https://home.forwardparty.com/r?u=JgyyvCfQwldlSeD7KJl_Ih7269o_4hwqOhPs1_PHvgI&e=61868e7acdd36ae0ddf3e39aa8429171&utm_source=forwardparty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=2024_statewide_call_invite&n=1)
---
Friday, November 15, 2024 |
### It's time to get involved, Locally
Join us Monday November 18th at 8pm for our Monthly Statewide call. You can RSVP with the button below. If the recent election left you with a renewed desire for some new options, call in to learn how we are making that happen! [](https://home.forwardparty.com/r?u=MtBLw57MCBnd28lIl741u2Dt1n837RKwUJg_KtN7MY7q18JSzxr4IIh1PTMDpFPRQGa3i-p7rAuoG8kynt2Tiw&e=61868e7acdd36ae0ddf3e39aa8429171&utm_source=forwardparty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=2024_statewide_call_invite&n=2) We want to thank everyone that supported us and our candidates in 2024. Tens of thousands of Pennsylvanians voted for a Forward Party Candidate. Our organization welcomed new volunteers from Philadelphia to Erie and everywhere in between in supporting two statewide campaigns. While we didn't make our goal of achieving minor party status, we learned a lot that will help us in future election cycles. For 2025, the challenge is different, it's local, local, local. The offices up for election this year are all local and it's important we find some great candidates to run. We can support these candidates from across the state, but the local organizing around these races will be critical. You may not be able to change what happens with the Presidency, but you can have a huge impact on a local, Mayor, Township Supervisor, School Board, or Judge of Elections race.
* * *
### Support our 2025 Efforts
There are a lot of ways to help us meet our goals in 2025, one of those ways is financially. We don't like asking for money in every email, so we don't do it. We don't send endless texts asking you to chip in $2. We're not trying to spend millions of dollars on campaigns that have no chance of winning. We're running a very efficient small organization that can support candidates in races where we can have an impact. We'd like to grow our base of support in 2025 and we ask you to consider making a recurring financial contribution to let us do more. | [](https://home.forwardparty.com/r?u=MtBLw57MCBnd28lIl741u-umgjlfzqeAM_zj2h1YgEQ8LiKSs_WIlu6d10HpikhG&e=61868e7acdd36ae0ddf3e39aa8429171&utm_source=forwardparty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=2024_statewide_call_invite&n=3 "Make a Donation") [Make a Donation](https://home.forwardparty.com/r?u=MtBLw57MCBnd28lIl741u-umgjlfzqeAM_zj2h1YgEQ8LiKSs_WIlu6d10HpikhG&e=61868e7acdd36ae0ddf3e39aa8429171&utm_source=forwardparty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=2024_statewide_call_invite&n=3)
---
* * *
We have an active community on Slack, come join the conversation.[
](https://home.forwardparty.com/r?u=OO1xB82Dwc0SwW5xslNAt5demYUjnvMsNObg_2SsnH4C04dQQgB9BZ02TA7y9H7t-4vbxkv79HHUmZ6qj3hodUR-7alEp57O08vr8cfcTeFUloFbffPqlZP8qsSt5ozRpo-ljG0b_nmp5HGri8eilg&e=61868e7acdd36ae0ddf3e39aa8429171&utm_source=forwardparty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=2024_statewide_call_invite&n=4)
* * *
We also need some fresh voices in our state leadership. If you'd like to help our organization succeed, there are plenty of ways to get involved with whatever time you're willing to give. Just reply to this email to start the conversation.
We look Forward to seeing you Monday at 8pm!
[ ](https://home.forwardparty.com/r?u=HN-VuZ6-MtyTZDOwpLeQohBI2w5n1fstLPCAOB1eS8pn49pgKy1KM2eEYboZkJaE&e=61868e7acdd36ae0ddf3e39aa8429171&utm_source=forwardparty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=2024_statewide_call_invite&n=5) [ ](https://home.forwardparty.com/r?u=HR9MoATtHgNjF_4kmlo5pN8R4zJ-fGDLgTAMST8PY6mgKwzOK4bTDEpy9KU5BOzg&e=61868e7acdd36ae0ddf3e39aa8429171&utm_source=forwardparty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=2024_statewide_call_invite&n=6) [ ](https://home.forwardparty.com/r?u=C67zBN9acu3ZSVmLPV47peHvpkNPm4HcBUGM4-0XJTPgmEVLc_dN12xbGWLIkZIR&e=61868e7acdd36ae0ddf3e39aa8429171&utm_source=forwardparty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=2024_statewide_call_invite&n=7) [ ](https://home.forwardparty.com/r?u=KO8ZOB0mq2gq63DvFrKfe08uhOv-byHfKpIIFrTtOpPikh4D0waR8pVrn6wFcdzO&e=61868e7acdd36ae0ddf3e39aa8429171&utm_source=forwardparty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=2024_statewide_call_invite&n=8) [ ](https://home.forwardparty.com/r?u=_KeSraPW0gSlxEBMOvJrEuogCR1FcLzdL_LSGKjfikF5BT1dZn3HN2gM4OEGEI0z&e=61868e7acdd36ae0ddf3e39aa8429171&utm_source=forwardparty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=2024_statewide_call_invite&n=9) Copyright © 2024 Forward Party®, all rights reserved. We don't send endless texts asking you to chip in $2. We're not trying to spend millions of dollars on campaigns that have no chance of winning. We're running a very efficient small organization that can support candidates in races where we can have an impact. We'd like to grow our base of support in 2025 and we ask you to consider making a recurring financial contribution to let us do more. | "Make a Donation" We have an active community on Slack, come join the conversation. * We also need some fresh voices in our state leadership. If you'd like to help our organization succeed, there are plenty of ways to get involved with whatever time you're willing to give. Just reply to this email to start the conversation. We look Forward to seeing you Monday at 8pm! Copyright © 2024 Forward Party®, all rights reserved. Our mailing address is: 1701 Rhode Island Ave NW, Washington, DC 20036, United States Paid for by Forward Party and not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee. ForwardParty.com

subject: What do you think about the campus protests?
body:
National Survey on Higher Education

_**A message from our sponsor...**_ | | | [](http://links.g4yamerica.com/u/click?_t=cc7dda5c2cc64061900678c88bd3a18a&_m=98300282e5e345e7ad17f10b287cf918&_e=QoqvHgxL_2vfmzJnHu4QsEIBmiA8EVC3aDgTdgCxaJZsDamdAbLSesG-xQvn0J2Axpoe8YuBA-6wFH0H-fGOpQvo9fa7_OjreLA0X3k7lPxh55czIcztOtGEPzGfciPwlJoooXEtC_IOEbwiEZ6aW7RztBHbYDxKPJSHqQ4h4jeoaNISn8yEFSm5epCX1My3PwK10sAChVi_wV6mK37ZnSLQbA9pY_8SfUPkYx_-IuBhTclT_TBNw4Jcu7vD1Ce9_zhrf1GELJDP9A5c85cgRubCyvZQkIJcau42FphTjWPOBdHlUdVgfZoUu8bKiTS1ZTlzL7TRSYnNStSPuiO2-wM5zqwDNZ3ZSkEdTOt_xm-sp39Vqa5ZLefPFwkz5EOGIVZU6Al18Qik2B4kTdDdSg%3D%3D)
---
| | Have you followed the latest coming from college and university campuses in America?

In 2024, revolutionary leftists and rent-a-mob organizations funded by progressive billionaires occupied elite universities across the country.

Many of these universities canceled classes and commencement due to pro-terror protests. Police have arrested students and even professors at several institutions due to violence!

That's why I need to hear from you right away. What do you think about all of this?
**Could you please take a few minutes to complete our National Survey on Higher Education and let me know your thoughts[today](http://links.g4yamerica.com/u/click?_t=cc7dda5c2cc64061900678c88bd3a18a&_m=98300282e5e345e7ad17f10b287cf918&_e=QoqvHgxL_2vfmzJnHu4QsEIBmiA8EVC3aDgTdgCxaJZsDamdAbLSesG-xQvn0J2Axpoe8YuBA-6wFH0H-fGOpQvo9fa7_OjreLA0X3k7lPxh55czIcztOtGEPzGfciPwlJoooXEtC_IOEbwiEZ6aW7RztBHbYDxKPJSHqQ4h4jeoaNISn8yEFSm5epCX1My3PwK10sAChVi_wV6mK37ZnSLQbA9pY_8SfUPkYx_-IuBhTclT_TBNw4Jcu7vD1Ce9dSkxiYteZ9zQDT1ADTaJujkgeGHSQIrve0-xXHBLUZWn00HsNPap91Lgkjbk0Gakru8v4VLILQKZgwVkeXKNi1SqvHf6lXNsQ_uIYZzFeJqP7g9QbKacmM9MdjZOlAb7A9BQA6JrLm2ty-6jczGRNA%3D%3D)?**

[**https://info.hillsdale.edu/higher-education-survey**](http://links.g4yamerica.com/u/click?_t=cc7dda5c2cc64061900678c88bd3a18a&_m=98300282e5e345e7ad17f10b287cf918&_e=QoqvHgxL_2vfmzJnHu4QsEIBmiA8EVC3aDgTdgCxaJZsDamdAbLSesG-xQvn0J2Axpoe8YuBA-6wFH0H-fGOpQvo9fa7_OjreLA0X3k7lPxh55czIcztOtGEPzGfciPwlJoooXEtC_IOEbwiEZ6aW7RztBHbYDxKPJSHqQ4h4jeoaNISn8yEFSm5epCX1My3PwK10sAChVi_wV6mK37ZnSLQbA9pY_8SfUPkYx_-IuBhTclT_TBNw4Jcu7vD1Ce91nWjKGwvoYXRKTBoPd8dEQAr4ypd1VRnq-JpusPAbCrOe-oFYfSiC4WuAPY-A935G0OogmQNgxQPaw4JyHGmp4ibBHwZ79hxzDT2rMsfzm-F_HBVzqhbH0iGeQZ45gT7BmFFYYstvrREkJcMaDFlww%3D%3D)

It’s no secret that these campus radicals get their inspiration from the student protestors of 1968...

Our country has changed a lot since that year. And I would say—and I think you agree—not for the better.

A big reason is that many of these radicals took over our education system...as professors, administrators, and government bureaucrats.

And they spread far-Left propaganda in our schools and culture with the help of big-money progressive donors and your tax dollars.

**Hillsdale College is one of the _only_ colleges in this country that hasn’t fallen into this madness. **

We are one of the _only_ colleges that teach young Americans—and millions of people around this country—what makes our country the freest and most prosperous nation in history.

**But in response to the violent mobs we see in far too many colleges and universities, we need YOUR HELP to do even more. We must reach and teach millions on behalf of liberty, far beyond Hillsdale’s campus. **

We refuse to accept ONE PENNY of government funding—not even indirectly, in the form of federal or state student grants and loans.

This independence frees us from burdensome and corrupting regulations. It’s why our college is a place that seeks to DEFEND LIBERTY rather than OVERTHROW IT.

But it comes at a cost! We rely heavily on the generosity of friends like you to do our work.

So, would you consider chipping in to help us **reach** and **teach** millions more citizens nationwide?

**You can teach millions** —everyone from the high school senior who takes a civics course in one of our K-12 classical schools using our **free** curriculum ...

...to the family who reads _Imprimis_ —our **free** digest of liberty—and engages in a lively discussion at the dinner table over what Heather Mac Donald, Victor Davis Hanson, or Christopher Rufo had to say ...

...to the grandparents who watch our **free** online courses on the Constitution and American history and tell stories to their grandchildren about the great heroes of liberty.

When elite schools are doing everything they can to destroy this country, you can change this country for the better—one person, one family, one community at a time.

So, after you take our survey, please consider supporting us once again.

Any gift you can give from **$10** , **$25** , **$35** , or even **$50** , if you’ve been especially blessed this year, will help us relentlessly pursue our mission on behalf of liberty—especially when our higher education is in crisis. But we need your help right away.

I hope you will partner with Hillsdale College by making a generous tax-deductible gift today. You can easily do so after completing the attached **National Survey on Higher Education** , which you can access at this secure link:

[**https://info.hillsdale.edu/higher-education-survey**](http://links.g4yamerica.com/u/click?_t=cc7dda5c2cc64061900678c88bd3a18a&_m=98300282e5e345e7ad17f10b287cf918&_e=QoqvHgxL_2vfmzJnHu4QsEIBmiA8EVC3aDgTdgCxaJZsDamdAbLSesG-xQvn0J2Axpoe8YuBA-6wFH0H-fGOpQvo9fa7_OjreLA0X3k7lPxh55czIcztOtGEPzGfciPwlJoooXEtC_IOEbwiEZ6aW7RztBHbYDxKPJSHqQ4h4jeoaNISn8yEFSm5epCX1My3PwK10sAChVi_wV6mK37ZnSLQbA9pY_8SfUPkYx_-IuBhTclT_TBNw4Jcu7vD1Ce9roVPyzwYXUvY5PmigT_ZFeQuJZl_BU1f04CogchxpbnaciyGUcVaq8sCOq5BDJ6yZbM6Z94vR-Zrp4325ihk1UXDsRFZtXDouk27nh5W0e_qsKUZ2k86S2iNb4v68mv7noGAxuUK8UZxnmdfbfnJ_g%3D%3D)

Thank you in advance for letting me know your thoughts.

Warm regards,

Bill Gray, ’01
Vice President
Institutional Advancement
Hillsdale College

P.S. Big-money progressive donors and your tax dollars have helped far-Left activists, administrators, and bureaucrats take over elite colleges and universities. That’s why you see these places erupt in protests—and even violent mobs—that have led to canceled classes and commencements, and even the arrests of students and professors.

That’s why I’m asking you today to take Hillsdale College’s **National Survey on Higher Education**. It’ll only take a few minutes. You can find our survey at the secure link here:

**[https://info.hillsdale.edu/higher-education-survey](http://links.g4yamerica.com/u/click?_t=cc7dda5c2cc64061900678c88bd3a18a&_m=98300282e5e345e7ad17f10b287cf918&_e=QoqvHgxL_2vfmzJnHu4QsEIBmiA8EVC3aDgTdgCxaJZsDamdAbLSesG-xQvn0J2Axpoe8YuBA-6wFH0H-fGOpQvo9fa7_OjreLA0X3k7lPxh55czIcztOtGEPzGfciPwlJoooXEtC_IOEbwiEZ6aW7RztBHbYDxKPJSHqQ4h4jeoaNISn8yEFSm5epCX1My3PwK10sAChVi_wV6mK37ZnSLQbA9pY_8SfUPkYx_-IuBhTclT_TBNw4Jcu7vD1Ce9uOi-hSHZ_270yVnrERvVY1b0dOd8jTps5YwDDgk8GaEHYRZ2tvtsbY0F_v6C9eCfAoFC8PYSjM5z-7ZZgogiZQZItfrQa6FoKiZr0deJftQxnsnG1ZmPob0n-IrMFN0J-p93psSEbGxNAMJZDFgXuw%3D%3D)**

Thanks again! [Unsubscribe](http://links.g4yamerica.com/e/encryptedUnsubscribe?_r=cc7dda5c2cc64061900678c88bd3a18a&_s=98300282e5e345e7ad17f10b287cf918&_t=g2__LlfBSqjA7MTQO24BpkRFi0dZ62xYC0LX9gZviwpIpOlHQtZp2UgRjtIWz_Owo3wZ7YFK0l7puQkFfBz0emExv2LiSQfrHlUKTOdE9h_XMOCvSFjhl-1NLzHCBiTL)

When elite schools are doing everything they can to destroy this country, you can change this country for the better—one person, one family, one community at a time. So, after you take our survey, please consider supporting us once again. Any gift you can give from $10 , $25 , $35 , or even $50 , if you’ve been especially blessed this year, will help us relentlessly pursue our mission on behalf of liberty—especially when our higher education is in crisis. But we need your help right away. I hope you will partner with Hillsdale College by making a generous tax-deductible gift today. You can easily do so after completing the attached National Survey on Higher Education , which you can access at this secure link: Thank you in advance for letting me know your thoughts. Warm regards, Bill Gray, ’01 Vice President Institutional Advancement Hillsdale College P.S. Big-money progressive donors and your tax dollars have helped far-Left activists, administrators, and bureaucrats take over elite colleges and universities. That’s why you see these places erupt in protests—and even violent mobs—that have led to canceled classes and commencements, and even the arrests of students and professors. That’s why I’m asking you today to take Hillsdale College’s National Survey on Higher Education. It’ll only take a few minutes. You can find our survey at the secure link here: Thanks again! | |

clean_body: Dave McCormick needs your help | | | | | Fellow Conservative, It's Ted Cruz with an urgent request. The Senate race in Pennsylvania has been called and Republican Dave McCormick won fair and square. But Democrat Bob Casey and his liberal allies are refusing to concede. We have to stop liberals from stealing this election. Dave McCormick is a West Point grad, combat veteran, and political outsider who is committed to shaking up Washington. He IS the Senator-elect no matter what Democrats want to say. But with Bob Casey and liberal lawyers plotting a recount, Dave McCormick needs your support. Thanks, Ted Cruz | | | Paid for by Ted Cruz for Senate | | 815 A Brazos, PMB 550, Austin, TX 78701 | | | To stop receiving emails from Ted Cruz for Senate, to unsubscribe. |

body:
When Trump won in 2016, Democrats controlled just 29 chambers. Now, thanks to the work of the DLCC and the support of our grassroots donors, Democrats control nearly 40 state legislative chambers. | | |
---
| |
---|---
| 🛑**There’s no sugarcoating it: Our party faced major setbacks on Election Day. But if you want to keep fighting for our democracy, our rights, our freedoms, and our future, please keep reading.** 👇
---
When Trump won in 2016, Democrats controlled just 29 chambers. Now, thanks to the work of the DLCC and the support of our grassroots donors, Democrats control nearly 40 state legislative chambers.

Without Congress, these majorities will provide a much-needed check to oppose the worst of the incoming administration.

**Expanding Democratic power in statehouses across the country is the best way to counteract the damage of a second Trump presidency.**
---
We’re committed to building our largest membership team in DLCC history to fight back against the dangerous extremism of Trump and his allies by building Democratic majorities from the ground up.

As one of our most dedicated supporters, we need you on this team standing alongside us.

Donations from our members each year directly fuel our work to:

✅ Compete in majority-making special elections
✅ Chip away at Republican supermajorities
✅ Identify and flip vulnerable GOP-held seats
_And so much more..._
---

name: PoliticsPA
subject: State Row Winners Talk Life, Skip Politics
body:
Tune into the latest installment of the Voices of Reason podcast. | | | |
---
| | | Welcome to the latest edition of _Voices of Reason_ where we’ll recap exclusive news and data featured in our most recent podcast.

In this segment, we highlight the winners of Pennsylvania's state row offices: incumbents** Stacy Garrity** and **Tim DeFoor** , along with newly elected **Dave Sunday**. You won't want to miss their plans for the next four years.
---
| **Big Names Make News**
---
| **Attorney General Dave Sunday** discussed what you can expect from his AG agenda: combating the opioid crisis, addressing mental health challenges, examining the impact of social media on children, navigating the rise of A.I., safeguarding senior citizens, and more. [[Watch](https://broadandliberty.us3.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a45553d37b628a10a8ae35af1&id=9eabe83851&e=b7b3eddce2)]

**Auditor General Tim DeFoor** showcased innovation in his office – with programs allowing PA students to launch full-time, remote careers with game-changing effects for PA's small town economies. [[Watch](https://broadandliberty.us3.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a45553d37b628a10a8ae35af1&id=a35157af16&e=b7b3eddce2)]

**Treasurer Stacy Garrity****** explained,**** “I am the fiscal watchdog for the Commonwealth assets,” describing how she oversees over 150 billion dollars worth of assets and manages different boards that allocate assets through numerous programs. [[Watch](https://broadandliberty.us3.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a45553d37b628a10a8ae35af1&id=590ab41fb8&e=b7b3eddce2)]
---
|
* * *
---
| **Numbers You Need to Know**
---
| _State Row Elections_
* Dave Sunday won Attorney General with **50.89%** of the vote.. [[P](https://broadandliberty.us3.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a45553d37b628a10a8ae35af1&id=d149f2404c&e=b7b3eddce2)[A.gov](https://broadandliberty.us3.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a45553d37b628a10a8ae35af1&id=6d2315929d&e=b7b3eddce2)]
* Tim DeFoor won Auditor General with **51.21%** of the vote. [[P](https://broadandliberty.us3.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a45553d37b628a10a8ae35af1&id=747b367c9c&e=b7b3eddce2)[A](https://broadandliberty.us3.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a45553d37b628a10a8ae35af1&id=d3a1e8fa15&e=b7b3eddce2)[.gov](https://broadandliberty.us3.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a45553d37b628a10a8ae35af1&id=d0634b1e7f&e=b7b3eddce2)]
* Stacy Garrity won State Treasurer with **51.99%** of the vote. [[P](https://broadandliberty.us3.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a45553d37b628a10a8ae35af1&id=c3ef918fd7&e=b7b3eddce2)[A.gov](https://broadandliberty.us3.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a45553d37b628a10a8ae35af1&id=448b81ab6f&e=b7b3eddce2)]

_Demographics_
* In Philly's 114 majority-Latino precincts, Trump’s vote share rose from 15.3% in 2020 to **21.8% in 2024** [[MSN](https://broadandliberty.us3.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a45553d37b628a10a8ae35af1&id=76da865ffa&e=b7b3eddce2)]
* In Luzerne County, Trump won **158 of 186 precincts** , including every ward in Nanticoke and majority-Latino Hazleton. [[StandardSpeaker](https://broadandliberty.us3.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a45553d37b628a10a8ae35af1&id=6303141fef&e=b7b3eddce2)]

_Local Level Shifts_
* Trump was able to flip **45 precincts in Bucks County** , which he lost in 2020. [[Broad + L](https://broadandliberty.us3.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a45553d37b628a10a8ae35af1&id=cdc3345496&e=b7b3eddce2)[iberty](https://broadandliberty.us3.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a45553d37b628a10a8ae35af1&id=d9266d7aed&e=b7b3eddce2)]

| Fact-checkers often play umpire but rarely call it fair. One side’s truths are labeled “needs more context,” while the other’s whoppers get a pass. That’s why we launched [FactCheckPA](https://broadandliberty.us3.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a45553d37b628a10a8ae35af1&id=4114b0d5ac&e=b7b3eddce2): to sort fact from fiction, no matter the source. Follow us for breakdowns of claims from Pennsylvania politicians, interest groups, and media—and [send us tips](https://broadandliberty.us3.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a45553d37b628a10a8ae35af1&id=182f954a67&e=b7b3eddce2) on what to check.

FactCheckPA, brought to you by _Voices of Reason,_ officially launches next week. [Visit our site](https://broadandliberty.us3.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a45553d37b628a10a8ae35af1&id=f572628b94&e=b7b3eddce2) today for a preview of what's to come!

| The _Voices of Reason_ podcast has covered the most important issues in Pennsylvania politics – from [education funding](https://broadandliberty.us3.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a45553d37b628a10a8ae35af1&id=9effc35c02&e=b7b3eddce2) to [trust in elections](https://broadandliberty.us3.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a45553d37b628a10a8ae35af1&id=34439d11f7&e=b7b3eddce2). Secretary of the Commonwealth [Al Schmidt](https://broadandliberty.us3.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a45553d37b628a10a8ae35af1&id=8f1d90dd26&e=b7b3eddce2), PA Treasurer [Stacy Garrity](https://broadandliberty.us3.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a45553d37b628a10a8ae35af1&id=c541199b01&e=b7b3eddce2), and House Appropriations Chairman [Jordan Harris](https://broadandliberty.us3.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a45553d37b628a10a8ae35af1&id=b0210b15d3&e=b7b3eddce2) are just a few of many influential guests who have joined us for exclusive interviews and roundtable discussions.
Visit the _Voice of Reason_ [YouTube page](https://broadandliberty.us3.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a45553d37b628a10a8ae35af1&id=03702df4dd&e=b7b3eddce2) to experience all the great moments you missed.

name: Defeat Boebert PAC
subject: Boebert couldn’t even crack 53% of the vote
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Defeat Boebert PAC
body:
| | | Peter, Lauren Boebert abandoned her constituents in CD-3 last year after she nearly lost to Adam Frisch. She hopped into the race in CD-4 because she believed that would be an easier race to win. CD-3 was rated a R+7 district by _Cook Political Report_ , while CD-4 was rated as R+13. So in theory, Boebert should have sailed to an easy victory after moving districts. Especially in a year in which Trump moved the country to the right by several percentage points and won the Electoral College as well as the popular vote. **But that’s not what happened. Boebert received just under 53% of the vote in her district. In 2020, she received 52% of the vote in an R+7 district and then won by only a few hundred votes in 2022 and hemorraged over 60,000 votes.** If Boebert couldn’t even break 53% in a district nearly twice as red as CD-3 and got crushed by low MAGA turnout without Trump on the ballot, then you better believe she will be vulnerable in 2026—especially if there is a strong Democrat on the ballot. We recognize that it’s hard to even think about midterms right now, but we want to make sure we’re pounding this drum early and often: we can beat Lauren Boebert when she doesn’t have the voter surge from her Dear Leader Donald Trump to save her. If you’re not ready to get back in the fight just yet, we totally get it. **[But if you are, join us by rushing a $2 name: Tim
subject: The honor of a lifetime
disclaimer_text: paid for by Tim Walz for Governor
body:
I want to thank every single person who stood with Vice President Kamala Harris and me during this campaign.
| [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/97147379/512437858/2014215487?refcode=header&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDc0NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1NjM0MDdhMy03OGEzLWVmMTEtODhkMC02MDQ1YmRkNjJkYjYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=IbAR6Eub7EkdmyIdHT9S9iKQZcHfFBCoKkEEd8W8sa8=)
---
Peter,
I want to thank every single person who stood with Vice President Kamala Harris and me during this campaign. While the outcome isn’t what we wanted, it was the honor of a lifetime to fight alongside you and millions of other Americans for our shared values of democracy and freedom.
If you’re feeling deflated or discouraged, I get it. Take some time to take care of yourself, your loved ones, and your community. And know this: Whenever you’re ready to get back in the fight, I’ll be right here, ready to join you again.
Over the last three months, I had the opportunity to talk with a lot of people about the work we’re doing in Minnesota—from providing free school meals for every student to enacting common-sense gun safety measures to becoming the first state in the nation to establish an ironclad right to reproductive freedom since Roe was overturned, and so much more.
And I have to say, Peter, a lot of folks thought that sounded pretty damn good. You see, I’ve always believed the point of getting elected isn’t to bank political capital. It’s to burn political capital to improve lives.
**So, let me be 100% clear: If Donald Trump and JD Vance try to reverse our progress and bring a hateful agenda to Minnesota, I’ll be ready to stand up to protect our values and our way of life.**
As long as I’m Governor of Minnesota, we will protect a woman’s right to make her own health care decisions, welcome immigrants and all people as who they are, stand with working people, and defend our kids’ freedom to go to school without hunger and the fear of being shot in their classrooms.
Now, if we’re going to continue making Minnesota an example for the rest of this great nation in the coming years, we’re going to have to work a little harder, fight a little harder, and organize a little more. But I know there is nothing we can't accomplish when we stand together and meet our challenges head-on.
I love this country. I love this state. I love this job. And I’m not done fighting for Minnesota and the future all Americans deserve, not by a long shot. Thank you again for all that you do.
I’m grateful,
Tim Walz

clean_body: I want to thank every single person who stood with Vice President Kamala Harris and me during this campaign. | = Peter, I want to thank every single person who stood with Vice President Kamala Harris and me during this campaign. While the outcome isn’t what we wanted, it was the honor of a lifetime to fight alongside you and millions of other Americans for our shared values of democracy and freedom. If you’re feeling deflated or discouraged, I get it. Take some time to take care of yourself, your loved ones, and your community. And know this: Whenever you’re ready to get back in the fight, I’ll be right here, ready to join you again. Over the last three months, I had the opportunity to talk with a lot of people about the work we’re doing in Minnesota—from providing free school meals for every student to enacting common-sense gun safety measures to becoming the first state in the nation to establish an ironclad right to reproductive freedom since Roe was overturned, and so much more. And I have to say, Peter, a lot of folks thought that sounded pretty damn good. You see, I’ve always believed the point of getting elected isn’t to bank political capital. It’s to burn political capital to improve lives. So, let me be 100% clear: If Donald Trump and JD Vance try to reverse our progress and bring a hateful agenda to Minnesota, I’ll be ready to stand up to protect our values and our way of life. These undecided races are the key to taking back the Senate majority. | Peter,

Our Senate majority is coming down to [**Pennsylvania**.](http://links.itsourgreatamerica.com/u/click?_t=442fb7cf105f4725a8bda0b6bcffc1bd&_m=b5b8afcd84184063bca347ee7661cded&_e=WVL17Rww987Y9j9nStzPol1FU5ptCdQrxOzf24MksK-4CMDpgrlGmpSU6BVr-VI64y-4HEqdEDtfWIr5R26kfq0msRgEAjFo19ODq1a3llw5m4paBFhD3Ig-a-LJ98f0DCOFbNiTUHnZJG0vmDpI78vzztvmAAZljk7iIS7ru_cZeCGGgD1DHziRioa8YkCFjPuWbVuCp9fXeFqfgBAz6of_RVc9GfS3cQ5R4FJMfy6JDw9TFKvK7f_6O3xeK51NcZiFDAFMUYemNi-w7Wi26D3Y__OqLCyOitLyfwZSwR7oSi6a-WIWEzVSEE3xhbXWtWRlh5FiPeIuNvscVTZi62CPQvkSd8yVE_6jdgC6aR9An4_peN98MHnwadgDREUhdX96M2UlR30uZ7PE_j04l-RE36P9Q68JQhU81ghOg2kXeRGWS-rFjsVaMTIaGIjJBBG2NMuQATX4JmO9iUY3Uw%3D%3D)

Right now, we have a razor-thin Republican Senate majority. We can’t let the new Republican Senate majority slip away after we have worked so hard this year.

But that is precisely what will happen if we don’t step up today to support Dave McCormick in his fight against Chuck Schumer’s corrupt lawyers.

Then there are the legal fees Dave will have to pay to repel Chuck Schumer’s army of dirty trickster Democrat lawyers.

It will cost millions more to protect this new Senate Republican majority, and we can’t let Dave McCormick down when he needs us MOST.

These numbers aren’t exact, so please don’t hold it against us, but according to the Pew Research Center, the average cost per ballot for recounting Senate elections is 15 cents.

These vital races involve millions of votes.

Can Senate Republicans count on Peter to send $30 or more today to fund recount efforts for 200 ballots? | | Peter, I get it. You’ve been strung along, even burnt out on political messaging. Democratic donors have plenty of real reasons why they should support the cause, and exaggerating the stakes for months is exhausting. But if you’re tired of doomscrolling and still want to contribute to the races in play, let me tell you about a race with an opportunity that’s still in our hands and will have a major impact – and that’s keeping Mary Peltola in Congress. Mary is one of my absolute favorites in Congress and I’ve learned so much working alongside her. She represents the best of her state of Alaska and it’s honestly how everyone should serve. Keeping Mary in office isn’t just keeping a trusted friend and ally around – keeping every last seat we can blue is going to make a huge difference in our ability to curb the worst of the far-right’s impulses in 2025. And right now, across Alaska, thousands of in-person votes remain to be counted, and they’re coming from areas with large Alaska Native populations where Mary has overperformed other Democrats in the past. **In other words, his race is far from over, Peter.** [**Mary’s team is working around the clock to be prepared for any and all scenarios, and defending every single Alaskan’s vote until results are final. Will you split $ 5 or any other amount between us and Mary’s recount fund to make sure every Alaskan’s voice is heard?**](https://go.sparkpostmail1.com/f/a/IV8l_Sl00IuLbEMYorIIIw~~/AAUS1gA~) __If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue__ __Express, your split donation will go through immediately:__**____** | ****[$5](https://go.sparkpostmail1.com/f/a/3CjhLkRBNEcfJYPYDetfVQ~~/AAUS1gA~/RgRpGg4FP0SdaHR0cHM6Ly9zZWN1cmUuYWN0Ymx1ZS5jb20vZG9uYXRlL2VzLXBlbHRvbGEtcTQtMjAyND9yZWZjb2RlPWVtLTExLjE1LjI0LWFsbC1hJnJlZmNvZGVObXJvQm1pZD03ODU3NzUwMzAmcmVmY29kZT1lbS0xMS4xNS4yNC1hbGwtYSZleHByZXNzX2xhbmU9dHJ1ZSZhbW91bnQ9NVcDc3BjQgpnNhGJN2db5TcXUhRkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbVgEAAAAGw~~)**** | ****[$10](https://go.sparkpostmail1.com/f/a/ap-5qaaFqbOyEvParYSYOA~~/AAUS1gA~/RgRpGg4FP0SeaHR0cHM6Ly9zZWN1cmUuYWN0Ymx1ZS5jb20vZG9uYXRlL2VzLXBlbHRvbGEtcTQtMjAyND9yZWZjb2RlPWVtLTExLjE1LjI0LWFsbC1hJnJlZmNvZGVObXJvQm1pZD03ODU3NzUwMzAmcmVmY29kZT1lbS0xMS4xNS4yNC1hbGwtYSZleHByZXNzX2xhbmU9dHJ1ZSZhbW91bnQ9MTBXA3NwY0IKZzYRiTdnW-U3F1IUZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb21YBAAAABs~)****

clean_body: ~ | | Peter, I get it. You’ve been strung along, even burnt out on political messaging. Democratic donors have plenty of real reasons why they should support the cause, and exaggerating the stakes for months is exhausting. But if you’re tired of doomscrolling and still want to contribute to the races in play, let me tell you about a race with an opportunity that’s still in our hands and will have a major impact – and that’s keeping Mary Peltola in Congress. Mary is one of my absolute favorites in Congress and I’ve learned so much working alongside her. She represents the best of her state of Alaska and it’s honestly how everyone should serve. Keeping Mary in office isn’t just keeping a trusted friend and ally around – keeping every last seat we can blue is going to make a huge difference in our ability to curb the worst of the far-right’s impulses in 2025. And right now, across Alaska, thousands of in-person votes remain to be counted, and they’re coming from areas with large Alaska Native populations where Mary has overperformed other Democrats in the past. In other words, his race is far from over, Peter. If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your split donation will go through immediately:____ | **~~ | ~ ---|--- ~ | ~ | ~~** Onward to victory! -Eric | Paid for by Eric Sorensen for Illinois. Eric Sorensen for IllinoisPO Box 1172Moline, IL 61265United States ~ "Website"•~ "Privacy Policy"

name: Elissa Slotkin
subject: Thank you to my staff
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY ELISSA SLOTKIN FOR MICHIGAN
body:
# [](https://act.elissaslotkin.org/go/188?t=1&akid=2203%2E135344%2EUuJEq8)

Friends,
Let’s face it -- serving in Congress and running for Senate is kind of an unusual job. You could even call it weird. And all that weirdness would be really tough without a first-class team to do it with.
Thankfully, I have just that. My experience in the CIA and at the Pentagon taught me the importance of building strong, cohesive teams. You want high performance and low drama, well-rounded skills, an unshakeable work ethic, and a commitment to the mission above all. And so I want to give a special thank you to my campaign team, led by my campaign manager, Matt Hennessey.
[](https://act.elissaslotkin.org/go/3226?t=2&akid=2203%2E135344%2EUuJEq8)
This group of people is some of the most talented people in Michigan politics. Over the last 19 months since we launched our Senate campaign, they have kept their head down and stayed focused on the mission ahead of them. Our political and operations teams organized public events across Michigan and made sure we were showing up in communities in every corner of the state. My communications team helped tell the story of this campaign. My digital team made sure that we were meeting people where they are online. Our policy shop developed an ambitious Opportunity Agenda for Michigan’s under-represented communities. Our research team made sure everything we put out was fact-checked. Our finance team made sure we had the resources to get all that done, and ably managed our finances so skillfully that we were able to overcome $120 million in outside spending, a record for a Michigan election. And our scheduling and operations team kept all those trains running nonstop.
It was hard and often thankless work. And many of the people who did it are young enough that this dark, divided period in our politics is all they’ve ever known. But they came together to work for something better. I’m so proud of them, and so thankful for their excellence.
-- Elissa
**[CONTRIBUTE](https://act.elissaslotkin.org/go/9?c0=ebs-em-nov24.k4yPYt&refcode=em241115-1-15&t=3&akid=2203%2E135344%2EUuJEq8)**

PAID FOR BY ELISSA SLOTKIN FOR MICHIGAN
P.O. Box 4145
East Lansing, MI 48826
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is a very important way we communicate with supporters like you, but if you want to, you can [ unsubscribe here](https://act.elissaslotkin.org/unsubscribe/unsubscribe?t=4&akid=2203%2E135344%2EUuJEq8).

[ Sign up here to receive fewer emails.](https://act.elissaslotkin.org/signup/users-fewer-emails/?t=5&akid=2203%2E135344%2EUuJEq8)

Elissa Slotkin served in the Central Intelligence Agency and the Department of Defense. Use of her job titles and photographs during service do not imply endorsement by the Central Intelligence Agency OR the Department of Defense.

subject: Feeling the pain of inflation
body:

| | Dear Fellow Conservative,

Do you want to talk about how inflation has hurt you?

In this critical year for our country, many politicians and pundits are throwing around talking points about inflation and the consumer price index.

But most people don't fully understand how these abstract concepts affect their bottom line.

That's why my colleagues and I at The Heritage Foundation created our Personal Inflation Calculator.

This powerful tool will help you see the real, tangible impact that the Biden-Harris administration's constant spending and money printing has on your life.

You can customize all the inputs to your exact financial situation from your electricity bill to your housing costs.

**Find out inflation 's impact on your bottom line through The Heritage Foundation's Personal Inflation Calculator at the secure link below.**

[**https://secured.heritage.org/inflation-calculator**](http://links.newsletter.conservativedirect.com/u/click?_t=5b1853ae48754bee8f471363fe4933a9&_m=96acc8f26adb46e09dce44294651450f&_e=lMn5WECTH0gXCB6Dqg2Jew0uh-7ahgNEyXPIlJDs-iyRulxGbhGhekfwSiGgNXSko9eQAFw2jSNCfXKl905VXetv8NrZw6UQ4IBEpkQglOLS4uDJdB_docvp2ll1_VvDexpYIMyIKWW0VUPLjRvj40_layO1q8GAFJqCAnUxfzM_JhwN8dKO1SaLiSnY8UHZ7iF-sc_imxJXTONe04RaKtmDQ6hKE8aPvWYpopBOXTrWzThaR1GKdx17fNklJV0xJ6k_To55O8vcmlyfhalpBeEpb7qQanfbuJu7KYR-SlpBzxcWdl7L2N6__WHa3aTyUNKp2y-c4RkGDFfeJ44k2-2CBrYo71f3ViaR2Y-q0NM%3D)

I hope this calculator proves useful for you and your family.

Sincerely,

Kevin D. Roberts, Ph.D.
President, The Heritage Foundation

**P.S. Find out just how bad inflation has been for you through The Heritage Foundation 's Personal Inflation Calculator: [https://secured.heritage.org/inflation-calculator](http://links.newsletter.conservativedirect.com/u/click?_t=5b1853ae48754bee8f471363fe4933a9&_m=96acc8f26adb46e09dce44294651450f&_e=lMn5WECTH0gXCB6Dqg2Jew0uh-7ahgNEyXPIlJDs-iyRulxGbhGhekfwSiGgNXSko9eQAFw2jSNCfXKl905VXetv8NrZw6UQ4IBEpkQglOLS4uDJdB_docvp2ll1_VvDexpYIMyIKWW0VUPLjRvj40_layO1q8GAFJqCAnUxfzM_JhwN8dKO1SaLiSnY8UHZ7iF-sc_imxJXTONe04RaKnA8Mzauu07hZjZMOXrWaeupCo3Rwl0eDRBt1OkCv8NL7xkvvHGpQhrgdJtMjVqf8JljdA-EY_Vdw_F20xu3SHTrrjFqWz6kojug_4OqMzsTC56L4DPCkZjb8VdRk5ogISASfj1mX0-MTqxRGLI7DDA%3D)**

clean_body: The number of Americans who identify as Republicans has never been lower in HISTORY| | | This is DISTURBING,Peter. Even though President Trump won in a landslide victory, we saw a scary headline. The number of Americans who identify as Republicans has never been lower in HISTORY. This simply cannot be true, but we genuinely cannot know for sure unless patriots, like you, let us know if you’re still with us. Look - we are going to have an uphill battle cleaning up the mess Joe Biden and Kamala Harris created. We need your advice to help us through it. | | Contributions to the National Republican Senatorial Committee are not deductible for federal income tax purposes.. | | Paid for by the NRSC. Not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee.

name: Wiley Nickel
subject: Peter, did you see my op-ed about how we can protect Americans from the Trump agenda?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Wiley Nickel for North Carolina**
body:
|
# [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/97149640/512445119/-488448398?refcode=AU_GWN_CL_GEN_GEN_NO_20241115_PM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODMxNCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkOTg2NGYxZi03Y2EzLWVmMTEtODhkMC02MDQ1YmRkNjJkYjYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=zs4_FXBB8OoheRY9KfCJZ0xzbr9UqPyarj9XMsAEK30=)
---
Peter: Last week was hard for all of us, but we simply don't have time to lick our wounds. We need to start preparing to stop the Trump 2025 agenda right away. I believe one of the first things Democrats need to do is form a Shadow Cabinet to oppose Donald Trump, and I wrote an **[op-ed in The Washington Post](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/97149641/512445120/-1079958245?refcode=AU_GWN_CL_GEN_GEN_NO_20241115_PM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODMxNCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkOTg2NGYxZi03Y2EzLWVmMTEtODhkMC02MDQ1YmRkNjJkYjYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=zs4_FXBB8OoheRY9KfCJZ0xzbr9UqPyarj9XMsAEK30=&emci=85f3dea5-79a3-ef11-88d0-6045bdd62db6&emdi=d9864f1f-7ca3-ef11-88d0-6045bdd62db6&ceid=28008880)** to outline my plan. Please take a moment to read it so we can get to work together. — Wiley | **THE WASHINGTON POST**
**[What should Democrats do now? Form a shadow cabinet.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/97149642/512445121/-1079958245?refcode=AU_GWN_CL_GEN_GEN_NO_20241115_PM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODMxNCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkOTg2NGYxZi03Y2EzLWVmMTEtODhkMC02MDQ1YmRkNjJkYjYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=zs4_FXBB8OoheRY9KfCJZ0xzbr9UqPyarj9XMsAEK30=&emci=85f3dea5-79a3-ef11-88d0-6045bdd62db6&emdi=d9864f1f-7ca3-ef11-88d0-6045bdd62db6&ceid=28008880)**
Opinion | Wiley Nickel Last week stung. As Democrats, we simply failed to convince the American people we have better ideas to solve their problems. Now, we need to dust ourselves off and get ready to fight. We can’t let Donald Trump’s radical agenda go unanswered or unopposed. Here’s an idea for how to organize our opposition: We need to borrow from our British friends and appoint a shadow cabinet to fight back against the worst excesses of a second Trump administration. The special relationship between the United States and Britain extends not just to our strength on the world stage but also to our shared belief in democracy. Across the Atlantic, the British have something we don’t: a team from the opposition that mirrors the government’s cabinet members. They watch the cabinet closely, publicly challenging, scrutinizing and offering new ideas. It’s another form of checks and balances — a quiet guardrail that keeps power accountable. With a shadow cabinet, there is no hiding. Each decision by the government faces a ready counterpoint — not just from the media and voters but also from political leaders poised to (theoretically) step in. Shadow cabinet members can also become the clear point people for advocacy and grassroots organizers, making it easier to unify and amplify ideas and solutions out of favor among those in power. It’s democracy’s insurance policy. And it strengthens the government, too: There is no room for lazy ideas when rivals stand ready. So, what would a shadow cabinet look like here in the United States? We have an amazing wealth of talent on the Democratic side of the aisle in Congress — people loyal to the Constitution and ready to serve in opposition. Democratic leaders Hakeem Jeffries (New York) in the House and Charles E. Schumer (New York) in the Senate could appoint 26 members of Congress to go one-on-one with each member of Trump’s Cabinet. If Trump attempts to weaponize the justice system against his political opponents, we could see Sen. Adam Schiff (California), as our shadow attorney general, arguing against replacing our independent prosecutors with Trump loyalists. If Trump seeks to eliminate the Education Department, Rep. Jahana Hayes (Connecticut), a former teacher of the year, could step up as shadow education secretary to loudly defend it. If Trump tries to hand Ukraine and much of Eastern Europe to Russian President Vladimir Putin, Rep. Gregory W. Meeks (New York), as shadow secretary of state, could be a strong voice in support of maintaining international relationships and protecting democracy at home and abroad. Sen. Michael Bennet (Colorado), as shadow treasury secretary, and Rep. Suzan DelBene (Washington), as shadow commerce secretary, could help ensure the middle class and small businesses have a voice in government, and call out Trump’s proposed tax cuts for billionaires and corporations. Rep. Adam Smith (Washington), as shadow defense secretary, could counter Trump’s threat to use military force against his political opponents and work to ensure that the Defense Department stays loyal to the Constitution and not a wannabe dictator. And Sen. Tammy Duckworth (Illinois) could argue against cuts to the Department of Veterans Affairs that would delay the benefits and care our service members have rightly earned. If Trump hands over the Environmental Protection Agency to the fossil fuel industry, we could see Rep. Kathy Castor (Florida) pushing back for environmental protection and conservation to protect the air we breathe and the water we drink. And if Trump pushes to ban abortion nationwide, Rep. Rosa DeLauro could step in, as shadow secretary of health and human services, to defend women’s right to choose and argue against the gutting of Medicare by Trump and his cronies. New times require new solutions. This shadow cabinet isn’t just about opposing extreme MAGA attacks on our government. It’s also about making clear what we stand for, which is something we didn’t do enough this election cycle. It’s time to show — not just say — what we’re for: justice, accountability and democracy.
---
**HERE'S WHAT'S NEXT:**
North Carolina Democrats have a lot of work ahead of us. We need to organize against the dangerous Trump Administration — from forming a Democratic Shadow Cabinet, to fighting in the courts, to organizing communities on the ground — and get ready to win big in 2026.
**Your continued support is critical as America starts this trying new chapter.[Please pitch in to Wiley's 2026 Fight Fund to be ready for all the work ahead between now and the midterm elections.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/97149643/512445122/-1960556440?refcode=AU_GWN_CL_GEN_GEN_NO_20241115_PM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODMxNCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkOTg2NGYxZi03Y2EzLWVmMTEtODhkMC02MDQ1YmRkNjJkYjYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=zs4_FXBB8OoheRY9KfCJZ0xzbr9UqPyarj9XMsAEK30=)**

name: Dan Goldman
subject: I just introduced a resolution to prevent a Trump dictatorship

body:
|

Peter, It didn’t take long. name: Team McBride
subject: We’d love for you to sign our card to Sarah
disclaimer_text: Paid for by McBride for Delaware
body:
Just over a week ago, Sarah won her election to represent Delaware in the United States House of Representatives!
#
Just over a week ago, Sarah won her election to represent Delaware in the United States House of Representatives!
Thanks to your incredible support, she made history as the first out transgender member of Congress. **Now, she’s down in Washington, rolling up her sleeves and diving into the details at New Member Orientation.**
As we celebrate Sarah’s victory, we also know we’re facing challenges ahead. We lost the presidential election, and we have a long fight to defend our values, protect our democracy, and work with anyone willing to make life better for communities across the country.
**Sarah is ready to make a difference — no matter who is in office.** While she’s in D.C., gearing up for the work ahead, we want to send her a card filled with notes from her supporters.
[**Can you take a moment to sign our card? We’d love for you to sign it.**](https://act.sarahmcbride.com/signup/em-congrats-card/?source=em20241115-1558&akid=1558%2E21716%2Ec9aBQe)
**[Sign the card »](https://act.sarahmcbride.com/signup/em-congrats-card/?source=em20241115-1558&akid=1558%2E21716%2Ec9aBQe)**
Sarah is an effective and proven legislator with the power to build bridges to get big things done.
And because of this grassroots team, Sarah will be officially joining Congress in a couple of months — where she’ll focus on the issues that matter most to Delawareans: making life more affordable by passing paid and family leave, raising wages for workers, and making health care and child care more accessible.
**That’s what she ran this campaign promising to do, and that’s what she’ll fight for in Congress.**
[**Can you sign the card to congratulate her on her victory last week and let her know you have her back as she fights for all of us?**](https://act.sarahmcbride.com/signup/em-congrats-card/?refcode=em20241115-1558&amount=5&akid=1558%2E21716%2Ec9aBQe)
Thank you,
Team McBride
* * *
**[Donate »](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mcb-em-footer?refcode=em20241115-1&t=1&refcode2=1558_21716_c9aBQe&akid=1558%2E21716%2Ec9aBQe)**
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is a critical way we communicate with grassroots supporters like you. However, if you would like to change your subscription preferences, here are some options:
* [Receive Fewer Emails](https://act.sarahmcbride.com/signup/receive_fewer_emails/?t=2&akid=1558%2E21716%2Ec9aBQe)
* [Update Your Information](https://act.sarahmcbride.com/signup/update_your_information/?t=3&akid=1558%2E21716%2Ec9aBQe)
* [Unsubscribe](https://act.sarahmcbride.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=4&akid=1558%2E21716%2Ec9aBQe)

Email us: [info@sarahmcbride.com](mailto:info@sarahmcbride.com)
Paid for by McBride for Delaware

name: Senate Republicans
subject: It’s not over in Pennsylvania
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the NRSC
body:
These undecided races are the key to taking back the Senate majority. | Fellow American,

Our Senate majority is coming down to [**Pennsylvania**.](http://links.makingamericathegreatest.com/u/click?_t=79fa4a3daf024a0a886c5b498ff32e32&_m=e397d95e4b5f47788ce54fb80da96078&_e=m7lJABAxb2wkhQHT_6V2d3mlrZmXifNcndMEjkHMvV4zleh-ucfp1ypURlq6cGSddge72aAe4L8e-Q6Dw2sFyV42KPWUWqgpRrVnQBp2n_2tliTtqdjPTrF90WBhCju0NufCV08pwevxFBNAENaed_pVp_sa1BFvb0q013xGd-_46cvpXNL3Ze8n65ge9qRMJhCDCIVb-aAm-4NA2FK3tBFnVVb9w1IcaltnfT9y275lS-I79dQ8K02AEA_Czf5TYjwMGknhjmqxLqFj-XsdgIAxC3gl8o0qmuL2_Cpb-Q5MtfozUhkT6u_uX4-BPv8iZhiY7b4tY7lYl0r3bejcszup_BZQcHrqLXZYKHQYASbrj9pJLUqC7HJU2auja13wh5kdsTWP_dUTVpsb_-gJpKQiNCXizWKl16GdP8Hkv3HUxHr97yDDdbAUJbVb9V-_4fkXdW8BEGQYoQdByF3e2G9rMo9ZGH61zutmMRigocQ%3D)

Right now, we have a razor-thin Republican Senate majority. We can’t let the new Republican Senate majority slip away after we have worked so hard this year.

But that is precisely what will happen if we don’t step up today to support Dave McCormick in his fight against Chuck Schumer’s corrupt lawyers.

Then there are the legal fees Dave will have to pay to repel Chuck Schumer’s army of dirty trickster Democrat lawyers.

It will cost millions more to protect this new Senate Republican majority, and we can’t let Dave McCormick down when he needs us MOST.

These numbers aren’t exact, so please don’t hold it against us, but according to the Pew Research Center, the average cost per ballot for recounting Senate elections is 15 cents.

These vital races involve millions of votes.

Can Senate Republicans count on Fellow American to send $30 or more today to fund recount efforts for 200 ballots? [**Please chip in whatever you can spare today to help where it’s needed most.**](http://links.makingamericathegreatest.com/u/click?_t=79fa4a3daf024a0a886c5b498ff32e32&_m=e397d95e4b5f47788ce54fb80da96078&_e=m7lJABAxb2wkhQHT_6V2d3mlrZmXifNcndMEjkHMvV4zleh-ucfp1ypURlq6cGSddge72aAe4L8e-Q6Dw2sFyV42KPWUWqgpRrVnQBp2n_2tliTtqdjPTrF90WBhCju0NufCV08pwevxFBNAENaed_pVp_sa1BFvb0q013xGd-_46cvpXNL3Ze8n65ge9qRMJhCDCIVb-aAm-4NA2FK3tBFnVVb9w1IcaltnfT9y275lS-I79dQ8K02AEA_Czf5TYjwMGknhjmqxLqFj-XsdgIAxC3gl8o0qmuL2_Cpb-Q5MtfozUhkT6u_uX4-BPv8iZhiY7b4tY7lYl0r3bejcs0lxxnm3IIv1nRDVkR9n99yz0mXkqHFKsr3Aw34yAsY_fZd_GoJVs4mhPv1dl6UZoHEpoQSpMSfLgDP3zAp8Wpo1XBhf2zwtK-q_lieZtl29CfC1TXXzwYk0C17BiGDOltGzm11z4n98bx8B0h-44DY%3D)

[**DONATE $30 TO DAVE MCCORMICK >>>**](http://links.makingamericathegreatest.com/u/click?_t=79fa4a3daf024a0a886c5b498ff32e32&_m=e397d95e4b5f47788ce54fb80da96078&_e=m7lJABAxb2wkhQHT_6V2d3mlrZmXifNcndMEjkHMvV4zleh-ucfp1ypURlq6cGSddge72aAe4L8e-Q6Dw2sFyV42KPWUWqgpRrVnQBp2n_2tliTtqdjPTrF90WBhCju0NufCV08pwevxFBNAENaed_pVp_sa1BFvb0q013xGd-_46cvpXNL3Ze8n65ge9qRMJhCDCIVb-aAm-4NA2FK3tBFnVVb9w1IcaltnfT9y275lS-I79dQ8K02AEA_Czf5TYjwMGknhjmqxLqFj-XsdgIAxC3gl8o0qmuL2_Cpb-Q5MtfozUhkT6u_uX4-BPv8iZhiY7b4tY7lYl0r3bejcs-1tkPiFkLZstVotdVtWXXpbpKwITf_CLkuki3h7zGYXza93ooPJRWpQP4iIws8aEcAVtUYAS7vB6hUvEJ9q6CMOcq2l4dBQy8Q7_LCsRRXk8__PGX2ZMxgFTuOtRA8EK8KASir6NM9O--dMXC1vfQ0%3D)
_Don’t forget that the recount costs are just the tip of the iceberg; Dave McCormick also must fend off far-Left lawyers in court, and that could be even more expensive.

_ [**Please chip in $30 or more today to support Republicans fighting to CONFIRM REPUBLICAN VICTORY in races that have gone to recounts.**](http://links.makingamericathegreatest.com/u/click?_t=79fa4a3daf024a0a886c5b498ff32e32&_m=e397d95e4b5f47788ce54fb80da96078&_e=m7lJABAxb2wkhQHT_6V2d3mlrZmXifNcndMEjkHMvV4zleh-ucfp1ypURlq6cGSddge72aAe4L8e-Q6Dw2sFyV42KPWUWqgpRrVnQBp2n_2tliTtqdjPTrF90WBhCju0NufCV08pwevxFBNAENaed_pVp_sa1BFvb0q013xGd-_46cvpXNL3Ze8n65ge9qRMJhCDCIVb-aAm-4NA2FK3tBFnVVb9w1IcaltnfT9y275lS-I79dQ8K02AEA_Czf5TYjwMGknhjmqxLqFj-XsdgIAxC3gl8o0qmuL2_Cpb-Q5MtfozUhkT6u_uX4-BPv8iZhiY7b4tY7lYl0r3bejcsyn1JxAR28-v1fA2Ml7uD_8xqV08jplcIYEA7wWGhDP0azhhCqQ-lzINNWLYeh0MHaEQMxqIR76QZ44aLdlEeeS5K8IMv0tghI5O_fzGiwsW1j6Dc4pdyyf56bXDRph8uScxhjRXXmUGeW6arQQdwlQ%3D)

name: Josh Gottheimer
subject: I’m running for Governor!
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY JOSH GOTTHEIMER FOR GOVERNOR
body:
---
| | Friend,

**I’m thrilled to share some exciting news with you – I’m in! I’m officially running for Governor of New Jersey ([watch my launch video](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/97150442/512448138/1691506925?source=EM_NBI_JG_20241115_ST_GovLaunch_0_3MO_JoshGottheimer_NA_NA_NA&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS84MDczNyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5NDRiMDhhZC03ZGEzLWVmMTEtODhkMC02MDQ1YmRkNjJkYjYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=g864BtAoFr1XrB0ObvADdps0Yxa57g2q4TQl93NQkKs=&emci=efdfe195-7aa3-ef11-88d0-6045bdd62db6&emdi=944b08ad-7da3-ef11-88d0-6045bdd62db6&ceid=37438246))!** Jersey has given me and my family so much – a place to grow up, raise our kids, and build a future. I want to make sure everyone in our state has that same shot.

But let’s face it: life in Jersey has become too expensive. We’re now the fourth most expensive state in the country, with the second-highest childcare costs, and housing prices more than 35% above the national average. We’ve got the highest property taxes, the highest business taxes, high utility costs, and higher income taxes than 43 other states. I hear it all the time – moms, dads, recent grads, and seniors telling me how much they love Jersey, but worry they won’t be able to afford to stay.

**I’m running to be the lower taxes and lower cost Governor. It will take a problem solver, and a Democrat, with the right experience and willingness to get things done – and one who’s not afraid to fight Jersey style when he needs to.**

Since my first race in 2016, one thing has stayed constant: my commitment to lowering taxes. Taxes are too high — and I’m determined to cut them.**Since 2016, my campaign signs have always said “lower taxes” at the bottom.** I’ve delivered on that promise, helping to expand the Child Tax Credit and bringing millions back to Jersey for essentials like firetrucks, new roads, and clean drinking water. **I meant it then, and I mean it now.**

**That’s why I’m running for Governor – to make life more affordable, keep our Jersey Values strong, and ensure that everyone has a real chance to succeed here.**

Yours,

Josh

_P.S. If you're with me in the fight to lower costs, lower taxes, and protect Jersey Values – [**click here to become a founding donor of my campaign.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/97150443/512448139/-486314421?source=EM_NBI_JG_20241115_ST_GovLaunch_0_3MO_JoshGottheimer_NA_NA_NA&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS84MDczNyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5NDRiMDhhZC03ZGEzLWVmMTEtODhkMC02MDQ1YmRkNjJkYjYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=g864BtAoFr1XrB0ObvADdps0Yxa57g2q4TQl93NQkKs=&emci=efdfe195-7aa3-ef11-88d0-6045bdd62db6&emdi=944b08ad-7da3-ef11-88d0-6045bdd62db6&ceid=37438246) I can't do this without you._
---

name: Rand Paul
subject: Have they all forgotten how the economy works?
body:
[](http://links.conservativeum.com/u/click?_t=26c2e4aa9bbe40418f61e26972138f21&_m=7cdc7e230320468092a075318c0b1e3a&_e=QKSeXWN9velFAcwJ-f__HYfJxz84F_IiXaJlyQHuU503XYX89LAVDQkR3E_My43RVVhZv9eaqUkT9IDNhk3aUk9e-OoOQ4C5iaSnySFZ1IUPLStGCb2HXWlwbgTAF0BkzNvrheD3wD-seVkcBJxuMO5hMaprIqf8joiMnglQGAncYsgeDf4kd90dD-rhNXL0DIYPl5LEzoEemXO1-cfemkuTOyKp2IQMzaV4MsQc_hj8iFdYkyQN6f5-5J0bCywAR5ELwA5gIv9Dq0adaGapQ89fwy_2rZNWvn5PthVIFdCFeTedp1yzNC9IZqslfVbs0im01RHEgK5zEWFJL8s0Cu2GlbddqsZ8xr5zJplo6BQtLh7aIAgErbh8CDjwss8MMdsGSo-JiqZrPUr_VgyXTTFLySnoeC6d4sBT5fmjUJi5zyawlXadH8d-pD2oOcC-)
Peter,

Biden, Pelosi, and AOC all seem to have forgotten anything they learned in an economics class... or even basic 8th-grade math classes.

Do you see the horrific ideas coming out of Washington D.C.?
* Raising the minimum wage to $20+
* Passing over $3 Trillion budgets
* Allowing inflation to destroy the value of the dollar
* They've even proposed minting a "$1 Trillion coin" to fund the budget...

These ideas are not only madness but economic suicide.**The Foundation for Economic Education 's (FEE) high school students know more about basic economics and math than Joe Biden (and they can stay awake during class)!**

FEE is educating both high school and college students about the true principles of free markets, entrepreneurship, individual liberties, and personal responsibility. Their flagship program,** "FEE In the Classroom"** is teaching students these important lessons and values in order to save our Republic from socialism.

**Make no mistake:** If AOC had attended a FEE In the Classroom seminar we would not be in this mess.

[Which is why I am PERSONALLY supporting FEE In the Classroom and am asking all of my supporters to contribute or even sponsor a FEE In the Classroom program. Please click here to contribute $1,000, $500, $250, $100, $50, or even $10.](http://links.conservativeum.com/u/click?_t=26c2e4aa9bbe40418f61e26972138f21&_m=7cdc7e230320468092a075318c0b1e3a&_e=QKSeXWN9velFAcwJ-f__HYfJxz84F_IiXaJlyQHuU503XYX89LAVDQkR3E_My43RVVhZv9eaqUkT9IDNhk3aUk9e-OoOQ4C5iaSnySFZ1IUPLStGCb2HXWlwbgTAF0BkzNvrheD3wD-seVkcBJxuMO5hMaprIqf8joiMnglQGAncYsgeDf4kd90dD-rhNXL0DIYPl5LEzoEemXO1-cfemkuTOyKp2IQMzaV4MsQc_hj8iFdYkyQN6f5-5J0bCywA9dCJaNWeHKpJj-X9j3c4P4oFBfLBvokgZLRbnlmdbr_r7qZJD6mPwSMAWEN2__HvSxYzftOje78rbrba0gbyedSikW6p3kSWr_yDQbAxf0AAjG9mmS-pzGI2U41O4H5M2unp0kkmvzT-XjMeshoUjCfVUcXafYy8d9FPwqoYoPE_tIY99dDJVjLRzQ4UJfrv)

_You and I will never win unless we reach young people with our message_.

The truth is we have an uphill battle ahead of us.

Big government, Critical Race Theory, radical activists, and cancel culture have all played a part to indoctrinate our country's youth inside the classroom.

But I am optimistic and fully believe FEE can turn the tide against socialism in the classroom.
[](http://links.conservativeum.com/u/click?_t=26c2e4aa9bbe40418f61e26972138f21&_m=7cdc7e230320468092a075318c0b1e3a&_e=QKSeXWN9velFAcwJ-f__HYfJxz84F_IiXaJlyQHuU503XYX89LAVDQkR3E_My43RVVhZv9eaqUkT9IDNhk3aUk9e-OoOQ4C5iaSnySFZ1IUPLStGCb2HXWlwbgTAF0BkzNvrheD3wD-seVkcBJxuMO5hMaprIqf8joiMnglQGAncYsgeDf4kd90dD-rhNXL0DIYPl5LEzoEemXO1-cfemkuTOyKp2IQMzaV4MsQc_hj8iFdYkyQN6f5-5J0bCywAnUMzK2u5cNx9wUhE3MKLnw9vbLZm2QdfXeBPMBMnH62Y1INCr19oNa1DEEWy0xDIkhPcNTD3pdCARtgZ24Gx16qxDNSlGQaaldUCEpbztYFrWMYABO66GE-TsaHRLaCJHgnpdtUDVM3dMHD8cQc7RPmySiN7L0XD3635_0fzJr36k6eNfUtqgPuTLHNIOKxD)

When young people hear our message it resonates with them.
* Young people want to be free and independent
* Entrepreneurship and problem-solving are appealing to young high school and college students
* Privacy and individual liberty are important to younger generations
* Our country's youth want fulfilling and well-paying jobs... Well, you're not going to get that with socialism

**DO NOT give up on young people. **

We can win hearts and minds. And that's exactly what FEE is doing with FEE In the Classroom.

FEE students are among the brightest men and women I meet. In fact, I've even had FEE staff testify in front of Congress and some former FEE students have worked in my office or on my campaigns.

[I am inviting you to support the Foundation for Economic Education by making a donation of $10, $20.24, $50, $100, $250, $500, $1,000 or any amount.](http://links.conservativeum.com/u/click?_t=26c2e4aa9bbe40418f61e26972138f21&_m=7cdc7e230320468092a075318c0b1e3a&_e=QKSeXWN9velFAcwJ-f__HYfJxz84F_IiXaJlyQHuU503XYX89LAVDQkR3E_My43RVVhZv9eaqUkT9IDNhk3aUk9e-OoOQ4C5iaSnySFZ1IUPLStGCb2HXWlwbgTAF0BkzNvrheD3wD-seVkcBJxuMO5hMaprIqf8joiMnglQGAncYsgeDf4kd90dD-rhNXL0DIYPl5LEzoEemXO1-cfemkuTOyKp2IQMzaV4MsQc_hj8iFdYkyQN6f5-5J0bCywA9dCJaNWeHKpJj-X9j3c4Pw0sSjEY9hNk3CVCdeDjbrBUpaWYxpOw3-TD4ofi4vqY_5L2pddBshRhz0qD9SxxsDuOmC3mH9gbKpKmOT0M519cbGsJR9036RqcO8oW9FPLaWvFaab1j5VfbnsAhhWdiuINvDGKVYby_BKgnPb0KGrqO9J1ooN23-PUxACoehqT)

clean_body: - Peter, Biden, Pelosi, and AOC all seem to have forgotten anything they learned in an economics class... or even basic 8th-grade math classes. Do you see the horrific ideas coming out of Washington D.C.? Raising the minimum wage to $20+ Passing over $3 Trillion budgets Allowing inflation to destroy the value of the dollar They've even proposed minting a "$1 Trillion coin" to fund the budget... These ideas are not only madness but economic suicide.The Foundation for Economic Education 's (FEE) high school students know more about basic economics and math than Joe Biden (and they can stay awake during class)! FEE is educating both high school and college students about the true principles of free markets, entrepreneurship, individual liberties, and personal responsibility. Their flagship program, "FEE In the Classroom" is teaching students these important lessons and values in order to save our Republic from socialism. Make no mistake: If AOC had attended a FEE In the Classroom seminar we would not be in this mess. You and I will never win unless we reach young people with our message. The truth is we have an uphill battle ahead of us. Big government, Critical Race Theory, radical activists, and cancel culture have all played a part to indoctrinate our country's youth inside the classroom. But I am optimistic and fully believe FEE can turn the tide against socialism in the classroom. When young people hear our message it resonates with them. Young people want to be free and independent Entrepreneurship and problem-solving are appealing to young high school and college students Privacy and individual liberty are important to younger generations Our country's youth want fulfilling and well-paying jobs... Well, you're not going to get that with socialism DO NOT give up on young people. We can win hearts and minds. And that's exactly what FEE is doing with FEE In the Classroom. FEE students are among the brightest men and women I meet. In fact, I've even had FEE staff testify in front of Congress and some former FEE students have worked in my office or on my campaigns. I am asking you to make a long-term investment in the future of our Republic. FEE's students learn the ideas of liberty, free enterprise, the principles of our Founding Fathers, and have an impact on our culture and public policy process. But it takes time. The organization was founded in 1946 and rose to prominence during the Cold War. FEE served as the greatest voice for the ideas of liberty in this time and influenced many leaders such as Ronald Reagan and Margaret Thatcher. The ideas of liberty defeated communism and we can win again against the rising tide of socialism in the classroom. But I need your help. Thank you, Senator Rand Paul FEE is a 501(c)(3) nonprofit educational organization, so donations made to FEE are tax-deductible to the full extent allowable by law. |

subject: Our Fight Isn’t Over!
body:
| | | | | | [View this email in your browser](https://us14.campaign-archive.com/?e=7b1b739a89&u=306598b2f3a0f328de4c6676e&id=a3115c2d7b)

---

# Our Fight Isn’t Over!

Dear Friends,
It’s been a challenging week as we navigate the consequences of the recent elections. While every president has the right to nominate their cabinet, I must express my strong opposition to all of Trump's picks thus far. One nomination, in particular, stands out as unfit, unqualified, and dangerous for a vital position in our government: Matt Gaetz for Attorney General.
We know how Trump has previously attempted to use Attorneys General as personal allies to settle scores. With Gaetz in this role, all safeguards and accountability would be dismantled. His troubling history, which includes allegations of sexual misconduct and ties to sex trafficking, raises serious concerns. Just yesterday, he resigned from Congress to evade a damning bipartisan report from the House Ethics Committee regarding his conduct.
Prominent Republicans, including Senator Lisa Murkowski, former Ambassador John Bolton, and former Speaker Kevin McCarthy, have already condemned this nomination. We must not allow this precarious choice to proceed.
I urge you to reach out to Republican incoming Majority Leader John Thune and any Republican senators. Call their offices and demand they oppose Gaetz's nomination. It's essential to remind them not to relinquish their responsibility by allowing recess appointments to sidestep the Senate’s confirmation process.
You can look up Senate members and their contact numbers using the buttons below.As we grapple with these election outcomes, it may feel daunting to uphold the values we cherish. Now, more than ever, we must double down and fight for our principles. It's easy to champion what’s right when our side controls the White House and Congress; this is our true test of commitment and character.
Let’s make our voices heard and stand up for the integrity of our government. As Bob Marley wisely said, “You never know how strong you are until being strong is your only choice.” Let’s choose strength and action as we advocate for our values and our country.
Best,
Dr. Asif MahmoodPS. Follow me on X, (link below) for more updates.

---

body:
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/97151300/512450332/-531765509?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDcvMS83NTE3NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzMGU4MjY5Yy03ZmEzLWVmMTEtODhkMC02MDQ1YmRkNjJkYjYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=kRPNn7iE3dns-ajGnPk_z8MWd4Ig1ORT56zdyW86GyM=&emci=a2b4a3d9-6fa3-ef11-88d0-6045bdd62db6&emdi=30e8269c-7fa3-ef11-88d0-6045bdd62db6&ceid=10203249) Now that the dust has settled I wanted to send this email to thank everyone for your support and hard work in my campaign to be your Attorney General. While I wasn't able to win this election, the cause of freedom and making sure our democracy works for everyone will continue.

For many of us, the election results were not what we wanted in so many races. I certainly will do my part to reflect on why and what I and others can potentially do better moving forward.

I also wish Dave Sunday the best as he gets set to become Pennsylvania's next Attorney General.

As we move forward please know that being your nominee for Attorney General was an honor. I am sorry I wasn't able to win this for you. I am committed to staying active and doing my part to make our state and country stronger for everyone.

Have a great Holiday Season and I look forward to seeing everyone soon.

Again, thank you!

Sincerely,

Eugene

Have a great Holiday Season and I look forward to seeing everyone soon. Again, thank you! Sincerely, Eugene | Make sure this email goes to your inbox. Add to your address book. Email is a key way for us to stay in touch and make sure you get the latest updates from our campaign. But if you don't want to receive emails, you can . | Paid for by DePasquale for AG DePasquale for AG PO Box 53043 Pittsburgh, PA 15219 United States
