name: Dan Carr
subject: Pray Like Never Before
body:
Christians Must Pray

| |
---|---|---
|
# Pray Like Never Before
### Christians Must Pray
| | | [Dan Carr](https://substack.com/@dancarr2014)
---
| Nov 15
---
| [](https://substack.com/@dancarr2014)
---
In this video, we call on Christians across the nation to unite in prayer for America. In these challenging times, our country, our churches, and our elected officials need God's guidance more than ever.
[](https://substack.com/redirect/4baf1a6b-9169-42e4-ba65-93254e3c0dc2?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
🙏 Pray for America: That hearts would turn back to God and seek His truth. Pray for revival!!
🙏 Pray for Our Churches: That pastors, leaders, and congregations would stand boldly in faith and remain lights in our communities.
🙏 Pray for Our Elected Officials: That God would give them wisdom, courage, and discernment to lead with integrity and a commitment to righteousness. [#PrayForAmerica](https://substack.com/redirect/052fa113-fdf6-42d1-a56d-76856cf78297?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) [#FaithAndFreedom](https://substack.com/redirect/6222a68c-fd17-4f31-8ffa-65afcb2d6962?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) [#PrayForOurNation](https://substack.com/redirect/550251ec-a40e-49cb-b685-d1cb154eabc9?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) [#UnityInPrayer](https://substack.com/redirect/a41d382e-4fb0-481e-9778-e94fec4fe486?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) [#PrayForLeaders](https://substack.com/redirect/f461a3ae-37d4-4b4a-a130-dd2057cb5164?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
[Upgrade to paid](https://substack.com/redirect/2/eyJlIjoiaHR0cHM6Ly9kYW5qYWNraWUyMDE0LnN1YnN0YWNrLmNvbS9zdWJzY3JpYmU_.9pI-rvR-uHz5Ysad5chnaFDw-B_m4zTxaeJ6ZwMTZik?&utm_medium=email&utm_source=subscribe-widget&utm_content=151714590)
[Give a gift subscription](https://substack.com/redirect/2/eyJlIjoiaHR0cHM6Ly9kYW5qYWNraWUyMDE0LnN1YnN0YWNrLmNvbS9zdWJzY3JpYmU_.9pI-rvR-uHz5Ysad5chnaFDw-B_m4zTxaeJ6ZwMTZik?&gift=true)

The first $5,000 contributed in a calendar year from federally permissible sources will be deposited in The Real Texas PAC's contribution account. Once a federally permissible source has contributed $5,000 in a calendar year, The Real Texas PAC will transfer any amounts in excess of $5,000 to its non-contribution account. All contributions from corporations and labor unions will be deposited in the non-contribution account. Please contact us at realtexas@mbacg.com if you would like a different allocation. If you believe you received this message in error or wish to no longer receive email from us, please unsubscribe: .

name: The Democratic Party
subject: You deserve to know →
body:
No question about it: the election did not go the way any of us had hoped.
---
Derek, No question about it: the election did not go the way any of us had hoped. We put everything we had into this election, knocked on millions of doors, and trained tens of thousands of volunteers -- but ultimately came up short. This is a moment to learn, reflect, and rebuild. But it’s no time to sit back. As Vice President Harris said, we can’t throw up our hands, we have to roll up our sleeves. We cannot take a break. This work is more important than ever. Now, we have to pivot to an ask -- an important one. **If you understand the importance of a strong Democratic Party -- especially in this moment -- then we are asking you to contribute to the Democratic National Committee today.** But before we share a link, you deserve to know that we will use your donation to strengthen our state and local Democratic parties that are tapped out after a tough election. We will use it to ensure we do not lose the organizing and tech infrastructure we’ve built up all across the country. We will use it to organize against destructive legislation and executive orders. And we will use it to put ourselves in a position to win local and statewide races next year, take back Congress in the next election, and the White House in 2028. We won't ask as often as we did before the election, but we do hope you can contribute in response to this request, especially before the new Congress and president are sworn in. [**Please reaffirm your commitment to a strong Democratic Party and standing up to Trump by making a $3 contribution to the Democratic National Committee today.**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em-dnc-november-2024?amount=3&refcode=em_20241115_2338_fr&refcode2=2338_22930333_MVvT6F&akid=2338%2E22930333%2EMVvT6F) _If you 've stored your info with ActBlue, we'll process your contribution instantly:_ | | | **[Donate $3](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em-dnc-november-2024?express_lane=true&amount=3&refcode=em_20241115_2338_fr&refcode2=2338_22930333_MVvT6F&akid=2338%2E22930333%2EMVvT6F)**

They lack qualifications, have histories of sexual abuse, have zero regard for human rights, and point to a broader MAGA hypocrisy

# [Trump Nominees Are Not Just A Joke -- They Are Dangerous](https://substack.com/app-link/post?publication_id=2550223&post_id=151708815&utm_source=post-email-title&utm_campaign=email-post-title&isFreemail=true&r=1hvr60&token=eyJ1c2VyX2lkIjo5MDUwMTE5MiwicG9zdF9pZCI6MTUxNzA4ODE1LCJpYXQiOjE3MzE2OTc1NTcsImV4cCI6MTczNDI4OTU1NywiaXNzIjoicHViLTI1NTAyMjMiLCJzdWIiOiJwb3N0LXJlYWN0aW9uIn0.ze8zTtelLi7v52y6cl6p1ifyxLu5EqUpovMjFdZ8wwE)
### They lack qualifications, have histories of sexual abuse, have zero regard for human rights, and point to a broader MAGA hypocrisy
| | [Qasim Rashid](https://substack.com/@qasimrashid)
---
| Nov 15
---
| [](https://substack.com/@qasimrashid)
---
---
| | | [](https://substack.com/app-link/post?publication_id=2550223&post_id=151708815&utm_source=substack&isFreemail=true&submitLike=true&token=eyJ1c2VyX2lkIjo5MDUwMTE5MiwicG9zdF9pZCI6MTUxNzA4ODE1LCJyZWFjdGlvbiI6IuKdpCIsImlhdCI6MTczMTY5NzU1NywiZXhwIjoxNzM0Mjg5NTU3LCJpc3MiOiJwdWItMjU1MDIyMyIsInN1YiI6InJlYWN0aW9uIn0.VdUNC2WSwF2Ag2x6i9iWemxjxu-vx9RAPLm2BJH4g2o&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=email-reaction&r=1hvr60)
---
| | [](https://substack.com/app-link/post?publication_id=2550223&post_id=151708815&utm_source=substack&utm_medium=email&isFreemail=true&comments=true&token=eyJ1c2VyX2lkIjo5MDUwMTE5MiwicG9zdF9pZCI6MTUxNzA4ODE1LCJpYXQiOjE3MzE2OTc1NTcsImV4cCI6MTczNDI4OTU1NywiaXNzIjoicHViLTI1NTAyMjMiLCJzdWIiOiJwb3N0LXJlYWN0aW9uIn0.ze8zTtelLi7v52y6cl6p1ifyxLu5EqUpovMjFdZ8wwE&r=1hvr60&utm_campaign=email-half-magic-comments&action=post-comment&utm_source=substack&utm_medium=email)
---
| | [](https://substack.com/app-link/post?publication_id=2550223&post_id=151708815&utm_source=substack&utm_medium=email&utm_content=share&utm_campaign=email-share&action=share&triggerShare=true&isFreemail=true&r=1hvr60&token=eyJ1c2VyX2lkIjo5MDUwMTE5MiwicG9zdF9pZCI6MTUxNzA4ODE1LCJpYXQiOjE3MzE2OTc1NTcsImV4cCI6MTczNDI4OTU1NywiaXNzIjoicHViLTI1NTAyMjMiLCJzdWIiOiJwb3N0LXJlYWN0aW9uIn0.ze8zTtelLi7v52y6cl6p1ifyxLu5EqUpovMjFdZ8wwE)
---
| | [](https://substack..l8TWSImhXVYfLe-4cda3aCUVghlJwh78pV3LSOvphnc?&utm_source=substack&utm_medium=email)
---
| | [READ IN APP](https://open.substack.com/pub/qasimrashid/p/trump-nominees-are-not-just-a-joke?utm_source=email&redirect=app-store&utm_campaign=email-read-in-app)
---
A _kakistocracy_ is defined a "_government by the least suitable or competent citizens of a state_." Donald Trump's nominees to key cabinet positions represent the unholy fusion of incompetence, white supremacy, and cruelty--a living breathing example of kakistocracy. And while MAGAs love to lecture the world about "meritocracy," Trump's shortlist for several critical roles doesn't just defy meritocracy--it mocks it. It is a parade of unqualified individuals with deeply troubling accusations against them, yet they're being considered for immense power. Indeed, beyond mockery, their attempted appointments undermine the safety of our entire Republic.
**Let 's Address This.**
I am doing everything in my power to stave off fascism in the United States, and I welcome your support. **Subscribe below and join the movement.**
[ Upgrade to paid](https://substack..4AYzHQJIcBmC9ZpOYog1sg60cFRcJv-TzilsviWXTOk?&utm_medium=email&utm_source=subscribe-widget-preamble&utm_content=151708815)
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/a0cf609d-8354-4740-8ad4-ef68bc53ec47?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
(L-R) Gaetz, Hegseth, RFK, Huckabee
### Matt Gaetz: Nominee for US Attorney General
Matt Gaetz is a now former congressman from Florida, and is reportedly Trump's pick for Attorney General. The Attorney General's role is to serve as the nation's top law enforcement officer, overseeing the Department of Justice and safeguarding the rule of law. **So what are Gaetz 's qualifications for this role?**
None. He has never tried a single case in court. Not one. Gaetz's legal experience is virtually non-existent, yet Trump sees him fit to lead the entire Justice Department.
But it doesn't end there. Gaetz is also a credibly accused child sexual predator--[a fact attested to even by right wing media](https://substack.com/redirect/1fdb591e-c90e-449b-b8b6-2534e530a1e7?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg). Gaetz is a _former_ Congressman because he resigned two days before a damning ethics report was set to go public detailing allegations of sexual abuse he committed against a minor girl. Gaetz has been under investigation for several years for alleged sex trafficking of a minor and reportedly paying for sex with underage girls. His accomplices are already serving prison time for the same accusations. And though Gaetz denies the allegations, the fact that Trump would even consider him for Attorney General speaks volumes about MAGA's disregard for ethics or accountability.
### Pete Hegseth: Nominee for Secretary of Defense
The Secretary of Defense is responsible for overseeing the military, shaping national security policy, and making decisions that can affect billions of lives globally. This is a role typically filled by former Four Star Generals or leaders with a career in military strategy and policy. Donald Trump's reported pick for this critical role is Pete Hegseth, a Fox News personality. **So what are Hegseth 's qualifications for this role?**
Virtually none. Hegseth has never worked on defense policy. His experience with the military [includes being removed from President Biden's security detail due to lack of reliability and trust](https://substack.com/redirect/05fcdd99-b188-4338-b56b-a3cd98b26bc5?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg). Moreover, nothing in Hegseth's career includes the high-level strategic expertise necessary to lead the Department of Defense. Simply put, Hegseth is unqualified for the job.
And it doesn't stop there. Like Gaetz, Hegseth carries deeply troubling baggage. He is a [credibly accused sexual predator](https://substack.com/redirect/38eb5b44-6cc7-49a3-90ca-364c7c79bb25?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg), with allegations of misconduct that would disqualify any reasonable candidate from consideration for such an important role. And while he flaunts his Christian faith, he's apparently [cheated on all three of his wives, had children out of wedlock](https://substack.com/redirect/8bbb3aef-7d72-4bad-97e5-f50e3fc9a15c?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg), and that's even before the sexual abuse reports. Yet here he is, being touted as Trump's choice for Secretary of Defense.
### R.F.K., Jr.: Nominee for Health and Human Services
The Secretary of Health and Human Services (HHS) is one of the most critical positions in the federal government, responsible for overseeing the nation's public health, social services, and healthcare systems. This role involves managing agencies like the CDC, FDA, and NIH, all of which are central to safeguarding the health and well-being of millions of Americans--as we learned first hand during COVID. Trump's pick for Secretary of Health and Human Services is Robert F. Kennedy Jr. **So what are Kennedy 's qualifications for this role?**
None. RFK is a man with zero experience in health policy. Worse, [Kennedy is an anti-vaxxer whose dangerous propaganda reportedly fueled a devastating measles outbreak in Samoa](https://substack.com/redirect/b0743376-cdd0-4bc8-baeb-fb585d7ccfb3?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg), resulting in unnecessary suffering of thousands and death of nearly 100 children. And just like Gaetz and Hegseth, [Kennedy too, is a credibly accused sexual predator](https://substack.com/redirect/cf5f5825-f46c-4be2-a9df-5bec55e25907?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg). Elevating someone like Kennedy to oversee America's healthcare system, especially as up to 1000 Americans a day are still dying of COVID, is a surefire way to increase death and suffering.
### Mike Huckabee: Nominee for Ambassador to Israel
The Ambassador to Israel is a critical diplomatic position, especially given the fraught and sensitive nature of U.S.-Israel relations. Trump's reported pick for this role is former Arkansas Governor Mike Huckabee. **So what are Huckabee 's qualifications for this role?**
Virtually none. Huckabee's track record reveals a man deeply unfit for diplomacy. He has made [public comments claiming Palestinians do not exist](https://substack.com/redirect/2472ede1-5adb-4115-97c1-d36c270e7943?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg), a stance so dehumanizing and extreme that it directly undermines the United States' ability to mediate in the region. How can someone with such an appalling lack of respect for an entire people group represent America on the global stage--especially as Palestinians already suffer genocide and war crimes?
But there's more. Huckabee also has a troubling history of enabling corruption and abuse. He helped pardon a man accused of Medicare fraud [and enabling the sexual abuse of children](https://substack.com/redirect/21cf4b90-431e-4ae0-8dc8-fc6161c00356?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg). The gravity of accusations necessitate detailing the criminal report against Ted Suhl, the man for whom Huckabee secured a [pardon](https://substack.com/redirect/21cf4b90-431e-4ae0-8dc8-fc6161c00356?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg):
> The [55-page complaint](https://substack.com/redirect/e676aa20-62e6-483e-ad87-342a593fb5d4?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) in the U.S. District Court for the Eastern District of Arkansas in Little Rock focuses on allegations of sexual abuse, including "innumerable incidents of fondling of genitals and oral rape," by the camp's director of social services, Emmett Presley. Camp leadership, including Suhl, were aware the licensed counselor "habitually raped and sexually molested minor male residents."
These actions are not just ethical and criminal failings--they are disqualifications for any public office, let alone an ambassadorship on the global stage.
### The Hypocrisy of MAGA's "Meritocracy"
Gaetz, Hegseth, Kennedy, and Huckabee have four things in common:
1. They are wholly unqualified for the roles Trump has reportedly chosen them for.
2. They are all wealthy, white men with connections to Trump's inner circle.
3. They all face credible accusations of grotesque sexual abuse or enabling harm to others.
4. All those failings are excused as they are nominated to prestigious roles of immense power.

An Attorney General who ignores the rule of law, a Defense Secretary unfit to manage global threats, a Health Secretary that doesn't believe in medical science, and an Ambassador who inflames tensions in one of the world's most volatile regions. These are not just bad choices--they are catastrophic ones that will destroy our Republic.
And I can go on. Elon Musk, [another man credibly accused of sexual assault by at least eight women](https://substack.com/redirect/5481b8e4-194b-4e18-be2b-8da407be5956?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg), now co-leads allegedly new Department of Governmental Efficiency. Stephen Miller, [a man whose own uncle acknowledges he is an extremist](https://substack.com/redirect/bd8b24ad-e85f-4362-a9b4-5e7575cb5a06?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg), in a lead policy role. And let's not forget the original unqualified hire, JD Vance, a man who previously referred to Trump as "[America's Hitler](https://substack.com/redirect/b27df600-b517-44b4-a2e8-f0f2337d3150?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)."
And while MAGA politicians and pundits lecture Black and brown communities about "meritocracy" and about "diversity, equity, and inclusion," these appointments reveal the real values of the MAGA movement. This is not about merit--it is about loyalty to Trump and the preservation of white supremacy at all costs. These attempted appointments are a reminder once more that every MAGA accusation is a confession.
### Conclusion
With Trump set to return to the White House, these appointments represent not just incompetence, but a deliberate assault on the principles of justice, security, and democracy. The MAGA vision of "meritocracy" is clear: reward the powerful, protect white male supremacy, turn a blind eye to the harm their choices inflict on everyone else, and lecture Black and brown people about the need to work harder.
The hypocrisy and incompetence is a danger to our nation's future. We deserve leaders who are qualified, ethical, and committed to serving _all_ Americans, not just the wealthy and well-connected. And we must demand better before it's too late.

clean_body: They lack qualifications, have histories of sexual abuse, have zero regard for human rights, and point to a broader MAGA hypocrisy | | ---|---|--- | | | Forwarded this email? ? for more ? Thank you for being an awesome subscriber! When possible, I hope you'll consider upgrading to a $6/mo or $50/year subscription! They lack qualifications, have histories of sexual abuse, have zero regard for human rights, and point to a broader MAGA hypocrisy | | | Nov 15 | | | | | | | | | | | | A kakistocracy is defined a "government by the least suitable or competent citizens of a state." Donald Trump's nominees to key cabinet positions represent the unholy fusion of incompetence, white supremacy, and cruelty--a living breathing example of kakistocracy. And while MAGAs love to lecture the world about "meritocracy," Trump's shortlist for several critical roles doesn't just defy meritocracy--it mocks it. It is a parade of unqualified individuals with deeply troubling accusations against them, yet they're being considered for immense power. Indeed, beyond mockery, their attempted appointments undermine the safety of our entire Republic. Let 's Address This. I am doing everything in my power to stave off fascism in the United States, and I welcome your support. Subscribe below and join the movement. | | ---|---|--- (L-R) Gaetz, Hegseth, RFK, Huckabee Matt Gaetz: Nominee for US Attorney General Matt Gaetz is a now former congressman from Florida, and is reportedly Trump's pick for Attorney General. The Attorney General's role is to serve as the nation's top law enforcement officer, overseeing the Department of Justice and safeguarding the rule of law. So what are Gaetz 's qualifications for this role? None. He has never tried a single case in court. Not one. Gaetz's legal experience is virtually non-existent, yet Trump sees him fit to lead the entire Justice Department. But it doesn't end there. Gaetz is also a credibly accused child sexual predator--. Gaetz is a former Congressman because he resigned two days before a damning ethics report was set to go public detailing allegations of sexual abuse he committed against a minor girl. Gaetz has been under investigation for several years for alleged sex trafficking of a minor and reportedly paying for sex with underage girls. His accomplices are already serving prison time for the same accusations. And though Gaetz denies the allegations, the fact that Trump would even consider him for Attorney General speaks volumes about MAGA's disregard for ethics or accountability. Pete Hegseth: Nominee for Secretary of Defense The Secretary of Defense is responsible for overseeing the military, shaping national security policy, and making decisions that can affect billions of lives globally. This is a role typically filled by former Four Star Generals or leaders with a career in military strategy and policy. Donald Trump's reported pick for this critical role is Pete Hegseth, a Fox News personality. So what are Hegseth 's qualifications for this role? Virtually none. Hegseth has never worked on defense policy. His experience with the military . Moreover, nothing in Hegseth's career includes the high-level strategic expertise necessary to lead the Department of Defense. Simply put, Hegseth is unqualified for the job. And it doesn't stop there. Like Gaetz, Hegseth carries deeply troubling baggage. He is a , with allegations of misconduct that would disqualify any reasonable candidate from consideration for such an important role. And while he flaunts his Christian faith, he's apparently , and that's even before the sexual abuse reports. Yet here he is, being touted as Trump's choice for Secretary of Defense. R.F.K., Jr.: Nominee for Health and Human Services The Secretary of Health and Human Services (HHS) is one of the most critical positions in the federal government, responsible for overseeing the nation's public health, social services, and healthcare systems. This role involves managing agencies like the CDC, FDA, and NIH, all of which are central to safeguarding the health and well-being of millions of Americans--as we learned first hand during COVID. Trump's pick for Secretary of Health and Human Services is Robert F. Kennedy Jr. So what are Kennedy 's qualifications for this role? None. RFK is a man with zero experience in health policy. Worse, , resulting in unnecessary suffering of thousands and death of nearly 100 children. And just like Gaetz and Hegseth, . Elevating someone like Kennedy to oversee America's healthcare system, especially as up to 1000 Americans a day are still dying of COVID, is a surefire way to increase death and suffering. Mike Huckabee: Nominee for Ambassador to Israel The Ambassador to Israel is a critical diplomatic position, especially given the fraught and sensitive nature of U.S.-Israel relations. Trump's reported pick for this role is former Arkansas Governor Mike Huckabee. So what are Huckabee 's qualifications for this role?** Virtually none. Huckabee's track record reveals a man deeply unfit for diplomacy. He has made , a stance so dehumanizing and extreme that it directly undermines the United States' ability to mediate in the region. How can someone with such an appalling lack of respect for an entire people group represent America on the global stage--especially as Palestinians already suffer genocide and war crimes? But there's more. Huckabee also has a troubling history of enabling corruption and abuse. He helped pardon a man accused of Medicare fraud . The gravity of accusations necessitate detailing the criminal report against Ted Suhl, the man for whom Huckabee secured a : The in the U.S. District Court for the Eastern District of Arkansas in Little Rock focuses on allegations of sexual abuse, including "innumerable incidents of fondling of genitals and oral rape," by the camp's director of social services, Emmett Presley. Camp leadership, including Suhl, were aware the licensed counselor "habitually raped and sexually molested minor male residents." These actions are not just ethical and criminal failings--they are disqualifications for any public office, let alone an ambassadorship on the global stage. The Hypocrisy of MAGA's "Meritocracy" Gaetz, Hegseth, Kennedy, and Huckabee have four things in common: 1. They are wholly unqualified for the roles Trump has reportedly chosen them for. 2. They are all wealthy, white men with connections to Trump's inner circle. 3. They all face credible accusations of grotesque sexual abuse or enabling harm to others. 4. All those failings are excused as they are nominated to prestigious roles of immense power. An Attorney General who ignores the rule of law, a Defense Secretary unfit to manage global threats, a Health Secretary that doesn't believe in medical science, and an Ambassador who inflames tensions in one of the world's most volatile regions. These are not just bad choices--they are catastrophic ones that will destroy our Republic. And I can go on. Elon Musk, , now co-leads allegedly new Department of Governmental Efficiency. Stephen Miller, , in a lead policy role. And let's not forget the original unqualified hire, JD Vance, a man who previously referred to Trump as "." And while MAGA politicians and pundits lecture Black and brown communities about "meritocracy" and about "diversity, equity, and inclusion," these appointments reveal the real values of the MAGA movement. This is not about merit--it is about loyalty to Trump and the preservation of white supremacy at all costs. These attempted appointments are a reminder once more that every MAGA accusation is a confession. Conclusion With Trump set to return to the White House, these appointments represent not just incompetence, but a deliberate assault on the principles of justice, security, and democracy. The MAGA vision of "meritocracy" is clear: reward the powerful, protect white male supremacy, turn a blind eye to the harm their choices inflict on everyone else, and lecture Black and brown people about the need to work harder. The hypocrisy and incompetence is a danger to our nation's future. We deserve leaders who are qualified, ethical, and committed to serving all Americans, not just the wealthy and well-connected. And we must demand better before it's too late. Let's Address This with Qasim Rashid is a reader-supported publication. # [Don't let anti-vaccine nut RFK Jr take over health care in America](https://default.salsalabs.org/T225e031a-34b0-4ef6-8bc0-d91d69330dee/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)
---
| | [](https://default.salsalabs.org/T1ebaeeb2-e88a-43ca-89ed-77dc84dbbf80/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)
---
| | | You may know RFK Jr. as the guy who found a dead bear on the road and stuck it in his car trunk to eat later. And then went to a steak dinner, and decided to leave the bear in Central Park. He's very, very weird. And he's got some very, very weird opinions re: health care, including vaccine skepticism (aka, "being a moron"). And opposing fluoride in water, the single-most effective step against tooth decay taken in the last 50 years. And Donald Trump wants to put him in charge of the department of Health and Human Services. He wants to let him fight to reduce vaccination rates, and unleash new waves of measles, polio and god knows what else. And wreak havoc across the health care spectrum. In short, putting him in charge of health care is like putting an arsonist in charge of the fire department. And there is no way in hell we should do it. [**Add your name, urge the Senate to reject his nomination, and don't let anti-vaccine nut RFK Jr take over health care in America.**](https://default.salsalabs.org/T5269661f-bfe4-4261-8cb1-8722d0c4c968/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)

subject: Right-wing media gleefully embraces Trump’s terrifying cabinet picks
body:
Even Republicans are worried about Trump’s more extreme choices. Right-wing media hosts are calling them “the Avengers.”

[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/97154182/512458847/2130526953?refcode=emwrapper&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTkvMS8xMDc4NzgiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiNmViNmYyY2MtODVhMy1lZjExLTg4ZDAtNjA0NWJkZDYyZGI2IiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=-M4KYtRrshYyXcF-kipWpvkwgCMOs5I62cor8V_gb9g=&emci=66b6f2cc-85a3-ef11-88d0-6045bdd62db6&emdi=6eb6f2cc-85a3-ef11-88d0-6045bdd62db6&ceid=14016711)
Peter **–**
This week, Donald Trump unveiled his new cabinet picks—and they’re as extreme as we feared.
* Robert F. Kennedy Jr., a vaccine skeptic and COVID conspiracy theorist, is nominated to lead Health and Human Services.
* Tulsi Gabbard, known for ties to Putin, is tapped for Director of National Intelligence.
* Pete Hegseth, a Fox and Friends host who opposes women in combat, is set to become Secretary of Defense.
* **And perhaps most concerning, Matt Gaetz—investigated by the DOJ for sex trafficking minors—is nominated for Attorney General.**

These picks have set off bipartisan alarms. Some Republicans are hesitating to back them, with Senators Lisa Murkowski and Susan Collins warning Gaetz may struggle to pass Senate confirmation.
Senior Pentagon officials have voiced grave concerns over Gabbard’s and Hegseth’s utter lack of experience.
**So, if there’s this much worry, why do Trump’s picks still stand a strong chance of being confirmed?**
[**The answer lies in Trump’s biggest asset in winning the 2024 election: right-wing media. If you support COURIER’s mission to hold Fox News and the far-right accountable for their role in undermining our democracy, can you chip in $25 now?**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/97154183/512458848/-593472309?refcode=20241115-EM-TrumpsCabinet&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTkvMS8xMDc4NzgiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiNmViNmYyY2MtODVhMy1lZjExLTg4ZDAtNjA0NWJkZDYyZGI2IiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=-M4KYtRrshYyXcF-kipWpvkwgCMOs5I62cor8V_gb9g=)
While bipartisan leaders express concern, right-wing media has been celebrating:
* Fox anchor Jesse Watters openly said, “We’re excited. And I’m not just saying that because I know the entire cabinet and I’ll be asking for special favors.”
* Newsmax host Joe Pinion declared his excitement for Trump’s “record-breaking” deportation plans.
* Steve Gruber from Real America’s Voice praised Trump’s cabinet as “an all-star group... like the Avengers.”

This isn’t just support—it’s a coordinated effort to normalize and legitimize these extreme choices. Right-wing media will paint Hegseth’s unqualified, anti-woman views as “patriotic,” downplay Gaetz’s ethical concerns, and present RFK Jr.’s dangerous conspiracies as bold thinking.
Their agenda won’t stop with the base; it will infiltrate the mainstream, subtly reshaping how these picks are viewed, making it easier for them to gain confirmation.
**This is where COURIER (and you) come in.**
COURIER was founded to counter the dangerous influence of right-wing media by reaching voters where they are online. Our 11 state-based newsrooms in battlegrounds like Pennsylvania, Arizona, and Michigan bring accurate, values-driven reporting to millions, fighting misinformation with news that matters.
With Trump’s media allies now closer than ever to his administration, expanding our reach has never been more urgent. Every contribution helps us grow, challenge right-wing narratives, and deliver honest, community-focused journalism.

Help me stop these bad actors once and for all
| | | [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/97154488/512459419/-2022193277?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk1618-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS84OTg0OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3NmE4NWY5OS04NmEzLWVmMTEtODhkMC02MDQ1YmRkNjJkYjYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=ZXsVcGtYZaQqhkpo0FkReggqz7bISsKdfNRczPLqOrs=)

Peter, throughout my career, I've seen firsthand how bad actors can take advantage of unsuspecting people and their families.
When I took office as the first Black woman elected as New York attorney general, I swore that I'd stop at _nothing_ until these corrupt corporations and crooked individuals were brought to justice.
**And while I've stuck by my promise to fight against these malicious forces, they've only gotten more aggressive with their tactics.[With so much hanging in the balance this year, I need your help to _hold them accountable_ with your $5 donation before my $20,000 mid-month fundraising deadline.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/97154489/512459420/-2022193277?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&amount=5&refcode=jtk1618-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS84OTg0OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3NmE4NWY5OS04NmEzLWVmMTEtODhkMC02MDQ1YmRkNjJkYjYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=ZXsVcGtYZaQqhkpo0FkReggqz7bISsKdfNRczPLqOrs=)**
**• Hold them accountable** for cheating workers and exploiting families.
**• Hold them accountable** for trying to take away our reproductive rights.
**• Hold them accountable** for attempting to dismantle our democracy.
It's up to fearless fighters like us to take on these bad actors and **hold them accountable** for their crimes against the vulnerable and voiceless.

If we don't, then we run the risk of an unrecognizable future – one where our rights, livelihoods, and our very democracy are on the chopping block.
**Brave advocates like you have always stepped up in moments like this, Peter. And with my mid-month deadline quickly approaching, I'm calling on you to stand by my side so that I have the resources I need to stop these corrupt, powerful forces.**
**[Will you rush a donation of $5 or more right now toward my $20,000 goal so that we can make sure these bad actors are held accountable?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/97154490/512459421/-2022193277?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&amount=5&refcode=jtk1618-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS84OTg0OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3NmE4NWY5OS04NmEzLWVmMTEtODhkMC02MDQ1YmRkNjJkYjYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=ZXsVcGtYZaQqhkpo0FkReggqz7bISsKdfNRczPLqOrs=)**

| Our victory here in West Michigan was only possible because we connected with our community. **From every conversation on the doorstep to each message shared across our neighborhoods, we’ve built a bond around the issues that matter most:_protecting_ _access to healthcare, safeguarding reproductive rights, standing up for working families, and preserving our democracy._** [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/97154504/512459457/664569763?refcode=BLU_EM_HSC_2024-11-15_1&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzMvMS85NTY0MCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3NGE4NWY5OS04NmEzLWVmMTEtODhkMC02MDQ1YmRkNjJkYjYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=vvJaB5PfaQLvQTkqqSD6kBHh_ZmlbEt-M3q6BwUBvDo=)

West Michigan has become a bright spot in our ability to make real progress. We’ve shown that when we come together around our shared values, we can accomplish so much–even in historically conservative districts. But sustaining this progress and preparing for what lies ahead will take continued commitment and resources.

From every conversation on the doorstep to each message shared across our neighborhoods, we’ve built a bond around the issues that matter most:protecting access to healthcare, safeguarding reproductive rights, standing up for working families, and preserving our democracy. = West Michigan has become a bright spot in our ability to make real progress. We’ve shown that when we come together around our shared values, we can accomplish so much–even in historically conservative districts. name: Team WFP
subject: The dust is still settling
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Working Families Party PAC (77 Sands St
clean_body: We believe WFP was built for this moment. | | | Peter, It’s now been a little more than a week since the election. And while the dust is still settling, most of the votes have now been fully counted in races nationwide. We've got a lot of work ahead of us — and so many of you have already let us know you are ready to join the fight. Tens of thousands of you from every state have joined virtual calls and organizing meetings with the Working Families Party over the past week to process the election results and plan together how we fight back. But we also know a lot of you may still be feeling angry, hopeless, or just checked out. Whatever you are feeling in this moment is okay. Whenever you're ready, we will be here as your political home. Because if there is one thing that is clear from last week's results it is that we need a political voice that represents and fights for working-class voters of every race. And we believe WFP was built for this moment. Despite the gloomy headlines, there were a number of important WFP victories worth celebrating in last week's election, like: Kam Smith , a Delaware WFP champion and human services professional who unseated the sitting Speaker of the House in a Democratic primary earlier this year; Ruwa Romman, a Georgia WFP champion, Palestinian-American and the first Muslim woman re-elected to her seat in a purple district in the Georgia House of Representatives by an 18 point margin; Monique Worrell , in Florida, who successfully reclaimed her State’s Attorney seat in Orange County after Gov. Ron DeSantis removed her from office in a shameless authoritarian power grab; And so, so many more. Or keep scrolling down to read about some more results from last week: In our effort in Congress... **Last year, WFP organized and launched two new broad labor and community coalitions to fill a much-needed field mobilization gap in blue states:Battleground New York and Battleground California. And in both states, those efforts ended up winning seats in multiple target districts. In New York, we picked up three new districts: Josh Riley in NY-19, John Mannion in NY-22, and Laura Gillen in NY-04. In California, winners included George Whitesides in CA-27 and Dave Min in CA-47, and we're still closely watching competitive races in other seats as the final mail ballots get counted. We also prioritized defense for WFP-endorsed incumbents in tough seats: Pat Ryan in NY-18, Jahana Hayes in CT-5, and Gabe Vazquez in NM-02. All three expanded their margins over two years ago. We’re disappointed that NJ WFP director Sue Altman fell short in NJ-7 in her uphill race. But we’re delighted to add a new WFP champion to Congress in Lateefah Simon in CA-12, who succeeds Barbara Lee. Further down the ballot... In Connecticut , WFP-endorsed Democrats picked up SIX Republican-held districts in the State House, thanks to campaigns from Nick Menapace , Rebecca Martinez , Kaitlyn Shake , Nick Gauthier , Ken Gucker , and MJ Shannon. We also re-elected three incumbents in the State Senate, Julie Kushner , Jan Hochadel , and Martha Marx. In Wisconsin , WFP candidates won four seats to help break the Republican supermajority: Angelina Cruz, Christian Phelps, Rep. Jenna Jacobson , and Rep. Robyn Vining. In Pennsylvania , Democrats held a bare majority in the state house before Election Day. Though WFP’s top Republican-district candidate Anna Thomas fell just short, Democrats held their ground and blocked Republicans from flipping the chamber. In Arizona , Republicans hold narrow majorities in both chambers. Unfortunately, Republicans actually slightly increased those majorities this cycle, with our top purple-district candidate Judy Schweibert falling short. However, WFP incumbents like Rep. Lorena Austin held their seats as other Dems lost. In New York : we elected three working class women of color, Claire Valdez , Gabriella Romero , and Larinda Hooks to the state legislature. In New Mexico : a slate of eight WFP champs defeated corporate Democrats in legislative primaries, including: Joseph Hernandez , Michelle Paulene Abeyta , Sarah Silva and Heather Berghmans. In California : our work to build WFP power in the legislature continues as we elected WFP champ Sade Elhawary to the state Assembly in Los Angeles. And one year ago in Virginia’s off-cycle legislative elections, WFP helped flip the Virginia House of Delegates after winning 5 of our 7 priority legislative primaries , including ousting two corporate Democratic incumbents. Lastly, we secured several wins at the municipal level... In Portland, Oregon, we helped elect Tiffany Koyama Lane, Angelita Morillo , and Mitch Green to City Council, securing a progressive majority for the first time in recent memory. And in Multnomah County, where Portland resides, Shannon Singleton and Meghan Moyer were elected to County Commissioner seats. In Seattle, WFP champAlexis Mercedes Rinck defeated a Chamber of Commerce-backed candidate for a seat on the Seattle City Council. WFP-endorsed Phoenix City Council candidate Anna Hernandez won a tough four-way race with 53% of the vote. And in Los Angeles, WFP-backed Ysabel Jurado , a tenants rights attorney, unseated Los Angeles City Councilmember Kevin de León. — We know that these wins may feel like a mere consolation prize. But the fact of the matter is that real change for working families isn’t exclusively or even mainly found in the halls of Congress or the White House. Stronger and more empathetic communities should ALWAYS be celebrated. And if you’re looking for a new political home or community of your own, we encourage you to join us. Our work isn’t over. It's just beginning. And we would love nothing more than for you to be a part of it going forward. In solidarity forever, Team WFP Thoughts? Feedback? We want to hear it. Reply directly to this email and let us know. This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. If you received this email as a forward and want to get the latest updates from the Working Families Party directly, The Working Families Party is the party of the multiracial working class, fighting for a nation that cares for all of us. Wanna learn more? And if you need to update your contact information, Other political groups have corporate donors. But we can pool our resources too. ** Paid for by Working Families Party PAC (77 Sands St. #6, Brooklyn, NY, 11201). | | Sent via . name: Raja Krishnamoorthi
subject: please, Peter
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Friends of Raja for Congress
body:
Peter, I know you’re tired. I know it’s been a long election cycle. But I need to be honest: **[_Democrats have to start this next election cycle off strong to flip the House and remove MAGA extremists from power in this next election. That’s why I’m aiming to raise another $1,628 before my Mid-Month Deadline to hit my goal and rebuild our grassroots movement. * **TOP NEWS**

"**Texas' top elected officials signal Texas could cut border spending after Trump takes office,** " Texas Tribune's **Alejandro Serrano** -- "Since President-elect **Donald Trump 's** victory last week, Gov. **Greg Abbott** and Lt. Gov. **Dan Patrick** -- the state's top two elected officials -- have signaled a new willingness to potentially scale back the state's historic spending on border security.

On the campaign trail, Trump vowed to crack down on illegal immigration by reimplementing policies from his first term while starting new ones, [like mass deportations](https://substack.com/redirect/d9d83ec7-adfa-4ae6-99ea-839964caf94b?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg).

[Abbott told reporters](https://substack.com/redirect/18e4c08c-65c0-4ef9-bf51-772e7892c4a3?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) last week that Texas will have to continue its border security measures as a "stopgap effort" during the time it takes Trump to implement his border and immigration policies. But once they are in place, Abbott said, Texas "will have the opportunity to consider" repurposing the state money it has plowed into [Operation Lone Star](https://substack.com/redirect/48b17c81-d39e-4691-a2a4-58bc24d652ab?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg), the multi-prong effort Abbott launched in 2021 shortly after President **Joe Biden** took office.

To date, OLS has cost $11 billion, and Abbott's office had asked lawmakers to [approve another $2.9 billion](https://substack.com/redirect/51b87778-d7c9-44ce-a59e-483f00505142?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) in the upcoming legislative session. Abbott now says OLS money could be used for things like property tax cuts or education.
[BECOME A PAID SUBSCRIBER: $7/mo](https://substack.com/redirect/231d3d8b-0226-43b8-bb6b-87f86bc5f7bc?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
"President Trump will provide a more secure border than any president in the history of the United States of America," Abbott said a day after the election. "I've had private talks with the president, and he's going to be stronger and better at securing the border than he was in his first term, which was very strong and effective."

Meanwhile, [Patrick also said](https://substack.com/redirect/25d94c73-877a-429c-a398-c309be9e4188?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) that Trump's victory could mean shifting spending priorities for the state.

"We had to do everything we could to protect our citizens," Patrick said in an interview with WFAA-TV in Dallas published Sunday. "We're going to be able to take a lot of that money now and put it back to our taxpayers, for roads, for water, for education, for health care, for all the things that we need that Joe Biden forced us to spend because he was letting millions of people cross the border."
[BECOME A PAID SUBSCRIBER: $70/yr](https://substack.com/redirect/231d3d8b-0226-43b8-bb6b-87f86bc5f7bc?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
It is unclear exactly how the [state's border spending breaks down](https://substack.com/redirect/d27b1014-909a-4a55-b4ec-23e924e978e8?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg), but the money has been used to surge Texas Department of Public Safety troopers and Texas National Guard troops to the border; send [busloads of migrants to cities run by Democrats](https://substack.com/redirect/9248a9d5-5d3e-4463-ad8e-6383d7d71b4d?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg); and bolster local governments that have joined the OLS effort through grants -- including sheriff's offices that used the money to hire deputies.

Even as the state's spending on border security has increased, [polling has shown](https://substack.com/redirect/6c58c304-f3a6-42a5-b7cf-2fd25be3839b?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) that Republican Texans feel the state could spend even more to secure the state's 1,254-mile border with Mexico.

Trump's victory "provides an enormous amount" of political cover to reduce spending now, said **James Henson** , director of the Texas Politics Project at UT Austin. And with an initiative so expensive, "it's hard not to feel like there's room for some reductions," he said.

"When you spend government funds, constituencies develop among those funds, and that's one of the reasons it's hard to cut back on spending," Henson added.

Other legislators have also indicated it might be time to cut back on border security spending at the state level." [Texas Tribune](https://substack.com/redirect/1f3ee42a-021b-414b-b083-21bd46d72125?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)

($5/mo or $50/yr or $199 lifetime) TOP NEWS "Texas' top elected officials signal Texas could cut border spending after Trump takes office, " Texas Tribune's Alejandro Serrano -- "Since President-elect Donald Trump 's victory last week, Gov. Greg Abbott and Lt. Gov. Dan Patrick -- the state's top two elected officials -- have signaled a new willingness to potentially scale back the state's historic spending on border security. On the campaign trail, Trump vowed to crack down on illegal immigration by reimplementing policies from his first term while starting new ones, . last week that Texas will have to continue its border security measures as a "stopgap effort" during the time it takes Trump to implement his border and immigration policies. But once they are in place, Abbott said, Texas "will have the opportunity to consider" repurposing the state money it has plowed into , the multi-prong effort Abbott launched in 2021 shortly after President Joe Biden took office. To date, OLS has cost $11 billion, and Abbott's office had asked lawmakers to in the upcoming legislative session. Abbott now says OLS money could be used for things like property tax cuts or education. "President Trump will provide a more secure border than any president in the history of the United States of America," Abbott said a day after the election. "I've had private talks with the president, and he's going to be stronger and better at securing the border than he was in his first term, which was very strong and effective." Meanwhile, that Trump's victory could mean shifting spending priorities for the state. "We had to do everything we could to protect our citizens," Patrick said in an interview with WFAA-TV in Dallas published Sunday. "We're going to be able to take a lot of that money now and put it back to our taxpayers, for roads, for water, for education, for health care, for all the things that we need that Joe Biden forced us to spend because he was letting millions of people cross the border." It is unclear exactly how the , but the money has been used to surge Texas Department of Public Safety troopers and Texas National Guard troops to the border; send ; and bolster local governments that have joined the OLS effort through grants -- including sheriff's offices that used the money to hire deputies. Even as the state's spending on border security has increased, that Republican Texans feel the state could spend even more to secure the state's 1,254-mile border with Mexico. Trump's victory "provides an enormous amount" of political cover to reduce spending now, said James Henson , director of the Texas Politics Project at UT Austin. And with an initiative so expensive, "it's hard not to feel like there's room for some reductions," he said. "When you spend government funds, constituencies develop among those funds, and that's one of the reasons it's hard to cut back on spending," Henson added. Other legislators have also indicated it might be time to cut back on border security spending at the state level." * **TOP NEWS**

"**Texas' top elected officials signal Texas could cut border spending after Trump takes office,** " Texas Tribune's **Alejandro Serrano** -- "Since President-elect **Donald Trump 's** victory last week, Gov. **Greg Abbott** and Lt. Gov. **Dan Patrick** -- the state's top two elected officials -- have signaled a new willingness to potentially scale back the state's historic spending on border security.

On the campaign trail, Trump vowed to crack down on illegal immigration by reimplementing policies from his first term while starting new ones, [like mass deportations](https://substack.com/redirect/08de2af0-cfe8-461c-8f45-6bfc1ffd664d?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg).

[Abbott told reporters](https://substack.com/redirect/42fd91b3-f795-4cf5-af6f-6be1b1d6be07?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) last week that Texas will have to continue its border security measures as a "stopgap effort" during the time it takes Trump to implement his border and immigration policies. But once they are in place, Abbott said, Texas "will have the opportunity to consider" repurposing the state money it has plowed into [Operation Lone Star](https://substack.com/redirect/49aed3ca-dd94-4c2b-bd90-62f23c45ce12?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg), the multi-prong effort Abbott launched in 2021 shortly after President **Joe Biden** took office.

To date, OLS has cost $11 billion, and Abbott's office had asked lawmakers to [approve another $2.9 billion](https://substack.com/redirect/780eaff2-feeb-4ce2-b361-6fbcb2f6d3a7?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) in the upcoming legislative session. Abbott now says OLS money could be used for things like property tax cuts or education.
[BECOME A PAID SUBSCRIBER: $7/mo](https://substack.com/redirect/41831f2c-ecdf-4918-9819-18ce37e18e59?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
"President Trump will provide a more secure border than any president in the history of the United States of America," Abbott said a day after the election. "I've had private talks with the president, and he's going to be stronger and better at securing the border than he was in his first term, which was very strong and effective."

Meanwhile, [Patrick also said](https://substack.com/redirect/0ce68dda-7945-4ca0-9705-5ea9a4e7865e?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) that Trump's victory could mean shifting spending priorities for the state.

"We had to do everything we could to protect our citizens," Patrick said in an interview with WFAA-TV in Dallas published Sunday. "We're going to be able to take a lot of that money now and put it back to our taxpayers, for roads, for water, for education, for health care, for all the things that we need that Joe Biden forced us to spend because he was letting millions of people cross the border."
[BECOME A PAID SUBSCRIBER: $70/yr](https://substack.com/redirect/41831f2c-ecdf-4918-9819-18ce37e18e59?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
It is unclear exactly how the [state's border spending breaks down](https://substack.com/redirect/5f9d7c4d-73a0-4122-ad91-a0d6f30a9a25?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg), but the money has been used to surge Texas Department of Public Safety troopers and Texas National Guard troops to the border; send [busloads of migrants to cities run by Democrats](https://substack.com/redirect/4835fbda-6e1b-491c-8ea3-51b41e910f28?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg); and bolster local governments that have joined the OLS effort through grants -- including sheriff's offices that used the money to hire deputies.

Even as the state's spending on border security has increased, [polling has shown](https://substack.com/redirect/89ecc029-d517-460f-bb04-4d75cb49addb?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) that Republican Texans feel the state could spend even more to secure the state's 1,254-mile border with Mexico.

Trump's victory "provides an enormous amount" of political cover to reduce spending now, said **James Henson** , director of the Texas Politics Project at UT Austin. And with an initiative so expensive, "it's hard not to feel like there's room for some reductions," he said.

"When you spend government funds, constituencies develop among those funds, and that's one of the reasons it's hard to cut back on spending," Henson added.

Other legislators have also indicated it might be time to cut back on border security spending at the state level." [Texas Tribune](https://substack.com/redirect/e0b81d47-08c2-4fec-bb8d-5da2f1824f6a?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)

"President Trump will provide a more secure border than any president in the history of the United States of America," Abbott said a day after the election. "I've had private talks with the president, and he's going to be stronger and better at securing the border than he was in his first term, which was very strong and effective." Meanwhile, that Trump's victory could mean shifting spending priorities for the state. "We had to do everything we could to protect our citizens," Patrick said in an interview with WFAA-TV in Dallas published Sunday. "We're going to be able to take a lot of that money now and put it back to our taxpayers, for roads, for water, for education, for health care, for all the things that we need that Joe Biden forced us to spend because he was letting millions of people cross the border." It is unclear exactly how the , but the money has been used to surge Texas Department of Public Safety troopers and Texas National Guard troops to the border; send ; and bolster local governments that have joined the OLS effort through grants -- including sheriff's offices that used the money to hire deputies. Even as the state's spending on border security has increased, that Republican Texans feel the state could spend even more to secure the state's 1,254-mile border with Mexico. Trump's victory "provides an enormous amount" of political cover to reduce spending now, said James Henson , director of the Texas Politics Project at UT Austin. And with an initiative so expensive, "it's hard not to feel like there's room for some reductions," he said. "When you spend government funds, constituencies develop among those funds, and that's one of the reasons it's hard to cut back on spending," Henson added. Other legislators have also indicated it might be time to cut back on border security spending at the state level." | | Peter, like millions, the Presidential Election results made my heart drop. I spent too long refreshing the news, caught in a sense of despair I hadn't felt in a long time. We face a troubling reality: Our country has chosen to embrace a dangerous leader in Donald Trump, and Florida fell short of codifying abortion rights. These four years will be challenging, with significant setbacks for progress on climate change, gun violence, housing, civil and human rights, and economic equity. And all that while, Trump will continue to thrive on fear, scapegoating marginalized communities while the ultra-wealthy evade accountability for the real issues of working people and the poor. **Fear is a powerful motivator, Peter._But it is often short-lived._** Even in my deep disappointment, I believe our struggle will never succumb to despair. The blood of our ancestors and the resilience of our souls remind us that a better world is always possible. **Hope is both a feeling and a choice. Though I did not wake up feeling hopeful after the election, now I choose hope. And I’m asking the same of you.** [**_They want us to surrender our fight because that's when we truly lose. Instead, we’re going to unite to build a movement that rejects the politics of scarcity and embraces one of abundance and love. clean_body: | ~ | | Peter, like millions, the Presidential Election results made my heart drop. I spent too long refreshing the news, caught in a sense of despair I hadn't felt in a long time. We face a troubling reality: Our country has chosen to embrace a dangerous leader in Donald Trump, and Florida fell short of codifying abortion rights. These four years will be challenging, with significant setbacks for progress on climate change, gun violence, housing, civil and human rights, and economic equity. And all that while, Trump will continue to thrive on fear, scapegoating marginalized communities while the ultra-wealthy evade accountability for the real issues of working people and the poor. Fear is a powerful motivator, Peter.But it is often short-lived. Even in my deep disappointment, I believe our struggle will never succumb to despair. The blood of our ancestors and the resilience of our souls remind us that a better world is always possible. Hope is both a feeling and a choice. Though I did not wake up feeling hopeful after the election, now I choose hope. And I’m asking the same of you. ~ If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | ~ | ~ | ~ | | | ~~ Maxwell Frost | ~ Maxwell Alejandro Frost is an organizer representing Florida's 10th Congressional District. In 2022, he made history to become the first member of Gen Z elected to Congress. Maxwell isn't taking any corporate PAC, big sugar, or fossil fuel contributions. He needs your help to protect this seat for poor and working-class people. Will you join our historic movement today? | ~~ ~~ ~ | PAID FOR BY MAXWELL FROST FOR CONGRESS Maxwell Frost for Congress PO Box 772671 Orlando, FL 32877-2671 United States | Email is an important way for us to communicate with our supporters. subject: TRUMP! TRUMP! TRUMP!
body:
Help set Trump’s priorities
| | | | ******[](http://links.newsletter.conservativedirect.com/u/click?_t=5b1853ae48754bee8f471363fe4933a9&_m=9c5a86d43b58421c890229b824d86d13&_e=QdVjadkDolXLzs6mjaWzo_ASj75F6vGIgE9oN-_GBDHoDTo5UU8uRwT2S5rIG0Po-VCkBn265HOVpu6b02OLn6F4bXxsAJKFCe0crQrgQD5EPzZdmzYyHRUzhW9KyLaaVTsZXkGJzgo8xoBLADUNxCVCEX6WsRz5Gjc7I04bwVaIMPxIrGZjyDIU1U8prDL_fuRTxUqOZ8r7r5yqJu2jF_G7FY8PYWv00is0j-suBgrGTBwj_JgoAKfczUHt3XuveoyrOVpXpMGTh9AvpFiUdOwv_l9UbMasU9JQnSUlf2jqdtRBRLA2FLhVx__6D_USj0N5-gn4oykhLn09a1uOugYWg3vmLXWHQt9Gu2izBtiMxWs4s2dTSL6cw55wqmSyaxiGmbYeMZsq18XpivVlTA%3D%3D)******
**BREAKING NEWS: PRESIDENT TRUMP WON!**
Peter, I invite you to join me, Pastor Paula White, and the National Faith Advisory Board in the crucial mission to defend our faith.
I'm calling on you to join our Inaugural Faith Committee. Together, we can help set the agenda for President Trump's second term. Through prayer and unity, we can shape a future rooted in faith, and make sure our priorities are put FIRST!
[JOIN THE INAUGURAL FAITH COMMITTEE](http://links.newsletter.conservativedirect.com/u/click?_t=5b1853ae48754bee8f471363fe4933a9&_m=9c5a86d43b58421c890229b824d86d13&_e=QdVjadkDolXLzs6mjaWzo_ASj75F6vGIgE9oN-_GBDHoDTo5UU8uRwT2S5rIG0Po-VCkBn265HOVpu6b02OLn6F4bXxsAJKFCe0crQrgQD5EPzZdmzYyHRUzhW9KyLaaVTsZXkGJzgo8xoBLADUNxCVCEX6WsRz5Gjc7I04bwVaIMPxIrGZjyDIU1U8prDL_fuRTxUqOZ8r7r5yqJu2jF_G7FY8PYWv00is0j-suBgrGTBwj_JgoAKfczUHt3XuvJTfXEd7OHJ_5Zqqv_IfLmlrSrC9BUm9m46totSrLw_wW5IasNCbOl2N9xSblwQY-6ZAq5yhifJT3CK1ioqV7dZFhVXgIn1qw0ouYxIlkyzvNaxayTeRrhy5YFTMsoBiGblOpg9WikrFYP0009iJIOA%3D%3D)
As President Trump's personal pastor, I have witnessed firsthand his unwavering commitment to defending our faith. During his first term, he championed religious freedom, and now, as he prepares for his second, it is up to us to set the agenda.
**Will you join our Inaugural Faith Committee?**
******[YES!](http://links.newsletter.conservativedirect.com/u/click?_t=5b1853ae48754bee8f471363fe4933a9&_m=9c5a86d43b58421c890229b824d86d13&_e=QdVjadkDolXLzs6mjaWzo_ASj75F6vGIgE9oN-_GBDHoDTo5UU8uRwT2S5rIG0Po-VCkBn265HOVpu6b02OLn6F4bXxsAJKFCe0crQrgQD5EPzZdmzYyHRUzhW9KyLaaVTsZXkGJzgo8xoBLADUNxCVCEX6WsRz5Gjc7I04bwVaIMPxIrGZjyDIU1U8prDL_fuRTxUqOZ8r7r5yqJu2jF_G7FY8PYWv00is0j-suBgrGTBwj_JgoAKfczUHt3XuvO-_sh9tRAoHoqUk9YcEMLXHcRd27fD3eaTcJMN48TwnAzH9klcKFrHIF5lrPOLreOjK-S5NdbTIGQTrsy73KRlpDyw58aKl9WoLsOKgbSo84fLkZgHhxK6jrG42RwHHjCDebbYdkd6afFNN0LOPxwA%3D%3D)** **** President Trump stood for us in this election; now, let us stand for him. The power of our collective voice can influence government policies and create generational change. Join us in this mission of hope and resilience.
We need to make sure we provide him with the resources he needs to represent People of Faith in his second term. [**I 'm going to share this list of priorities with him, so PLEASE make sure I have your response by MIDNIGHT TONIGHT! >>**](http://links.newsletter.conservativedirect.com/u/click?_t=5b1853ae48754bee8f471363fe4933a9&_m=9c5a86d43b58421c890229b824d86d13&_e=QdVjadkDolXLzs6mjaWzo_ASj75F6vGIgE9oN-_GBDHoDTo5UU8uRwT2S5rIG0Po-VCkBn265HOVpu6b02OLn6F4bXxsAJKFCe0crQrgQD5EPzZdmzYyHRUzhW9KyLaaVTsZXkGJzgo8xoBLADUNxCVCEX6WsRz5Gjc7I04bwVaIMPxIrGZjyDIU1U8prDL_fuRTxUqOZ8r7r5yqJu2jF_G7FY8PYWv00is0j-suBgrGTBwj_JgoAKfczUHt3XuvwptV01MJllCv389DMntlPtpet-uaNe3yNPcLZix2App0rGLANkZRcrlTkRtTiCAESew2FZk2fSOJgTE4aeVKXefnK9NbmEDcdBfoL15EkuGXG9a1dQwPJCdARNaA4hQx32vmWugn8aFI9no20bH8mg%3D%3D)
In faith and unity,
Pastor Paula White National Faith Advisory Board

name: Kamala Harris
subject: We will continue to wage our fight at the voting booth, in the courts and in the public square.
body:
Right now, there are still a number of critical races across the country that are either too close to call, or within the margin of recounts or certain legal challenges. | | |
---
[ ](https://click.contact.kamalaharris.com/ss/c/u001.iIBo0N5fSFzEFL40Tn-vtbMETCUYClkOrOh9-SNJfqtlGpBLNM9DdY-TrFptiHSq-L9c1ri9sVau_yBdU3bjlcgt11yaiPOxQivUjcB0wPJ7iVBr1KD5Kw_Au8YlZRNISvbRqmnpC5FHTydhRX9UzdPO5OFb8ro1RLgK5SB1PHGk_tR88FEYU8_tcCfXI1ekfJADp_KPGd7JVor3teve762tdfPTwuncN9SJyyXQWs0mkD4cU6mSL-ZvDs1JiZd-pMFlJxhCbzAAp-F4EaVlJjlUNn5dOB5XAxuUNMpJr_-4eiEAf4PDFRepb8gGvlldOwh8rhx5KMFexqAsnTafiDcgeUvpaBbp9kuSVUbwwI2uJWkLZOtfCHQHK4bQFH_5xim5dmSVuzmNI20NXhZl2CaqzRv7ZCXKIs6LtcDpjI7dHqjEHt37OfcZQxKW8nAl/4bh/N7WSvduvRfGROTTFnGXTJQ/h0/h001.mRMyBRk-sn-t3T-QTwpmAudZL1MpcCi8eeMaWpbxsuU)
As you know, Peter, I started out as a prosecutor. Throughout my career I have seen people at some of the worst times in their lives. People who had suffered great harm and great pain and yet found within themselves the strength to fight for justice, for themselves, and for others. Their courage served as an inspiration to me and I hope it will serve as an inspiration to _you._ You see: The light of America's promise will burn bright as long as long as we keep fighting. This fight for freedom, for opportunity, for fairness, and the dignity of all people is not one I intend to give up. _I am asking you not to either._ **Right now, there are still a number of critical races across the country that are either too close to call, or within the margin of recounts or certain legal challenges.** [**So, if it makes sense for your budget, I am asking you to send a $50 contribution to the Harris Fight Fund program today. Whatever you give will help Democratic candidates who need to protect their victories.**](https://click.contact.kamalaharris.com/ss/c/u001.NV3IV8RXB3BPG-RgoenRivizIuY7_hyRTlr0Ev1A4jw19nK6Yk904jr2ZtjiO4RdFcI_M9LJtmDQgg6k1hTm6jQbzg-6wDxcSdomrZjR4-HbQEHdX-Z1MMnekcH0u3UbOM_N4S9Z6ZkonWXuUBHUv6-kCUjXA7hBR7LPJco7b4a92iXBrl1UguB8G20MUjfSfel-TGuGw3Y2d5FDDA9fekE997d15_n7pTQLtyCgKuuWhzgZYqXX5441REn-8BaeJLZD6VqEHY6dWl_2CjkKjI-xFcvsJtI5Z0cfD0L91ppl14wmT0sF6mAU6keexoepajPgiOlXNYjqvUg4F7tDKRZOclmB313p5E70ikAnUoFNovFrdIg0pw3u3S25lU1jhcm_XP5i7RR5a5QSoivz8RmspKHVrOSXsR8B7icVv2bMDshWx8M3TuSsrYytjEd_FUFNnacpWrnC7q61_ufNVXe8MJMkewu65FJNfPaGrH5kIKNy-VO6IfzBfI200hBJLxvekdizj2q3l2K8RmaXDmIdBc9UBRHyhr4IK818JaQPOB-K59tN0M3hgO9lcB5j-iCWPJvMJPYKvpwnV8XHBtAUBpQ6AMn1wPXsS0mA5AOWbdQRel26XdvgCUEVd0cPB_5m8xWXr5KCpwkFzksldupZRv3KVawiBcC4fG9HUx2DLeCKq0rAZhv9-NNCDqUS/4bh/N7WSvduvRfGROTTFnGXTJQ/h1/h001.MNMZGAfDGt8RlNqEAj3r4xuCq47SoXZ1DAUUV7_9ZGA) _If you've saved payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_ | | [$50 >>](https://click.contact.kamalaharris.com/ss/c/u001.NV3IV8RXB3BPG-RgoenRivizIuY7_hyRTlr0Ev1A4jw19nK6Yk904jr2ZtjiO4RdFcI_M9LJtmDQgg6k1hTm6jQbzg-6wDxcSdomrZjR4-HbQEHdX-Z1MMnekcH0u3UbOM_N4S9Z6ZkonWXuUBHUv6-kCUjXA7hBR7LPJco7b4a92iXBrl1UguB8G20MUjfSfel-TGuGw3Y2d5FDDA9fekE997d15_n7pTQLtyCgKuuWhzgZYqXX5441REn-8BaeJLZD6VqEHY6dWl_2CjkKjI-xFcvsJtI5Z0cfD0L91ppl14wmT0sF6mAU6keexoepajPgiOlXNYjqvUg4F7tDKRZOclmB313p5E70ikAnUoFNovFrdIg0pw3u3S25lU1jQbGyCFXOUTQ-m7KLarlwX6PYonAHaI7fa_5uYQCo2Qmet_Aw0h8q1C-8fM1hAifJUW3rchX_bIsvdBv8WVUlU3rdfMKOJk-QHeKyCUjk_fZNp1kXET5hie7L0CM15EE453XJ0hMwi_3Tdd8sZzkuieuGhxoriKH21A59Jl06tIQtssRWgZUTTsxFJH9yXkn2oBYLgz4BpoGDYOyYshWwZk51RXHp7y2hpjzjFWuxsOnlqc3eMsbZVbe7VJLD1MGfLlu5ykIkyiOqawoZ-aqeeAqhmXUZxB_GBvZEGzXr00xdaZYzOSdOgube9l2U44SKPQBygsvJKnNOEDG2r7vTCw/4bh/N7WSvduvRfGROTTFnGXTJQ/h2/h001.0WBD80hvRmrQbdrUV1azPOTjT7Bt-M8pbRv-epvfB7M)

The first $41,300/$15,000 from a person/multicandidate committee (“PAC”) will be allocated to the DNC. The next $3,300/$5,000 from a person/PAC will be allocated to Harris for President’s Recount Account. The next $510,000/$255,000 from a person/PAC will be split equally among the Democratic state parties from these states: AK, AL, AR, AZ, CA, CO, CT, DC, DE, FL, GA, HI, IA, ID, IL, IN, KS, KY, LA, MA, MD, ME, MI, MN, MO, MS, MT, NC, ND, NE, NH, NJ, NM, NV, NY, OH, OK, OR, PA, RI, SC, SD, TN, TX, UT, VA, VT, WA, WI, WV, and WY. Any additional funds will be allocated to the DNC, subject to applicable contribution limits.
A contributor may designate their contribution for a particular participant by contacting **info@kamalaharris.com**.The allocation formula above may change if following it would result in an excessive contribution.
clean_body: Right now, there are still a number of critical races across the country that are either too close to call, or within the margin of recounts or certain legal challenges. | | | As you know, Peter, I started out as a prosecutor. Throughout my career I have seen people at some of the worst times in their lives. People who had suffered great harm and great pain and yet found within themselves the strength to fight for justice, for themselves, and for others. Their courage served as an inspiration to me and I hope it will serve as an inspiration to you. You see: The light of America's promise will burn bright as long as long as we keep fighting. This fight for freedom, for opportunity, for fairness, and the dignity of all people is not one I intend to give up. I am asking you not to either. Right now, there are still a number of critical races across the country that are either too close to call, or within the margin of recounts or certain legal challenges. If you've saved payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | | | | | | We will continue to wage our fight at the voting booth, in the courts and in the public square. And, If you can afford it, your donation will help ensure every vote is counted and every voice is heard in this election. If you can’t give right now, that is okay. My ask is that you also wage this fight in quieter ways. In how you treat one another with kindness and respect, by always using your strength to lift people up, and ensuring everyone has the dignity that they deserve. Thank you for staying in the fight alongside me. Kamala Kamala Harris Vice President of the United States | | | |

name: Jazz Lewis
subject: November 2024 Newsletter
body:
https://www.jazzlewis.com/ [https://www.jazzlewis.com/]
November 2024 Newsletter
Election 2024
With the 2024 presidential election behind us, now is the time to come together, reflect, and look forward with hope and determination. We’ve made great strides here in Maryland, and I am thrilled to congratulate our newly elected U.S. Senator Angela Alsobrooks, as well as Representatives-elect April Delaney, Sarah Elfreth, and John Olszewski. Their voices, along with those of our current federal leaders, are an asset to our communities and show the country how our diversity is our strength.
For those who feel anxious, worried, or even disheartened right now—take the time you need to process those emotions. There will be time to review the election and to reflect on what happened and why. As someone who began their career as a community organizer, I believe it’s essential that, despite any disapproval of the outcome, we listen to voters. They’ve shared a message that we must heed. Now is the moment to learn, to regroup, to rebuild, and to prepare ourselves to offer a stronger, more representative vision to lead us forward while fighting for the values and ideals we hold dear.
I am committed to doing my part. I hope you’ll join me. Together, we can shape a future that aligns with the values we cherish and work toward a vision that serves all.
Finally, I want to extend a heartfelt thank you to Vice President Kamala Harris for her inspiring campaign and her steadfast commitment in a tightly contested race.
Thank you for your continued passion, resilience, and faith in our democracy. I look forward to all we’ll accomplish together in the days ahead.
[https://prod.cdn.everyaction.com/images/van/NGP/NGP21/1/88468/images/Alsobrooks%20Victory.png] [https://prod.cdn.everyaction.com/images/van/NGP/NGP21/1/88468/images/Kamala%20Thanks.jpg]
Angela Alsobrooks Phone Bank
Before the election, I wanted to do what I could to help make a difference in this election, specifically Angela's campaign. Rep. Steny Hoyer and I joined some Alsobrooks volunteers to phone bank and further raise support for Angela. Thank you to Rep. Hoyer for joining me and to all of the volunteers who mobilized thousands of voters across Maryland and helped elect Angela. We all know Angela will make us all proud and do big things for Maryland in the Senate.
[https://prod.cdn.everyaction.com/images/van/NGP/NGP21/1/88468/images/Alsobrooks%20Phone%20Bank.jpg]
Caucus of African American Leaders
Last month, I had the opportunity to join Chair Carl Snowden and the Caucus of African American Leaders of Anne Arundel County at their meeting. The caucus’ mission is to inspire and support the community, and its work is driven by progressive ideas, bold action, and the goal of building a strong, foundational community.
We had an honest discussion about how we can enact policies to combat disenfranchisement and discrimination and support and uplift the next generation of leaders. I look forward to future meetings and to seeing what CAAL does next. To learn more about the caucus, click here [https://www.aacaal.org/] .
bit.ly/JazzOct22 [bit.ly/JazzOct22]
Thanksgiving 2024
Wishing you and your family a happy and blessed Thanksgiving on November 28!
[https://prod.cdn.everyaction.com/images/van/NGP/NGP21/1/88468/images/Thanksgiving.jpg]
https://www.jazzlewis.com/ [https://www.jazzlewis.com/]

name: Team Freedom VA
subject: Do you have a story like Katy's?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Freedom Virginia, Inc
body:
freedomva.org [freedomva.org]
“In 2016, I was prescribed Latuda [Lurasidone HCL] for treatment of my bipolar disorder. My insurance covered it for a while, but it came with a steep copay. I lost my insurance in 2022, and I was shocked when I went to pick up my prescription and I was told it would cost $1,300 for a month’s supply. The pharmacist suggested I try GoodRx for a medication coupon, but the only discount I could find was for $50 off. At that point, I decided to go without my medication for a while because I simply could not afford it. This led to me hoping I could find spare Latuda to hold me over, but to no avail. Latuda is only one of the medications I take daily, and it costs more than most people's paychecks, rent, or mortgages. It made me feel defeated and hopeless until I could get insured again. I never want to choose between feeling mentally stable and having food on my table ever again.”
-Katy, Henrico
Do you have an experience like Katy’s? [https://docs.google.com/forms/d/e/1FAIpQLSeCvt2VkWVl6BGH2q3Bkv61BfiH5QRqic8BeR_FxoIqCxpgAw/viewform?usp=sf_link] It may be more common than you think. 1 out of every 4 Virginians [https://www.healthcarevaluehub.org/advocate-resources/publications/virginia-residents-worried-about-high-drug-costs-support-range-government-solutions] who depend on prescription medication decides not to take those medications because they cannot afford them, and 63% of Virginians [https://www.aarp.org/content/dam/aarp/research/topics/health/prescription-drugs/virginia-prescription-drug-survey-2023-annotated-questionnaire.doi.10.26419-2Fres.00710.002.pdf] are worried about whether they can afford necessary prescriptions in addition to other essential costs like groceries and rent.
As we prepare for this next General Assembly session, we want to hear from YOU about your experiences with affordability issues in Virginia. Whether it’s affording prescription drugs, taking time off to care for yourself or a loved one, or finding affordable childcare and housing, your story should be heard.
[https://prod.cdn.everyaction.com/images/van/TSM/TSMMP/1/85567/images/Screenshot%202024-11-14%20113514.png]
Share Your Story [https://www.aarp.org/content/dam/aarp/research/topics/health/prescription-drugs/virginia-prescription-drug-survey-2023-annotated-questionnaire.doi.10.26419-2Fres.00710.002.pdf]

name: Blue House
subject: Thousands of votes left to count
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Alsobrooks for Senate
body:
Peter, we need your help.

As of now, there are still thousands of votes to be counted in some of the
most competitive House districts across the country.

We must ensure each and every one of these ballots is counted so we can
elect representatives that believe in protecting reproductive freedoms,
democracy, and Medicare.

That’s why we are contacting voters to help make sure that rejected
ballots are fixed and submitted and sending our staff to these two
battleground districts to monitor vote counting.

But, Peter, this
work is expensive and we’re running out of time and money. [ https://act.angelaalsobrooks.com/go/33554?t=1007&amount=25&akid=3224%2E52803%2ERQ5nD3 ]Will you
chip in a split donation with Angela Alsobrooks to help our team on the
ground fight until every last vote is counted and support these two
battleground districts? Every donation will go to helping our teams and
building up a blue firewall to combat Trump.

If you’ve saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your
donation will go through immediately.

name: Jay Jones
subject: Why the Matt Gaetz nomination makes our race even more important:
body:
https://jayjones.com [https://jayjones.com]
Team,
This week, Trump chose former Congressman Matt Gaetz to be this nation’s next Attorney General. For someone who has openly flouted the rule of law, this president-elect is doing everything he can to make sure that he won’t face consequences for his actions.
Just like Trump, Gaetz is another leader who has openly flouted the rule of law time and time again. But before I go on, will you take a moment to chip in $5 to ensure we defend the rule of law here in the Commonwealth? [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/loc_jones_em_q42024?amount=5]
In case you didn’t know who Matt Gaetz is:
1. He supported the January 6th insurrection and refused to certify the 2020 election results.
2. He invited a Holocaust denier to join him at a State of the Union address.
3. Before he resigned, Gaetz was under investigation by the House Ethics Committee for sexual misconduct and misuse of campaign funds.
In short, former Congressman Gaetz is not fit to serve as our nation’s attorney general.
This nomination makes our campaign even more important. State Attorneys General will have to be the firewall against Trump’s administration – and our race in Virginia will be the first major test of that firewall.
We need all hands on deck, team. Will you chip in $10 or more to help me win this race and get to work defending the rule of law? [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/loc_jones_em_q42024?amount=10]
