name: the EMILYs List team
subject: The fight continues
body:
EMILYs List was built for this |
---
[](https://click.everyaction.com/k/97156658/512465292/162262288?refcode=WTEFEW47_20241115_BuildingBack_ALL&sourceid=1055438&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9UU00vVFNNRUwvMS84NzA2OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1OTIzODIyZS04Y2EzLWVmMTEtODhkMC02MDQ1YmRkNjJkYjYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=QO2C0mWO_6mWFo3UIa9P-ckdVmIzfcTodvMrpqn2SHQ=) Peter,

There's no way to sugarcoat this moment. Despite some crucial wins by Democratic pro-choice women nationwide, we know that this year's the election results mean reproductive freedom is still in SERIOUS jeopardy.

But here's the thing: EMILYs List's mission is to build pro-choice women's political power _over the long-term_. Even (especially!) after heartbreaking election results, _that fight continues_.

In our 39 years as an organization, we've faced setbacks at the ballot box before. Years like 2004 and 2016 come to mind — elections when we did not get the results we wanted, so we regrouped and came back stronger. We have always been ready to keep fighting. Vice President Kamala Harris said it herself:

**"Sometimes the fight takes a while. That doesn't mean we won't win."**

And we know, Peter, that Democratic pro-choice women will lead the fight for our fundamental freedoms. After all, women have been at the forefront of some of the toughest battles this country has ever faced.

This election was a reminder that sometimes, the fight for progress _hurts_. Hillary Clinton made a big crack in the highest and hardest glass ceiling in politics, Kamala Harris made another one — and we know that one day, we'll shatter that ceiling into a million pieces once and for all.

We're so grateful for your support, and want you to know that EMILYs List was built for moments like this. We've been in tough fights before, and we are most certainly not backing down now. [**Now is the time for strength, community, and ACTION. If you're able, please consider donating to help power our pro-choice movement into the next election cycle — and beyond:**](https://click.everyaction.com/k/97156659/512465293/-1512887892?refcode=WTEFEW47_20241115_BuildingBack_ALL&sourceid=1055438&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9UU00vVFNNRUwvMS84NzA2OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1OTIzODIyZS04Y2EzLWVmMTEtODhkMC02MDQ1YmRkNjJkYjYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=QO2C0mWO_6mWFo3UIa9P-ckdVmIzfcTodvMrpqn2SHQ=) | [DONATE](https://click.everyaction.com/k/97156660/512465294/162262288?refcode=WTEFEW47_20241115_BuildingBack_ALL&sourceid=1055438&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9UU00vVFNNRUwvMS84NzA2OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1OTIzODIyZS04Y2EzLWVmMTEtODhkMC02MDQ1YmRkNjJkYjYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=QO2C0mWO_6mWFo3UIa9P-ckdVmIzfcTodvMrpqn2SHQ=)
---
Thank you,

clean_body: EMILYs List was built for this | = Peter, There's no way to sugarcoat this moment. Despite some crucial wins by Democratic pro-choice women nationwide, we know that this year's the election results mean reproductive freedom is still in SERIOUS jeopardy. But here's the thing: EMILYs List's mission is to build pro-choice women's political power over the long-term. Even (especially!) after heartbreaking election results, that fight continues. In our 39 years as an organization, we've faced setbacks at the ballot box before. Years like 2004 and 2016 come to mind — elections when we did not get the results we wanted, so we regrouped and came back stronger. We have always been ready to keep fighting. Vice President Kamala Harris said it herself: "Sometimes the fight takes a while. That doesn't mean we won't win." And we know, Peter, that Democratic pro-choice women will lead the fight for our fundamental freedoms. After all, women have been at the forefront of some of the toughest battles this country has ever faced. This election was a reminder that sometimes, the fight for progress hurts. Hillary Clinton made a big crack in the highest and hardest glass ceiling in politics, Kamala Harris made another one — and we know that one day, we'll shatter that ceiling into a million pieces once and for all. We're so grateful for your support, and want you to know that EMILYs List was built for moments like this. We've been in tough fights before, and we are most certainly not backing down now. = | = Thank you, the EMILYs List team = Thank you for being a supporter of EMILYs List. This email was sent to: dpwillis67@gmail.com. Inbox overcrowded? Sign up to get less email . We'd hate to see you go, but if you want to stop receiving all email, unsubscribe . Have a question? Feel free to drop us a line at mailto:information@emilyslist.org or simply reply to this email. Contributions or gifts to EMILYs List or endorsed candidates are not tax deductible. EMILYs List P.O. name: Blue House
subject: Thousands of votes left to count
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Democrats Win Seats PAC
body:
First few lines
Our mission at DWS PAC is to strategically direct resources to help elect Democrats around the country, and our success depends on support from thousands of donors across the country. If you’d like to unsubscribe, [click here](https://go.dwspac.com/p/bg-w4eO8DEWuKhf2unAuQg2?unsubscribedata=UUN4k782LAwacJPRRiULbzLOpEWfUDrHYglMo25ri1snePxPePosmO0PqSuVnMBSX%2BLzC0ZBNGxPlbqrH2llvsMOIUqcTYgCev%2FkhsKiCCoPPHZ1XjvChuVBaWiJc9gt3GpZt4PV4hLm%2BpQXCJn4Ontoo7lbsqzRDCkrtvNp3JAuGlsC7%2BmObI9OQ2s8Sr%2Bqd2yhs6XbfBcCXyzqbut%2F4WqkbJPkLTpcR87lrur3rS4QQGuhKnWOdAcHk%2Bqfr%2BeEOY9EwHI16UsQGUVaJoOMvtp0gwLjAI7Oq2kUI%2F470bxGye93XDdWbQxN7YqU3At1l1IRq%2Bl%2FeC%2FeZgVuSKSorto4p8nVuKi7eSVuqeEiZmErGIISvqm%2BgJFw0Nni2apkdgW4B%2F%2BhEAHle0bmzr350CY6WnhUEtivRDXLIlZj%2Fr4%3D).
---
| Peter, we need your help.

As of now, there’s still thousands of votes to be counted in some of the most competitive House districts across the country.

We must ensure each and every one of these ballots are counted so we can elect representatives that believe in protecting reproductive freedoms, democracy, and Medicare.

That’s why we are contacting voters to help make sure that rejected ballots are fixed and submitted and sending our staff to these two battleground districts to monitor vote counting.

name: CC Permit
subject: your CCW Permit is approved! download here ✅
body:
get it now before its gone
| |
---
| | [](https://links.gunowner-news.com/a/1537/click/19104/6374453/6a1cf3d1f68d6a23cea1a5cb9ac4d4fedfb65cdf/36c82b9f471a605526f2f59e2f196d16c068cce2)
---
| | _November 15th, 2024_
---
|
---
| | , It’s important you download your concealed carry certificate before it's banned for good.

Due to increased pressure from lawmakers, a website offering you a certificate for America’s Top CCW Gun Permit **could be shut down at any moment.**

Which is why it’s important you download your **Concealed Carry Certificate ASAP** Christopher.

Wait even one more day and we won’t be able to guarantee this certificate will be available to download.

This certificate is great for gun owners because it takes advantage of a little-known (but 100% legal) loophole - **[allowing you to get a CCW certification from this website](https://links.gunowner-news.com/a/1537/click/19104/6374453/11210de2ea15cafafcf409ad9df735939a726a75/36c82b9f471a605526f2f59e2f196d16c068cce2). You don’t even have to leave your house to do it!**

This loophole ensures you encounter: Zero government red tape (and no exposing your private info to the Feds)... Zero lines, classroom time or books to read... Zero gun range time (you don’t even need to fire a gun to get this permit). **[It’s as simple as visiting this site and answering a few questions (they’re simple)](https://links.gunowner-news.com/a/1537/click/19104/6374453/11210de2ea15cafafcf409ad9df735939a726a75/36c82b9f471a605526f2f59e2f196d16c068cce2).**

Plus you can complete the entire certification process online.

Download it directly to your phone or computer in as little as 30 minutes.

**You don’t even need to own a gun to get this permit...** that’s why it’s named America’s #1 Concealed Carry Permit.

31 states have agreed to accept this permit so far. That’s because it’s simply the closest and easiest path to a semi-nationally recognized permit that’s available right now.

This permit isn’t just a basic concealed carry permit either. **It’s one of a kind... and is available to you No Matter what state you reside in.**

**Hurry and get it now.**

**[There are no guarantees this website](https://links.gunowner-news.com/a/1537/click/19104/6374453/11210de2ea15cafafcf409ad9df735939a726a75/36c82b9f471a605526f2f59e2f196d16c068cce2)** will be able to legally deliver this certificate to your email address after today!

name: Robert Garcia
subject: RFK Jr.’s appointment to the HHS will cost lives
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Robert Garcia for Congress
body:
# [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/97157635/512468005/938567526?refcode=header&noskip=true&&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTcxOSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwNmUyZGVlZS04ZmEzLWVmMTEtODhkMC02MDQ1YmRkNjJkYjYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=suhqz5nf8aSRE1oqmKpFK42P1a4jwSEhkIkrUU3G5P4=)
Friends —
Donald Trump announced RFK Jr. as his pick to lead the Department of Health and Human Services.
Yes, RFK Jr., the tinfoil hat conspiracy theorist who believes in debunked claims that vaccines cause autism, thinks fluoride in water causes people to turn Trans and Gay and has taken aim at the FDA, CDC, and National Institutes of Health.
If confirmed, he will be in charge of agencies that regulate food and medicine, decide whether Medicare and Medicaid will pay for drugs and hospital treatments, guard against infectious diseases, and conduct billions of dollars of medical research into cancer and Alzheimer’s.
Our country just went through the single largest loss of life event a couple of years ago — and now Donald Trump wants to put a vaccine skeptic in charge of our health system?
This pick is irresponsible, shameful, and disgusting and is something we must furiously oppose.
[**If you agree, please add your name to my petition to call on the Senate to REJECT RFK Jr.’s appointment to HHS Secretary.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/97157636/512468006/-514306681?refcode2=06e2deee-8fa3-ef11-88d0-6045bdd62db6&refcode=em241115&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTcxOSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwNmUyZGVlZS04ZmEzLWVmMTEtODhkMC02MDQ1YmRkNjJkYjYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=suhqz5nf8aSRE1oqmKpFK42P1a4jwSEhkIkrUU3G5P4=&emci=2e2aeb44-89a3-ef11-88d0-6045bdd62db6&emdi=06e2deee-8fa3-ef11-88d0-6045bdd62db6&ceid=16877361)

name: Rashida Tlaib
subject: Sign to block $20 billion to Israel by supporting Senator BernieSanders’ Resolutions of Disapproval
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Rashida Tlaib for Congress
body:
We cannot stand by while our tax dollars fuel this carnage. | | | [](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/u001.X6XUC7u8ppFLNtMO_55SZlNseb7gEYIOhm_EWnhzEOZKmTtnV3k2h4V2x_O3H7rdW2az5rgktBwzxQ8Ml9Wgkmv85qW-UsBonL4KRa0bcNqdICU6T3NBDdNIZG7w7wEWtX8EiqjyvAGlYhGar3lExRjU3vbn60LKG5b2QtBFwlLv_AlU4Y810SI-cjdgjpIi5vKYom1Ztbi8KsR603tkDBT-hIT0pCtbZSHBr6G3bSVPjVQOLjspmksrqBa7UA6v4DHDIkreiou9HXMpnqxj3yCtLs72rK7zFYnAaVZ9W5yVh2eAHbr4-t8tldWJyXG6pDZOiouB-Ou40eIi6zQZvj7BO7prrihz_wefZqaQC1nanYzhdEbdufr5WQJtBY4Gsb4EegcWExtIxQ-iO7WuMQUWwtJeRNuNvmmo7dEX8NyV0bb0uhOsB_-787IOOxNEs5dgKvNbP6NX7oWikGFxXvnzg4yTid9Vp1TbD4X8nIg/4bh/6zY0GLBxRY6YJ78wk1yYjw/h0/h001.JpcApKdPNCEnVjIaj50q6wJS4rAcwNY5Mzhx7D24xV4)
---
Friend, A new United Nations report found that 70% of the Palestinians killed in Gaza are women and children, with children making up 44% of those killed. Heartbreakingly, **Israel’s government has killed more 5-9 year olds than any other age group in Gaza, followed by 10-14 year olds and 0-4 year olds.** These are babies, burned alive, bombed to pieces, starved, or shot with hundreds of bullets like Hind Rajab. Our government is making us complicit in these sickening horrors. President Biden’s administration sent over $22 billion to Israel’s military in the past year, meaning U.S. taxpayers have funded 70% of Israel’s attacks—which have killed and injured at least 170,000 people in Palestine and Lebanon so far.1 **We cannot stand by while our tax dollars fuel this carnage. The majority of Americans agree: We must stop the flow of weapons to Israel.** But Biden recently approved another $20 billion weapons deal to Israel, including specific bombs and equipment that have been used to kill children and other civilians such as healthcare workers and journalists. **To block Biden’s latest weapons shipments to Israel, Senator Bernie Sanders has introduced Joint Resolutions of Disapproval.** Starting next week, Sanders will be able to force a floor vote on these resolutions in the Senate. This is the first-ever vote in Congress to directly block weapons to Israel and an important step toward an arms embargo. [**Sign now to tell Senators: Vote yes on Bernie Sanders' Joint Resolutions of Disapproval to block $20 billion in U.S. weapons to Israel.**](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/u001.qUXRBnqZ7T8nxbpAcIVwoUsWLkUMWlo_0JmZttSlm38jvf5GaclcQ7i_R9B-DMhJ8fXiWC38jy4zcPpxq3DScfzApNfZ-CTVW4SIvuewRsWy_POd5whfJ4I9taTG4AVJuFlxKyp25SAXhcWvBvHw4UEXX7JSQDOYvo1Ns7aNNL2HqUGgaY_YMOqYr64uAI1kgcOG1XsCOX_Q_6JkIC2LQNEUH5WTRTnvbqkGqfcTbIM35kkjiYVcL96EahsioRgxBg1KWDayHcv2UM7aZrcKItv_GbcfRFKtU24O_QeUvrWRTBAetDabucGQ3hXU3TLviAvBZGnFI0n5_d791irYEJ_q793Olp2j1ErF3sj9QXmm81R5XIUblAnh1S3mRqeuhbabS0A5XWGYr79CLlbqVGYMjCV6NEKCQwvHVhaRZaXnoOagwK4nZciMuXyhNAPN3bWTVMumojaKTtYNe2-Fk_bypN7h2VG-X2xq0NhkQzJGoIWsJtWR1cz8D7eQyq1PbEMI7azYWpHt9bg3Hc9O4c2jZkgZatEgmha_SaPTPA8weUCct8VUg_lyKa5aXfK-cRLHl4zP4EbtUCmmj6SgTmTiNZTUNzH50Rf1ubFmVzdo3ARFMkY7_tMPw2QxshIq_rQDAxouQ3iKWEkM3Z2FLibREnPum5dx5fLAT3SuAb9RjAQbiRYPrn38AOnQy9w5pb3fW8ONc5go4b7X9INX83HPlRYr8YnLL0FMZJ9OAIg/4bh/6zY0GLBxRY6YJ78wk1yYjw/h1/h001.X6ZrxUaLLHGkVRbZp7xUVkafUpiBik3aVXs3rWAR2v8) | [SIGN ON](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/u001.qUXRBnqZ7T8nxbpAcIVwoUsWLkUMWlo_0JmZttSlm38jvf5GaclcQ7i_R9B-DMhJ8fXiWC38jy4zcPpxq3DScfzApNfZ-CTVW4SIvuewRsWy_POd5whfJ4I9taTG4AVJuFlxKyp25SAXhcWvBvHw4UEXX7JSQDOYvo1Ns7aNNL2HqUGgaY_YMOqYr64uAI1kgcOG1XsCOX_Q_6JkIC2LQNEUH5WTRTnvbqkGqfcTbIM35kkjiYVcL96EahsioRgxBg1KWDayHcv2UM7aZrcKItv_GbcfRFKtU24O_QeUvrWRTBAetDabucGQ3hXU3TLviAvBZGnFI0n5_d791irYEJ_q793Olp2j1ErF3sj9QXmm81R5XIUblAnh1S3mRqeuhbabS0A5XWGYr79CLlbqVBO4uKinOKPJIVM94MS99hc1CJOCfk4q7HVskCHNLYdy_1FkcGEg8_ySjdFh-cqpGTtOcT1eKUHPKU7-2r4y89vhvJBJxowJlxolaXn-o6dLjQyqsXQyP_Ska1h3fPeZESqHuhTrTGMBppuldKtHDKGiRz45oJxYcE9CQ8KR2cFaL6TWPagL3jW0QWApwhOYlrpwkD1Igfvqis93njt1tqMAL5QXTsRXLDEMvyXQgAlCPraUmHtIMvQ0VvPXcjKgCnk6oUcMu1tVhp9kG5zzXVx_p5OOV4_6Eg01ucngu3Z_oJGqtXNPGXoMTcaDFqmjdL0d20qW-6yh9QeJkJ_Q_GQ/4bh/6zY0GLBxRY6YJ78wk1yYjw/h2/h001.fQY8tRe8qtobr4RTBFdeCuYcQoo3kXOYXVpNeZ5yXS8)
---
As poll after poll shows, most U.S. voters want to stop U.S. arms sales to Israel, including a majority of Jewish Americans. For over a year, we have been rising up and demanding an end to this escalated ethnic cleansing of Palestinians.
While our efforts have not ended Israel’s devastating atrocities, our demands are now more mainstream among the American people and Democratic U.S. policymakers. Meanwhile, other countries have stopped arming Israel and an overwhelming majority of countries in the United Nations have voted for sanctions on Israel.
Not only is our government violating international laws by continuing to back Israel’s war crimes, it’s also violating U.S. laws that restrict weapons transfers to countries blocking U.S. humanitarian aid or committing other human rights abuses.
Biden’s administration knows the Israeli government is blocking humanitarian aid, which is starving Palestinians in Gaza and depriving them of lifesaving medical supplies. **Over 30 days ago, Biden’s Secretary of State gave Israel 30 days to increase aid into Gaza and stop undermining the UN agency for Palestinian refugees (UNRWA)—or risk facing consequences like restrictions on U.S. weapons transfers.**
We’ve passed their deadline and aid organizations including Save the Children and Oxfam have confirmed that Israel’s government has failed to meet the demanded criteria in the past month, and instead “took actions that dramatically worsened the situation on the ground.”2 The Israeli government also just passed legislation banning UNRWA entirely.
**However, Biden’s administration confirmed this week that there will be no consequences for Israel’s growing atrocities.** In response, demonstrators gathered outside the White House demanding an arms embargo, including former members of the administration who have resigned in protest. Some were arrested for exercising their First Amendment rights.
Joe Biden is still president and he can still save millions of lives, but it’s clear he must be pushed by Congress. We only have until the end of the year to push Senator Sanders’ Joint Resolutions of Disapproval through Congress and cut off the flow of some weapons to Israel.
[**Will you add your name now to demand Senators vote to block $20 billion in illegal weapons sales to Israel?**](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/u001.qUXRBnqZ7T8nxbpAcIVwoUsWLkUMWlo_0JmZttSlm38jvf5GaclcQ7i_R9B-DMhJ8fXiWC38jy4zcPpxq3DScfzApNfZ-CTVW4SIvuewRsWy_POd5whfJ4I9taTG4AVJuFlxKyp25SAXhcWvBvHw4UEXX7JSQDOYvo1Ns7aNNL2HqUGgaY_YMOqYr64uAI1kgcOG1XsCOX_Q_6JkIC2LQNEUH5WTRTnvbqkGqfcTbIM35kkjiYVcL96EahsioRgxBg1KWDayHcv2UM7aZrcKItv_GbcfRFKtU24O_QeUvrWRTBAetDabucGQ3hXU3TLviAvBZGnFI0n5_d791irYEJ_q793Olp2j1ErF3sj9QXmm81R5XIUblAnh1S3mRqeuhbabS0A5XWGYr79CLlbqVCXpeOfY7cp1uhcMhor6mDD_uWj2uHt9Na6AhScHxaluHZGHDvMW0VhFk53OkhwolXQ4ic7skG_S2nTT3D-Vc5W3CITO__9eEYjeSmFSeCADlluuKbetbhD-sdb7_i19V4givM5MDKAtuLsGGeSH8lV7PH3H9NYgFpQzXrMzJHxnNqo-hbLS8M0cwALO9HR4pjkXj0u1JgWEVHffOpCrmnQ-5DN_VF85xtWni9oMwaYSUrZgYgKBLvIWLbTATjcN5ZRImyB0w4NKYgneX1UHYjnrvvu2wrxSwgfuji3jrwz6fPImvVzm4NHis9N2nTfBqu-OXd_z1HSXWw1qoTVK2mU/4bh/6zY0GLBxRY6YJ78wk1yYjw/h3/h001.eE6__SACU67PIX_iyC9QvBY0yzbITRhizi0njVPGr3U)
Thank you. Together, we will keep pushing to save lives at home and abroad, no matter people’s faith or ethnicity and no matter who is president. Our struggle continues.
In solidarity,
Rashida

clean_body: We cannot stand by while our tax dollars fuel this carnage. | | | Friend, A new United Nations report found that 70% of the Palestinians killed in Gaza are women and children, with children making up 44% of those killed. Heartbreakingly, Israel’s government has killed more 5-9 year olds than any other age group in Gaza, followed by 10-14 year olds and 0-4 year olds. These are babies, burned alive, bombed to pieces, starved, or shot with hundreds of bullets like Hind Rajab. Our government is making us complicit in these sickening horrors. President Biden’s administration sent over $22 billion to Israel’s military in the past year, meaning U.S. taxpayers have funded 70% of Israel’s attacks—which have killed and injured at least 170,000 people in Palestine and Lebanon so far.1 We cannot stand by while our tax dollars fuel this carnage. The majority of Americans agree: We must stop the flow of weapons to Israel. But Biden recently approved another $20 billion weapons deal to Israel, including specific bombs and equipment that have been used to kill children and other civilians such as healthcare workers and journalists. To block Biden’s latest weapons shipments to Israel, Senator Bernie Sanders has introduced Joint Resolutions of Disapproval. Starting next week, Sanders will be able to force a floor vote on these resolutions in the Senate. This is the first-ever vote in Congress to directly block weapons to Israel and an important step toward an arms embargo. | As poll after poll shows, most U.S. voters want to stop U.S. arms sales to Israel, including a majority of Jewish Americans. For over a year, we have been rising up and demanding an end to this escalated ethnic cleansing of Palestinians. While our efforts have not ended Israel’s devastating atrocities, our demands are now more mainstream among the American people and Democratic U.S. policymakers. Meanwhile, other countries have stopped arming Israel and an overwhelming majority of countries in the United Nations have voted for sanctions on Israel. Not only is our government violating international laws by continuing to back Israel’s war crimes, it’s also violating U.S. laws that restrict weapons transfers to countries blocking U.S. humanitarian aid or committing other human rights abuses. Biden’s administration knows the Israeli government is blocking humanitarian aid, which is starving Palestinians in Gaza and depriving them of lifesaving medical supplies. Over 30 days ago, Biden’s Secretary of State gave Israel 30 days to increase aid into Gaza and stop undermining the UN agency for Palestinian refugees (UNRWA)—or risk facing consequences like restrictions on U.S. weapons transfers. We’ve passed their deadline and aid organizations including Save the Children and Oxfam have confirmed that Israel’s government has failed to meet the demanded criteria in the past month, and instead “took actions that dramatically worsened the situation on the ground.”2 The Israeli government also just passed legislation banning UNRWA entirely. However, Biden’s administration confirmed this week that there will be no consequences for Israel’s growing atrocities. In response, demonstrators gathered outside the White House demanding an arms embargo, including former members of the administration who have resigned in protest. Some were arrested for exercising their First Amendment rights. Joe Biden is still president and he can still save millions of lives, but it’s clear he must be pushed by Congress. We only have until the end of the year to push Senator Sanders’ Joint Resolutions of Disapproval through Congress and cut off the flow of some weapons to Israel. Thank you. Together, we will keep pushing to save lives at home and abroad, no matter people’s faith or ethnicity and no matter who is president. Our struggle continues. In solidarity, Rashida 1 2 Rashida Tlaib for Congress PO Box 32777 Detroit, MI 48232 | Paid for by Rashida Tlaib for Congress | | Sent via . To update your email address, change your name or address, or to stop receiving emails from Rashida Tlaib for Congress, please .

_U.S. Rep. Frank Mrvan Grows Victory Margin in Closely Watched Swing District_ ****
[ Share INDems](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/97157685/512468121/-1266634475?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDMvMS82NzYzNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1ODBlYTAwNy05MGEzLWVmMTEtODhkMC02MDQ1YmRkNjJkYjYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogIkRQV0lMTElTNjdAR01BSUwuQ09NIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=ePZliZ17mPI0XdnZvuWKuOkIyUWme0qqJaYsLWqzi2Q=&emci=d3a691af-8ba3-ef11-88d0-6045bdd62db6&emdi=580ea007-90a3-ef11-88d0-6045bdd62db6&ceid=4925535) U.S. Rep. Frank Mrvan (CD-1) [more than doubled his victory margin](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/97157686/512468122/1331198886?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDMvMS82NzYzNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1ODBlYTAwNy05MGEzLWVmMTEtODhkMC02MDQ1YmRkNjJkYjYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogIkRQV0lMTElTNjdAR01BSUwuQ09NIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=ePZliZ17mPI0XdnZvuWKuOkIyUWme0qqJaYsLWqzi2Q=&emci=d3a691af-8ba3-ef11-88d0-6045bdd62db6&emdi=580ea007-90a3-ef11-88d0-6045bdd62db6&ceid=4925535) in 2024 compared with his 2022 win. This year, he won by over 27,000 votes when he only won by 12,000 votes in 2022. Following his reelection, Mrvan continued to proudly serve the American people and introduced [H.R.10105 - Veterans’ Security and Pay Transparency Act](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/97157687/512468123/-1061943709?s=1&r=1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDMvMS82NzYzNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1ODBlYTAwNy05MGEzLWVmMTEtODhkMC02MDQ1YmRkNjJkYjYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogIkRQV0lMTElTNjdAR01BSUwuQ09NIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=ePZliZ17mPI0XdnZvuWKuOkIyUWme0qqJaYsLWqzi2Q=&emci=d3a691af-8ba3-ef11-88d0-6045bdd62db6&emdi=580ea007-90a3-ef11-88d0-6045bdd62db6&ceid=4925535). The bill is designed to help the U.S. Department of Veterans Affairs improve its retention and recruitment of VA personnel. “I look forward to continuing to work with all of my Congressional colleagues to hold the VA accountable and ensure that the VA police force has the resources it needs to keep our selfless veterans and VA facilities secure,” Mrvan said in a [press release](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/97157688/512468124/1351805083?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDMvMS82NzYzNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1ODBlYTAwNy05MGEzLWVmMTEtODhkMC02MDQ1YmRkNjJkYjYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogIkRQV0lMTElTNjdAR01BSUwuQ09NIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=ePZliZ17mPI0XdnZvuWKuOkIyUWme0qqJaYsLWqzi2Q=&emci=d3a691af-8ba3-ef11-88d0-6045bdd62db6&emdi=580ea007-90a3-ef11-88d0-6045bdd62db6&ceid=4925535). ****_LG-elect Micah Beckwith Threatens IU Student Newspaper_ **[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/97157689/512468125/-1016648626?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDMvMS82NzYzNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1ODBlYTAwNy05MGEzLWVmMTEtODhkMC02MDQ1YmRkNjJkYjYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogIkRQV0lMTElTNjdAR01BSUwuQ09NIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=ePZliZ17mPI0XdnZvuWKuOkIyUWme0qqJaYsLWqzi2Q=&emci=d3a691af-8ba3-ef11-88d0-6045bdd62db6&emdi=580ea007-90a3-ef11-88d0-6045bdd62db6&ceid=4925535)**[ Share INDems](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/97157690/512468126/-1016648626?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDMvMS82NzYzNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1ODBlYTAwNy05MGEzLWVmMTEtODhkMC02MDQ1YmRkNjJkYjYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogIkRQV0lMTElTNjdAR01BSUwuQ09NIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=ePZliZ17mPI0XdnZvuWKuOkIyUWme0qqJaYsLWqzi2Q=&emci=d3a691af-8ba3-ef11-88d0-6045bdd62db6&emdi=580ea007-90a3-ef11-88d0-6045bdd62db6&ceid=4925535) On Tuesday, November 12, Lieutenant Governor-elect Republican Micah Beckwith took to [Facebook](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/97157691/512468127/-963018971?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDMvMS82NzYzNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1ODBlYTAwNy05MGEzLWVmMTEtODhkMC02MDQ1YmRkNjJkYjYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogIkRQV0lMTElTNjdAR01BSUwuQ09NIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=ePZliZ17mPI0XdnZvuWKuOkIyUWme0qqJaYsLWqzi2Q=&emci=d3a691af-8ba3-ef11-88d0-6045bdd62db6&emdi=580ea007-90a3-ef11-88d0-6045bdd62db6&ceid=4925535) and [X](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/97157692/512468128/-332612167?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDMvMS82NzYzNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1ODBlYTAwNy05MGEzLWVmMTEtODhkMC02MDQ1YmRkNjJkYjYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogIkRQV0lMTElTNjdAR01BSUwuQ09NIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=ePZliZ17mPI0XdnZvuWKuOkIyUWme0qqJaYsLWqzi2Q=&emci=d3a691af-8ba3-ef11-88d0-6045bdd62db6&emdi=580ea007-90a3-ef11-88d0-6045bdd62db6&ceid=4925535) to attack the Indiana Daily Student (IDS), a student-led publication from Indiana University (IU), and threaten its existence for using an illustration of Trump on its cover featuring quotes from former supporters and peers. Beckwith slammed the illustration, [saying](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/97157693/512468129/-332612167?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDMvMS82NzYzNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1ODBlYTAwNy05MGEzLWVmMTEtODhkMC02MDQ1YmRkNjJkYjYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogIkRQV0lMTElTNjdAR01BSUwuQ09NIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=ePZliZ17mPI0XdnZvuWKuOkIyUWme0qqJaYsLWqzi2Q=&emci=d3a691af-8ba3-ef11-88d0-6045bdd62db6&emdi=580ea007-90a3-ef11-88d0-6045bdd62db6&ceid=4925535), “This is WOKE propaganda at its finest and why most of America looks at higher education indoctrination centers like IU as a complete joke and waste of money.” Contrary to Beckwith’s negative review, [U.S. News and World Report ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/97157694/512468130/1998274169?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDMvMS82NzYzNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1ODBlYTAwNy05MGEzLWVmMTEtODhkMC02MDQ1YmRkNjJkYjYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogIkRQV0lMTElTNjdAR01BSUwuQ09NIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=ePZliZ17mPI0XdnZvuWKuOkIyUWme0qqJaYsLWqzi2Q=&emci=d3a691af-8ba3-ef11-88d0-6045bdd62db6&emdi=580ea007-90a3-ef11-88d0-6045bdd62db6&ceid=4925535#:~:text=your%20college%20needs%3F-,Indiana%20University%2D%2DBloomington%20Rankings,about%20how%20we%20rank%20schools.)ranks IU as #34 in top public schools in the nation and #73 in national universities. As a longtime, respected institution, [the school has graduated over 790,000 individuals](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/97157695/512468131/-1980006851?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDMvMS82NzYzNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1ODBlYTAwNy05MGEzLWVmMTEtODhkMC02MDQ1YmRkNjJkYjYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogIkRQV0lMTElTNjdAR01BSUwuQ09NIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=ePZliZ17mPI0XdnZvuWKuOkIyUWme0qqJaYsLWqzi2Q=&emci=d3a691af-8ba3-ef11-88d0-6045bdd62db6&emdi=580ea007-90a3-ef11-88d0-6045bdd62db6&ceid=4925535#:~:text=IU%20counts%20790%2C033%20graduates%20across%20seven%20campuses%20in%20nine%20locations.). Beckwith also falsely claimed that the IDS was run using taxpayer dollars. In fact, the paper is [editorially independent](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/97157696/512468132/-2104963055?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDMvMS82NzYzNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1ODBlYTAwNy05MGEzLWVmMTEtODhkMC02MDQ1YmRkNjJkYjYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogIkRQV0lMTElTNjdAR01BSUwuQ09NIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=ePZliZ17mPI0XdnZvuWKuOkIyUWme0qqJaYsLWqzi2Q=&emci=d3a691af-8ba3-ef11-88d0-6045bdd62db6&emdi=580ea007-90a3-ef11-88d0-6045bdd62db6&ceid=4925535) from the university and is funded via advertisements and the events it holds. Beckwith concluded his tirade against the publication by stating, “This type of elitist leftist propaganda needs to stop or we will be happy to stop it for them.” As the new second-in-command in the state, Beckwith should refrain from abusing one of the nation’s finest institutions. ****_Each week, the State Party will highlight key policy from Democrats at the Statehouse or across the state. Phil GiaQuinta will continue to serve as the leader of Indiana House Democrats alongside Floor Leader Cherrish Pryor and Caucus Chair Carey Hamilton. During his time in Indiana’s General Assembly, GiaQuinta has become known for defending quality education, fighting to expand healthcare access and affordability, and promoting local businesses. He has served as a state representative since 2006. “I’m thankful that House Democrats have once again entrusted me to lead our efforts at the Statehouse to protect our freedoms and build up Indiana’s working class. clean_body: | Welcome to the Indiana Democratic Party's weekly newsletter, The Kernel of Truth. The State Party will provide the most important fact - a kernel of truth - from the week. ** U.S. Rep. Frank Mrvan Grows Victory Margin in Closely Watched Swing District U.S. Rep. Frank Mrvan (CD-1) in 2024 compared with his 2022 win. This year, he won by over 27,000 votes when he only won by 12,000 votes in 2022. Following his reelection, Mrvan continued to proudly serve the American people and introduced . The bill is designed to help the U.S. Department of Veterans Affairs improve its retention and recruitment of VA personnel. “I look forward to continuing to work with all of my Congressional colleagues to hold the VA accountable and ensure that the VA police force has the resources it needs to keep our selfless veterans and VA facilities secure,” Mrvan said in a . LG-elect Micah Beckwith Threatens IU Student Newspaper On Tuesday, November 12, Lieutenant Governor-elect Republican Micah Beckwith took to and to attack the Indiana Daily Student (IDS), a student-led publication from Indiana University (IU), and threaten its existence for using an illustration of Trump on its cover featuring quotes from former supporters and peers. Beckwith slammed the illustration, , “This is WOKE propaganda at its finest and why most of America looks at higher education indoctrination centers like IU as a complete joke and waste of money.” Contrary to Beckwith’s negative review, IU as #34 in top public schools in the nation and #73 in national universities. As a longtime, respected institution, .. Beckwith also falsely claimed that the IDS was run using taxpayer dollars. In fact, the paper is from the university and is funded via advertisements and the events it holds. Beckwith concluded his tirade against the publication by stating, “This type of elitist leftist propaganda needs to stop or we will be happy to stop it for them.” As the new second-in-command in the state, Beckwith should refrain from abusing one of the nation’s finest institutions. Each week, the State Party will highlight key policy from Democrats at the Statehouse or across the state. Democrats deliver a better future for Hoosier families, and we urge you to share this information with your networks. State Rep. Phil GiaQuinta will continue to serve as the leader of Indiana House Democrats alongside Floor Leader Cherrish Pryor and Caucus Chair Carey Hamilton. During his time in Indiana’s General Assembly, GiaQuinta has become known for defending quality education, fighting to expand healthcare access and affordability, and promoting local businesses. He has served as a state representative since 2006. “I’m thankful that House Democrats have once again entrusted me to lead our efforts at the Statehouse to protect our freedoms and build up Indiana’s working class. As we enter next year’s budget session, Indiana House Democrats’ priorities are the same as they always have been: people before profit. That means fully funding our public schools, keeping healthcare costs low and empowering our local communities to better become places where people want to live, work, play and stay,” GiaQuinta said in a . ** RSVP for IDP’s Holiday Party = Reserve your spot at our annual Holiday Party to hear from Democratic leaders from across Indiana. = Get Involved! Opportunities After the Election As we move past the 2024 Election, it is imperative that we unite together to create a better future for our state. One of the best ways to do that is to help us rebuild our party and grow in the coming months and years. Upcoming Candidate Trainings Join the National Democratic Training Committee on Tuesday, November 19th from 1-2 pm ET for NDTC’s Great Democratic Debrief: your exclusive opportunity to collectively share what we learned from this past cycle, and develop actionable strategies for more progressive candidates. **Good Afternoon!** It's Friday, and that means your weekly dose of good news is here with _The Feel Good Flyover_! Today we're reporting on Daisy, an AI-generated "grandmother" who keeps scammers on the phone for hours, sweetly asking about her digital cat photos while secretly protecting real seniors from fraud. Finally, a technology we can all root for! Did someone forward this to you? Keep _The Feel Good Flyover_ coming to your inbox by [subscribing here](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJyEz7FuhSAUxvGnge0azgFEBoYmjdvt2pEgHpQGL0bpbfr2jV07dP3y5Zf83-_-HnLJj-UtbOTSknxL1aNAdQO4gfb7Uc-dYvOKzy4RIUlODowEI9AoyVeHkzZgbUhogx76yVqpepN0tGlC0sizu0AA0CjQauzmKKMyqTcYh2EAYErQnFs9uo-aH22lVL7rk44u1o0Xt7a2n0y-MBwZjn8v1y7Hz7Yx-aoEP9y8f-VS8tkbpsSyhVx-pfZP4NPhTwAAAP__O9VUVg). ## AI Granny Turns Tables on Phone Scammers
A British internet provider has unleashed [_Daisy_ , an AI-powered "granny"](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJyEkD2O2zAQRk8jdWOQI9p0ChZp1G3alMKYHEoT8EcgmRV8-2D3Aum_7-Hh_f7YPkiSlP0XZXZxj9uIdUOFBrQGfd_OVvvJfmxmDi4yIy8zO20XbRVas8yHe1GwuODjFTHExajwosU8dFAKlQ_ezuK-gFrrOyr8ccdb8Is3Nj4s-ufzqfVkFAcZtd3-VCnj4Jje9ZPbzdc8J3eMcfZp-TnhOuF6XddtsD8aBfpeTLj6ms-_Q8o-4UptSBQvlEDK4JRk5-J5wjWQ9DeMg4EE9kalvEE6HNwYRgUq_eIGnlLqEFvN0D3lzK0DlQAX9cFfb2kwJPPcXDgvSUn6w05G7ZkkfRuP_4T8dPgvAAD__9iPfNQ) whose sole mission is to keep scammers tangled in endless conversation so they have less time to target real victims. Trained on real scammer scripts, Daisy plays the part of a [sweet but tech-challenged senior](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJyEkDGu3CAUAE-DOyzzDMZbUKRxt2lTWi_wwERgLCBr7e2_9l_g96MZaf489yfGFM_wGzMZH_zefdlhAsmF4ELtVy3tItt3OTjjiYDmgYzQs9ATaDkPh0FlUeMD9Lou89_FSueVnTQpJ1A8rBqi-QiFEAomeCgYnZ2t1H7RYNd1FYLJiVzspY7_Sjz7QT69y4vqaEsekjl6vxqbfzHYGGz3fY-95Bb-R0cfgsGGkcGWiTp3GNub94M4Rh7opIqdHA8Vz_PND0pXPAPvhfeKF28Wc6bahmrcdceUYls0k1PIGNN3vf8w5WXgKwAA__-5v2kt), frustrating fraudsters with gems like, _" I can see a lot of options on the screen, what do you want me to type, dear?"_ and _" It's showing me the picture of my cat Fluffy."_ With many people itching to get back at scammers, Daisy might just be the passive-aggressive hero we didn't know we needed. [Watch a video of Daisy in action](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJyEz71qwzAUxfGnkbYY3XslKxk0lIZs6dBCC12ErY9YRY6Mrdjk7Yv7Al3PgR_8v6722qWc7re3bgwm3qKtsVgUKA8AB1B2mssyBVet5N7EEDAQDwY0gRaoJfHBIJIIJxS9h15Fop4kKkct9hTBk-DJ7CAAKBR4Uth4R07q2Gp0x-MRgEkRfKplbn5KutchxPwsa5gbV0aezVDrtDB6YXhheNm2rXmWR330Yf_3patuYHRZGZ3fP-2Hf43fB7EwbCujs6KFz8ZPW8o5La1mUtzGLuU_vP7TvBr8DQAA__9ad1me).
## Firefighters Save 2-Year-Old from Texas Blaze
Volunteer firefighters in Granbury, Texas, rescued [2-year-old Liam from a severe apartment fire](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJyE0LFuhDAQBNCvMZ0RXhsMhYs0dJc2JdqDNTgxGJnVcZevj4iUOs00Iz2N5uM23DDEsM3vuJLzsx_YpwEqMFIpqephz-nYaeTBFJPzREC6IKesVrYCa3SxOA-dNeTv3TSCgVbXmtBSY7umwbatsAjuApVSNVTQ1VBOox6N9Y2FsW1bpYSpaAqccvmZwsYL-fhKD8rlmNYiuoV5P4R-E9AL6M_zLL9Ofl6lgP6iBfRK_cWWMi-S6YmH9CGTD_PClA954IMkyBdhlilOEnfMvNLG8h7xmwT0RXbTfoYYw9FYYap5xRB_R_A_3zwc_AQAAP__AStoXA) early Sunday morning. His mother woke to the sound of breaking glass as flames consumed their balcony. She escaped with her 4-year-old but couldn't reach Liam due to thick smoke. Firefighters arrived quickly, using a ladder to reach the window where Liam was trapped. They pulled him to safety, and he was airlifted to a hospital with carbon monoxide poisoning. Now recovered, Liam has been reunited with his family. His mom thanked the firefighters for their swift action, crediting them with saving her son's life. Watch [the rescue video here](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJyEz01uwyAQQOHTwC4WM2BjFiy6sZRFIlVq1Z-NhfFg0-Jg2SRVbl-1F8gB3pO-t1N_cjHFy3R2C9kwhb6E3KNAdQA4QN2vW95X8qVXfLSBCElysqAlaIFaST7bViIMRrTknXaqcY0clDEGhgC-JuN5tH9DAKhRoKmxGr30SodGo2_bFoApQWMseau-cryUmUK65xttlc8LT3YuZd2ZfGLYMezu-Vqu1UAMu_Mrvh9fjt-fH898s-P6E1OKe6OZEtPiYvrvywPWzeJvAAAA__8MgFEG).
## Lindsey Vonn Returns to Skiing at 40
American skier Lindsey Vonn is making a [remarkable comeback at age 40](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJyEkLGOtCAURp8GOwxccPAvKP7Gbrbd0ihc9O4iGCBj5u037gts9yVfck5yPp_zc6FIaftYDrRhC3MLeQYBmkvJ5TCfJdcTXZt1521ABFQdWmmUNAKMVt1ug8AVFx_MuIIWYlEjBO316lap3CqGjuwNlFIOIODfAL13ymkTHgbcOI5SMi3QU8ul_8qU2o4hvvMLS-_y0UW7t3ZWpv4zmBhM13X1bq0Jr3r_DKZ7MpgiJV_xzV85JY7JV16wUcEDU-M5vo-THHf7cpyUE6_fRGljMHXF-vOiGKk-DNNiOxaKv-b2R5CXhZ8AAAD__6Q1aFU), six years after her last competitive race and following a career plagued by injuries. The three-time Olympic medalist has endured two ACL tears, an MCL tear, a meniscus injury, multiple broken bones--including her wrist and several fingers--and a partial knee replacement in April. Despite it all, Vonn said, _" Getting back to skiing without pain has been an incredible journey." _Watch [this compilation of her Olympic wins](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJyEz8tqhDAUxvGnSXYjOSe3cZFFobizq0KXkuaiKdFYzSjTpy_2Bbr9PvjB_6MfeptyWsY3OwcTxzjUWAZkKG4AN5DDupV9Da4OgnoTQ8DAaTCgOWiGWnA6GdRSKoWSKe-ZboEz24J3rZat5Yp5mswFAoBEhq3ExjvuhI5Ko7vf7wBEsOBTLVvzVdJSpxDzsxxha1yZaTZTretO-AvBjmB3nmfzLI_6-AzXfy22uonw7iD81Wqrf9Qyf7_3dDN-PVPOaVeaCDbONuU_sv5Tehj8DQAA___PZlb2).
| Flying together with our sponsor [](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJyE0DGOszAQBeDTmA7kGRsGChe_FKXL325pOXgMXmFAxslmb78iB9htR59G772Pm725uMR1-u8SmzAFW8JmUaKuAWpo7Z63Y-exWF15E5iRVcUGSAFJJK2q2XgagHXooL0rd5cefEAKA7Su57bXsormfAgALUocWmz8qEZNoSMc-74HEFqyj2XLzecW1zJzWL63J-dm3FK1mLmU_RDqn8CrwGtcn3yUJrF_1fl1kvOuro-S7LE98shCXXzKJ1jc6uM67W5igd0pEvv4SEJddpfLyvmY4w69rDUo-24ssCurS3z8YiwQEalBk6QqG79_xWWJR0dCyym5uLyDlz_2fBr8CQAA__-yTXil) **Protect Your Food and the Planet** Pesticides are supposed to protect your food from bugs. It's Friday, and that means your weekly dose of good news is here with The Feel Good Flyover! Today we're reporting on Daisy, an AI-generated "grandmother" who keeps scammers on the phone for hours, sweetly asking about her digital cat photos while secretly protecting real seniors from fraud. Finally, a technology we can all root for! Did someone forward this to you? Keep The Feel Good Flyover coming to your inbox by . We're sponsored this afternoon by our friends at . Check out their investment opportunity below. | AI Granny Turns Tables on Phone Scammers A British internet provider has unleashed whose sole mission is to keep scammers tangled in endless conversation so they have less time to target real victims. Trained on real scammer scripts, Daisy plays the part of a , frustrating fraudsters with gems like, " I can see a lot of options on the screen, what do you want me to type, dear?" and " It's showing me the picture of my cat Fluffy." With many people itching to get back at scammers, Daisy might just be the passive-aggressive hero we didn't know we needed. . Firefighters Save 2-Year-Old from Texas Blaze Volunteer firefighters in Granbury, Texas, rescued early Sunday morning. His mother woke to the sound of breaking glass as flames consumed their balcony. She escaped with her 4-year-old but couldn't reach Liam due to thick smoke. Firefighters arrived quickly, using a ladder to reach the window where Liam was trapped. They pulled him to safety, and he was airlifted to a hospital with carbon monoxide poisoning. Now recovered, Liam has been reunited with his family. His mom thanked the firefighters for their swift action, crediting them with saving her son's life. Watch . Lindsey Vonn Returns to Skiing at 40 American skier Lindsey Vonn is making a , six years after her last competitive race and following a career plagued by injuries. The three-time Olympic medalist has endured two ACL tears, an MCL tear, a meniscus injury, multiple broken bones--including her wrist and several fingers--and a partial knee replacement in April. Despite it all, Vonn said, " Getting back to skiing without pain has been an incredible journey." Sign on to OPPOSE the nomination of Venmo Matt for Attorney General!](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/u001.qUXRBnqZ7T8nxbpAcIVwoUsWLkUMWlo_0JmZttSlm38grSogR0BbsRmic-VyT2h81wzdQ6ylk-Nj1OeWVt_yEkAAnoLwVWvyW1uTwb41BShiATQ4Zn1vqE0hpfw4pd67kqfP2JpCUVbHHbWOK3dSNo2C-ZVgKw2DC5SIWYDTZPAhK6zlFOWqoNo8DOEdepMHdwNIjE_KGs-iF4JFpxkzHxWmg0AC8Eb4UVJit6egeXyE1L_cPcZEq-ip-_H3LQ49hic-gwsGI4zpf0bgXlh1-kjYOP6_XTerpEHudxBZFJG4MOaDi95OiqeNBhE5BeYH8DVI4W-RCtcPlzOMJiEf89g9tns1V1VSkENVM8NFGn7xs2PJG3n1_juEfGKq3Ucgbc-L4z_O4pzj2_Ws4bhbXwW7XQ6X1VebEq8KIa_KPhyrJMWqKcXEdgO80jidl-Ldjmbu6zgbD82qEbNci96e4xSGP4dS5GLHCxWtHZzzTQKFoUwIq6MIo8Zc6YIpJCzB8rLJjIt1KgSPTfBWvScz9dHBpfkuN61EA134UohdqVQ/4bh/pLmGLXmZSDKHdsnEYRTb_g/h1/h001.VW6_btnhjeqt41Py0NU8ZvxMEXKFchsn-f4RmL-jDHo)**
* * *
In a move that defies reason and threatens the very foundation of justice in our nation, adjudicated rapist Donald Trump has nominated alleged child sex trafficker, Trump bootlicker, and blatant misogynist Rep. name: Diane Sare
subject: Tonight's Symposium at 8 pm -- Schiller, Beethoven and Revolutionary Times
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Sare for Senate
body:
| | [](https://www.sareforsenate.com/?e=bd1d687cdeff164927fc1e159dca3e71&utm_source=sareforsenate&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=symposium_november_15th&n=1)
---
Friend -- Tonight we will discuss _why_ the work of German "Poet of Freedom" Friedrich Schiller and the music of Ludwig van Beethoven should inform the spirit of the day, as they informed the revolutionary spirit of 1989. The defeat of British stooge Kamala Harris creates the potential to rethink all of the axioms underlying the current world order and to create something more worthy of the dignity of man. Joining me tonight will be Schiller scholar, Leni Rubinstein, and Schiller Institute Vice President, John Sigerson. Then on December 7-8, the Schiller Institute will hold an on-line conference entitled: [ "In the Spirit of Schiller and Beethoven: All Men Become Brethren!"](https://www.sareforsenate.com/r?u=rWeo0T8catXg17FnJdKclV9S3tTFY-VoHf27ektZr9SGxFdgo0OnnTETew-BsvtVjTRMH9NxWgqNi_CB2y-nnQ&e=bd1d687cdeff164927fc1e159dca3e71&utm_source=sareforsenate&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=symposium_november_15th&n=2)

clean_body: | | Friend -- Tonight we will discuss why the work of German "Poet of Freedom" Friedrich Schiller and the music of Ludwig van Beethoven should inform the spirit of the day, as they informed the revolutionary spirit of 1989. The defeat of British stooge Kamala Harris creates the potential to rethink all of the axioms underlying the current world order and to create something more worthy of the dignity of man. Joining me tonight will be Schiller scholar, Leni Rubinstein, and Schiller Institute Vice President, John Sigerson. Then on December 7-8, the Schiller Institute will hold an on-line conference entitled: .\--Diane Sare | "DONATE" * | | | | | ---|---|---|---|---|--- | Paid for by Sare for Senate

name: Gene Karpinski, LCV
subject: [ Time Sensitive ] Protect public lands. Safeguard air and water. Confirm more judges. We need to move quickly before Trump takes office:
body:
To view this mail in a browser, copy https://links.messages.lcv.org/servlet/MailView?ms=MTE3NzAyMjgS1&r=NjA3MDU0MTAzNTc3S0&j=MjEwMDIzMDA2MgS2&mt=1&rt=0 into your browser.
Peter — with many of us still reeling from the results of the election,
I truly hope you are finding some ways to take care of yourself this week. We’re reaching out because there is a short, but important, window where there
is still an opportunity to advance important protections for the environment and
our democracy: The EPA needs to keep protecting clean air safeguards. If it acts quickly, Trump won’t be able to immediately block the rules.President Biden can protect public lands, including designating new national monuments.The U.S. Senate needs to confirm as many pro-environment, pro-democracy judges as possible, before Trump takes office. This work is INCREDIBLY important and time-sensitive— and we’re mobilizing our supporters and elected allies to make sure it happens
NOW. We’re counting on people like you — people who care about our environment
and our climate — to have our back. Please, secure your annual LCV membership today. Every new annual member who joins will help ensure that our teams have what they need to advocate, organize, and press elected leaders to protect our environment from Donald Trump’s pro-polluter agenda. https://links.messages.lcv. RENEW YOUR MEMBERSHIP >> https://links.messages.lcv.org/els/v2/~ We know what a second Trump administration will bring: free rein for polluters,
worsening climate change, and massive giveaways of public lands to corporate polluters. What we do right now— before Inauguration Day in January — will influence how much we can limit
Trump’s damage on day one. People like you and me have the power to slow, weaken, or even disrupt Trump’s
extreme Project 2025 agenda, but only if we act TOGETHER. It’s going to be hard
work — it will take a collective and sustained effort to stop Trump from
eliminating the National Weather Service, gutting environmental agencies,
removing protections for our air and water, and handing over our parks and
monuments to drilling and mining. LCV and our state affiliates have stood up to Trump before — and won — but only by building a powerful movement ready to fiercely defend bedrock
environmental protections, Peter. I know it’s been a grueling election season, but the environment needs our help today — so we’re asking: Secure your annual LCV membership right now. By locking in your support today, you’ll play a key role in protecting our environment, climate, and democracy from Trump’s dirty and corrupt agenda. https://links.messages.lcv.org/els/v2/j9y2f0- This isn’t the email I want to be sending, Peter. But I’m grateful to
have you by our side at this critical moment for our future. I hope you’ll join
us in the important fights ahead. Onward, Gene Karpinski
President
League of Conservation Voters This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. If this isn't the best email address at which to reach you,update your contact information https://www.pages08.net/leagueofconservationvoters/forms/ContactInformation?spMailingID=11770228&spUserID=NjA3MDU0MTAzNTc3S0&spJobID=MjEwMDIzMDA2MgS2&spReportId=MjEwMDIzMDA2MgS2.Click here to unsubscribe https://www.pages08.net/leagueofconservationvoters/forms/Unsubscribe?spMailingID=11770228&spUserID=NjA3MDU0MTAzNTc3S0&spJobID=MjEwMDIzMDA2MgS2&spReportId=MjEwMDIzMDA2MgS2 from our supporter list.Send us any comments, criticisms, or feedback here mailto:feedback@lcv.org?subject=, or just reply to this email! Thanks for your support.

740 15th St NW, Suite 700
Washington, DC 20005
202-785-8683 DONATE https://links.messages.lcv.org/els/v2/Ap9dcpmZ82S~

Our fight for the future doesn’t stop. [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/97158533/512470628/497247908?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDYvMS84NzIyMyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjNWI1NmMwYi05NGEzLWVmMTEtODhkMC02MDQ1YmRkNjJkYjYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=LzgvTShnb5JdOsfswhoZ7r-G9G_tDICdHEOXHIk8VPo=&emci=042b5102-73a3-ef11-88d0-6045bdd62db6&emdi=c5b56c0b-94a3-ef11-88d0-6045bdd62db6&ceid=31337995) | Peter, It’s been a tough couple of days for the future of progress everywhere across our country, including here in Pennsylvania. However, there are bright spots. Democrats retained our State House majority by one seat. Alongside my Democratic colleagues, I assure you that we will not only work as a counterbalance to the MAGA faction of the GOP, but we will continue to work diligently to defend and expand our freedoms, from reproductive care to funding our schools, and so much more. While the dust is still settling, it’s clear that our fight for our future has never been more important. At the federal level, we did not see the results we wanted, but here in Pennsylvania, we are still on the ground, fighting every day for our communities and to create a better future for everyone. We begin to rebuild now, Peter. With your help, I’ll continue to drive forward policies in Harrisburg that work for all Pennsylvanians. In 2025, the Virginia Governor’s race will be the first political test for Donald Trump’s second term — and Abigail is ready to take on that challenge.

Abigail’s leadership stands in stark contrast to Trump’s brand of politics. She’s fought for affordable healthcare, economic opportunities, and commonsense policies that protect our community and our democracy. Her track record shows that she has the courage to stand up for what’s right — even when it’s not the easy path.

While Trump doubles down on extreme, divisive policies, this election could decide whether we continue to move forward or regress to the politics of fear and division.

**Together, we can send a message that Trump’s politics of hate and division are not welcome here — and that leadership rooted in empathy and common sense will win here in Virginia. clean_body: In 2025, the Virginia Governor’s race will be the first political test for Donald Trump’s second term — and Abigail is ready to take on that challenge. | Peter, have you seen this? = In 2025, the Virginia Governor’s race will be the first political test for Donald Trump’s second term — and Abigail is ready to take on that challenge. Abigail’s leadership stands in stark contrast to Trump’s brand of politics. She’s fought for affordable healthcare, economic opportunities, and commonsense policies that protect our community and our democracy. Her track record shows that she has the courage to stand up for what’s right — even when it’s not the easy path. While Trump doubles down on extreme, divisive policies, this election could decide whether we continue to move forward or regress to the politics of fear and division. Together, we can send a message that Trump’s politics of hate and division are not welcome here — and that leadership rooted in empathy and common sense will win here in Virginia. But we need your help | = | = | = | = | = Thank you, Spanberger for Governor Team * | | Paid for by Spanberger for Governor Spanberger for Governor P.O. body:

| | | Friend, Election Day may be in the books, _but my race isn 't done yet._

_**[I'm neck and neck with my radical opponent, and ballots are still being counted as I send you this message.](http://links.itsourgreatamerica.com/u/click?_t=442fb7cf105f4725a8bda0b6bcffc1bd&_m=17e23e167d0c4c5abe32fea731ba932a&_e=yyeacbxwc-NsA28m27GyzEjl2pIzIwJbZFIdipj9PqAhoFgz_wqgJYfJDFIDi-R_lDthG9_2x_WHprDmeRckrooG1bwK5IpNM8EZ7UbnXwOj3uSXHBX7TH0e-m1Zf-tGLKkdmCVYYzQbJqDo-1VVAAjGsZS_rlhR1DHvswJxiGy5lDUkJvsCJz9wEQjdRnbwdzLPR5KN7AaXWcJwlrVFsFJecHGjtwMuHtNzejGf1J6QyHfcC3zwwR-KeR_dXZC36xM4-OXzKnYUQjnxb5t1wRt5FSHXweaZV8cAovDnZw9gB-tW8gYivQP6-xugKrceR9Uq-kBRd_dWEDokrEj953R3ZO9JLMfRbzDMdkglIjCapK5hUFhcY6qVLfCb3CiJXctFl2USlkI_K7K3Rxc8al8bRyTykdLrpZEKeaI38DQ%3D "I’m neck and neck with my radical opponent, and ballots are still being counted as I send you this message.")**_

name: Dan Crenshaw
subject: I need your advice...
body:
https://secure.winred.com/crenshawforcongress/2025-legislative-priorities-survey

Peter,

As I’m sure you’ve probably seen by now, we were successful in defending our Republican House majority!

With President Trump in the White House and Republican majorities in the House and Senate, the real work to repair the damage inflicted by the Biden administration begins now.

And I’m hoping that YOU will help shape our agenda by telling me what issues are most important to you and your family.

Whether it is securing our southern border, unleashing American energy, or repairing our broken economy, many issues will be top priorities when the new Congress is sworn in.

[So as we are putting our agenda together for the 119th Congress, please take my Legislative Priorities Survey and let me know what issues you believe are most important to you and your loved ones.](https://secure.winred.com/crenshawforcongress/2025-legislative-priorities-survey)

https://secure.winred.com/crenshawforcongress/2025-legislative-priorities-survey

[LEGISLATIVE PRIORITIES SURVEY >>](https://secure.winred.com/crenshawforcongress/2025-legislative-priorities-survey)

We’ve got a lot of work ahead of us if we are going to fix all of the damage that has been done over the past 4 years.

But I know if we work together we can accomplish anything. Even:

- Reining in inflation
- Securing our southern border and finishing the wall
- Ending the toxic woke agenda
- Unleashing American energy
- Bringing jobs back to American soil
- Renewing the Trump Tax Cuts
These are just a few of the many items we are prioritizing.

And with you helping shape the agenda, we are sure to bring prosperity back to America and get our country back on the right track.

[So please make sure your voice is heard and take my Legislative Priorities Survey and let me know what issues you believe are most important to you and your loved ones.](https://secure.winred.com/crenshawforcongress/2025-legislative-priorities-survey)

In Service,

https://secure.winred.com/crenshawforcongress/2025-legislative-priorities-survey

Dan Crenshaw

No longer want to receive these emails? [Unsubscribe](https://manage.kmail-lists.com/subscriptions/unsubscribe?a=S4BaSF&c=01J1QTVQWPYECZHVSD48W6BZXF&k=d7a252b5a9aa2f11f013663142d1414b&m=01JCRSWQAAC4S4TAX7VEECSGFQ&r=3ui9snxK).
Team Crenshaw 5900 Memorial Drive Suite 215 Houston, Texas 77007

body:
| | |

| |
---
| | _**The Results of Your Hard Work!**_
---
Friends, This past election was a testament to the power of teamwork and grassroots support. Together, we achieved incredible victories, and it’s all thanks to you—our dedicated volunteers, county parties, and Republican organizations across Indiana. Your tireless efforts, from knocking on doors to sharing our vision for Indiana, made a significant impact.

The numbers speak for themselves! Be sure to check below, where we’ve included a graph that highlights the incredible reach of your hard work—calls made, doors knocked, and voters engaged. These metrics prove just how vital your contributions were in ensuring our candidates’ success.

As we celebrate these victories, we also look ahead with optimism. Mike Braun has announced the leadership of his Transition Council, bringing together a talented team of individuals who will play a critical role in shaping Indiana’s future. Their experience and vision will help ensure a seamless transition and continued progress for our state.

Together, we’ve built a foundation for success, and as we prepare for the work to come, I couldn’t be more excited for the future of Indiana. Thank you all for what you do!
---
| |
---
| | Chairman Randy Head

|

|
---
| |

**Governor-elect Mike Braun Announces Transition Council Leadership**
---
Governor-elect Mike Braun has unveiled key issue areas and leadership teams that will be part of the transition process. These councils are chaired by experts and are comprised of experienced members that will help Governor-elect Braun lead the charge in 2025. Governor-elect Mike Braun emphasizes government efficiency as well as executive to executive relationships. See our summary of these councils below or read them in full [HERE](http://links.email.in-gop.com/u/click?_t=9a0b7d408bc44ce9bb6828c91a267dbf&_m=4233e9c4c6a6424f8e5ece39d629e5a3&_e=UosWwPPkoLOyJ0O0Fh_vA62j9bH6qYr7v6za1jcKyWXoBZITzgkoa66rTh3hN2f7RQ9ejfdfp9VPG3NPoKtzPaBMsJMnok2xFFwBK8b4ao9gNBet6lxKmlXPjs5dXTIvXr3JrEGBgKqidllMynqfKIR_xxAWvQ3YdcXQQ8hfpYBe7jh0O_aLFcPr2bygqT7XWBhK6TjHkJazBzxEuzdDk6X89jkY_TNCiYeBdeWA_pwCxnYMtQHv_dnnxkhFNPmLkdiyN4J6DYOtdpl4LMULUGui5HCpZsBawWDy8MwcQHzntxzbYlOdIc3D-tYPDpazviEqQj_pcc0tdLmgpt0GyiRqoVoHj3LxyxbGK_NyM72ji6wPgOd7g_6ak2D9eQSnw_tc3a4mLwmyNMp-WKdNCHJHHWGg3mxgN3PZ78l94wlajwV-0JlXtgGp8AZuA7x43zB5zfh8aQ-MroRxNnphXrgoflSDvf_k6XrFbVMnyL6XySuJ2aw-j1JijAhoQ5qnTBK7xYWuSFNqm-wVwoTxxboVXUkmoAgWplGJPlrOBL5_VsA8Imt5umdEFAT4XqxyVz-fP_Utt6CJQ7uHIbRTFxj7ZWhprj8iXtsQD7vvdarCiE8-tFs8IssArHKb1_A7k_AWDf5Xani3M2ZEKJZ7DGe906TFZULEvjWO4-vwCfF0iPlnVX6pqrxegAY2oGXCVNfhNQRPTfILc9Ke-xORRNOQuscmnHpx4pLLIm_KcBU%3D "http://links.email.in-gop.com/u/click?_t=9a0b7d408bc44ce9bb6828c91a267dbf&_m=4m5w0XZp2FvuNNj8bIouau4glv8ruWDFn&_e=pKKNwVu5Hf_L-PPWmjLm-KfZiAbS3Seb2EabZzJm7s0D4opBgjkyIMd8XJlnjflXEhXQUauYgb7uNYYHjA9MIRtgkxay-2B_WZ-8YyF7UvHivFC9uC97htaBzMRBVGLp_nLSMhAJuNstO8Wy0a7Grr9WhNKGxQALHMVl6B1edgsva0A-nHbyRfnhOazToPBgyS9nLUXcg_-zkHQc2N_sVuphd3UBUl3VIIFuoMXTeqLd16AAGkwqa_XPx7pKnhKd-NAC2-V8sLX09ZPrFrkQ9G_EXQvqglBI9HCLODTPQauUf1NchKDpxW-mn6EDpHTb"). What to know:
---
* **Key Issues**
* Agencies or policy areas of focus include Management and Budget, Business Affairs, Commerce, Energy and Natural Resources, Health and Family services, Public Safety, Transportation and Infrastructure, and Education.

* **Government Efficiency and Management**
* Throughout his campaign, Mike Braun focused on ensuring Indiana's government is efficient and does not waste Hoosier tax dollars. This will be a focus for the transition council on Government Efficiency and Management, similar to the federal Department of Government Efficiency.

* **Executive-to-Executive Relationships**
* Mike Braun has also made it a top priority that local governments have an explicit seat at the table and have the opportunity to share their perspective. That is why he has made sure from the get-go they are part of the team and able to do exactly that.

---
Governor-elect Mike Braun’s transition team sets the stage for an exciting new chapter in Indiana. This highlights a bold vision for our future rooted in efficiency, collaboration, and innovation. This approach is about more than building on success—it’s about charting new territory and taking Indiana to places it has never been before. There’s every reason to be excited about the future we’re creating together. To learn more click [HERE](http://links.email.in-gop.com/u/click?_t=9a0b7d408bc44ce9bb6828c91a267dbf&_m=4233e9c4c6a6424f8e5ece39d629e5a3&_e=UosWwPPkoLOyJ0O0Fh_vA62j9bH6qYr7v6za1jcKyWXoBZITzgkoa66rTh3hN2f7RQ9ejfdfp9VPG3NPoKtzPaBMsJMnok2xFFwBK8b4ao9gNBet6lxKmlXPjs5dXTIvXr3JrEGBgKqidllMynqfKIR_xxAWvQ3YdcXQQ8hfpYBe7jh0O_aLFcPr2bygqT7XWBhK6TjHkJazBzxEuzdDk6X89jkY_TNCiYeBdeWA_pwCxnYMtQHv_dnnxkhFNPmLkdiyN4J6DYOtdpl4LMULUGui5HCpZsBawWDy8MwcQHzntxzbYlOdIc3D-tYPDpazviEqQj_pcc0tdLmgpt0GyiRqoVoHj3LxyxbGK_NyM72ji6wPgOd7g_6ak2D9eQSnmPn5yVvhdEeQywLpFzwkF85iX8ATvBOLv7XPm1gZgDbuDzY4m3R_ysV1QowAeS01V8R3H9fKyy7dbiohY4NDzdyzoQpv_5GeHHKdciifq5F7-WZBLWLvHf_PMvnjp1hFoUkLOv7MMFL4PouycP6Sm3YW5dcgw-HQheIJ6yRiRtGoeVTt8-gwiX21ojk5G9svp4fpY5p4ITOVRobbVzXF9OstdkDJmOFvLmK3BTgAE5-UmMrFDENjP4XoRBiFF1Elhg0j1F-hrbWfNtJYpRextjXaB3uHCuQqsNanaL5EwqvXNIEXVXGPtHHj2eh4o-2173OLvuHnaFOVhOWhBMCIImpw6iaVQuHUOVPIqj0MCPA%3D "http://links.email.in-gop.com/u/click?_t=9a0b7d408bc44ce9bb6828c91a267dbf&_m=4m5w0XZp2FvuNNj8bIouau4glv8ruWDFn&_e=pKKNwVu5Hf_L-PPWmjLm-KfZiAbS3Seb2EabZzJm7s0D4opBgjkyIMd8XJlnjflXEhXQUauYgb7uNYYHjA9MIRtgkxay-2B_WZ-8YyF7UvHivFC9uC97htaBzMRBVGLp_nLSMhAJuNstO8Wy0a7Grr9WhNKGxQALHMVl6B1edgulHujOoduheg0o5QSvItdM4Wi1MxegkYiHy6gfUA9gSXSPZhWs7dJpSX5u4ujQbH_vEYJseVBpCXTCcvKLjk9aZKeLBWjvGPu63JipBSrO1OFhFgp30hKgJAMbv03xsRZsz5l9e8Fqf1FqJ6XfN2mY").

**What Dedication Achieves!**
---
For months, we called on you to help spread the Republican message, and wow, did you deliver! Your hard work and tireless dedication were nothing short of incredible, and we cannot thank you enough for everything you’ve done.

The impact of our grassroots efforts cannot be overstated. You showed up, rolled up your sleeves, and made a difference—whether knocking on doors, making calls, or rallying your communities. Below, you’ll see a chart that tells the story of your outstanding efforts. It’s a powerful reminder of just how critical each and every one of you was in driving this campaign to victory!

Thank you for being the heart and soul of our movement!

clean_body: | | | | | | | The Results of Your Hard Work! Friends, This past election was a testament to the power of teamwork and grassroots support. Together, we achieved incredible victories, and it’s all thanks to you—our dedicated volunteers, county parties, and Republican organizations across Indiana. Your tireless efforts, from knocking on doors to sharing our vision for Indiana, made a significant impact. The numbers speak for themselves! Be sure to check below, where we’ve included a graph that highlights the incredible reach of your hard work—calls made, doors knocked, and voters engaged. These metrics prove just how vital your contributions were in ensuring our candidates’ success. As we celebrate these victories, we also look ahead with optimism. Mike Braun has announced the leadership of his Transition Council, bringing together a talented team of individuals who will play a critical role in shaping Indiana’s future. Their experience and vision will help ensure a seamless transition and continued progress for our state. Together, we’ve built a foundation for success, and as we prepare for the work to come, I couldn’t be more excited for the future of Indiana. Thank you all for what you do! | | | | Chairman Randy Head | | | | | | Governor-Elect Mike Braun Announced Transition Councils and Spoke at Jasper's Veterans Day Program Governor-elect Mike Braun the formation of Transition Councils, and their appointed leadership. What's he saying : "To build an effective government that serves all Hoosier residents, we need the best minds and most experienced leaders at the table...” Follow the link below to read about our formation of Transition Councils, along with their appointed leadership and members." \- Governor-elect. Braun said via . Governor-elect Mike Braun to Jasper High School for their 2024 Veterans Day ceremony. What's he saying : "Honored to be back at Jasper High School for their 2024 Veterans Day ceremony. As a proud Jasper graduate, it was moving to see students, staff, and community members come together to recognize the men and women who have served our great nation." \- Sen. Braun said via To stay up-to-date, follow Sen. Mike Braun on or | Governor-elect Mike Braun Announces Transition Council Leadership Governor-elect Mike Braun has unveiled key issue areas and leadership teams that will be part of the transition process. These councils are chaired by experts and are comprised of experienced members that will help Governor-elect Braun lead the charge in 2025. Governor-elect Mike Braun emphasizes government efficiency as well as executive to executive relationships. See our summary of these councils below or read them in full "". What to know: Key Issues Agencies or policy areas of focus include Management and Budget, Business Affairs, Commerce, Energy and Natural Resources, Health and Family services, Public Safety, Transportation and Infrastructure, and Education. Government Efficiency and Management Throughout his campaign, Mike Braun focused on ensuring Indiana's government is efficient and does not waste Hoosier tax dollars. This will be a focus for the transition council on Government Efficiency and Management, similar to the federal Department of Government Efficiency. Executive-to-Executive Relationships Mike Braun has also made it a top priority that local governments have an explicit seat at the table and have the opportunity to share their perspective. That is why he has made sure from the get-go they are part of the team and able to do exactly that. Governor-elect Mike Braun’s transition team sets the stage for an exciting new chapter in Indiana. This highlights a bold vision for our future rooted in efficiency, collaboration, and innovation. This approach is about more than building on success—it’s about charting new territory and taking Indiana to places it has never been before. name: Adam Gray
subject: All eyes on CA-13
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY ELISSA SLOTKIN FOR MICHIGAN
body:
My name is Adam Gray and I’m the Democratic nominee in California’s 13th Congressional District.
# [](https://act.elissaslotkin.org/go/188?t=1&akid=2204%2E135344%2Eyw8UMj)

My name is Adam Gray and I’m the Democratic nominee in California’s 13th Congressional District.
When I ran for this seat in 2022, our race came down to just 564 votes. It was the second-closest race in the entire country.
This year, I know that we can finish the job.
Right now, our race is _**still too close to call**_ and we know it’s going to come down to every last vote.
[**Will you split a donation between our recount fund and Elissa Sloktin today to ensure we can count every vote in CA-13 and flip this seat?**](https://act.elissaslotkin.org/go/9?c0=ebs-em-gray-nov24.IM3PTr&refcode=em241115-2-15&t=2&akid=2204%2E135344%2Eyw8UMj)
**[CONTRIBUTE](https://act.elissaslotkin.org/go/9?c0=ebs-em-gray-nov24.IM3PTr&refcode=em241115-2-15&t=3&akid=2204%2E135344%2Eyw8UMj)**
I decided to run for Congress again because the San Joaquin Valley deserves leaders who work just as hard as we do. I got into this race to finally get results for this community, just like I did for 10 years in the California State Assembly.
**I’ve been part of close races before, and we knew this year’s race would be another one.** As votes continue to be counted, I just want to say how thankful I am to have your support.
**Let’s finish the job. That means counting every single vote.**
[**This isn’t over. Please split a donation of $24 or more between our recount fund and Elissa Slotkin. In a race this close, everything counts.**](https://act.elissaslotkin.org/go/9?c0=ebs-em-gray-nov24.IM3PTr&refcode=em241115-2-15&t=4&akid=2204%2E135344%2Eyw8UMj)
_If you 've stored your info with ActBlue, we'll process your contribution instantly between Elissa Slotkin and Adam Gray:_

I’ve been part of close races before, and we knew this year’s race would be another one. As votes continue to be counted, I just want to say how thankful I am to have your support. Let’s finish the job. That means counting every single vote. If you 've stored your info with ActBlue, we'll process your contribution instantly between Elissa Slotkin and Adam Gray: | | ** | | | | | | | ** Thanks for your support and patience, Adam Gray PAID FOR BY ELISSA SLOTKIN FOR MICHIGAN P.O. Box 4145 East Lansing, MI 48826

Submit your America First Agenda Audit and let us know what you want President Trump to do on Day 1!

| | | Friend,

The American people have spoken, and they've selected President Trump and House Republicans to lead our great country.

This is a tremendous honor, and I speak for every member of our House Republican conference when I say we don't intend to squander it.

name: Justice Democrats
subject: “The message could not be more clear”
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY JUSTICE DEMOCRATS
body:
[1]Justice Democrats

Peter,

As we continue to reflect on the 2024 election results, it’s increasingly
obvious that the Democratic establishment must change course and re-focus
on people, not corporate interests and wealthy donors.

Ayman Mohyeldin of MSNBC, who read Justice Democrats’ post-election
statement on his show this week, couldn’t have said it better:

[ https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jd-em-20241115?refcode=em20241115-36152&amounts=10%2C27%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&refcode2=36152_1203867_tA0uqf&akid=36152%2E1203867%2EtA0uqf ]Tweet from Justice Democrats: “@AymanM: The message could not be more
clear—Democrats desperately need new leadership...The onus is no on
Democrats to act said @justicedems: It’s time to end the era of career
politicians and the corrupt campaign finance laws that keep them in
power...their time is up.”

The Democratic Party needs to take a long, hard look at itself if it wants
to rebuild trust with everyday people and win more elections — and that
doesn’t mean pointing the finger at progressives.

Justice Democrats like Rep. Rashida Tlaib — who’s remained a steadfast
champion of her working class constituents and continues to lead the call
for an end to Israel’s genocide in Gaza — handily won re-election,
outperforming the top of the ticket.

Though we lost Squad members Cori Bush and Jamaal Bowman in their
Democratic primaries this summer, it was only after the Democratic
establishment failed to defend them from the unprecedented $20 million in
attacks from right-wing megadonor-funded groups like AIPAC and its super
PACs.

[ https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jd-em-20241115?refcode=em20241115-36152&amounts=10%2C27%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&refcode2=36152_1203867_tA0uqf&akid=36152%2E1203867%2EtA0uqf ]Tweet from Morris Katz: A lot of the mainstream Dem voices that are
lamenting the party’s abandonment of the working class wholly abandoned
@CoriBush & @JamaalBowmanNY, two working class members, a nurse and a
school principal, when GOP billionaires targeted them.

Justice Democrats is actively recruiting everyday working Americans —
nurses, principals, union workers, and community organizers — to run for
Congress in order to transform our economy and democracy, but we can’t do
it without grassroots support from people like you.

[ https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jd-em-20241115?refcode=em20241115-36152&amounts=10%2C27%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&amount=5&refcode2=36152_1203867_tA0uqf&akid=36152%2E1203867%2EtA0uqf ]Please, if you can, pitch in $5 or more to fuel our
2025-2026 Candidate Recruitment Fund so we can find and elect the next
generation of progressives to change the Democratic Party from the ground
up →

[ https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jd-em-20241115?refcode=em20241115-36152&amounts=10%2C27%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&amount=5&refcode2=36152_1203867_tA0uqf&akid=36152%2E1203867%2EtA0uqf ]Contribute $5

In solidarity,

Justice Democrats

Contribute to Justice Democrats: https://secure.actblue.com/donate/justicedemocrats?refcode=em20241115-36152-footer&t=1002&refcode2=36152_1203867_tA0uqf&akid=36152%2E1203867%2EtA0uqf

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way for us to reach you about opportunities to get involved. If you need to remove yourself from our email list, click here to unsubscribe: https://go.justicedemocrats.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=1003&akid=36152%2E1203867%2EtA0uqf

PAID FOR BY JUSTICE DEMOCRATS. Not authorized by any candidate or candidate’s committee.
Justice Democrats
1390 Columbia Ave #261
Lancaster PA 17603
Email us: us@justicedemocrats.com

name: Bob Casey
subject: Standing up for the people of Pennsylvania
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Chrissy Houlahan for Congress
body:
We need to make sure voters across the Commonwealth have their voices heard.
| | | [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/97161035/512479072/-1072566757?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDIvMS82NDkxMyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzNGQ2MjJmNi05Y2EzLWVmMTEtODhkMC02MDQ1YmRkNjJkYjYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=wli7aQgAHv8bKUcNgvOO1PR_cy7ypRbX47TI794imeM=&emci=dbe541e3-72a3-ef11-88d0-6045bdd62db6&emdi=34d622f6-9ca3-ef11-88d0-6045bdd62db6&ceid=21278485)

Derek, my priority has always been standing up for the people of Pennsylvania.
Across our Commonwealth, close to 7 million people cast their votes in a free and fair election. Our county election officials will finish counting those votes, just like they do in every election.
We need to make sure voters across the Commonwealth have their voices heard. The American democratic process was born in Pennsylvania, and that process must and will play out.
**[I’m here to tell you that the process is _not_ done, and this race is _not_ over. Can you fund our fight to have all voices heard by splitting a donation of $5 or more between myself and Chrissy Houlahan right now?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/97161037/512479074/832108024?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk1080-bu-nd&recurring=&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDIvMS82NDkxMyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzNGQ2MjJmNi05Y2EzLWVmMTEtODhkMC02MDQ1YmRkNjJkYjYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=wli7aQgAHv8bKUcNgvOO1PR_cy7ypRbX47TI794imeM=)**

name: Blue House
subject: Thousands of votes left to count
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the New Democrat Coalition Action Fund
body:
First few lines

| Friend, we need your help.

As of now, there’s still thousands of votes to be counted in some of the most competitive House districts across the country.

We must ensure each and every one of these ballots are counted so we can elect representatives that believe in protecting reproductive freedoms, democracy, and Medicare.

That’s why we are contacting voters to help make sure that rejected ballots are fixed and submitted and sending our staff to these six battleground districts to monitor vote counting.

**But, friend, this work is expensive and we’re running out of time and money.**[**Will you chip in a split donation to New Dems and our team to help our team on the ground fight until every last vote is counted and support these battleground districts? Every donation will go to helping our teams and building up a blue firewall to combat Trump. »**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/97161093/512479223/-109078215?amount=10&amounts=5,10,25,50,100,250,500&refcode=NDCAF_20241115_EMSPL_E1_T0_AC&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS84Mjc1NSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzOWQ2MjJmNi05Y2EzLWVmMTEtODhkMC02MDQ1YmRkNjJkYjYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Z1iVDkRc8aUTdKuVC09HZkSLgAylhTSe2pvieGCFcvE=) If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your split donation between Adam Gray, Derek Tran, and New Dems will go through immediately: | [CONTRIBUTE $10 »](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/97161094/512479226/-109078215?amount=10&amounts=5,10,25,50,100,250,500&express_lane=true&refcode=NDCAF_20241115_EMSPL_E1_T0_AC&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS84Mjc1NSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzOWQ2MjJmNi05Y2EzLWVmMTEtODhkMC02MDQ1YmRkNjJkYjYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Z1iVDkRc8aUTdKuVC09HZkSLgAylhTSe2pvieGCFcvE=)

clean_body: First few lines | Friend, we need your help. As of now, there’s still thousands of votes to be counted in some of the most competitive House districts across the country. We must ensure each and every one of these ballots are counted so we can elect representatives that believe in protecting reproductive freedoms, democracy, and Medicare. That’s why we are contacting voters to help make sure that rejected ballots are fixed and submitted and sending our staff to these six battleground districts to monitor vote counting. But, friend, this work is expensive and we’re running out of time and money.= If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your split donation between Adam Gray, Derek Tran, and New Dems will go through immediately: | = = = = = House Democratic Caucus | | Paid for by the New Democrat Coalition Action Fund www.newdemactionfund.com Not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee. 910 17th St NW Suite 1050, Washington, DC 20006 In 2022, NewDems flipped more competitive seats from red-to-blue than any other ideological caucus. name: Economy Watch (via NextGen America)
subject: $6 for eggs vs. $650 billion in corporate tax cuts
body:
Make it make sense.
| [](https://click.everyaction.com/k/97161517/512480519/240436357?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9UU00vVFNNTkcvMS81NjE1OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmM2EyNjBhYy05ZGEzLWVmMTEtODhkMC02MDQ1YmRkNjJkYjYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=2m30eKHpGufq44srxO-Em3YbUrlHQp0_lVfeuUKR7Yk=&emci=24eacebf-92a3-ef11-88d0-6045bdd62db6&emdi=f3a260ac-9da3-ef11-88d0-6045bdd62db6&ceid=6787172)
