NextGen’s President, Cristina Tzintzún Ramirez, is saying what we all are feeling, team: **This economy isn’t working for us.**
Whether you’re shopping for groceries or trying to rent an apartment, _everything_ is more expensive.
**But somehow, the federal minimum wage has sat at $7.25 for _years_.** And while some states have increased their minimum wage, millions of people are still clocking in and out of work every day for an hourly wage that just isn’t cutting it.
Here’s a bit of perspective for you: _Wherever you are in the country, a four-pack of Bounty paper towels probably costs more than the federal minimum wage._
Meanwhile, corporations are reaping the benefits of billion-dollar tax cuts.
It isn’t right.
It isn’t fair.
And we’re going to do something about it.
[Our labor is worth more than $7.25, and it’s past time for Congress to recognize that. If you’re ready to fight for change, add your name RIGHT NOW and demand that Congress raise the minimum wage.](https://click.everyaction.com/k/97161519/512480521/-2034232568?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9UU00vVFNNTkcvMS81NjE1OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmM2EyNjBhYy05ZGEzLWVmMTEtODhkMC02MDQ1YmRkNjJkYjYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=2m30eKHpGufq44srxO-Em3YbUrlHQp0_lVfeuUKR7Yk=&emci=24eacebf-92a3-ef11-88d0-6045bdd62db6&emdi=f3a260ac-9da3-ef11-88d0-6045bdd62db6&ceid=6787172)
| [Add your name →](https://click.everyaction.com/k/97161520/512480522/338420427?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9UU00vVFNNTkcvMS81NjE1OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmM2EyNjBhYy05ZGEzLWVmMTEtODhkMC02MDQ1YmRkNjJkYjYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=2m30eKHpGufq44srxO-Em3YbUrlHQp0_lVfeuUKR7Yk=&emci=24eacebf-92a3-ef11-88d0-6045bdd62db6&emdi=f3a260ac-9da3-ef11-88d0-6045bdd62db6&ceid=6787172)

name: Derrick
subject: I didn’t pick dpwillis67@gmail.com out of a hat – I meant to email YOU, Peter!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Van Orden for Congress
body:
We MUST fix the damage the radical Left has done to our country! We’ve fought too hard and for too long to let this moment slip from our grasp.
I know these emails, texts, phone calls, and letters can get annoying, but I promise you that this is crucial for our mission. Let me explain:

Well, Friend, I can assure you that I know "%%Emailc%%" belongs to you and I meant to contact YOU! Now, we MUST fix the damage the radical Left has done to our country! We've fought too hard and for too long to let this moment slip from our grasp. body:
|
# [](https://act.adamschiff.com/go/61?t=1&akid=8191%2E5257348%2ESUgOmV)
Derek, we wanted to make sure you saw this:
[](https://act.adamschiff.com/go/1014?c0=nov2024_abs_em.7WX_lH&refcode=AU_ABS_FR_GEN_RES_AC90_20241115_PM1_V1_S1&t=4&akid=8191%2E5257348%2ESUgOmV)
**Elon Musk, the wealthiest person in the world and one of Trump’s top advisors, attacked Adam on social media this week.**
If Musk, who owns X (formerly Twitter) and has the ear of Trump, is going after Adam now — simply for voicing his disapproval of a Cabinet selection — _imagine the extent to which Trump, Musk, and their MAGA allies will go after him for holding them accountable._
**Derek, we need to make sure Adam has the resources to fight back against efforts to silence him when he is calling out the unfitness for office of Trump nominees like Matt Gaetz.[Please rush in a contribution to make sure Adam can stand up to the MAGA movement — and the richest man in the world — that is eager to go after him.](https://act.adamschiff.com/go/1014?c0=nov2024_abs_em.7WX_lH&refcode=AU_ABS_FR_GEN_RES_AC90_20241115_PM1_V1_S1&email=&t=5&akid=8191%2E5257348%2ESUgOmV)**

#### Here is a preview of TONIGHT....
# **Steve Bannon urges Trump to rip apart the FBI and return Mark Milley to active duty so he can face court martial**
**[Donald Trump](https://substack.com/redirect/5b3fac07-3125-41bd-877c-85c1f3e5612e?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)** 's former strategist **[Steve Bannon](https://substack.com/redirect/583ef0b9-8ef3-49cc-bdc4-1711d485939d?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)** says former Joint Chiefs of Staff Gen. Mark Milley should be returned to uniform on the first day of the new administration so he can be court martialed.
Bannon, who was recently released from federal prison, laid out his priorities for the next Trump **[White House](https://substack.com/redirect/c11e8594-1c4b-4100-b10c-7e2cf79678cc?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)** and said he had been in close contact with his former boss, advising him on appointments.
The populist provocateur spoke to former Trump Press Secretary Sean Spicer in an interview that will be released **[at 6pm on Friday](https://substack.com/redirect/5e3e8083-9f5c-4224-9ece-011a180804bb?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)**.
https://www.dailymail.co.uk/news/article-14088253/steve-bannon-trump-sean-spicer-milley.html
## **Sunday night at 7pm - Political Job Chat**
Sunday night my co-host from the Morning Meeting, Dan Turentine, will join me as we take your questions about breaking into politics, Capitol Hill, campaigns, or even the Trump Administration. If you know someone who might have questions or just want to watch please let them to join my YouTube channel Sunday night at 7pm
## **[Thursday night at Mar A Lago](https://substack.com/redirect/24f48650-e7cb-4ffb-bb53-2d4c3284da30?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)**
I posted a ton of photos and videos on my instagram account @seanmspicer if you want to see some behind the scenes but it - like everything else these days - it was sureal. Sly Stallone, Elon, Vivek - several nominess, and of course President Trump dancing to the YMCA.
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/d820886e-b9ff-4f70-a3a7-64b15170ade4?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|

# **Advice for the next White House press secretary (from a former press secretary)**
When [Donald Trump ](https://substack.com/redirect/993ceb1b-8794-4d55-a461-c9384304c14e?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)is sworn in on Jan. 20 as our 47th president, with him will come the 36th White House press secretary. It is one of the most challenging jobs in the country, but also one of the most rewarding.
Because no day is ever the same, and there is no playbook for the job, I have a few tips for the next press secretary.
https://thehill.com/opinion/campaign/4987060-advice-for-the-next-white-house-press-secretary-from-a-former-press-secretary/
## Tuesday night LIVE NYC
We are doing the first LIVE edition of the Morning Meeting. You can watch it at 5pm on my YouTube Channel or come see us in NYC in person. Go to 2way.tv for tickets The normal show will air at 6pm right after
## Buckle Up Baby
I said it after election night and probably 100 times since -- if you were shocked by President Trump's win or any of his cabinet picks, buckle up baby. He comes back to office four years wiser and focused like a laser beam .
The common thread we see in these picks is the type of people he wants to surround himself with. We all know that famous saying, fool me once shame on you, fool me twice shame on me. When he won the first time he was new to politics and assumed that the people who wanted to come. Into his Administration did so for the right reasons -- to advance his agenda not their own. He learned quickly many people did not seek to advance his agenda. In fact, many opposed it. The consequences (hi Robert Muller) of not having appointees willing to fight the Left and their colleagues of the media was consuming ...

name: History Facts
subject: Did medieval people bathe?
body:
A common misconception exists regarding medieval people: that they were always dirty and paid little attention to personal hygiene. [](https://track.historyfacts.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=sn0k4r&__onlt=h&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com)
---
---
# [Were Medieval People Always Dirty? ](https://track.historyfacts.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=sn0k4r&__onlt=h&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com)
### [World History](https://track.historyfacts.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=sn0k4r&__onlt=h&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com)
[](https://track.historyfacts.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=sn0k4r&__onlt=h&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com)
| A common misconception exists regarding medieval people: that they were always dirty and paid little attention to personal hygiene. This stereotype is particularly prevalent in regard to the peasantry, who are often portrayed in popular culture as thoroughly unclean and rife with all manner of parasites, plagues, and putridity. But were the Middle Ages really so dirty?

clean_body: A common misconception exists regarding medieval people: that they were always dirty and paid little attention to personal hygiene. | A common misconception exists regarding medieval people: that they were always dirty and paid little attention to personal hygiene. This stereotype is particularly prevalent in regard to the peasantry, who are often portrayed in popular culture as thoroughly unclean and rife with all manner of parasites, plagues, and putridity. But were the Middle Ages really so dirty? | Advertisement | More on Middle Ages | | | | ---|---|---|--- | | | | ---|---|---|--- | | | | ---|---|---|--- Recommended Reading | | | ---|---|--- | | | ---|---|--- Advertisement | | | | ---|--- | ---|--- A daily digest of history's most fascinating happenings. | Want to unsubscribe? | | ---|---|--- | | | | | | | | | ---|---|---|---|---|---|---|---|--- Copyright © 2024 History Facts. name: Hoosiers for Haggard
subject: On the Road Again!
body:
| | | | | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/bb81271fd32c/on-the-road-again?e=72dace1453)
---
|
---
| | | | |
---
|
# Back on the Road!
---
| After what was a great and eventful election week last week, I was back on the road making sure I could continue to meet with voters who discussed the importance and need to pass more common-sense conservative legislation. A few nights ago, I met with a group of freedom-loving patriots in Lafayette who relayed to me with new leadership comes new needs to pass legislation that protects them from government overreach.
---
|
---
| I also had the unique opportunity to speak at the annual DARE breakfast with members of the law enforcement community. I think it is imperative that we continue to support and foster stronger relationships with those who serve and protect our communities and I applaud their efforts in continued community outreach.
---
|
---
| To round out the week, I was beyond honored to talk to some of the local students in Mooresville and talk about my job as a legislator and also break out the jet one last time for the season!
---
|
---
|
---
| Finally make sure to follow me on social media and check out our website as we roll out more pictures and announcements.
---

name: Vasquez HQ
subject: How we can strengthen our Democratic coalition
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Gabe Vasquez for Congress
body:
It’s going to take all of us to fight back against MAGA extremism with the strength needed to defend our democracy.

Gabe Vasquez won the most competitive Democratic seat in Congress in 2022. He's running to be a champion for working families and build an economy that benefits everyone. If you’d like to unsubscribe, [click here.](https://secure.ngpvan.com/p/lNYIdkhPikOBrh6RGc-KWg2?unsubscribedata=EbZLnqwwV2hjQjl8FA2pgW1%2BRd3%2F5puKzqpjGvJkQShAsI09trvJ86ob3mM7UT08DuXTdvcUVFq16bJyQAxsYh76m%2FyF5SDM6TxJbrGf2wrnBE2FqIHm1bs4vmEunSnStIDNFIwfgmEYKoQxmpWksFlPQayWbPDrbmhQk00ajO2uIbL0A3QrhMslP2jcfrPgsaUaRMFPxFyHWPYPVZWlvEbW6gemRKCzBLoRauUhcq%2B0%2FVjoavPHx4iohAZBXA8r0noExbnrRIqmdUTyd2blI1U9xBpFu%2FksSusRNs58bQr3LsnKg7qZfQ8LdcSZ%2FsUwHLE6McgZH2KfX3j2tdSBEgKWmE3FLWm%2BlpE5TmCKMPc1kKeTV1tCiWdq5q%2B8mSUn%2B1JihcIKL254m2y1S1JqydqhjJV9wAq4%2F%2FNoxFJp7vA%3D)
---
| |
---
We’re all still reeling from the results of Election Day. But thanks to your support, Gabe Vasquez will be fighting for New Mexicans in Congress for another term — and we need to focus on how we can prepare for what lies ahead. Right now, strengthening our Democratic coalition is of the utmost importance. It’s going to take all of us to fight back against MAGA extremism with the strength needed to defend our democracy. [So, please take a moment to fill out this brief survey — we still need 5 responses from 18326. Your input is critical as we prepare for what’s to come under a second Trump presidency →](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/97162375/512483117/1482932901?source=SBD_GV_EM_EN_111524_1_1_ISSUESSURVEY&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85MzAxMSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlNTg0NDY4Zi1hMmEzLWVmMTEtODhkMC02MDQ1YmRkNjJkYjYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=M4ZjveCZGSE-gU-bpbfIsgJ9P-GyWueqJiuTj5WCWts=&emci=eeafbfcf-a1a3-ef11-88d0-6045bdd62db6&emdi=e584468f-a2a3-ef11-88d0-6045bdd62db6&ceid=4482565) | We still need [5] responses from 18326. ---
Throughout his time in Congress, Gabe has traveled thousands of miles to every corner of our district, listening to the needs of his constituents and delivering results for them.
He is committed to working with all members of Congress to bring down costs, create good-paying jobs, lower inflation, protect our environment, and ensure all New Mexicans have access to affordable and high-quality health care.
Gabe won’t stop until all New Mexicans have fair and meaningful opportunities to raise happy, healthy families and pass on their traditions to the next generation — **no matter what MAGA Republicans throw our way in the next two years.**
[But in order to keep fighting for you, Gabe needs to know what’s on your mind as we face the road ahead. Help us out by taking a short survey now:](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/97162379/512483121/1482932901?source=SBD_GV_EM_EN_111524_1_1_ISSUESSURVEY&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85MzAxMSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlNTg0NDY4Zi1hMmEzLWVmMTEtODhkMC02MDQ1YmRkNjJkYjYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=M4ZjveCZGSE-gU-bpbfIsgJ9P-GyWueqJiuTj5WCWts=&emci=eeafbfcf-a1a3-ef11-88d0-6045bdd62db6&emdi=e584468f-a2a3-ef11-88d0-6045bdd62db6&ceid=4482565)

Together, we flipped NM-02 in 2022. Now, Gabe is busy in Congress fighting for reproductive choice, economic opportunity, affordable healthcare, and the best interests of the people. **Gabe won the most competitive Democratic seat in Congress in 2022, and is running to be a champion for working families and build an economy that benefits everyone.**

**But, our work is not done yet, Peter: Despite our race being called by every major national and local news outlet, and vote counting nearly complete, Joe Kent still has not conceded.

Peter, I know we’ve asked a lot of you recently, and I can’t express enough how much of an impact your support has made. But if there’s anything we’ve learned this year, it’s that we can’t take anything for granted.

And if there’s anything we know about Joe Kent, it’s that he doesn’t know when to quit.

**I’m already getting back to work delivering solutions for Southwest Washington in Congress, but with Kent still on the attack, we need to make sure we can continue defending our work, and this seat.[Will you pitch in $10 or any amount you can to our Campaign Defense Fund today?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/97162541/512483608/-821625913?amount=10&refcode=MGP_EM_FR_180DO_241115_1_2&refcode2=ca0b9bec-a3a3-ef11-88d0-6045bdd62db6&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzMvMS85NTkyOCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjYTBiOWJlYy1hM2EzLWVmMTEtODhkMC02MDQ1YmRkNjJkYjYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=pwxWIQy1OwHktnyXl_cUUn7cGQ6TCVb3DLO0MVcbN_0=)**

Marie

clean_body: | | Peter – did you see this update from Marie? We’ve given our all throughout this election, but our work is not over just yet. Joe Kent is still refusing to concede, which means we need to be ready to continue defending Marie. We know that Marie is still a top target for his network of dark-money backers.= = Thanks for your ongoing support, Peter. – Team Marie Previous Message from Marie: = Peter – Thanks to the incredible support of folks like you, we secured a decisive victory in one of the most competitive races in the country this cycle. I truly couldn’t have accomplished it without you. But, our work is not done yet, Peter: Despite our race being called by every major national and local news outlet, and vote counting nearly complete, Joe Kent still has not conceded. We know that Kent and his shady backers are going to fight this as long as they can, so we need to be prepared for anything they may throw our way. = If you've stored your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will process immediately. | | = | = | = | = | = | = Peter, I know we’ve asked a lot of you recently, and I can’t express enough how much of an impact your support has made. But if there’s anything we’ve learned this year, it’s that we can’t take anything for granted. And if there’s anything we know about Joe Kent, it’s that he doesn’t know when to quit. I’m already getting back to work delivering solutions for Southwest Washington in Congress, but with Kent still on the attack, we need to make sure we can continue defending our work, and this seat.= = Thanks again – for everything. Marie | | | = | Marie Gluesenkamp Perez is a fifth-generation Washingtonian, a small business owner and a pro-choice mother. name: Truth to Power
subject: George Whitesides won!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Truth to Power PAC
body:
# [](https://act.katieporter.com/go/9?t=1&akid=39306%2E3422442%2EEa8Lbg)
Derek, did you see the news?
George Whitesides has officially won in CA-27!
Katie emailed you last Friday sharing the importance of this race, and asked the people in this movement (that’s you!) to help George clinch victory.
Early partial results had George narrowly behind his Republican opponent, but now that nearly all ballots have been counted, George is going to Washington! Thank you so much to everyone who donated to help George’s campaign make sure that every vote is counted.
This is a testament to how powerful this movement is when we work together.
Katie and Truth to Power are going to continue to fight for our country. We are going to do everything we can to support Democrats who will work for working families and stand up to Trump’s cruel policies.
Thank you for being with us,
Truth to Power

**Katie Porter started Truth to Power to support Democrats who reject corporate PAC money** and are running to protect the environment, restore the nationwide right to an abortion, and create an economy that works for working people. **[Donate ›››](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/truth-to-power-1?refcode=em20241115-39306&amounts=&t=2&refcode2=39306_3422442_Ea8Lbg&akid=39306%2E3422442%2EEa8Lbg)**
---
Paid for by Truth to Power PAC
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way we keep in touch with people like you. But, if you'd like to receive fewer emails, [**you can do so here**](https://act.katieporter.com/signup/receive-fewer-ttp-emails/). If you need to remove yourself from our email list, [click here to unsubscribe](https://act.katieporter.com/signup/ttp-unsubscribe/?t=3&akid=39306%2E3422442%2EEa8Lbg).

To contribute via check, please address to: Truth to Power PAC, PO Box 5176, Irvine, CA 92616

name: Sam Eppler
subject: grateful
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Sam Eppler for Congress
body:
We launched this campaign over a year ago when I was only 26 years old. At first, no one took us seriously. But each day, our campaign grew person by person, door by door.

| [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/97162764/512484481/-101250739?refcode=BLU_EM_SEC_2024-11-15_1&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTkvMS8xMDYxNTEiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiYTg0YTdjNjItYTVhMy1lZjExLTg4ZDAtNjA0NWJkZDYyZGI2IiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=EnzpcMatAUwNExoMFfxB7VRiudlHYfKl9yTWzzEamns=)
---
| I wanted to check in and say thank you. I know the results, both nationally and locally, were not what we had hoped for. But I wanted to take a moment to express my profound gratitude for everyone who supported this campaign.

We launched this campaign over a year ago when I was only 26 years old. At first, no one took us seriously. But each day, our campaign grew person by person, door by door.

We picked up steam and started to get major endorsements and raise more money. We stood true to our values and challenged Beth Van Duyne on her anti-choice positions.

I’m so grateful for each and every one of my supporters. I truly couldn't have done any of this without you. To everyone who voted for me, knocked on a door, made phone calls, or donated, I am eternally grateful.

While I’m not headed to Congress, I look forward to continuing to work with my community, with people from both parties, to find common-sense solutions for the families of North Texas.

So grateful,

Sam Eppler
---

* * *

name: Carrie Anne Templeton
subject: Forward Friends: Volunteer Updates
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Forward Party and not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee
body:
Party news you can use!

| | [ ](https://home.forwardparty.com/r?u=JgyyvCfQwldlSeD7KJl_Ih7269o_4hwqOhPs1_PHvgI&e=61868e7acdd36ae0ddf3e39aa8429171&utm_source=forwardparty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=forward_friends_after_the_elec&n=1)
---
Friday, November 15, 2024 | Peter\-- Here is your **Forward Friends** volunteer update. A week after the election, how is everyone feeling? I hope motivated to get involved! Forward Party now has 70 elected officials in office, working every day to gain more. What a difference having Forward minded leaders will make in the coming years. _Candidate Wins:_ Of the 18 candidates across 12 states that we text banked for, 5 won their seats and a 6th, Miles Pomeroy for State Treasurer, met the vote threshold needed for Forward to achieve party status in Utah! Your efforts helped us reach over 250,000 voters, which certainly made an impact. Congratulations to: Carolina Jewett for school board in South Carolina, Vanessa Grossl for State House in Kentucky, Bob Marshall for State House in Colorado, Kevin Shin for city council in California, and Jonathan Cooper for Justice of the Peace in Nevada. If you'd like to watch the recording of our Meet the Forwardist Part 2 that highlights a couple of these candidates, you can do so [here](https://home.forwardparty.com/r?u=c1vIqT8LaeJ1yAWpG61iLuDApR3GoVKiGNkXfeb5gps&e=61868e7acdd36ae0ddf3e39aa8429171&utm_source=forwardparty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=forward_friends_after_the_elec&n=2). _Upcoming Opportunities:_ Do you miss texting for our candidates? I sure do! Next week we will have some texting opportunities, following up with voters who responded positively to any one of our candidates, letting them know more about Forward Party. There will be a post in the slack once those campaigns are live, or you can just check in CallHub. We are working on some very exciting programming for next year, helping people get more civically engaged, and even run for office, so stay tuned! _Volunteer Spotlight:_ While any and all amount of effort spent to help our candiates is truly appreciated, we have a few volunteers who went above and beyond and I would like to name them here. Jeanne Sole sent a whopping 48,753 texts! Ben Valimont was not far behind with 36,238 texts sent. Then Wendy Petry with 14,228 and Chris Hessler with 12,933. Dawn Guendert rounded out our top 5 with 12,729. We are so impressed with everyone's hard work that we are making a special t shirt just for volunteers who texted! If you registered on Call Hub and sent any amount of texts keep an eye out for an email from me. Let me once more express my gratitude to everyone for such an amazing election season. We can't do this work without you! Carrie Anne Templeton
[https://home.forwardparty.com/](https://home.forwardparty.com/?e=61868e7acdd36ae0ddf3e39aa8429171&utm_source=forwardparty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=forward_friends_after_the_elec&n=3)

name: John Fetterman
subject: Pennsylvania is now the frontline
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY Pennsylvania Senate Victory Fund 2024
body:
Peter, I’m going to be real with you: Bob Casey needs our help right now.
His race with Connecticut Dave is still too close to call 😬 and we need your help to make sure Pennsylvanians’ voices are heard.
Bob’s team is working hard while votes are still being counted, but they need the resources to make that happen.
Pennsylvania is now the frontline for standing up to Senate Republicans 🛑 and I need Bob in the Senate with me to keep up the fight. 💪
[**So please, donate $5 or whatever you can to Bob Casey today. Let’s make sure his team has the resources they need to get the job done.**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/casey-em-20241115-6?refcode=em-20241115-6&refcode2=4858_552475_HHnqAq&akid=4858%2E552475%2EHHnqAq)

subject: Our nation’s history is unifying
body:
I’m reaching out to share something important with you...something that could expand your horizons. | _Please see a special message from our sponsor. If you would like to unsubscribe, visit this[link](http://links.liberty-pulse.com/e/encryptedUnsubscribe?_r=29bc9815846f49728b1d374165de7bf2&_s=83620c1168b9482089302e497023c86a&_t=nZPGBYWWKgandFeU0aIyzsn66bz3bk2p2QCDeDUG-NOl46GdSxxXj-eY9i5oEQnDd4rA9Z0TJOT_P8VVLKvny5HF9SKQDrqWnB1qu_R2OiCelsjRxsEZt0ygNiuSuqfI)_
---
[](http://links.liberty-pulse.com/u/click?_t=29bc9815846f49728b1d374165de7bf2&_m=83620c1168b9482089302e497023c86a&_e=VGgBK4LWa3vepf8ebFahyMmjgPoCrJHonSu6FoyZyuFjN7o3mDyvbsIlKywIHGUlAf96LZCxMGonJXiknDTURHU5f2W5QPmGQ4IELMUxCAGY_3tIgYBTOH0l_cXgVvk6w4ifRFxuEuXUIY4VJnCK1wcOqzXFsbnat-Te1Hqnp5KWgUbYGGglGi1kjjBg_s2JPG75X8Uw0V_b2EKPv7krGWn945SkAXNZtpFxsZXHkFwzbkoIWkaYi8jQqVHsskffxvVlzFtjKemfzRNLgfJFJhLtZ2k7ndIK1ksfK6JxZAt_vNYKrMhlERTyCrPITi106DXrTsUtJHrtmrQDM2VJKdJaaij7euu-FyPCEsoS6LRmqcakkDAMhmkEu5Wsja_uxxZNfhU12ZuKr2lz3qbCsbhoPsHuVggZVMMgatt2-L0%3D) Dear Fellow American, Thanks for opening my email. I hope you're having a great day so far. I'm reaching out to share something important with you...something that could expand your horizons. I'm talking about studying American history! As Hillsdale College professor Wilfred McClay explains in our online course ["The Great American Story: A Land of Hope,"](http://links.liberty-pulse.com/u/click?_t=29bc9815846f49728b1d374165de7bf2&_m=83620c1168b9482089302e497023c86a&_e=VGgBK4LWa3vepf8ebFahyMmjgPoCrJHonSu6FoyZyuFjN7o3mDyvbsIlKywIHGUlAf96LZCxMGonJXiknDTURHU5f2W5QPmGQ4IELMUxCAGY_3tIgYBTOH0l_cXgVvk6w4ifRFxuEuXUIY4VJnCK1wcOqzXFsbnat-Te1Hqnp5KWgUbYGGglGi1kjjBg_s2JPG75X8Uw0V_b2EKPv7krGWn945SkAXNZtpFxsZXHkFwzbkoIWkaYi8jQqVHsskffxvVlzFtjKemfzRNLgfJFJuSJnZiH4aoT3DvToX8euyKTzGEQ9uIYisxh3x3GYgjOPm8MB8zEgXVE1xq_adnA9ezrq5iSjR9Ef4ddVLHFw12o0jYcuiFWdMSHlVys0-QCgBMFj9U6heX5_Za91tdPgRF7ZwVoqVfwyNsEF0KIxa8%3D) studying history can broaden your perspective and help you understand different ways of living. Compare that to _The New York Times '_ "1619 Project," now a multi-part series streaming online. The "1619 Project" locates the founding of America in 1619, the year the first slave arrived on our shores, rather than in 1776, when the **Declaration of Independence declared that all men are created equal with unalienable God-given rights**. According to the "1619 Project," the key to understanding America is not freedom but slavery--and the project's main goal is to broadcast this false teaching into every home, including yours. We must counter this false and dishonest historical narrative with the truth. **That 's why we've turned our online course, ["The Great American Story: A Land of Hope,"](http://links.liberty-pulse.com/u/click?_t=29bc9815846f49728b1d374165de7bf2&_m=83620c1168b9482089302e497023c86a&_e=VGgBK4LWa3vepf8ebFahyMmjgPoCrJHonSu6FoyZyuFjN7o3mDyvbsIlKywIHGUlAf96LZCxMGonJXiknDTURHU5f2W5QPmGQ4IELMUxCAGY_3tIgYBTOH0l_cXgVvk6w4ifRFxuEuXUIY4VJnCK1wcOqzXFsbnat-Te1Hqnp5KWgUbYGGglGi1kjjBg_s2JPG75X8Uw0V_b2EKPv7krGWn945SkAXNZtpFxsZXHkFwzbkoIWkaYi8jQqVHsskffxvVlzFtjKemfzRNLgfJFJp0ICGP-KfuMGupGAG9pXN-g5CFChtODfWboe3wdwNU6lalVGuW8pd_fBM9qAqDe2beQyogWHxiHLrErtsj0Dcdp9Dnk6ozZOiM8jyFMM_oEhvJxEcspww-X2MRzVecQFUODPnNUmvkXO8eIQzi4Y8E%3D) into a DVD set, and I'd like you to have a copy.** **" The Great American Story: A Land of Hope"** presents a full, unbiased account of America's past. We produced this course to restore the kind of intelligent patriotism--especially among our young people--essential to restoring free government. You'll be excited to learn that **" The Great American Story: A Land of Hope"** is a powerful counterweight to _The New York Times '_ "1619 Project," which tells people, especially children, that America is essentially an unjust nation--the opposite of our nation's unifying principles. Today, you can claim a DVD copy of ["The Great American Story: A Land of Hope"](http://links.liberty-pulse.com/u/click?_t=29bc9815846f49728b1d374165de7bf2&_m=83620c1168b9482089302e497023c86a&_e=VGgBK4LWa3vepf8ebFahyMmjgPoCrJHonSu6FoyZyuFjN7o3mDyvbsIlKywIHGUlAf96LZCxMGonJXiknDTURHU5f2W5QPmGQ4IELMUxCAGY_3tIgYBTOH0l_cXgVvk6w4ifRFxuEuXUIY4VJnCK1wcOqzXFsbnat-Te1Hqnp5KWgUbYGGglGi1kjjBg_s2JPG75X8Uw0V_b2EKPv7krGWn945SkAXNZtpFxsZXHkFwzbkoIWkaYi8jQqVHsskffxvVlzFtjKemfzRNLgfJFJv125zMJA4mAvwzBxzXwSRQplIlOwWu2tpDu4jGwozZWtzfPOLiw4FW55Am9zfBp81hV7yMgp1guWaN8B7uXEdcFfpjLcWD85c1rcy4k11uCDf-LPaecS_lt65lijXlZGgWaRzzzeIEfJwlx4mKU-g0%3D) for your home library or give it as a gift. **Presenting real American history is the surest means of preserving liberty.** Quantities are limited, so reserve your copy today. [https://secured.hillsdale.edu/hillsdale/support-great-american-story-dvd](http://links.liberty-pulse.com/u/click?_t=29bc9815846f49728b1d374165de7bf2&_m=83620c1168b9482089302e497023c86a&_e=VGgBK4LWa3vepf8ebFahyMmjgPoCrJHonSu6FoyZyuFjN7o3mDyvbsIlKywIHGUlAf96LZCxMGonJXiknDTURHU5f2W5QPmGQ4IELMUxCAGY_3tIgYBTOH0l_cXgVvk6w4ifRFxuEuXUIY4VJnCK1wcOqzXFsbnat-Te1Hqnp5KWgUbYGGglGi1kjjBg_s2JPG75X8Uw0V_b2EKPv7krGWn945SkAXNZtpFxsZXHkFwzbkoIWkaYi8jQqVHsskffxvVlzFtjKemfzRNLgfJFJrSuyHWRYDQjGYg1MUSnFPBUiNAISaefSVPAreRHdGlMZGW_kSqExOJHZxP8dNrgqikp2pG_5X-lP4YAjJlbB_qAYh_QBrm4YtCg_VnFo-ZcwsbL_cGy5Et_xZZhLXz6YS2HlIdg14cCrThqHGFSi1c%3D) Thank you for your partnership with Hillsdale College and for supporting its mission on behalf of liberty. Warm regards, Bill Gray, '01 Vice President Institutional Advancement Hillsdale College **P.S.** Despite what _The New York Times '_ "1619 Project" says, our nation's history is unifying. That's why we've produced a full, unbiased account of America's past with **" The Great American Story: A Land of Hope,"** now available on DVD. You can receive your copy with your generous tax-deductible gift of $100 or more using this secure link: [https://secured.hillsdale.edu/hillsdale/support-great-american-story-dvd](http://links.liberty-pulse.com/u/click?_t=29bc9815846f49728b1d374165de7bf2&_m=83620c1168b9482089302e497023c86a&_e=VGgBK4LWa3vepf8ebFahyMmjgPoCrJHonSu6FoyZyuFjN7o3mDyvbsIlKywIHGUlAf96LZCxMGonJXiknDTURHU5f2W5QPmGQ4IELMUxCAGY_3tIgYBTOH0l_cXgVvk6w4ifRFxuEuXUIY4VJnCK1wcOqzXFsbnat-Te1Hqnp5KWgUbYGGglGi1kjjBg_s2JPG75X8Uw0V_b2EKPv7krGWn945SkAXNZtpFxsZXHkFwzbkoIWkaYi8jQqVHsskffxvVlzFtjKemfzRNLgfJFJjSG92iyDh7h1z9zCw1GocU7APYJ78J7zQZfhG73TZFhxwp2L91YtsjYjp30hwRevZ6zixn4moXqqX8wBMF_4HZCHVgRrVkLVfNkDbnMK8jJCyYo-YuGsmeKPAjbHmC_mKAks1BpGpG_uS_O0P2AImQ%3D) Act today because quantities are limited! Thank you so much for helping us promote intelligent patriotism--especially among younger Americans. |

name: AOC
subject: Universal frustration
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez for Congress
body:
We can channel this righteous rage.
#
Democrats, oftentimes when we lose elections, think that we lost people to Trump.
And that is true in certain circumstances, but they don’t look enough at the fact that we _also_ lost people to the couch.
**There is a universal frustration in this country**. Much of it — which I think is justified — is raging at a political establishment that centers corporate interests, billionaires, and puts their needs ahead of the needs of working Americans.
**We can channel this righteous rage**. Because there are people whose SNAP and Child Tax Credits were cut off, but they’re seeing people like Elon Musk getting tax breaks and kissing up to Donald Trump.
It doesn’t matter that Trump is lying — he’s saying, “I’m fighting for you.” Political races are not about one candidate versus another candidate. Too often it gets pigeonholed like that.
**It is a race to convince a person about who cares about you more**.
To me, the Democratic Party’s alienation of the working-class has to do with the fact that we haven’t been able to deliver on a $15 minimum wage, improved and expanded Medicare for All, etc for many different reasons.
**We _have_ to put those demands front and center. We shouldn’t be afraid to fight for what we believe in**.
[Our main project is to unite the working class in this country against a fascist agenda. Period. Help us continue the fight by make a $5 donation today.](https://act.ocasiocortez.com/go/14659?c0=aoc-email-20241115.xToM6F&refcode=em20241115-7591-P_FND_EGR_GOL&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1&akid=7591%2E2526796%2EtVygi7)
**[Contribute $5](https://act.ocasiocortez.com/go/14659?c0=aoc-email-20241115.xToM6F&refcode=em20241115-7591-P_FND_EGR_GOL&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=20&akid=7591%2E2526796%2EtVygi7)**
In solidarity,
Alexandria

_**From Team AOC:** Alexandria spoke more on the election recently on MSNBC. [You can watch Alexandria's full remarks here →](https://act.ocasiocortez.com/go/31363?refcode=em20241115-7591-P_FND_EGR_GOL&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=21&akid=7591%2E2526796%2EtVygi7)_

**[Donate](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/aoc-email-20241115?refcode=em20241115-7591-P_FND_EGR_GOL&t=22&refcode2=7591_2526796_tVygi7&akid=7591%2E2526796%2EtVygi7)** | **[Merch](https://shop.ocasiocortez.com/?utm_source=em-footer-20241115-7591-P_FND_EGR_GOL&t=23&akid=7591%2E2526796%2EtVygi7)**
---|---
[](https://www.facebook.com/OcasioCortez/?t=24&akid=7591%2E2526796%2EtVygi7) | [](https://twitter.com/AOC?t=25&akid=7591%2E2526796%2EtVygi7) | [](https://www.instagram.com/aoc/?t=26&akid=7591%2E2526796%2EtVygi7)
---|---|---
Email us: [speak@ocasiocortez.com](mailto: speak@ocasiocortez.com)
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way we keep in touch with people like you, so thank you for reading to the end. Small donors like you keep us going. To contribute via check, please address to Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez for Congress, PO Box 680080, Corona, NY 11368.

* [Update My Personal Information](https://act.ocasiocortez.com/signup/did-your-information-change/?t=27&akid=7591%2E2526796%2EtVygi7)
* [Unsubscribe](https://act.ocasiocortez.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=28&akid=7591%2E2526796%2EtVygi7)

body:

The radical Left is STILL pushing to turn Florida BLUE, and with only **5 HOURS LEFT until tonight’s deadline** , we’re only $1,150 short of our mid-month goal. Missing this goal risks giving them an opening right here in our own backyard.

name: Lucas Kunce
subject: Thank you for everything, Peter
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Lucas Kunce for Missouri
body:
[1]Lucas Kunce for U.S. Senate

Peter,

It’s been 10 days since the election and I’ve had a lot to think about.

The thing that I’ve thought about the most is how incredible and
supportive everyone was out on the campaign trail, both physical and
virtual.

I can’t count the number of people who gave us friendship bracelets and
cookies, welcomed us into their homes, donated, and thanked us for the
work we did in this race.

[1]Marilyn showing off some of our bracelets. Marilyn showing off some of
our bracelets

[2]Cookies! Cookies!

It’s true that it’s very hard for a normal person to run for office in
this country, especially if, like we did, you choose not to sell out. I
had to quit my job, live off of savings, and on the road for a couple of
years, which was a real challenge. But it never felt like a sacrifice,
because so many of you were behind us and because we stood for something
real.

I’ll send out a more thorough review of the campaign, and what we
accomplished together, soon. But here are some toplines.

[3]Independence, MO Independence, MO

[4]Festus, MO Festus, MO

Background

* We built a historic grassroots movement, with support from nearly
250,000 individual donors and Missourians in all 114 counties and the
City of St. Louis
* We received zero dollars from the national party, corporate PACs,
federal lobbyists, or Big Pharma and Big Oil executives
* Unlike recent Democratic candidates for Senate in Missouri who
received tens of millions of dollars in external support, we received
almost none
* We were outspent on TV thanks to the millions of dollars raised for
Josh Hawley by DC insiders like Senator John Cornyn, as well as
millions of dollars in attack ads from a billionaire-funded Super PAC
supporting Hawley
* Being outspent and not having the same backup that Hawley got meant we
had to target our spending to just four of Missouri’s ten media
markets, largely on TV and digital — the need to both get our message
out and defend ourselves on air in those four media markets made it
impossible to afford things like a proper mail program or rural radio.
Our goal was to produce a strong number of ticket-splitting voters in
the exurban counties around Kansas City and St. Louis, as well as
parts of central and southern Missouri

[ https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/84314?t=1001&akid=8675%2E614464%2EmpsLeo ]Screengrab of TV ad titled 'Protect' This was one of our longest
running ads. It highlighted my family struggling through bankruptcy, how
our community took care of us, and how now communities like where I grew
up have been stripped for parts and left behind. It also highlighted my
commitment to rebuilding our state and restoring power and freedom to
everyday people.

[ https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/84315?t=1002&akid=8675%2E614464%2EmpsLeo ]Screengrab of TV ad titled 'Secure, Protect, Invest' This was our
closing ad of the campaign. It highlighted how my opponent was getting
rich while the rest of us struggled, and my commitment to investing in
Missourians.

Results

[7]Nationwide map of 2024 Democratic Senate Candidates vs Kamala Harris (%
Margins) from the Center for Politics

* We outperformed the margin in the presidential race and other
statewide races by roughly 5% to 10% across the board — a better
performance than many Democratic candidates for Senate around the
country this cycle. We even achieved a similar margin to several
states that received significantly more attention and financial
support
* We received roughly the same number of votes that previous competitive
Democratic statewide candidates in Missouri have gotten in the last
10-15 years — but also saw a return of the boosted GOP turnout in a
presidential cycle that we first saw in 2020, with a couple hundred
thousand more GOP voters compared to 2016
* In many targeted counties where we were able to spend to compete, like
Jefferson, Ray, and Iron, we outperformed the presidential ticket’s
margin by roughly 10% or more
* We received more votes in St. Louis City than any other statewide
candidate, and more votes in Kansas City than even the presidential
ticket
* In places where we didn’t have the resources to introduce me to
voters, like in the Hannibal media market for example, the margins in
our race were much closer to standard partisan breakdowns — comparing
those results to where we were able to advertise shows just how
effective our message was when we were able to get it out
* We thankfully still saw citizen-led initiatives to end Missouri’s
total abortion ban, raise the minimum wage, and establish paid sick
leave succeed on the statewide ballot

[8]Wentzville, MO Wentzville, MO

[9]Springfield, MO Springfield, MO

We have a lot to be proud of. When we were able to introduce my background
and ideas to people, we really over-performed. In a better year, with the
resources to compete statewide, that could change.

No matter the final result, I will always know that if votes were weighted
by enthusiasm, we would have won in a landslide. You showed up,
consistently, to give us the best fighting chance possible. I am so
grateful to everyone who dug deep, helped spread the word, and kept us in
the game.

[10]Photo of Lucas, Marilyn, and Harvey in front of a crowd of supporters
in St. Louis.

More to follow.

Thank you for everything.
Lucas

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way for us to reach you about opportunities to get involved. If you need to remove yourself from our email list, click here to unsubscribe: https://act.lucaskunce.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe?t=1003&akid=8675%2E614464%2EmpsLeo

Paid for by Lucas Kunce for Missouri.

Use of military rank, job titles, and photographs in uniform do not imply endorsement by the Department of the Navy or the Department of Defense.

I am so grateful to everyone who dug deep, helped spread the word, and kept us in the game. [10]Photo of Lucas, Marilyn, and Harvey in front of a crowd of supporters in St. Louis. More to follow. Thank you for everything. Lucas

name: Mike Pompeo
subject: Sloth is a sin.
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY CHAMPION AMERICAN VALUES
body:
We need to continue supporting Conservatives with everything we have!

| |
---
| | |
I'm writing to you today as a reminder that our work is far from over.

As Conservatives, we've enjoyed some significant victories in recent weeks, but I want to caution you that complacency threatens **our continued success.**

The Bible teaches us that sloth is a sin, and I believe that's especially true in the context of our Conservative movement. We must not become lazy and overconfident, assuming that our past victories will automatically translate into future successes.

**The truth is, that our values are still under attack from the Radical Left, and we must remain vigilant in our defense of them.**

That's why I'm urging you to stay engaged and active in the fight for our Conservative values. There are still many battles to be won, and I need your help to ensure that we emerge victorious.

---

name: Jayapal HQ
subject: Your input needed: What went wrong?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Pramila for Congress
body:
We’ve put together a short open-ended survey to get your thoughts on what Democrats need to do differently going forward.
# [](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/go/892?refcode=em20241115-4519-footer&t=1&akid=4519%2E420207%2EtP2Aon)
Peter, yesterday we sent out a short open-ended survey to get your thoughts on what went wrong in this election and what Democrats should do differently going forward.
So far the response has been incredible! We’re going to follow up with a summary of the results next week, but before we do, we want to make sure as many people as possible have a chance to respond.
[**Will you take a second to fill out our survey now? Your input will be invaluable as we chart the path forward.**](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/survey/2024-post-election-survey_2?source=em20241115-4519&akid=4519%2E420207%2EtP2Aon)
**[Take the survey](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/survey/2024-post-election-survey_2?source=em20241115-4519&akid=4519%2E420207%2EtP2Aon)**
In solidarity,
Jayapal HQ
\-------- Forwarded message --------
From: Team Pramila
Subject: [SURVEY] What went wrong?
Date: November 14, 2024
Peter, it’s obvious we have a lot of work to do to rebuild after this election.
But rather than aiming to eke out slim majorities in Congress and the electoral college, Democrats should strive to build a broad working-class coalition that can win lasting power and make real change.
That work begins now — and step one is listening to working people to learn what went wrong and how we can fix it.
**We’ve put together a short open-ended survey to get your thoughts on what Democrats need to do differently going forward.[Will you take a moment to let us know what you think?](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/survey/2024-post-election-survey_2?source=em20241115-4519&akid=4519%2E420207%2EtP2Aon)**
**[Take the survey](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/survey/2024-post-election-survey_2?source=em20241115-4519&akid=4519%2E420207%2EtP2Aon)**
Whether there’s a policy issue that you think wasn’t prioritized enough or a campaign strategy you think Democrats should adopt, we want to hear from you.
Donald Trump has a small army of billionaires on his side, including the richest man in the world, Elon Musk. **The only way we’re going to overcome their money is with a mass popular movement of everyday people across the country.**
So your input here is crucial, Peter. Don’t let this election give you an excuse to give up, however terrifying and demoralizing the results may be.
[**Take a minute to fill out our post-election survey now and help us jump-start the effort to turn things around. You’ll be surprised how fast things can change.**](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/survey/2024-post-election-survey_2?source=em20241115-4519&akid=4519%2E420207%2EtP2Aon)
In solidarity,
Team Pramila
**[Contribute](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/pj-email-footer?refcode=em20241115-4519-footer&t=2&refcode2=4519_420207_tP2Aon&akid=4519%2E420207%2EtP2Aon)**
---
[](https://www.facebook.com/pramila.jayapal) | [](https://twitter.com/pramilajayapal) | [](https://www.instagram.com/pramilajayapal/)
Email us: info@pramilaforcongress.com
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way we keep in touch with people like you, and small-dollar contributions sustain our movement for transformative change. To contribute by check, please address to Pramila for Congress, PO Box 21912, Seattle, WA 98111.
* [Receive Fewer Emails](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/signup/receive-fewer-emails/)
* [Update My Personal Information](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/signup/did-your-info-change/?t=3&akid=4519%2E420207%2EtP2Aon)
* [Unsubscribe](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=4&akid=4519%2E420207%2EtP2Aon)

Paid for by Pramila for Congress

name: Leaders We Deserve
subject: Sarah McBride won. Now we fight back.
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY LEADERS WE DESERVE, LEADERSWEDESERVE
body:
We need leaders who will stand up for what matters.
# [](https://act.leaderswedeserve.com/go/852?refcode=em20241115-1&t=1&akid=1442%2E587540%2EyGS2TA)
Peter,
Last week, Delaware voters sent Sarah McBride, a millennial champion for working families, to Congress because they knew exactly what she stands for: delivering real results.
With Republicans projected to hold a razor-thin majority in the House, Sarah's proven leadership in Congress has never been more crucial. She'll be there to stop the worst of the MAGA agenda, while fighting for the issues that matter most to young Americans: tackling the affordability crisis, expanding access to health care, confronting gun violence, and addressing the climate emergency.
This victory shows what's possible when we don't just fight back – we fight forward. In the Delaware State Senate, Sarah delivered paid family leave and expanded healthcare access. She built coalitions and got things done. That's exactly why Leaders We Deserve invested early in her campaign, mobilized supporters like you, and helped build the momentum that carried her to victory.
Sarah will bring historic representation to Congress as its first openly transgender member, along with her proven track record as a fierce advocate for progress. In a divided Congress, we need effective leaders like her who will stand up for our values and deliver real solutions.
Peter, this win proves that even in tough times, when we come together to support bold leaders, we can prevail. But we need your help to keep this momentum going. **[Will you make a $5 contribution to Leaders We Deserve to help us elect more leaders like Sarah?](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/lwd-em-20241115-1?refcode=em20241115-1442&amount=5&refcode2=1442_587540_yGS2TA&akid=1442%2E587540%2EyGS2TA)**
**[Donate $5 »](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/lwd-em-20241115-1?amount=5&refcode=em20241115-1442&refcode2=1442_587540_yGS2TA&akid=1442%2E587540%2EyGS2TA)**
The challenges ahead are real. But Sarah's victory – alongside other wins by young progressive leaders we've supported – shows that we're building power, race by race, state by state. Now more than ever, we need to keep investing in the next generation of leaders who will fight for our future.
Thank you for being in this fight,
Leaders We Deserve
* * *
**[Donate »](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/lwd-em-footer?refcode=em20241115-1&t=2&refcode2=1442_587540_yGS2TA&akid=1442%2E587540%2EyGS2TA)**

Washington, DC 20003

name: Sara Jacobs
subject: What I’m feeling…
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Sara Jacobs for Congress
body:
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/sjj-em [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/sjj-em]
Well friends, this is tough. I won my re-election campaign, and I am incredibly honored to continue representing my constituents – and at the same time, we faced some immense losses, the impacts of which will only become fully clear over time.
The day after Election Day, I spent hours talking with my team about how we’re going to spend the next two years: Where we’ll need to stand up and fight, where we can find common ground with our Republican colleagues, and how we are going to keep trying to rebuild people’s trust in government.
When I’m faced with a problem, I jump straight into problem-solving mode.
But later that night, as the results and ramifications of the election came into focus, the reality of what we’re up against really hit me . And the one thing I really wanted to do was to be with my community.
I drove to La Mesa to spend the evening with the La Mesa-Foothills Democratic Club – one of the amazing grassroots groups that has spent the last two years (and more) organizing their friends and neighbors around the values and the people we care about.
The first thing I wanted to say to them – and that I really want to say to all of you, too – is thank you . Thank you for putting your time and energy and heart in fighting for what you believe in – for kindness, for empathy, for taking care of one another.
Despite the disappointing national results, San Diego County had some big, big wins, none of which would have been possible without on-the-ground organizing.
As we move forward, even in the face of uncertainty and fear, we need to stay together – to stay in community, to not isolate ourselves or turn inward.
The truth is, there are a lot of people who voted for Donald Trump who will be hurt by his administration and his policies.
If and when that time comes, there can be no “I told you so.” There will be no gloating. That’s not who we are.
The Democratic Party will have plenty of work to do in the coming months and years – and part of that must be doing everything we can to welcome back voters who are looking for solutions. We need to show them we care, and prove that we will fight for their families and to make their lives better. Win or lose, we care about people, and we don’t want to see anyone suffer no matter who they voted for.
As we fight for a more perfect union and to make our party stronger and more accessible, I am so grateful, as ever, to have you by my side.
Warmly,
Sara
